Name: YAASS
Description:
We crafted this application because we saw something systematically wrong with the modern social media network. Essentially, modern networking and dating are broken concepts. In a society that has dozens of tools at its fingertips to connect with people, we are all still disconnected. Statistics show that there are almost 35 Million single-person households in the United States, a number that is far greater than decades ago. Young people are giving up in droves traditional, public view platforms, as they seek more privacy and authenticity in the circles. We found an existential crisis not only facing many in the US but across the globe. A crisis is exacerbated by the isolation and virtually of these new challenging times.

We created YAASS to put forth a solution to this problem. We felt that we can address the concerns to a large group of the population by giving them an intimate, private, and secure social network. Our company values honesty and integrity. We wanted to create a space where society can collaborate comfortably, with its set of tailored parameters. We believe that one’s friend, social group, or potential partner is out there. We wanted to bridge that gap.

YAASS is a first, all-inclusive, private social media experience. Users have the options to make certain parts of their profile non-visible, be selective on how professional credentials are shared, allow or not allow friends and families to make other profile suggestions, and much more!

Name: Women of Egypt Network
Description:
Women of Egypt Network (WoEgypt) is an advocacy movement whose main mission is to empower Egyptian women by bringing into focus important issues hindering their growth, and by effecting positive change.
The initiative was founded in 2016 and is reaching followers around the world, the vast majority being in Egypt. WOE believes that the road to empowerment begins with the development and strengthening of the individual’s core values and self-worth. This principle has been the guiding light of WOE since its inception and it has been incorporated into all its activities, including the publication and management of its FB page and Magazine. 

WOE has featured thousands of Egyptian women who have distinguished themselves as workers, professionals, artists, gymnasts and athletes, academics, entrepreneurs, and ordinary people who are breaking through gender barriers and societal taboos. This media exposure not only has highlighted the activities of these women; it has acted as a connectivity and networking tool for educational and business opportunities open to all who follow WOE on a daily basis. Moreover, WOE have become a credible and respected source of information and news about Egyptian women sought by printed and electronic media, international organizations and NGOs in Egypt and beyond.
WOE was also created to change the image of how the west perceives Egyptian women and to revive the memory of the amazing women of the Egyptian suffragette movement. 

Egyptian women of all ages are invited to share their stories, to inspire others who are reading them.

Name: WeAre8
Description:
Social media was originally established to connect people. But it has now fuelled unprecedented isolation and division. It has damaged democracy, exploited creators and publishers and stripped people of value.

Addictive algorithms control what people see and how people feel, forcing more ads and less friends into our feeds, so the tech giants can make even more money. This has turned humanity into the largest unconscious and unpaid workforce in human history.

Not on our watch.

WeAre8 ushers in a new era for social media, one where people, brands, communities and creators unite to change the world: 
 - No anonymity, or damaging algorithms, plus AI technology that eradicates hateful content

Name: Women's Executive Business Club
Description:
Women’s Executive Business Club (WEBC) je prostor podrške, autentičnog vodstva i zajedničkog rasta za žene i muškarce na izvršnim i liderskim pozicijama u Hrvatskoj i regiji. Okupljamo lidere i liderice, inovatore i vizionare koji svojim djelovanjem stvaraju promjenu – u poslovanju, zajednici i širem društvu.

WEBC je nastao iz želje da se stvori okruženje u kojem svi koji vjeruju u vrijednosti autentičnosti, svjesnog vodstva, međusobne podrške i pozitivnog utjecaja imaju mjesto za povezivanje i djelovanje. Naša zajednica nije utemeljena na spolu, već na vrijednostima koje nas povezuju: jednakost, razumijevanje, otvorenost prema novim idejama i hrabrost da budemo iskreni prema sebi i drugima.

U Women’s Executive Business Clubu potičemo dijeljenje znanja, razmjenu iskustava, stvaranje novih suradnji i zajedničko osnaživanje – jer vjerujemo da se najdublje promjene događaju kroz povezanost i podršku.

Bilo da si žena ili muškarac, ako živiš svoje vrijednosti, vodiš s integritetom i želiš doprinijeti razvoju svijesti, balansa i uključivosti u poslovnom svijetu – WEBC je tvoja zajednica.

Vizija:
Naša vizija je stvaranje regionalne mreže snažnih, samosvjesnih i uspješnih žena koje vode i inspiriraju promjenom na najvišim razinama poslovanja. Vjerujemo u moć zajedništva i podrške kako bismo zajedno ostvarili nevjerojatne uspjehe i premostili sve prepreke.

Misija:
Naša misija je strateški povezati i podržati žene, kao i muškarce koji podržavaju te žene na C-level i izvrsnim pozicijama kroz dijeljenje znanja, iskustava i resursa. Kroz specijalizirane evente, panel diskusije i mentorstvo, želimo ukazati na izazove s kojima se susrećemo u poslovnom i privatnom životu, te promovirati važnost balansa između ta dva svijeta.

Name: The Corporate Social Group
Description:
The Corporate Social Group is a social initiative building community among early-career professionals - including interns, graduates, and apprentices.

Through fun, inclusive, and accessible events, we create relaxed, social spaces that foster real peer-to-peer connection - bringing together young professionals across industries, cultures, and backgrounds.

We give each cohort - interns, graduates, and apprentices - their own dedicated space to connect with peers at a similar stage, helping them build confidence and community within their stream before expanding into broader, cross-group networks.

Whether it’s bowling, mini-golf, or arcade socials, our experiences are designed to encourage authentic relationships in a welcoming environment. It's also our way of reminding early-career professionals that work-life balance is not just possible - it’s necessary.

While young professionals are often encouraged to focus on vertical relationships with managers and senior colleagues, we champion the horizontal - the connections built with peers walking the same path. These are the people who understand your day-to-day, share your aspirations, and often become the foundation of your most meaningful long-term network.

So whether you're an intern stepping into the corporate world, a graduate navigating your first full-time role, or an apprentice building practical experience - we believe in your future, and in the power of community to support it.

For us, by us. 

#TheCorporateSocialGroup #SocialInitiative #InternLife #GradLife #Apprentices #WorkLifeBalance #FutureLeaders #EarlyCareers #ProfessionalCommunity

Name: Yesterday.
Description:
Chez Yesterday, nous croyons fermement que le networking est bien plus qu'une simple collecte de contacts. Nous avons créé Yesterday pour transformer la manière dont vous abordez le développement de votre réseau. Nous nous concentrons sur les rencontres pertinentes et sur la mise en lumière des synergies, des passions et des besoins professionnels.

Fonctionnalités Principales 
 Événements Impactants : Découvrez, cherchez et achetez des places pour des événements sélectionnés, conçus pour favoriser des interactions professionnelles enrichissantes.

 Clubs Engageants : Créez, recherchez, rejoignez des clubs existants ou postulez à de nouveaux clubs alignés avec vos intérêts professionnels.

 Recommandations Personnalisées : Yesterday fonctionne avec un système de recommandations basé sur les besoins des autres utilisateurs, vous permettant de découvrir des opportunités pertinentes selon vos centres d'intérêt et vos objectifs.

 Plus de Fonctionnalités à Venir : Restez à l'affût, de nombreuses fonctionnalités arrivent bientôt pour améliorer encore davantage votre expérience sur Yesterday.

Rejoignez Yesterday pour transformer vos connexions professionnelles en opportunités significatives dès aujourd'hui ! 

https://yesterday.club

Name: Forum for Offentlige Bestyrelser
Description:
Forum for Offentlige Bestyrelser formidler viden og praktiske erfaringer om offentligt bestyrelsesarbejde fra forskere, organisationer og praktikere. Vi er stedet for diskussioner og synspunkter for alle os, der er interesseret i offentligt bestyrelsesarbejde. 

Forum for Offentlige Bestyrelser støttes fagligt og økonomisk af Pluss Leadership, BDO, og Horten.

Vi samarbejder med bestyrelsesforeninger og brancheorganisationer for offentlige bestyrelser. Flere gange årligt drøfter vi bestyrelsesudfordringerne i sektorerne, så vores videnformidling matcher de aktuelle behov. Dertil stiller flere foreninger og brancheorganisationer deres analyser og anden relevant viden frit til rådighed for alle her på siden.

Forbindelsen til den teoretiske verden sikrer vi gennem fagudvalg med deltagelse af Per Nikolaj Bukh, professor, AAU; Søren Friis Møller, Ph.d. stipendiat, CBS; Steen Thomsen, professor, CBS; Rikke Søgaard Berth, advokat og partner, Horten; Søren Peter Nielsen, Stats. Aut. Rev. og partner BDO,  samt Jørgen Ulrik Jensen, partner, Pluss Leadership.

Dagens Dagsorden blev etableret i 2010 af Jørgen Ulrik Jensen fra Pluss Leadership. I 2012 indstiftede vi prisen ”Årets Offentlige Bestyrelse”, som overrækkes til årets bedste offentlige bestyrelse ved den årlige "Årets Offentlige Bestyrelseskonference".

Name: Tribela
Description:
Tribela is a membership-based social platform designed for intentional connection.

We exist in the space between doomscrolling and digital detox. It is for people who do not want to quit social media but want a healthier relationship with it.

Tribela offers the good parts of social media. Real connection, creative discovery, and meaningful community without the chaos, performance pressure, or endless scroll. The experience is calm by design, with customizable feeds, clear stopping points, and a slower, more human pace.

Our membership model aligns incentives with users, not attention extraction. Creators are supported directly, quality matters more than virality, and brand partnerships are thoughtful rather than disruptive.

Built for people who are digitally fluent but intentionally selective, Tribela is social media designed for this moment. Connection that fits into real life, not one that competes with it.

Akran öğrenimini de içeren komitelerimizde öğrencilerimizi finans dünyasına en iyi şekilde hazırlamak için vaka analizleri, sektörel projeler, şirketler ve mezunlarımızla birebir networking fırsatları sunmayı amaçlamaktayız.

Üyelerimiz, alanında uzman insanlar ve akademisyenlerle çalışarak finansal analizden bankacılığa, girişimcilikten veri bilimine, denetimden yatırıma farklı disiplinlerde kendilerini geliştirirler. 

Kulübümüz, öğrenci üyelerimizin sektöre en hazır ve donanımlı bireyler olarak adım atmasını sağlarken, iş dünyasıyla doğal etkileşimler kurmalarına da olanak tanır.

Name: Platform Achterhoek Food
Description:
Platform Achterhoek Food steunt de enthousiaste beweging in de regio naar duurzamer en gezond voedsel, bij voorkeur uit de eigen regio. We willen bereiken dat iedereen weet welke mooie voedselproducten er worden gemaakt in de Achterhoek en waar te koop. Van boerderijwinkel, restaurant tot supermarkt en speciaalzaak, niet alleen in de Achterhoek maar ook daarbuiten. Waarom wijn en kaas uit Frankrijk halen als ook Achterhoekse boeren prachtige prijswinnende wijnen en kazen maken? Meer groente en fruit zijn gezond, maar haal het dan bij een regionale teler of uit een boomgaard in je eigen buurt! Achterhoek Food vestigt de aandacht op de hardwerkende vakmensen die achter ons voedsel zitten én op het belang van gezond voedsel voor ons allen. Boeren en consumenten werken hierbij samen, scholder an scholder. Want samen bepalen we met onze vork hoe de Achterhoek en de wereld eruitzien. De slogan van Achterhoek Food is dan ook ‘Duurzaam, gezond en als het ff kan uit eigen grond….’

Achterhoek Food is ontstaan vanuit LEADER, het EU-programma voor plattelandsontwikkeling, en steunde alle succesvolle foodprojecten in de periode 2015 – 2022. Voor de LEADER periode 2024 tot en met 2027 heeft platform Achterhoek Food meer een eigen gezicht gekregen, maar is nog steeds onderdeel van LEADER en vormt het aanspreekpunt voor de inwoners die gebruik willen maken van ondersteuning van LEADER Achterhoek.

Name: Network Effect
Description:

In ons netwerk werken alle partners samen om deze uitdaging aan te pakken.

Met ervaringsdeskundigen die de werkelijkheid van leven in armoede kennen en dus weten wat helpt. En met betrokken professionals die allemaal hun eigen expertise meebrengen.
De Alliantie van Kracht wil meer grip op het voorkomen, verminderen en verzachten van de gevolgen van overerfbare armoede in de Groningse en Drentse Veenkoloniën.

Bij het netwerk zijn veel samenwerkingspartners aangesloten.

Description:
Mayıs 2020 - 2021 yılları arası Beta ve geliştirme aşaması. Üretim sürümü Ocak 2021 yılında yayına alınmıştır.

Getpad. Kendi fikrinin yazarı ol!
Dünyanın en sevilen blog makale yazarları ile okuyucuları buluşturan sosyal ağ platformunu keşfedin. Getpad içerik gücüyle 70 ülkeden okuyucu ve yazardan oluşan küresel topluluğu birbirine bağlar. Kendi fikirlerinizi özgürce yazmaya başlamak için hemen indirin.

Blog Makale  Ve Düşünce Yazın Keşfedilsin
Kendi fikirlerini özgürce ifade mi etmek istiyorsun? Getpad’de topluluğun ve teknolojinin gücüyle keşfedilmesini sağlayabilirsin. Özgün fikirlerini, Getpad’de ve yazma yolculuğun boyunca seni cesaretlendirmek için orada bulunan kullanıcılarımız ile paylaş.

Blog Makale Ve Düşünce Oku
Binlerce kullanıcı tarafından hazırlanmış içerikleri okuyabilirsin. Bir blog  veya düşünce okuma bağımlısı mısın? Beğendiğin içerikleri kütüphanene kaydedip tabletinde, Android, Huawei veya iPhone’ununda olsan bile senkronize ederek kaldığın yerden devam edebilirsin. 

Düşünce Yaz
Blog yazıları yazmak sana göre değil mi? Üzülme! Getpad’de anlık olarak düşünceni binlerce kullanıcıya paylaşabilirsin. Farklı paylaşımlar üzerinden tartışmaya katılabilirsin. 

Diğer Kullanıcılar İletişime Geç
Getpad’e üye olduğunda yazmayı okumayı severler topluluğunun bir parçası olursun. Diğer okuyucu ve yazarlar ile iletişime geçebilir iş birlikleri kurabilir veya yorumlar alanında tartışmaya katılabilirsin. 

info@getpadapp.com

- female identifying

active female angel, VC or family office / LP investor globally (no school affiliation needed)

Introducing the groundbreaking Feminist Collective of Romani Gender Experts!  Transcending borders and breaking barriers, we are a vibrant, transnational assembly of professionals, each a shining beacon in fields ranging from policy-making to education, human rights advocacy to community organizing, and beyond.

Our mission is nothing short of transformative:

 Safe Spaces: We provide a nurturing haven for Roma women gender equality professionals, fostering solidarity and strengthening bonds of understanding and support.

 Professional Growth: Through dynamic capacity-building trainings and workshops, we empower our members to soar to new heights, both personally and professionally.

 Intersectional Advocacy: With razor-sharp focus, we illuminate the intersectional struggles faced by Roma women and girls, championing their rights and amplifying their voices from a deeply rooted feminist perspective.

 Bridging Divides: We are architects of connection, building sturdy bridges between Roma gender equality professionals and the myriad institutions hungry for their expertise, be it in the realms of human rights, gender equality, civil society, or beyond.

In our collective, diversity is not just celebrated; it's our greatest strength. Together, we stand as a force to be reckoned with, carving out spaces of empowerment and progress in a world hungry for change.

And behind every endeavor, our collective heartbeat pulses with the passion and dedication of the feminist Romani gender experts who fuel our movement forward. Join us in shaping a future where equality knows no bounds!

Since March 2022, Unidas has been under the patronage of German Foreign Minister, Annalena Baerbock.

The Unidas Network is part of the German Federal Foreign Office’s Initiative for Latin America and the Caribbean. Unidas' goal is the equal participation of women in politics, society, culture, media, science, and the economy. To this end, Unidas connects and strengthens women and women’s movements in Latin America, the Caribbean, and Germany in their commitment to equality and women’s rights. Through its close ties with Germany’s Federal Foreign Office, Unidas also contributes to Germany’s feminist foreign policy

 EuVibe creates a safe, ethical, and inclusive space for European users to express themselves, collaborate, and grow. Our USP lies in building a sovereign, pan-European platform powered by European infrastructure, aligned with EU values and accessible in multiple languages. Aligned with the EU AI Act, the European declaration on Digital Rights and Principles, and European Commission Next Generation Internet (NGI) initiative.
 Building a European social platform today, you must harness the qualities of real-time relevance, influencer/community onboarding, and viral design—while focusing on trust, identity, and EU values. EuVibe is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to reclaim Europe’s digital space, empower citizens, and build a platform that reflects the continent’s values, diversity, and ambition. Built by and for Europeans, it stands as a digital infrastructure of unity, creativity, and sovereignty. The company will be set up to ensure permanent EU control, avoid foreign takeovers, and build public trust.

Whether you work in construction, urban planning, local government, or a related field, the Social Value Circle offers a platform for networking, learning, and contributing to meaningful societal change.

Mission:

To empower construction and built environment professionals to create and deliver social value by providing a collaborative platform that facilitates knowledge sharing, professional growth, and the development of impactful strategies.

Vision:

To become the leading community for social value professionals in the construction and built environment, ultimately influencing how social value is integrated into projects across the sector and supporting the successful implementation of social value initiatives.

Who Can Join:

You don’t need to be a social value specialist to be part of the Social Value Circle. While many of our members will be leaders in the social value space, we welcome professionals from all backgrounds who are contributing to or keen on exploring the evolving landscape of social value. Whether you're involved in construction, urban planning, or local government, Social Value Circle is open to professionals at all stages of their careers.

How to Get Involved:

Interested in joining or learning more? Reach out to us via LinkedIn to express interest. As we build our community, we are committed to shaping Social Value Circle around the needs and priorities of our members. In the spirit of collaboration, we also encourage members to share our initiatives and invite others who are interested in advancing social value.

Mobil: + 45 60 57 20 66
Mail: kontakt@forskellen.nu

Mit navn er Yacine Bessghir, og jeg agerer i min profession som socialpædagog med fokus på håndtering af komplekse problemstillinger relateret til socialt udsatte unge. Disse unge er karakteriseret ved psykosociale og emotionelle udfordringer samt en tendens til usikre tilknytningsstrategier. Udover min rolle som socialpædagog, fungerer jeg også som familiebehandler, hvor jeg arbejder forbyggende med familier, der kan være udfordret med deres børn. Mit mål er at styrke familieenheden og fremme sunde relationer mellem forældre og børn ved at implementere strategier, der styrker kommunikationen og skaber et trygt miljø for udvikling. Jeg tror på, at en holistisk tilgang, der adresserer både individuelle og familiemæssige behov, er afgørende for at skabe varige positive forandringer i livet for de mennesker, jeg arbejder sammen med.

Min tilgang til arbejdet præges af vedvarende udholdenhed og en dyb forpligtelse over for de unge, hvor jeg målrettet arbejder på at fremme selvbevidsthed og etablere rammer og strukturer, der letter den enkelte unges dagligdag. Mit overordnede mål er at bidrage til udviklingen af disse unge som aktive og ansvarsfulde samfundsborgere.

I min praksis benytter jeg mig af relevant lovgivning, herunder barnets lov, med særlig vægt på paragraferne for at sikre en holistisk tilgang til støtte og intervention.

Kinnek is a network of current and future entrepreneurs.

➤ Who are we?
We’re an international community of ~60 young entrepreneurs or aspiring entrepreneurs with roots in Spain. Membership is free but everyone is expected to be proactive and add to the community.

➤ How?
We create spaces where members connect through recurrent coffee chats, monthly calls, venture presentations and in-person events - challenging each other’s thinking and fostering internal relationships. Average time commitment is 2 hours/month.

➤ When?
Building connections before opportunities arise – playing ahead of the game. 

All members embrace four pillars:
 Driven: A strong desire to develop, own or run a business. Current or aspiring entrepreneurs and intrapreneurs that can prove their will to make things happen.
 Unique: An ability to bring rare and value-adding know-how to the table. Whether that means AI coding, financial acumen, content creation, or anything that raises eyebrows.
 Glocal: A strong personal or professional connection to Spain, yet open to the world. Most members are Spanish but we welcome others as long as they can prove their relationship with Spain.
 Engaged: A genuine commitment to the group through proactive participation and idea generation. Monthly team talks (1h) are an expectation and other involvements are recommended to remain a part of Kinnek.

All members are evaluated to ensure continual alignment with our four pillars. We maximize the value from and for all members by ensuring everyone remains active in the network.

For business opportunities or to learn more, contact us at hello@kinnekspain.com

Name: Venu: Find Things to Do
Description:
Venu is more than just an app—it's a movement to redefine how we connect in a fast-paced, digital-first world. Born out of a desire to make socializing easier and more meaningful, Venu bridges the gap between planning and spontaneity. It empowers users to discover, create, and share plans with friends or new connections, eliminating the stress and friction that often accompany organizing social activities.

What sets Venu apart is its user-centric approach and emphasis on simplifying social interactions. Unlike traditional event or group planning platforms, Venu is designed to adapt to how people actually socialize. Whether it’s a last-minute coffee meet-up, a weekend hike, or a carefully planned night out, Venu keeps the process effortless and fun.

Key features include:

-Real-Time Discovery: Explore what’s happening nearby and join activities that align with your interests.
-Seamless Planning: Create and share plans with friends in just a few taps. No endless group chats or juggling multiple apps.
-Social Integration: Venu helps you connect with people, fostering authentic relationships both online and offline.
-Venu stands out because it’s not just about logistics—it’s about making socializing feel natural again. Inspired by the challenges of social isolation during COVID-19, Venu is dedicated to helping users focus on what matters most: creating memories, building relationships, and experiencing life together.

With its intuitive interface and community-driven ethos, Venu is reshaping how we engage with our social circles and take advantage of opportunities around us. It's not just an app—it's a catalyst for connection.

KITA means "North" in Japanese. It's a symbol of how important the north direction is in the maritime industry—especially for sailors navigating or finding their way home.
If you're a young professional in the maritime industry, make sure to join our community! We're here to support and connect you as you build your career.

KITA the connector exists to empower the next generation of maritime professionals by connecting graduates to industry employers.  Our mission is to create a more diverse and inclusive maritime industry through sharing of information, motivation, mentorship, and connection to opportunities.
We believe that all people should have equal access to opportunity, and we want to close the gap between graduates and access to industry players with the potential for job opportunities in the maritime industry.

We aim to create a community of like-minded individuals who are looking for opportunities to understand and work in the marine industry.
We aim to do this by building a community based on networking events and mentorship programs.

What problems does KITA the connector seeks to solve? 
Lack of Diversity 
Sexual harassment - NO POLICIES 
Limiting women's development and side-lining them 
for opportunities 
Poor Maritime Ecosystem Awareness

Name: Meeps
Description:
Meeps est une plateforme qui permet aux organisations de diffuser leurs événements directement dans les calendriers de leurs publics.

Pour cela, elle s’appuie sur des agendas officiels suivis dans le temps, qui deviennent le point de référence durable vers lequel toutes les actions de communication convergent.

Emails, posts et notifications continuent de jouer leur rôle.
Meeps ne les remplace pas : il les enrichit et les relie.
Il agit comme une surcouche structurante, qui transforme des annonces éphémères en relation continue.

Lorsqu’une personne se relie à un agenda, elle reste connectée à une programmation dans la durée.
Chaque nouvel événement s’y inscrit naturellement, se synchronise dans son calendrier personnel (Google ou Apple), et apparaît au bon moment, sans se perdre après sa publication.
Au fil du temps, les événements s’additionnent, la relation s’installe, et l’agenda devient un repère vivant.

Côté utilisateur, Meeps devient un calendrier du temps libre personnel.
On y retrouve, au même endroit, tout ce que l’on a choisi de suivre pour ne plus rien rater de ce qui compte : programmations, centres d’intérêt, événements de ses proches, et ses propres rendez-vous.
Des sélections thématiques, composées par les équipes éditoriales de Meeps, permettent aussi de découvrir et suivre les événements qui comptent, sans avoir à chercher ni à trier en permanence.

Meeps n’est pas un média.
C’est une infrastructure d’agenda et de relation, pensée pour faire durer ce qui compte et éviter que l’essentiel ne se perde dans le flux.

Name: CensHERship
Description:
Ads rejected? Accounts banned? Content removed?

These are just some of the everyday experiences of brands, creators and medical professionals when trying to share women’s health content on social media.

And the same just isn’t happening to similar men’s health content.

CensHERship is a UK-based campaign that’s aiming to end the routine censorship of women’s health content online.

The campaign was launched in 2024 by Clio Wood, a women’s health advocate, author and founder of &Breathe, and Anna O’Sullivan, founder of FutureFemHealth.

Want to support the campaign?

- Follow this page for updates
- Complete our survey to share your experiences (using the website link below)
- Join our mailing list for updates: https://dashboard.mailerlite.com/forms/1095379/131992488171799585/share 

Your input will help us to make some livid noise about this with the platforms responsible. Not only to help ourselves and the visibility of our messaging, but also to support future generations of strong girls and women. 

We, and they, shouldn’t have to put up with this.

Built and expanded on ICTYN's footprint, SecuritHub is the world’s first social network and career development platform entirely dedicated to students, academics and professionals involved in the field of international security, counterterrorism and, more broadly, international relations. Unlike mainstream networking platforms which are often very time-consuming, lack proper approval and verification filters, and are generally too broad for niche targeting or too filled with spam messages, hidden costs and incomplete profile dilemmas, SecuritHub offers a more immediate, affordable and targeted way to connect, engage and collaborate with fellow researchers on a global scale. 

Armed with passion and driven by purpose, we are committed to assist our members in their personal and professional development by providing them with a niche community platform where they can network, share ideas and expertise, join groups, find potential co-authors, search for jobs and forge lasting business relationships, all in one place. Our membership is open to any individual with demonstrated interest in national and international security, terrorism and counter-terrorism, IR and geopolitics, regardless of age, gender, geographical location and educational background.

Name: ActsSocial - a Christian Social Media Platform
Description:
In December 2022, after morning prayer, the Holy Spirit spoke to me—clearly, powerfully, and unmistakably. The message? "Use your Christian technology company to build a new social media platform that glorifies My kingdom."

Hi. I'm Shawn Whitson, the Founder of ActsSocial, a social media platform with Christ-centered values. On that day in December of 2022, God revealed that a global Christian awakening was coming, but His people lacked a unified platform. Mainstream tech silences Christian voices, and it’s time to take back digital spaces for Christ. That’s why we built ActsSocial—a Christ-centered social platform where existing believers & new believers can connect, grow, and share faith without censorship.

But launching ActsSocial didn’t come without spiritual warfare—delays, financial strain, and constant opposition. The enemy fought hard, which only confirmed that this mission mattered. But God is in control, and nothing can stop His plan.

Now, we challenge you: Take the 40-Day Fast. Step away from secular social media and news. Immerse yourself in Christ-centered content and community on ActsSocial. Experience peace, clarity, and faith like never before.

ActsSocial is more than a platform—it’s a movement. A safe space free of bullying, foul language, and manipulation. A hub for Christian news, local Christian businesses, and churches. A place to find faith or grow deeper in it.

Join us and ask yourself—W.W.J.P.? What Would Jesus Post? Take the 40-day challenge and be part of something bigger.

We can’t wait to see you inside ActsSocial.

Name: Portland Small Business Network
Description:
The Portland Small Business Network serves the small business community of Portland, Oregon. We began as a Facebook Group that has now grown to over 15,000 Local Members and serves as a place to market and exchange ideas.

Portland Oregon Small Business Network (portlandsmallbusinessnetwork.com & facebook.com/groups/portlandsmallbiz) is a networking group dedicated to providing support and communication for all types of businesses big and small in the Portland Metro area. We are dedicated to providing information businesses to connect with resources, education, support, networking and relevant business services in the Portland metro area.

Portland Small Business Network Consulting Services specializes in Social Media, Event Planning & Implementation, Image & Branding as well as General Marketing. 

We help you create and implement Marketing & Promotional Campaigns, Social Media Management, Sales Training, Event Planning & Staffing, Content Editing and other services to help showcase your business and gain public awareness. We offer education, networking, support and community. 

Our participants have reported fantastic business connections made at our events.

Name: Fika
Description:
Fika is redefining the dating experience for those seeking meaningful connections. With over 2 million downloads in Vietnam, Fika is the #2 social and dating app, catering specifically to individuals aged 25-40 seeking long-term relationships. Fika's unique approach leverages advanced AI and billions of data points to move beyond superficial matching and facilitate genuine compatibility. Fika differs from traditional dating apps by removing profiles, swiping, and endless chats. Instead, Fika individualizes the matchmaking process and sets up real-life dates, limiting the time spent on the app and moving out to real-life connections.

Fika is currently available in Vietnam and is poised for global expansion.

Description:
Op 1SociaalDomein staan professionals op landelijk, regionaal en lokaal niveau met elkaar in verbinding over de domeinen en grenzen van hun organisatie heen. 

Het platform biedt een infrastructuur om te faciliteren dat deelnemers: 

- Kennis en ervaringen uitwisselen en verzamelen 
- Domein overstijgend samenwerken aan projecten en vraagstukken 
- Het professionele netwerk vergroten.  

Professionals en organisaties realiseren daarmee dat: 

- Een integrale aanpak mogelijk wordt 
- Domeinen onderling worden verbonden 
- Expertise vanuit diverse disciplines beschikbaar komt  

𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗹 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺:
Op een Regio platform van 1SociaalDomein werken professionals lokaal en regionaal met elkaar samen, over de organisatiegrenzen heen. Om van elkaar te leren over actuele vraagstukken wordt inhoudelijke kennis en ervaring met elkaar gedeeld.  
In besloten groepen wordt samengewerkt met partners (en burgers) in de wijk. Daar vindt o.a. multidisciplinair overleg (MDO), online deskundigheidsbevordering plaats en of wordt samengewerkt in werkgroepen aan lokale projecten.  
Gezamenlijke informatie wordt gedeeld binnen een centrale documentenbank. Het platform biedt hiervoor een beveiligde omgeving. 
 
Inmiddels maken meerdere regio's al succesvol gebruik van een regioplatform. 
Bijvoorbeeld ter bevordering van preventieakkoord, kansrijke start, gezonde regio’s, verbinding onderwijs jeugdhulp, verbinding medisch en sociaal domein.

Name: YouApp
Description:
Find and book curated hosts for real-world experiences based on shared interests, energy, and YOUAI guidance.

YouApp connects you with curated hosts for real-world experiences that match your interests and energy. Using YOUAI—our unique AI + metaphysics system—we help you discover aligned companions for activities that feel both effortless and meaningful.

Inspired by the Chinese “Tazi” (搭子) culture—finding the perfect partner for dining, exploring, or jamming—YouApp turns casual connections into memorable, purpose-driven moments.

Whether you're seeking a creative jam partner, a game buddy, or a mindful walk guide, YouApp makes real-world meetups smooth, fun, and tailored to your vibe.

Features
• YOUAI Matching: Get aligned host suggestions based on your energy and preferences.
• Curated Activities: Book experiences across diverse categories—from artsy sessions to outdoor resets.
• Real-Life Connections: Move seamlessly from in-app discovery to intentional meetups.
• Safety First: Verified identities, reviews, and clear guidelines to ensure rewarding experiences.

Why YouApp?
• Zero-Sugar Socializing: No pressure, no pretense—just real people sharing real interests.
• Intentional Living: Meet hosts who value creativity, mindfulness, and growth.
• AI-Guided Discovery: Let YOUAI nudge you toward the people and moments meant for your journey.
• Lifestyle Expansion: Explore new vibes, new friends, and new ways to live your story.

Built for:
• Urban Professionals: Connect with curated hosts efficiently, around your lifestyle.
• Hobby Enthusiasts: Whether you’re into learning, wellness, or creativity, there’s a host for you.

Name: Rural Marketing Association of India (RMAI)
Description:
Rural Marketing Association of India (RMAI) is a premier industry body devoted to furthering the cause of rural marketing. Since its inception in the year 2005, RMAI has been helping marketers plan and implement their rural marketing activities across the country.

Rural Marketing Association of India (RMAI) is a national industry body with a membership base of more than 70 companies that promotes the cause of promoting rural marketing. With 12.2% of the world’s population, rural India represents the single largest potential market and accounts for 53% of FMCGs and 59% of durables sale in India. The rural market has therefore become vital for the growth of most companies.

Dit doen we door de inclusieve samenwerking tussen ouders, jeugdigen en professionals te stimuleren en de netwerksamenwerking in de regio te versterken. Onze leden delen oplossingen en goede voorbeelden met elkaar en agenderen behoeften en knelpunten uit de praktijk bij bestuurders en beleidsmakers, om zo een brug te slaan tussen landelijke politiek en lokale praktijk.

Name: Anketa
Description:
Greetings! Welcome to our Blockchain-based Social Media Platform. We are Anketa. A revolutionary venture that is reshaping how industries gain valuable insights through polls and surveys.

As a passionate advocate for blockchain technology and its potential to revolutionize social media, we are dedicated to driving innovation and meaningful change in the digital landscape. Our platform's focus on providing unique industry insights through polls and surveys sets us apart in the ever-evolving world of social media.

At our platform, we believe in the power of decentralized networks, data privacy, and empowering users to be the architects of their digital experiences. By leveraging blockchain technology, we are creating a secure and transparent ecosystem that fosters genuine interactions, ensures data integrity, and rewards content creators for their contributions.

The impact of our platform reaches far beyond traditional social media. We are empowering industries to make informed decisions and gain deeper understanding through the data-driven insights generated by our polls and surveys. From market research to trend analysis, we are revolutionizing how businesses and professionals approach decision-making.

As a team, we are passionate, diverse, and driven by a shared vision to build a better digital future. Together, we work tirelessly to enhance user experiences, innovate new features, and ensure our platform remains at the forefront of cutting-edge technology.

Collaboration lies at the heart of our success. We thrive on fostering meaningful connections with industry leaders, like-minded innovators, and blockchain enthusiasts. If you're as excited about the potential of blockchain-based social media as we are, let's connect! Together, we can explore new opportunities and co-create a dynamic and impactful digital ecosystem.

Thank you for visiting our LinkedIn page. Stay tuned for exciting updates and engaging discussions.

Name: ScaleUp
Description:
ScaleUp is not just another ed-tech platform; it's a revolutionary social learning experience designed to make education accessible, engaging, and fun for everyone. Our platform embodies the vision that learning should be free for all, and it leverages the power of social media and collaboration to create a dynamic educational ecosystem.

We are committed to revolutionizing the way our users learn, adapting to the modern era of content consumption through social media while maintaining our core principles of delivering reliable content.

Free Access to Quality Education: Education is often seen as a privilege, but we're determined to change that. ScaleUp offers a vast variety of authentic verified content by Experts of their respective fields, all available for free. We believe that knowledge should have no price tag, and we're committed to breaking down the barriers to learning.

AI-Powered Learning Paths: We understand that every learner is unique, which is why we employ AI technology to create personalized learning paths. Whether you're a student, professional, or simply curious, ScaleUp tailors its content to match your interests and goals.

A Global Learning Community: We've created a global community of learners, educators, and experts who are passionate about making education a universal right. Join us, connect with like-minded individuals, and be part of the future of learning.

Our Vision for Tomorrow: The world is changing rapidly, and so is the way we learn. ScaleUp envisions a future where education is not confined to classrooms, where knowledge is shared freely, and where everyone has the opportunity to learn and grow. We're here to catalyze this transformation.

Join us at ScaleUp, and let's embark on a journey of knowledge, collaboration, and empowerment. Together, we can reshape the landscape of education and make learning a lifelong adventure for all. Welcome to the future of social learning. Welcome to ScaleUp.

Name: taringa!
Description:
taringa! is the digital nation made up of history, culture, users, content, technology, and talent. A nation where creative freedom flows, and where we seek to make history, as we have always done on the web.
History and culture, because since 2004, taringa! has changed the internet in many ways. We have generated iconic moments, phrases, jokes, characters, and a recognizable identity: the “taringuero,” a person who is authentic, who seeks to express themselves, and rejects the idea of being the same as everyone else.
Users and content, because we are 30 million taringueros who express ideas without fear of rejection and are always ready to defend them. We laugh and enjoy expressing ourselves.
Technology, because with our app, we provide an innovative and disruptive experience to Spanish-speaking users, where content is king and valuable connections are queen. At the same time, we took an important step into the future by starting to build our platform foundation on web 3.0, which gives us true freedom over our data and our economy, being the pioneers in giving this perspective to a social community.
Talent, because our multicultural team is made up of passionate people looking to change the world through technology, content, and meaningful connections. We want everyone to have an important place in the world, within our nation. We give them the voice they need.
We have an identity, a culture, a language, and, above all, the independence to say what we want, and to rebel when we are censored. taringa! is the nation of all those who dream of expressing themselves and all those who want their value to be recognized.

Name: RedBridge Lisbon
Description:
RedBridge is a cross-border California-Portugal entrepreneur's club founded by Jonathan Littman, Hugo Antonelo, Paulo Gaspar, Filipa Pinto de Carvalho, and Nathan Hadlock at our Palácio on Rua Vitor Cordon in Lisbon. 

We’re a diverse, highly motivated group of international innovators, founders, technologists, writers, artists, and creators who recognize the growing power of these elemental Portugal-California connections.  We recognize something remarkable is happening in Portugal. We want to help shape it.

What brings us together? Because our similarities and common bonds matter: our red bridges, seven glorious hills, whimsical cable cars, passion for wine and food, rugged coastlines, the ocean, and most of all our natural affinity and warmth for one another, and intense desire to create. These forces, and our common purpose, build trust. Bind us closer. 

RedBridge is a social club that aims to promote the highest level of entrepreneurship and innovation. In the Spring of 2022, we began hosting regular, inspiring events and leisurely dinners in Lisboa and SF to open your mind, and spark partnerships and truly remarkable projects and endeavors. We've led ten events, including Why Californians Love Portugal at Shack15.  

Portugal has become a prized tech hub and Europe’s top tourist destination. Californians are the number one group moving to Portugal. This enchanting country of just 10 million has done so many things right – including new laws recently passed to protect remote workers. The world’s 4th safest country, Portugal offers an unrivaled quality of life and was recently crowned the world’s friendliest country (Lisbon is the happiest city). With the rise of remote work and the potential to set up shop anywhere, many talented people and companies are quite simply saying why not? 

Welcome to RedBridge. 

Check out Jonathan Littman's popular story:
https://www.lamag.com/culturefiles/the-new-california-dream-is-in-portugal/

Name: Näringslivsforum i Skövde
Description:
Näringslivsforum i Skövde är Skaraborgs största företagsnätverk,som drivs i formen av en fristående förening. Visionen är att aktivt verka för ett företagsklimat i svensk toppklass som leder till fler och växande företag i Skövde.  
Vi ska, med medlemmarnas bästa i fokus, bidra till en positiv utveckling för näringslivet. Det gör vi genom att fokusera vårt arbete och våra aktiviteter kring områdena: Samhällsbyggnad, Kompetens och Medlemsnytta.

Vi har ett samarbetsavtal med Skövde kommun, är en uttalad remissinstans och för näringslivets talan i samarbeten med myndigheter, högskola och beslutsfattare i Skövde kommun. 

Vår stomme är våra nätverksträffar på olika teman för och med våra medlemsföretag med syften som inspiration, information, kompetensutveckling och såklart nätverkande. Detta genom att i största möjligaste mån nyttja konceptet ”medlem lär medlem” där vi samtidigt som vi lär känna varandra även utvecklar varandra. 
 
Som medlem vill företag och organisationer vara med och påverka Skövdes och Skaraborgs framtid samtidigt som de själva utvecklas. 

Vill du också bli en del av Skaraborgs största företagsnätverk? 
Välkommen, du fyller i dina uppgifter direkt på hemsidan.

Name: Business Women Nederland | Het grootste vrouwelijke ondernemersnetwerk van NL
Description:
Business Women Nederland (BWNL) is het grootste netwerk voor vrouwelijke ondernemers in Nederland. Onze missie is om de positie en kansen van vrouwelijke ondernemers te vergroten door middel van verbinding, zichtbaarheid en toegang tot kennis. 

We organiseren regelmatig evenementen, zoals BusinessBorrels en Business Growth Live, om gelijkgestemde ondernemers te ontmoeten en te inspireren. Ook reiken we sinds 2024 jaarlijks de #BWNL Award uit aan een vrouwelijke ondernemer die impact heeft gemaakt.

Ieder kwartaal geven we het gratis #BWNL Magazine uit, gemaakt voor en door vrouwelijke ondernemers. Daarnaast bieden we diverse memberships aan, wat betekent dat we voor iedere vrouwelijke ondernemer in Nederland een optie hebben om te werken aan een waardevol netwerk, zichtbaarheid en het opdoen van nieuwe kennis.

Name: Hirebird

Because let’s be honest: you’ve got better things to do than reformatting your resume for the hundredth time.

Sign up today, and watch the job offers come to you.

Name: Declic Inc. (500 Global, Blossom x Tiktok, Misk, Launch)
Description:
Declic is a dynamic platform designed to transform how people organize and experience social outings, meetings, and events. By connecting like-minded individuals, Declic empowers users to create shared experiences while seamlessly integrating ticketing services and event management tools. The app serves as a hub for discovering local activities, fostering connections, and engaging with communities, whether for personal enjoyment, professional networking, or small business promotion.

Leveraging AI-driven features, Declic personalizes user experiences, recommending events and activities based on preferences, location, and interests. This data-driven approach allows users to connect with others who share their passions, whether they are looking for hobby-based gatherings, professional networking events, or unique social experiences.

One of Declic’s unique strengths lies in its ability to support small businesses. The platform offers event organizers an efficient way to promote and manage their activities, while helping local businesses increase their visibility and attract a relevant audience. Whether through ticket sales or community building and branding, Declic provides businesses with the tools to reach and engage their target customers in a meaningful way.

With a focus on real-world connections, Declic fosters a sense of community and engagement. Whether you’re new to a city or a professional looking to expand your network, Declic makes it easy to find events that fit your needs and meet people who share your interests. It’s more than just an app—it’s a platform designed to bring people together, boost local businesses, and foster meaningful social interactions in an increasingly digital world.

Name: YOLLO
Description:
Tired of scrolling through old posts that already happened?

Days or weeks old, even months old. It’s not you. It’s your feed.
Posts stay alive forever, so your brain treats them as happening now.
Check the date..yep. Late!
Late to like. Late to comment. Late to repost. Late to DM.

YOLLO is a real-time social app where moments exist only while your friends are there. Friends show up to hype the post. When the hype’s gone, it disappears.

No reruns. No late likes. Only what’s happening now-just like IRL.

You see friends' lives as it happens, not when an algorithm decides.

Why YOLLO?
Exhausted from doom-scrolling, I realized my feed was full of old posts:
“Coldplay TONIGHT” from May.
“Lunch TODAY” from last week.
I reacted late. Found out late. Showed up late. It felt like stalking, not connection.

That story I watched? 23 hrs old.
That tweet I liked? 2 days old.
That TikTok I commented on? Month old.
Connection needs the present. That’s what led to YOLLO.

YOLLO-like IRL
Post what you’re doing. Vibe countdown starts.
Likes, comments & views add time (+10 secs); no hype, it fades.
Moments last while people talk like real convos.
From coffee runs to late-night chats, connection unfolds in real time.

WANT POSTS TO LAST LONGER?
Use YOLLO Minutes to hype posts in real time, even your own.

TIME NEVER WASTED
Earn Minutes by browsing, posting or inviting friends.

STAY CLOSE WITH NUDGE
A simple NUDGE keeps you connected-no streaks, no pressure, no algorithms.

FIND YOUR PEOPLE
Interest badges help you meet people who get you.

SEND MOMENTS, NOT TEXTS
Moments stay alive through likes & hype-ups. No DM pressure.

TOTAL PRIVACY 
When posts lose relevance, they vanish. No trolls, AI clutter, or old content.

MENTAL HEALTH & NOW
YOLLO brings you back to now. See posts when they matter & stay connected, not isolated.

Download the free YOLLO app & see how everyone got social wrong for so long.

YOLLO is all about the NOW. No old feeds! But, if that’s your vibe, you do you!

Name: Dispute Resolution Insights
Description: Dispute Resolution Insights is a professional hub dedicated to fostering scholarly exchange and legal dialogue. It serves as a central platform for judges, legal scholars, researchers, and practitioners to share insights, publications, case commentaries, and academic events. The hub promotes interdisciplinary legal thought and comparative jurisprudence with a strong emphasis on Arab legal systems. It also highlights emerging trends in arbitration, constitutional law, and international legal developments relevant to the region. Through networking and collaboration, the hub advances legal knowledge and professional growth within the Arab legal professional and academic community.

Name: IZW Initiative Zukunft Wirtschaft Deutschland e.V.
Description:
Die Initiative Zukunft Wirtschaft Deutschland e.V. versteht sich als bundesweite Initiative, welche sich für eine zukunftssichere Wirtschafts- und Gesellschaftspolitik engagiert und für den Erhalt des Wirtschaftsstandorts Deutschland einsetzt.

Der Mittelstand mit seinen über drei Millionen Unternehmen ist das Rückgrat der deutschen Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Allerdings leidet er unter massiv schlechteren Rahmenbedingungen, die die Zukunftsfähigkeit des Standorts Deutschland bereits ernsthaft schädigen. Deshalb hat sich Ende November 2023 die Initiative Zukunft Wirtschaft Deutschland e.V. (IZW) gegründet. Die IZW versteht sich als überparteiliche, branchenübergreifende Aktions-Plattform (www.zukunft-wirtschaft.de).

Die IZW will einen konstruktiven Dialog mit der Politik und der Bevölkerung – für eine zukunftsfähige Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft in Deutschland. Und sie will ihn JETZT!

Aufklärung über die entglittenen Rahmenbedingungen ist dabei ein entscheidender Faktor um die Öffentlichkeit besser zu informieren und den unaufschiebbaren Handlungsdruck auf die politischen Entscheider zu erhöhen. Die realen Auswirkungen der aktuellen Politik dürfen nicht länger verschwiegen oder beschönigt werden.

Name: TheWide
Description:
TheWide is the Code-Native social network built to fix the contributor crisis by rewarding IT expertise with real value.

We are the next-generation platform for developers, engineers, and IT professionals, fundamentally changing how knowledge is shared and monetized. We believe that in the age of AI, expert human contribution should be paid, not volunteered.

What Makes TheWide Unique?

- Code-Native Content: Stop sharing static screenshots! Our Posts and Shorts feature executable code snippets that run instantly, ensuring immediate knowledge transfer and reliability.

- The Sparks Economy: We democratize earnings. Users gain Sparks (convertible to cash rewards) for sharing original code, providing high-quality answers, and creating valuable content. Quality of contribution is the only metric.

- Active Collaboration: The Projects Hub allows users to showcase their work, find skilled collaborators based on verifiable skills, and receive direct community donations for their open-source initiatives.

- Community Governance: Our Idea Center ensures that the community shapes the product roadmap by voting on the next features to be developed.

TheWide is building a sustainable, rewarding, and transparent ecosystem for the modern IT professional.

Join the movement. Expertise has its rewards.

Name: Emajin Golf & Networking
Description:
Joining Emajin Golf Networking Club means you’ll be playing golf with incredible people, at some of the best golf courses in Australia. Whether you enjoy golf, or are more interested in business, learning and camaraderie – we offer something for everyone at each Emajin event. 

You’ll have the opportunity to play, build solid business relationships and enjoy stimulating talks at our events throughout the year. 

--------

The Power of Golf & Networking:

Golf presents you with a valuable, and enjoyable way to grow your business. However, traditional opportunities to play are limited. Playing in the one-off corporate golf day is not the same as playing with a group of people who you get to know, like and trust over time.  

Emajin provides golf networking in a structured way!

--------

The Benefits:

Emajin Golf is a membership-based, golf networking club. We are a community of like-minded golfers and business professionals, providing 3 key things.

- ACCESS to play at some of the best golf courses and hidden gems across Australia
- LEARN from senior executives as keynote speakers on relevant industry topics
- GROW your business network of senior business owners and c-suite executives 

Our events are exciting, innovative and fun!

With Emajin, you have a club of your own, which is designed for your professional lifestyle. 

Golf is good for business. You get to know people, develop a feel for a person’s character, make new friends and professional contacts. You get to take your business networking out of the traditional boardrooms and onto the fairways!!

--------

Nothing is better than a day of golf with your friends:
 
We are lucky to have an amazing group of members. We pride ourselves on being an extremely INclusive community, with a unique camaraderie.  

We welcome golfers of all skill levels and backgrounds, from proficient golfers to complete beginners. 

You might just discover a whole new world of professional possibilities and paths.

Come join us!

We provide the average INTERNET user the ability to discover rich and valued content across multiple delivery platforms and at the same time, our solutions promote and reward the writer of that content. Name: WINGG
Description:
WINGG (West-Vlaams Integrerend Netwerk Geestelijke Gezondheid) = een geheel van zorgaanbieders die zich binnen West-Vlaanderen richten op de geestelijke gezondheid van kinderen, jongeren en hun context.

Het netwerk bundelt – onder meer via verschillende zorgprogramma’s – de krachten om de hulpverlening voor kinderen en jongeren met een psychische kwetsbaarheid te optimaliseren. Om dit doel te bereiken wordt het bestaande residentiële en ambulante aanbod aangevuld met gespecialiseerde behandeling in de leefomgeving van de kinderen en jongeren.

Name: Black Girls in Social Work
Description:
Black Girls in Social Work (BGSW) is a support and networking organization for Black Women pursuing, studying, and working within the Social Work field. Our mission is to maintain a safe space for Black women in Social Work that promotes empowerment, networking, and their personal and professional advancement while also providing for communities in need through service. 

We were founded on August 1, 2018 by Bodequia Simon, LMSW for Black women pursuing and working within the field of Social Work. With our base being social media platforms, Facebook and Instagram, we curated a safe space for Black women within the field to network, support, and empower one another. We are an expanding organization that is branching past the cyber world and making our mark within the field and within vulnerable communities in need. With our core values being empowerment, service, and sisterhood, we will continuously work to live up to our slogan "As she moves forward, I will always have my sister's back."

Name: Konnecta People

Name: AxisStars
Description:
A secure environment created specifically for
Athletes and Pro Artists.
Centralize all quality and trusted resources in a 
Simple App to allow members
better control and tailor-made development 
The empowering community which enables Professional Athletes & Entertainers to securely & directly connect with vetted companies and all types of quality service providers such as Experts on Art, Car suppliers, Fashion brands, Agents, Lawyers or Wealth Managers and many more. 

Pro athletes and entertainers no longer need to gamble when choosing a trusted service provider.  They can review the ratings that their peers have given to a Partner for previous transactions. Ratings have been proven to bring more transparency and a better level of service in so many other industries with the introduction of platforms like Uber & Airbnb. 

On this win-win platform, Pro athletes and entertainers can network with their peers and discover new revenue generation opportunities whilst Partners can connect with new prospects and ambassadors for their brands.

Name: Kornerz Social Network
Description:
Kornerz is a Social Network, a space for thinkers, an exclusive safe haven for authentic interactions, a paid-member only for those who value depth and quality. 

Conversations and content are meticulously curated by Kornerstones like Doctor Agustina Nigro, MD, award-winning fashion model & entrepreneur Justyn Burgest-Graham, entrepreneurs Khalil Jezini, Rich Dornisch, Gabriel Faleri and many more.. They earn a revenue share of paid subscriptions on the social network.

Every "Korner" is a purpose-driven community, a world for thinkers like you. 

And here's what's waiting for you inside the app:

Each Korner acts like a distinct area within our vibrant digital gathering place, offering unique features, like:
Nooks: On demand video chats rooms, limited to 9 people per Nook.
Loops: Ongoing content and text conversations.

Name: Trueflutter
Description:
Trueflutter Inc. is a social technology platform that helps people cut through the noise to build meaningful connections. We operate three core products: Trueflutter Dating App (Africa's highest-rated dating app with 300M+ matches and 500K users), Prime Private Matchmaking (personalized matchmaking services), and VIP Connect (an exclusive networking community for African professionals).

We exist because the typical dating and networking experience is broken. Endless swiping. False starts. Compromised standards. People either give up or settle. We believe you shouldn't have to choose between maintaining high standards and actually meeting them.

Our platform combines intelligent matching technology with human-centered design to eliminate the painful trial and error most people face. We help people value themselves enough to know what they want, and give them the tools to find it without burning out in the process.

Founded with a simple belief: connection should feel intentional, not exhausting.

Name: Founders Friday
Description: Founders Friday is a monthly founder and ecosystem meetup designed to build connections and visibility for startups and their solutions, as well as visibility for other ecosystem players. It is conducted in a casual environment to increase learning opportunities, build connections, and relax after a month of hard work.

Description:
Women's Business Link is a networking group designed to inspire, enable and empower women to reach their full potential, professionally and personally. 
The WBL community is made up of women from all professions, all united by their desire to progress. 
The WBL provides a warm, supportive network  that allows its members to tap into their true passions and empowers  them to follow their own path and thrive with no constraints. Through WBL the members have access to practical business and career advice, collaboration and presentations from inspirational speakers on a variety of topics including those that encourage self-discovery. Description:
Who we are?

 | We create a roadmap and social media content in line with your brand's vision. Sociabrand is a social media agency that understands and communicates your brand accurately. We place great importance on understanding your needs, story, culture, values, and vision. This is because we know that the vision and unique values of companies standing behind products and services now influence the purchasing decisions of conscious consumers more than the products and services themselves. We prepare the most suitable content for your brand and highlight your brand's identity through social media. We enable you to communicate with your target audience, strengthen the connection, and support you in gaining loyal customers.

Why do we do this?

 | We spend a significant part of our day, almost all of it except for sleep, engaging in communication activities. Communication is one of our passions, and we view it as a dynamic process. We see it as a process where brands influence people, and people change and transform brands. Another passion of ours is science. We enthusiastically follow studies from different disciplines related to communication, striving to obtain the most accurate information. We use scientific methods to understand you and your target audience and strengthen the communication between you. The dizzying development of technology excites us, and our curiosity for modern communication technologies continues to grow. We value creativity and innovation and aim to strengthen your brand sustainably.

Our mission is both simple and powerful: to unite people, inspire collaboration, and grow communities.

We are here to build strong ties, where dialogue is at the centre and every voice counts. Name: IBA Alumni & Placement Society
Description:
The IBA Alumni and Placement Society is an amalgamation of two core functions; alumni engagement and securing work opportunities for IBA graduates.

IBA, having served as Pakistan's premier business school for over 60 years, has an alumni network more than 13000 strong, organized in different Chapters all across the globe, who support their alma mater through fundraising and lending their expertise.
The IBA Alumni and Placement Society is responsible for conducting engagement events in association with these chapters, and has recently concluded an extended series of events spanning Lahore, Islamabad, and Dubai - as well as annual alumni reunions in Karachi.

Furthermore, the society is responsible for organizing and executing the IBA Career Fair, which serves as the highlight of the spring recruitment season. The IBA Career Fair 2018, had over 80 companies, and was attended by over 3000 students.

Description:
Boussole Pro est un service de mise en relation organisé et structuré. “L’information d’aujourd’hui, les opportunités de demain.” 
Nous bâtissons un hub communautaire et un accélérateur de résilience économique, en mettant le cap sur le Hadith de la notre prophète ﷺ “L’homme le plus aimé d’Allah est celui qui est plus utile aux hommes”.

Notre mission consiste à ouvrir des portes de “kheir professionnel”.

Name: FilmmakersWorld
Description:
FilmmakersWorld is a global ecosystem dedicated to the craft of filmmaking — connecting studios, production companies, brands, and creative professionals worldwide.

With over 3 million followers across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Threads, and YouTube, plus a fast-growing digital magazine and newsletter, FilmmakersWorld has become one of the most influential voices in the industry.

We started eight years ago to fill a gap: the creative process behind filmmaking wasn’t being told with authenticity or depth online. So we built a space where storytelling, education, and digital amplification could meet — turning social platforms into a stage for creativity and craft.

We didn’t follow an existing playbook — we wrote our own.
FilmmakersWorld stands as a living bridge between creativity and culture: part media hub, part community, part movement.

Today, we continue to shape how filmmaking is seen, shared, and celebrated worldwide — driven by the belief that true quality can (and should) live beautifully on digital platforms.

Name: CosmoBuzz
Description: CosmoBuzz is a social platform where space enthusiasts and seasoned professionals can connect, network, learn and share their passion about space. Our goal is to provide a comprehensive and inclusive environment that empowers users to engage in meaningful discussions, share knowledge, and exchange ideas on a wide range of space-related topics. At the core of our values lies the belief in user empowerment, inclusivity, and knowledge transfer between our platform's users.

Name: Socials
Description:
Socials connects international students in new cities through verified, student-led WhatsApp communities.

Born from years of organising student events worldwide, Socials was created to support students before they arrive, when finding housing, trustworthy information, and their first connections matters most.

We run moderated, city-wide communities where students can:

- connect with peers early

- get local tips from experienced student ambassadors

- ask real questions in a safe, spam-free environment

- feel at home faster in a new city

Socials is active in 125+ cities, supporting students across universities, and works with trusted partners in housing, finance, and student services to add real, practical value.

Always free for students.
Always student-first.

Connecting students isn’t a feature, it’s the foundation.

Name: For Real Inc.
Description:
Step aside, swipe fatigue—the dating revolution is here, and it’s unapologetically real. ForReal is the flamethrower burning down the old order of endless swipes and curated highlight reels. It’s where you show up with your quirks, your late-night playlists, even that nervous laugh—and you’re met not with bots or filters, but with real humans ready to connect.
Every profile is ID-verified, every face is real, and every voice is heard through video profiles and live chats. The performative layer is gone; what’s left is authenticity in motion. Moderators and round-the-clock community checks keep the vibes high, but the real innovation is the five-star review system. Every interaction becomes a reputation-building moment: great dates rise to the top, sketchy behavior gets flagged, and accountability becomes part of the culture.
The magic doesn’t stop there. ForReal’s AI-powered matching works like a mixtape for the soul—curated around values, curiosities and compatibility, not superficial likes. And when it’s time to step out from behind the screen, ForReal takes you into the real world with curated events and group meetups that feel less like awkward speed-dating and more like being introduced by friends.
ForReal isn’t just an app; it’s a cultural reset. It’s tapping into a craving that’s been bubbling for years: the hunger for digital spaces that honor complexity, vulnerability and truth. The business model is simple but powerful—free entry to build scale, premium subscriptions for those who want ad-free browsing, unlimited matches, and access to exclusive experiences.
Investors and culture-watchers alike should take notice: ForReal isn’t chasing clicks or attention. It’s redefining the infrastructure of modern connection. In a world tired of filters, ForReal is the first app brave enough to say: come as you are, and let the realness rise.

Name: Rifah Chamber of Commerce and Industry
Description:
Welcome to Rifah Chamber of Commerce and Industry! With a vibrant presence spanning 17 states across India, Rifah Chamber of Commerce and Industry stands as a dynamic platform dedicated to fostering entrepreneurship and cultivating invaluable networking opportunities for businesses and aspiring entrepreneurs alike.

Based in the heart of Delhi, our Chamber is committed to empowering micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises through a plethora of initiatives. From insightful webinars and enriching business networking meets to impactful business summits and comprehensive training programs, we strive to equip businesses with the tools they need to thrive and excel in today's competitive landscape.

At Rifah Chamber of Commerce and Industry, we have established nine distinct verticals to cater to diverse business needs and interests:

Start Up & Scale Up: Supporting the growth journey of budding startups and facilitating their transition to scalable enterprises.
International Business: Providing guidance and resources for businesses venturing into international markets.
Business Networking: Creating avenues for meaningful connections and collaborations among industry peers.
Digital & Social Media: Harnessing the power of digital platforms to enhance brand visibility and reach.
Webinars: Offering valuable insights and knowledge-sharing sessions on relevant business topics.
Cluster & FPO Development: Fostering the development of industry clusters and promoting the formation of Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs).
Taxation and Business Finance: Providing expertise and assistance in navigating taxation and financial matters.
Rifahmart.com: An online marketplace facilitating seamless transactions and business interactions.
Joining Rifah Chamber of Commerce and Industry is a straightforward process. Simply visit our portal at www.rifah.org and follow the steps to become.

Neplýtvejte energií na oslovování studených kontaktů. Oslovujte jen ty, které vám už důvěřují.
Pokud potřebujete pro svůj byznys nové kontakty, klienty a zakázky, jste tady na správném místě.

LinkedIn vám pomůže získat:
■ Kontakty >Umožní vám získat nové kontakty, ke kterým byste se jinde a jinak nedostali

■ Důvěru > V byznyse, kde je obtížné oslovovat „studené“ kontakty, multiplikuje systém doporučení

■ Byznys > Umožňuje uplatnit funkční obchodní princip ZNÁT > LÍBIT SE > VĚŘIT > KOUPIT

Jen v ČR je na LinkedIn přes 1.900.000 kontaktů, mezi kterými jsou i VAŠI POTENCIÁLNÍ KLIENTI.
Jak z nich udělat klienty skutečné?

Stačí je jenom najít, oslovit, zaujmout a získat si jejich důvěru.  JAK to udělat správně a s tím správným výsledkem? To vás naučíme.

www.linkedakademie.cz

Name: GV Connect
Description:
GV Connect is India’s first cluster development enterprise, dedicated to promoting the growth of life sciences clusters. 

We assist in development of self-sustaining ecosystem that can offer tangible benefits to the businesses located within clusters. We help organizations with a wide variety of cluster needs ranging from common infrastructure development, skill development and talent sourcing, vendor connections, to development of social infrastructure and community building.

We are currently active in Genome Valley, Hyderabad, India’s leading life science cluster. Genome Valley is spread across approx. 10,000 acres and is home to more than 200 life science companies. 

Hyderabad has one of the largest concentrations for life sciences talent in India and Genome Valley engages approx. 20,000 direct and indirect workforce. The cluster also has excellent connectivity, dedicated water and power infrastructure, direct access to residential options, vibrant and diverse industries, incubation and common analytical labs facilities, developing social infrastructure.

http://gvconnect.in/

Follow us on:
https://www.facebook.com/GVlifesciencesclusters

BELANGRIJKE MEDEDELING: Het Online Kracht platform stopt!

We vallen meteen met de deur in huis: wij hebben besloten te stoppen met de Online Kracht Community.

Het verder uitbouwen van een online community kost veel tijd en energie. Dit was vanaf moment één soms al een uitdaging naast onze eigen freelance klanten, maar in de afgelopen maanden zijn we beide zowel zakelijk als privé een ander pad in geslagen.

Soms is het dan nodig om daarin stevige keuzes te maken en bepaalde dingen los te laten.

Met uiteraard ook een beetje pijn in ons hart moeten we dan ook mededelen dat we het professionele platform niet meer de tijd kunnen geven die ervoor nodig is en dat we daarom tot het besluit gekomen zijn de community te beëindigen.

Bedankt voor een geweldig mooi jaar vol nieuwe connecties, groei en leerzame processen!

Met krachtige groeten,
Demi en Caitlin

Name: neeedco
Description:
Quand l’aventure neeedco a démarrée, on est parti d’un constat simple mais appuyé par tout le secteur de l’audiovisuel.

 Le constat d’un manque évident de diversité et d’égalité devant comme derrière la caméra, ne permettait pas un imaginaire collectif reflétant la société française actuelle.

Vouloir faire évoluer les représentations à l’écran n’était pas suffisant, il fallait redistribuer les cartes dans toute la chaîne de production ! 

Avec neeedco l’idée était donc de se positionner comme un outil concret pour répondre à cette problématique.

 Et dans cette industrie, le réseau est primordial pour voir les opportunités se façonner et se concrétiser. Ce réseau, parfois protégé ou sacralisé, peut être difficile à se créer…

C’est là qu’on intervient ! 

Neeedco est le premier réseau égalitaire qui fait matcher profils et annonces du cinéma et de l'audiovisuel.

 Vous y trouverez des offres sensibles à nos valeurs, des profils métiers divers, touchant toutes les branches du secteur. De la réalisatrice au comédien, du producteur à l’assistante caméra ou encore du maquilleur à la scénariste…

Et là où on redistribue les cartes, c’est grâce à notre système de matching ! Axé sur l’équilibre besoins/compétences mais avant tout tourné vers l’humain, il crée des connexions basées sur les valeurs et intérêts artistiques de chacun.e.

 La communauté neeedco c’est des milliers profils tous métiers confondus, une parité quasi totale et une diversité que vous ne trouverez pas ailleurs !

Neeedco c’est aussi des rencontres lors de nos événements. Pour cela on vous donne rendez-vous tous les mois à nos évènement, pour parler cinéma mais aussi des valeurs qu’on partage, des projets à venir et de possibles futures collaborations.  

Alors maintenant que vous savez tout, venez participer à ce changement à nos côtés ! 

Créez votre profil sur neeedco et faites parti d’une communauté soudée et engagée

Name: Corporate Influencer Club
Description:
Der Corporate Influencer Club ist eine Intiative für alle, die den digitalen Wandel in ihrer Organisation vorantreiben und als Stimme ihres Unternehmens sichtbar werden möchten. 

Wir bieten eine einzigartige Community, die Einblicke in die Welt des Corporate Influencer gibt. Dabei stehen Informationen, Methoden und die Idee des Corporate Influencer-Wirkens im Mittelpunkt. 

Unser Club umfasst ein vielfältiges Ökosystem aus Ressourcen und Veranstaltungen:

Podcast : Inspirierende Gespräche mit Branchenexpert:innen
LinkedIn Audio Sessions : Interaktive Formate zum Austausch mit führenden Köpfen und Gleichgesinnten
Events : Ihr findet uns auf der Zukunft Personal EUROPE, Nord und Süd

Jede:r kann kostenlos Mitglied werden. Lass Dich inspirieren, erweitere Dein Wissen und werde als Corporate Influencer sichtbar(er). Wir unterstützen Dich dabei, Deine Geschichte zu erzählen und Deine Organisation auf der digitalen Bühne zu repräsentieren. 

Die Community des Corporate Influencer Clubs findest Du in unserer gleichnamigen LinkedIn-Gruppe, in der auch die Hauptkommunikation stattfindet. Vernetze Dich und tausche Dich aus 

Wir, Sophie Rickmann, Klaus Eck, Dr. Winfried Ebner, Alexander Wunschel und Holger Kahnt möchten Dich unterstützen, Deine Rolle als Corporate Influencer zu stärken. 

Der Corporate Influencer Club ist mehr als nur eine Initiative – wir sind eine Bewegung für alle, die den Dialog zwischen Unternehmen und Gesellschaft vorantreiben wollen. Sei dabei und gestalte die Zukunft mit uns!
