Name: Pomegranate Business Speed Networking
Description:
Pomegranate Business Speed Networking is an online business networking platform that helps navigate the growth of your business net worth.

Join the Pomegranate Speed Networking community today. As the old adage goes "It's not what you know in today's, day and age, but whom you know that matters" this is true!

Speed Networking is one of the most powerful and productive activities an individual can do to launch and manage their professional career. Building an interconnected group of relationships with others is at the core of a person’s effectiveness both personally and professionally. In the workplace today, we need to be known to others as well as ensure that others are aware of how we might be a resource for them. Whether student, young careerist, or seasoned professional, having a network of people you can tap into for information, advice and opportunities while sharing your own, is paramount.

Speed networking is a structured and fast-paced networking event allowing participants to interact with others, typically in a series of brief one-on-one information exchanges. The participants readily share contact information and decide whom they will follow up with. This type of event can provide exposure to a lot of people in a short amount of time. It is a way to let others know who you are and what you are looking for, whether new customers or clients, business or sales leads.

Name: The Creative Collective Networking
Description:
The Creative Collective: A Wild and Welcoming Networking Event for Creative Freelancers

We've all been there. An hour or more of 60 second pitches. Maybe a ten minute presentation for good measure.

The Creative Collective is your fortnightly dose of fast-paced fun. Guaranteed to make new creative connections in an environment that's been described as "Fun, welcoming, lovely people and to be honest just blinking hilarious!"

It's a mood lifter, a business booster, and it's home.

Part networking, part community, part bizarre cabaret. Sort of. 15-second intros, daft icebreakers, surprise 121s, and breakout rooms with actual personality. It's less stiff handshake and more virtual embrace with people who get what it's like to freelance as a creative.

Our attendees are videographers, voice actors, illustrators, animators, composers, web designers, photographers, graphic designers, copywriters, ... and those who blur every line in between.

If you create, make, or perform, digitally or in the real world, this is where you'll [cheese catchphrase] find your people.

What Happens During the 90 Minutes
Light chat as everyone joins
Hilarious intro from Ben & Martin
Breakout Room 1 with weird icebreaker
15-sec intros (less snoring)
5 minute 121
Martin’s Spinny Wheel Thing, the prize nobody wants to win. (It's a 60 second pitch)
5 minute 121
Themed breakout rooms (you choose, but it's going to be the Bantz Room)
“TCC After Dark”. Anything goes.

Why It’s Different
No monologues
No stuffy sales
Just brilliant creative freelancers lifting each other up and having a bit of a laugh.

The Essentials
 When: Every second Wednesday at 1pm (UK time)
 Where: Zoom – link sent after registration
 Cost: 3 free vists, then £5 per visit or £99 for full membership (which gets you over £2,000 worth of goodies!)

Creative freelancing can feel like a rollercoaster with no seatbelt. TCC is somewhere you can show up, be seen, get inspired, and have fun doing it.

It's free to join our online local marketplace. Get your online shop with only few clicks to benefit from our digital marketing, delivery and customer service.

We encourage choosing local and promote sustainability

Our marketplace is open climate solution and we are align with many of the sustainable development goals.

Consuming local products have many social, financial and environmental advantages: it helps to save energy and reduce carbon footprints of long distance transportation. Our FarmToForks strategy helps to reduce food loss and waste, requires less packaging and provides better food transparency of resources.
It supports the local economy, creates and protects jobs.

We protect life at Happy Local by leading towards sustainability of our small spaceship.
Let's make it happen, be a part of the solution

Startup from Luxembourg and soon available worldwide to connect locals - stay tuned for Happy Local in your town

"Zirvedeki Liderlerin Buluşma Noktası"
Değişen ve gelişen iş dünyamızda, üst düzey yöneticiler için etkili bir ağa erişim, başarı için kritik bir faktördür. Bu misyondan yola çıkarak kurulan C-Suite Connect Platformu, şirketlerin C-Level ve üst düzey yöneticileri için büyüme, gelişme ve ağ oluşturma fırsatları sağlamaya odaklanan liderlerin ağıdır.

Platform, iş dünyasındaki güncel konuları analiz etme, deneyimleri paylaşma ve geleceğe dair vizyonları detaylandırma imkanı sunuyor. Bu sayede sektörde düşünce liderliğinizi güçlendirebilir ve bilgi paylaşımına katkıda bulunabilirsiniz. 

In our changing and evolving business world, access to an effective network for senior executives is a critical factor for success. Established based on this mission, C-Suite Connect Platform is a network of leaders focused on providing growth, development and networking opportunities for C-Level and senior executives of companies.
C-Suite Connect is not just a connection platform, it's also a leadership ecosystem. Name: Everest
Description:
The future belongs to the few bold enough to climb the highest peaks - the entrepreneurial teams building in climate, health, AI, infrastructure, and the next frontier of human possibility.
 
But building something world-changing isn’t a straight line. It’s a daunting ascent. You don’t just need a map. You need someone who’s seen the mountain.

We built Everest to be your Sherpa, a collective platform designed to be a living, intelligent system that:

            •          Knows the route
            •          Has seen a thousand expeditions before yours
            •          Helps you carry the weight
            •          Guides you, step-by-step, to the summit

Everest combines an AI-powered operating system with a high-signal network of coaches, operators, and capital partners, all designed to help the most ambitious founders become the most effective leaders.

Every founder on Everest is paired with an elite executive coach and operator - someone who’s scaled the summit themselves. With full visibility into your company’s inner workings, they don’t just give generic advice - they deliver precision support, grounded in live team context, to help you scale as a leader. 

But what truly sets Everest apart is the network. Everest surrounds you with a precision-matched collective of Fortune 500 Executives, GTM leaders, technical advisors, and battle-tested founders - people who have scaled iconic companies and solved the exact problems you’re facing. Our platform monitors your progress and detects when you’re surging, or at a strategic crossroads - and activates the right person at the right time, with full context in hand. No cold intros. Just deeply relevant support when it matters most. This is not passive mentorship. This is active, embedded leverage.

With Everest, founders no longer climb alone. We provide the real-time intelligence, expert support, and capital alignment needed to accelerate your climb - with clarity, coordination, and confidence.

Young Mongolian Professionals Association was established and incorporated in Virginia, USA in 2009 as a nonprofit, tax-exempt 501(c)3 organization in the United States exclusively for educational and developmental purposes; and ran its activities in the USA from 2009-2015...
Young Mongolian Professionals Association, now “YOUTHinc”. has been successfully implementing its pilot programs and projects in Mongolia since 2020 such as our INTERNSHIP PROGRAM for professional development and practical work experience; BFIT program for personal development and promoting healthy lifestyle; Schlolarship program, STUDY TOURS with partnering organizations and other soft skills, capacity building and networking with prospective employers and businesses...

𝐄𝐝𝐮𝐒𝐩𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐢𝐬 𝐚 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝, 𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐬 (𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐝𝐨𝐞𝐬𝐧’𝐭), 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐰 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐩, 𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐮𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐞-𝐛𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐢𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬.

Here, we don’t just celebrate big ideas. We also talk about small efforts, silent struggles, local innovations, and field learnings that often go unnoticed.

 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐘𝐨𝐮’𝐥𝐥 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐇𝐞𝐫𝐞:
 Lived experiences of educators, facilitators, mentors, and social sector practitioners

 Best practices from classrooms, training sessions, and community interventions

 Peer-to-peer learning and collaborative reflections

 Mentorship tips for early-career professionals in the social/education space

 Tools, models, and frameworks for real-world educational challenges

 Open discussions on what it means to teach, lead, and learn in today’s world

𝐖𝐞 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐰𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧:

 Learn from each other’s stories

CarryMe.fr est la seule solution fiable, solidaire, économique, éco-responsable et sécurisée qui permet d’accéder à des produits venant d’ailleurs !
Et de plus, CarryMe vous permettra de développer votre réseau en France et à l'international et d'aider les plus démunis 

 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗰̧𝗮 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗲 ? 

Plate-forme digitale PeerToPeer, CarryMe.fr met en relation les membres d’une communauté privée* (ou leurs proches) qui ont besoin d’accéder à des produits d’un autre pays / d’une autre ville, avec des voyageurs qui acceptent de réserver un espace dans leurs bagages. 

* ce sont les employés des Entreprises ou Associations, ou étudiants de Grandes écoles. 

En proposant CarryMe.fr aux membres de votre communauté, vous contribuez activement aux Objectifs du Développement Durable (ODD)  : 

☆ Réduire la pauvreté (ODD N°1)

☆ Assurer le bien-être & la santé des salariés & étudiants (et leurs proches) (ODD N°3) 

☆ Diminuer les inégalités (ODD N°10)

☆ Participer à la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique (ODD N°13)

Notre mission est de transformer le marché du transport afin que des centaines de millions de personnes puissent accéder aux produits qui leur manquent tant, de manière fiable, écologique et à très faible coût.

 Et de faire de CarryMe.fr la référence du transport collaboratif de produits à l’international !

Pour vous faire sentir chez vous lorsque vous êtes loin de chez vous 

Et pour chacun d’entre nous, l'occasion de faire de belles rencontres avec des personnes qui partagent les mêmes valeurs.

 Rejoignez notre communauté de confiance dès aujourd’hui sur CarryMe ! 

Contactez-nous en écrivant à contact@carryme.fr

@bientôt !

Name: TRN - The Research Network Ltd
Description:
Drug discovery and development requires in-depth multi-disciplinary expertise which organisations may not always have in-house. The Research Network (TRN) enables direct access to a global network of highly experienced pharmaceutical professionals and service providers with a wide range of pre-clinical and clinical capability.

Accessing expertise and scientific services via TRN is a flexible cost efficient route to progressing your projects with high quality data from pre-clinical to clinical stages of development. Within TRN you can work with one specific expert or the required network of expertise to move your project forward. TRN will help you to identify the most cost effective route to progress your project.

TRN offers; Integrated project and strategic management (Target identification to Clinical PoC), grant writing and submission support, >60 experts globally and established relationships with a wide range of CROs. (Chemistry, biology, DMPK/ ADME, Drug Safety/ Toxicology, CMC Formulation, Regulatory & Clinical), Specific expertise in CVMD, Respiratory, Inflammation, Immunology, Virology, Dermatology, Pain, Oncology, CNS, Rare & Orphan Diseases, Small molecules and biologicals, 
TRN offers expertise gained in major pharma companies (Pfizer, AZ, Abbott, GSK, Millennium, Nycomed and others).

TRN offers pay-as you-go drug discovery with a simple efficient contracting process, access to quality CRO facilities, you retain all intellectual property.

With its wide network and experience of many project and funding paradigms, TRN is well placed to find the right partners for your projects and to assist with securing funding.

For any additional information about the services we provide or to contact us to discuss your requirements, please go to our website www.trn.net

Description:
10 yıl önce “en kaliteli sosyal medya hizmetlerini sunma” hedefiyle çıktığı yolda adını Türkiye’nin en büyük bilişim şirketleri arasına yazdıran Bayigram.com, kullanıcıların tüm beklentilerine profesyonel çözümler sunan memnuniyet garantili bir platformdur.


Kurulduğu günden bu yana 200 bini aşkın müşteriye hizmet veren ve 10 milyondan fazla işlem kaydı yapan Bayigram.com, en güvenilir ve en çok tercih edilen platformlar arasında zirvede yer almaktadır.


Tüm sosyal medya platformlarında bireysel veya kurumsal hesapları büyütmek için özel çalışmalar yapan platform, tamamen kendi bünyesinde çalışan yazılım ekibinin geliştirdiği sosyal medya yazılımlarını kullanmaktadır.


13 kişilik profesyonel ekibiyle 7 gün 24 saat kesintisiz destek operasyonunu sürdüren Bayigram.com, kullanıcılara ayrıca tüm işlemleri web tabanlı ara yüzünden yönetebilme özgürlüğü sunmaktadır.


Firma, sosyal medya alanında sorunsuz hizmet almak isteyen kullanıcıların 1 numaralı adresi haline gelmiştir.
Sosyal medyada hedeflerini gerçekleştirmek isteyenlere avantajlı fırsatlar sunan ve yüksek işlem hızıyla sisteme düşen tüm siparişleri en kısa zamanda teslim eden Bayigram.com, olası bir sorunu anında çözen garantili hizmet anlayışı, güvenli ödeme imkanı ve canlı destek hizmetiyle de alanında lider olmayı sürdürmektedir.  
Hizmet yelpazesi içinde her ihtiyaca yönelik destekler bulunan platform, bütçe dostu fiyat seçenekleri ve güvenilir hizmet kalitesi sayesinde müşteri kitlesini her geçen gün genişletmektedir. 


Bayigram.com’un sosyal medya hizmeti sunduğu platformlar arasında, tüm dünyada en çok tercih edilen uygulamalar Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok, Twitch, Spotify, Clubhouse, SoundCloud, Tumblr, Periscope, Pinterest, Vimeo, LinkedIn, Telegram, Dailymotion, DLive, Google, Netflix, Nonolive, PUBG, SEO, Tinder, Trovo ve Reddit yer almaktadır.

Description:
We are a dynamic community of researchers and policymakers from across Europe, united in our efforts to advance AI safety. Our network brings together experts from over 13 countries and counting, all working towards a common goal: ensuring that artificial intelligence systems are safe, ethical, and positively impactful for humanity. ENAIS (pronounced e-nice) distinguishes itself from related organizations by its focus on existential risks from AI.

At ENAIS, we believe that as AI technology continues to advance, it's important to consider the potential risks and challenges that come with it. That's why we are dedicated to researching and promoting best practices in AI safety, ensuring that advanced AI systems are developed and deployed responsibly.

Join us in our mission to make AI a force for good. Together, we can shape the future of this exciting and rapidly evolving field.

Seu nome é originado no projetista chefe, Orkut Büyükkökten, engenheiro turco do Google. O alvo inicial do Orkut era os Estados Unidos, mas a maioria dos usuários foram do Brasil e da Índia.

Name: Sportidia
Description:
Sportidia is on a mission to revolutionize wellness, fitness, and social media. Our motto, "Where being social is being active," reflects our commitment to leveraging technology to make getting active truly fun and social.

We're more than just another app; we're a platform that bridges the gap between the digital and real worlds. Sportidia motivates individuals to ignite their passion for health and wellness by connecting them with like-minded people.

Join us in to create this movement that redefines what it means to be social and active.

For good things to happen in the world, people need to meet. If people don't meet enough new people, companies don't get started, kids don't get made, friends are few... and people are lonely. Meeting new people is a dropping number year on year, which makes it one of societies biggest problems, and certainly one of the most underestimated ones.

We are solving that in the simplest and non cringe way, already leading to 100's of people meeting per week.

- Scroll, earn, discover, shop: A one-stop destination where discovery, rewards, and shopping happen effortlessly.

Name: منصة لينك إن
Description:
منصتنا هي الوجهة المثالية للأفراد والشركات التي تسعى إلى تعزيز حضورها الرقمي وتحقيق أهدافها المهنية. نتميز بتقديم خدمات مبتكرة ومتكاملة تساعدك على إنشاء وإدارة حساباتك بشكل احترافي على لينكد إن، مما يساهم في تحسين ظهورك الرقمي والوصول إلى فرص العمل التي تتناسب مع مهاراتك وأهدافك.

نعمل مع الأفراد على تطوير ملفاتهم الشخصية لتكون جاذبة ومتميزة في سوق العمل، بينما نقدم للشركات حلولًا مبتكرة لتصميم ملفات تعريف احترافية تُبرز قيمة علامتها التجارية وتعزز مكانتها في السوق.

بالإضافة إلى ذلك، نقدم خدمات اشتراكات لينكد إن المميزة، التي تتيح الوصول إلى أدوات احترافية تساهم في توسيع شبكة علاقاتك المهنية واستهداف العملاء والشركاء المثاليين.

هدفنا هو أن نكون شريكك في النجاح، حيث نسعى لتقديم حلول مصممة خصيصًا تناسب احتياجاتك، سواء كنت فردًا تطمح للتميز الوظيفي أو شركة تسعى لإحداث تأثير قوي في السوق.

Name: ChatSpark
Description:
ChatSpark is an audio-first social platform redefining how people connect by blending meaningful voice interactions with the energy of casual gaming. We believe digital conversations become far more engaging when they are sparked through play, emotion, and shared moments—rather than through transactional or passive communication.

At the center of this vision is Challenge & Connect, ChatSpark’s unique interaction philosophy that transforms how people initiate conversations. By introducing light, enjoyable gaming as a social layer, ChatSpark creates an environment where users can interact with a sense of excitement, confidence, and emotional momentum before transitioning into authentic voice-based connections. It’s a new way of breaking the ice—fun, dynamic, and deeply human.

Casual gaming on ChatSpark isn’t about competition for its own sake; it’s about fostering more natural, comfortable, and memorable interactions. These playful experiences lower barriers, create shared context, and make conversations feel more meaningful from the very first moment.

Creators thrive in this ecosystem through richer engagement and deeper audience relationships. ChatSpark empowers them with an interactive space where their presence feels more accessible, more dynamic, and more connected.

Safety and trust are foundational to everything we build. Our platform prioritizes responsible moderation, user well-being, and a secure communication environment, ensuring that every interaction—whether playful or personal—happens with clarity and comfort.

As ChatSpark grows, we remain committed to innovation, user-centric design, and delivering emotionally rewarding audio experiences at scale. We’re building a platform where casual gaming and voice communication come together to create a new category of digital interaction.

ChatSpark is reshaping how people meet, play, and connect—one challenge and one conversation at a time.

Name: Linkedln Local Togo
Description:
Dans un monde où des outils puissants, attrayants, possédant tous des propriétés distinctes deviennent maîtres de nos jours, les plateformes sociales sont réputées devenir l’un des principaux moyens de réseautage et de développement de carrière. LinkedIn, une des plateformes sociales professionnelles, semble être indispensable à cet effet pour les professionnels, notamment la jeunesse cherchant à développer leur réseau, à explorer des possibilités d’opportunités de carrière et à partager leurs expertises. Toutefois, bien que la plateforme offre une multitude d’outils pour se connecter et collaborer, son utilisation efficace reste des moindre. 

Au Togo, le potentiel de LinkedIn pour connecter les professionnels locaux est encore sous-exploité. De nombreux professionnels disposent de profils LinkedIn mais n’ont pas encore pleinement exploité les avantages des interactions en personne, qui peuvent significativement enrichir leurs réseaux professionnels. En parallèle, les entreprises et les entrepreneurs locaux cherchent des moyens efficaces pour promouvoir leur visibilité et créer des partenariats stratégiques.

Le projet LinkedIn Local Togo vient à point nommé et vise à combler cette lacune en offrant une série d’événements locaux qui permettront aux jeunes togolais, membres de LinkedIn de se rencontrer en personne, d'échanger des idées, de se partager des opportunités d’affaires et d’emplois et de bâtir de solides et durables relations.

Description:
Historien om Kvinder i Fodbold er historien om dedikation, fællesskab og forandring.

Kvinder i Fodbold blev etableret i september 2024 med en ambition om at skabe et fællesskab, der vil styrke kvinder og piger i fodbold. Sammen kæmper vi for at forbedre vilkårene og udvide mulighederne for piger og kvinder i dansk fodbold. Vi står sammen for bedre vilkår, øget synlighed og større anerkendelse af piger og kvinder i sporten.

Vores mål er ikke blot at styrke "kvindefodbold", men at udvikle hele fodboldverdenen – ved at give mere plads til piger og kvinder i alle sportens aspekter – på banen, i klubberne og ved bordene, hvor beslutningerne træffes og fremtidens fodbold formes. I dag drives foreningen af et sekretariat, der arbejder tæt sammen med foreningens advisory board, bestyrelse, over 30 engagerede frivillige og alle vores medlemmer.

Name: CONEXEN
Description:
We Activate Life Sciences Ecosystems, Powered by People.

CONEXEN creates the conditions where the right connections form naturally, transforming professional journeys across Life Sciences, Biopharma, Health Tech, and Medical Devices.

We believe that thriving ecosystems aren't accidental. They're built with intention, trust, and a shared drive to achieve the extraordinary. While others focus on organisational structures, we focus on something more fundamental: activating the human connections that drive innovation, careers, and meaningful change.

Our story began in 2022 in Cambridge (England), fostering a vibrant community where life sciences leaders connect as people first. What started as award-winning gatherings filled with palpable energy and authentic collaboration quickly became origins: sparking partnerships born from trust, shaping careers, and accelerating breakthroughs.

Today, CONEXEN stands at the intersection of community and impact. We've expanded from Cambridge to new cities, with each gathering designed to create the outcomes our members consistently report: board positions secured, strategic partnerships formed, funding connections established, and careers transformed.

These outcomes don't happen by chance they emerge from an ecosystem deliberately activated for impact.

What makes our approach distinctive is our philosophy of generosity approaching each interaction with "How can I help?" rather than "What can I gain?" This creates an environment where meaningful connections flourish naturally, careers advance through genuine relationships, and the entire ecosystem strengthens.

CONEXEN is for the visionaries, the collaborators, the ecosystem thinkers who believe that real innovation starts with connection. We are for those ready to move beyond business as usual and harness the exponential power of a deliberately activated network.

JOIN US!

A Revolutionary Ad Revenue Model
For the first time ever, Ulearna offers a unique ad revenue-sharing model. Both creators and users benefit:
Creators earn revenue from ads shown on their videos.
Users earn a share of revenue simply by watching ads. You can withdraw your earnings or donate them to a charity of your choice.
A Platform for Personal Growth
While Ulearna focuses on social connections, we also offer courses across various topics, from personal development to technical skills. Whether you’re here to learn or connect, Ulearna provides a space for personal growth alongside meaningful interactions.
A Safe Space for All
Ulearna is a family-friendly platform where harmful or inappropriate content is strictly prohibited. Our platform ensures a positive experience for users of all ages, making it a safe and supportive community.

La communauté s’est rapidement développée sur un concept simple : la mise en relation d’indépendantes dans leurs villes respectives afin qu’elles puissent se rencontrer et nouer des liens amicaux ou professionnels avec des femmes qui comprennent leurs problématiques. En bref, avoir une bande de potes freelances ! 

En parallèle, un espace d’échange en ligne ultra-bienveillant s’est naturellement constitué et accompagne désormais les membres TPF de toute la France au jour le jour.

L’inscription donne également accès à des événements en ligne (ateliers hebdomadaires et masterclass mensuelle), une médiathèque, des avantages auprès de partenaires, et l’annuaire géant qu’est notre plateforme. 

À ce jour, TPF compte presque 300 membres réparties dans plus de 50 villes de France ! Infos et inscription sur tapotefreelance.com

Through mentorship, networking, and shared learning experiences, we provide the support and resources necessary for women to navigate and excel in board roles.

Name: Renewables UnWind
Description:
Renewables UnWind is a networking event series bringing together sustainability professionals to socialize and strategize. Most new power projects within the United States are developed with clean energy, yet public support of renewable resources remains stagnant. In a convivial, after-work setting, Renewables UnWind gathers the brightest cleantech professionals in cities across North America to talk about policy, partnerships, and progress towards a clean energy future. Join us and keep the conversation moving forward.

Over the last 9 years, Renewables UnWind has hosted 30,000 professionals in sustainable energy in 25 cities around North America. It has established itself as the premier national networking event to connect those working across the various sectors of sustainable energy and the cleantech industry.

Since our inception as a monthly New York City meetup, we have quickly extended our reach across North America, which has led to partnering with the largest trade shows and renewable energy focused conferences. We've partnered with the largest clean energy trade shows in the world. In 2025, you can find us in Las Vegas, Philadelphia, Houston, Toronto, Fort Lauderdale, Calgary, Chicago, Austin, New York, Phoenix, and Toronto. 

For a complete overview of Renewables UnWind sponsorship opportunities, benefits and packages, please drop an email to events@renewablesunwind.com

Through this, we help connect those working in the various sectors of renewable energy. Stay up to date with our events by following our LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram pages.

Name: Bremer Currywurst Gesellschaft
Description:
Herbert Grönemeyer: „Gehste inne Stadt, wat macht dich da satt? 'Ne Currywurst“

Zu Beginn des Jahres 2022 hatten die Menschen nach der langen Corona-Zeit das Bedürfnis sich wieder persönlich zu treffen und auszutauschen. 
Björn Tuchscherer hat die Idee der Currywurstgesellschaft aus Hannover mitgebracht und hier in Bremen ins Leben gerufen.

Neben der Qualität und dem Geschmack der Currywurst geht es um echtes Networking. Das Knüpfen und Intensivieren von Kontakten und der Austausch von Gedanken und Ideen zwischen den TeilnehmerInnen stehen im Mittelpunkt unserer Treffen. Immer am ersten Freitag im Monat von 12:30 bis 14:00 Uhr

Gestartet sind wir im StäV in der Bremer Innenstadt mit etwa 12 Personen. Danach wollten wir im Kontext der Treffen auch neue Lokalitäten kennlernen und nicht nur personell wachsen. 

Seit dem Start des Jahres 2024 sind dann Barbara Begerow und Holger Schilling mit Björn gemeinsam in einem „Präsidium“ ehrenamtlich für die Bremer Currywurst Gesellschaft aktiv. 

In den vergangen Monaten waren wir sehr gerne zu Gast, u.a.: Lankenauer Höft, Feldmanns Bierhaus, Becks Ambiente, Bar Rique, Q1, Bolzerei, Atlantik-Galopprennbahn, CHILLI-CLUB.

Wir sind bei den Treffen je 1/3 „Stammgäste“, 1/3 „Wiederholungs-TäterInnen“ und 1/3 „Erstis“. Und das zeichnet uns u.a. aus: Stetig neue Kontakte und immer wieder die Intensivierung von Kontakten.

„Du musst Dich nicht vor der Runde vorstellen oder einen Vortrag halten !“ 
Du darfst es aber auch nicht. Die BCG lebt durch und wächst über die bilaterale Kommunikation und den Austausch in kleinen Gruppen.

Einzige Pflichten:
Nach Anmeldung bitte auch erscheinen & wenn Du das Treffen verlässt, Essen & Trinken bezahlen.

Any successful survivor with Real Life Traumatic experience. People who have lived it, still deal with it & conquer through setbacks each day in their life. Relentless people who've never given up on the road to success! We live with an abundance of resilience, grit, emotional intelligence & internal fortitude!

What's in it for you?
Real synergy is gained through similar life experiences. We believe that the most Powerful People across the world have experienced Adversity! With Post-Traumatic Growth Champions your time & story matters because we understand the life you’ve lived! 

So are you ready to be a guiding light for others with your raging warmth & courage? Do you want to connect with others who've traveled a similar path as you? Are you looking for a powerful network who understands your life experience? Maybe you're here for your own self-healing?

You're in the right place. We are so happy to have you! Your depth is a novel! There is more to your spirit than 20,000 leagues under the sea!

Founder, Edward "Ed" Cassas. 
From Trauma to Triumph.

𝗘𝗺𝗽𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗨𝗻𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗲𝘀

𝗦𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁: Plan, promote, and track events effortlessly with built-in ticketing and analytics.

𝗦𝗲𝗮𝗺𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗢𝗻𝗯𝗼𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴: Digital processes for welcoming new students to universities, clubs, societies, and halls of residence.

𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗲 𝗢𝗿𝗴𝗮𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: A centralised hub for managing digital assets and resources.

𝗪𝗵𝗼 𝗪𝗲 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗲:
Uni-Circle works with universities, student unions, student halls, and clubs across the UK, helping them build connected, engaged, and financially sustainable communities.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗜𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗰𝘁:
By addressing key challenges like fragmented communication, rising costs, and declining engagement, Uni-Circle enables institutions to:

 Improve student satisfaction.

Let’s shape the future of student life—together.

Name: SPARK
Description:
The Spark Story

In a world where connections have become fleeting and superficial, Spark was born from a desire to reignite the essence of romance and bespoke in the digital age. Our journey began with a simple question: What if finding love could be an adventure, a series of unforgettable experiences that speak to the soul?

At Spark, we believe that love should be extraordinary, just like the people seeking it. Our vision was to create a sanctuary for the discerning, for those who value depth, culture, and genuine connections, set against the backdrop of the world's most exquisite experiences. From the bustling streets of Bangkok to the serene landscapes across Thailand, Spark is about discovering love in the lap of luxury, where every match leads to a new adventure, a new story waiting to unfold.

We are not just a dating app; we are architects of memories, curating bespoke experiences that become the canvas for your love stories. Whether it's a private dinner under the stars, a scenic flight to a secluded beach, or a masterclass with a world-renowned chef, Spark is your gateway to a world where love meets experiences.

As we invite you to join our exclusive community, we promise not just matches, but journeys. Journeys that begin with a spark and evolve into flames of passion, friendship, and lasting connections. This is the essence of Spark – where every swipe is a step into a world of unparalleled experiences, curated with love, for love.

At Spark, our mission is to redefine the landscape of dating by creating an exclusive platform that transcends conventional boundaries. We aim to curate unforgettable, luxurious experiences that foster genuine connections, celebrating class, culture, and depth in relationships. Our commitment extends beyond matchmaking; we aspire to cultivate a global community where meaningful relationships thrive, supported by unparalleled service and an ethos of exclusivity.

Welcome to Spark. Where extraordinary journeys of love begin.

Name: Young Professionals in Social Value
Description:
What is Young Professionals in Social Value?
Young Professionals in Social Value (#YPSV) is a free networking group to connect young professionals to facilitate the social value movement across all sectors and invite a generation of professionals to consider how they can make an impact to their communities. YPSV is open to professionals passionate about social value under the age of 35.

What will YPSV do?
We will facilitate a combination of virtual and in person events to provide a platform for young professionals to connect with likeminded professionals that are driving the social value movement.

Do I have to work full time in social value to join?
Not at all! We are aware that the social value industry is rapidly growing however it is not a formal part of many people’s roles. We want to invite individuals under the age of 35 who work within social value or have an interest and would like to learn how this industry is evolving.

How do I get involved?
Complete the survey below or email us at infoypsv@gmail.com. 

Currently, we are only open for individuals under the age of 35 to join however we will be looking at incorporating professionals of all ages into some of our future events so keep an eye out on our page! As the social value industry is all about the movement we are creating, please share our content and recommend individuals to our group.

Name: Uganda Market Systems Development Network
Description:
In Uganda, MSD approach has been adopted by many development agencies. MSD Approach itself calls for tailor made, market specific and iterative design and implementation of interventions that create lasting and scalable impact. Adopting a uniform development approach anchored onto MSD principles by all development agencies is necessary to avoid any mixed signals and confusion that may arise as different development agencies design and implement their interventions. There is also a need to strengthen any emerging Community of Practice that would enhance the understanding and implementation of the MSD approach in Uganda. Furthermore, there is a growing community of commercial businesses, social businesses and capital advisory firms that are engaged in implementing inclusive and BoP facing business models. The Market Systems Development Network seeks to create a network or a framework that brings together like-minded MSD practitioners including development agencies, NGOs, donor projects, private consulting firms, and private sector firms into a 
community of practice.

Name: NyAI Nest
Description:
Welcome to Nyai Nest - Justice Support for Everyone

The Problem We're Solving:
Millions of people face injustice every day but struggle to get the support they need. Whether it's lack of legal knowledge, limited networks, insufficient resources, or emotional overwhelm - the path to justice feels impossible for too many.

Current justice support systems are:
• Expensive and inaccessible to most people
• Fragmented across different services and providers
• Focused only on legal aspects, ignoring emotional and social needs
• One-size-fits-all rather than personalized to individual situations
• Overwhelming for people already dealing with injustice

Our Mission:
To create a world where everyone - regardless of their background, resources, or connections - can access comprehensive support for their justice journey.

We believe justice shouldn't be a privilege for the few, but a right accessible to all. Every person deserves a safe space to find their voice, build their strength, and pursue what's right.

Our Vision:
A nurturing ecosystem where justice seekers find exactly the support they need - combining the safety of a protective nest with the power of an interconnected network.

Join us in building a more just world, one person at a time.

#JusticeForAll #AccessToJustice #SocialImpact #EqualRights #CommunitySupport #JusticeReform

Name: StudentLINK S.r.l.
Description:
"By students for students": StudentLINK S.r.l. is an innovative start-up company created with the aim of accompanying, supporting and connecting university students throughout their academic career.  

𝐖𝐇𝐘?
During a moment of particular difficulty in landing in the new university world, inundated by conflicting emotions and feelings, such as disorientation, and pervaded by fear and difficulty in integrating, students were born with the desire to find a solution that could help those who were in their same situation.
 
𝐇𝐎𝐖?
Through the first university social network completely dedicated to meet the main needs and requirements that characterize the student, during his academic experience and not.
  
𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓?
StudentLINK is identified as an aggregator of services and functions useful to students in order to speed up the integration process and have all the information they need, instantly, finding a true point of reference. 
 
𝐌𝐈𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍 
To create an interactive and reliable community of students, offering them a variety of features delivered through a digital platform, in order to grow and strengthen the university network. 
 
𝐕𝐈𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍 
The Vision on which the business idea is based is to create a university community that is recognized internationally and can be a reference point for all those who are about to enter this world or who have already been part of it.
  
"We are young people born in the era of the smartphone and grew up together with the development of the cloud and new technologies that we believe to be fundamental resources, and that, through StudentLINK, it will be possible to use in schools, as well as universities, to create a real interaction between students of tomorrow."

Name: Love Therapy Thursday
Description:
Could you use a virtual hug today? Or give one to someone who needs it?

Welcome to #LoveTherapyThursday, the biggest mental health support group on the planet! It's every Thursday all day long!

#TherapyThursday is about real, human connection. It’s about checking in with yourself and those around you, listening with empathy, and showing support. 

You are not a weak person
Comparison is the thief of joy
This is a judgment-free zone

HERE’S HOW YOU CAN IMPACT SOMEONE’S LIFE TODAY:

 Comment about your own mental health journey
 Support and reply to other people in the comments with empathy
 Like, comment, and engage with others' stories

It’s okay to not be okay and it’s okay to talk about it. 

Talking about mental health doesn’t need to be hard. Let’s break the stigma and support each other 

---------

Don’t worry about sharing the “right” thing. 

Having trouble figuring out what to write? Here are some ideas! 

 This is what I’ve been through…
 This is something that has helped me…
 Reply to someone: I’ve been there too. You’ve got this. I support you.

Happy posting! Let’s make the world a better place, by sharing with vulnerability, listening with empathy, and connecting with love. 

Go to www.LoveTherapyThursday.org to get involved in the movement.

DISCLAIMER: 
We at #lovetherapythursday are not trained therapists or mental health professionals. We are simply people who are on own our own mental health journey. We’ve found that sharing helps. We want everyone to feel like they can share their stories, even those that seem too hard to share. 

Mental health matters and struggles are real. We hope Therapy Thursday is a helpful resource and highly recommend therapy, which has been a big part of our journey. 

When you have an emergency, you call 911. Likewise, if you need to talk with someone about mental health, call the Mental Health Crisis Hotline by dialing 988 (in the US only).

Name: Weavit networks
Description:
Spotted the perfect contact? Unsure how to connect? Weavit finds the best route in your network.

Weavit is a trusted Networking platform that solves an old issue: we do not know who our contacts know.

We surveyed hundreds of professionals and they all agree with this: they are all ready to open up their network and help out. Networking is a win-win game. You give, you receive. But finding out who can help is a challenge.

LinkedIn is not helpful here. Over its almost two decade of existence, members have been accepting an increasing number of connections. Our survey shows that on average, Linkedin members believe they could make a correct introduction to 20% of their LinkedIn connections, at best.

Weavit solves this by determining who you know best, based on your email and text communications. When a Weavit member wants to access someone in the network, Weavit will automatically assess who is the best intermediary to put them in touch.

And thanks to digital - for once - this is done totally anonymously. Weavit never reveals who is the intermediary, until they agree to help. If a member cannot or does not wish to make an introduction, no one will ever know. No pressure or awkward "sorry I don't know them..." moment anymore.

Zo bereiken we niet alleen mensen die al betrokken zijn, maar juist ook doelgroepen die normaal minder snel aansluiten.

MorocColors richt zich op iedereen die openstaat voor verbinding en gedeelde interesses, ongeacht achtergrond. Hoewel onze roots mede liggen in Marokkaanse verhalen en perspectieven, zijn onze projecten nadrukkelijk gericht op het Nederlandse en Belgische publiek.

We werken samen met maatschappelijke, culturele en educatieve partners en ontwikkelen projecten in opdracht of in coproductie, waaronder programma’s rond lezen, erfgoed, arbeidsmarktparticipatie en talentontwikkeling.

MorocColors staat voor een positieve, inclusieve benadering, zonder politieke of religieuze agenda.

Samenwerking, partnerschap en kennisdeling vormen de kern van ons werk.

𝗦𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗸𝗲𝗻?
MorocColors staat open voor samenwerking met maatschappelijke, culturele en educatieve instellingen die doelgroepen willen bereiken en verbinden. Wij denken graag mee in coproducties, pilots en projecten die bijdragen aan participatie, ontmoeting en kennisdeling.

Name: Lebanese Executives Council - LEC
Description:
The Lebanese Executives Council is an independent, private-sector-led body that brings together Lebanese executives, professionals, and activists worldwide to build meaningful business and social connections across industries and geographies. Established in 2019, the Council serves as a dynamic platform for collaboration, knowledge exchange, and sectoral advancement, complementing the work of other Lebanese and international councils.

Through a structure built on sectoral committees and dedicated workgroups, the Council enables members to engage with peers, share expertise, and discuss mutual interests across sectors. Each committee appoints a representative to the Governing Body, ensuring that every professional voice is heard and considered in shaping the Council’s direction.

With a flexible and inclusive membership model, the Council welcomes individuals, SMEs, corporations, and associations looking to expand their networks, access expert support, and explore new business frontiers. Members benefit from access to cross-sectoral resources, business databases, and strategic advice on setting up ventures in host countries.

Our vision is to cultivate a global network of Lebanese leaders who support each other in achieving professional success, fostering innovation, and strengthening Lebanon’s economic and cultural ties with the world.

The Council also plays a key role in supporting local economic development by leveraging its members’ expertise to shape practical sectoral strategies and contribute to financial, social, and investment planning in host countries.

Name: Society for Conservation Biology - Asia Region (SCB-Asia)
Description:
Stretching from equatorial tropical jungles to the high Himalayas, from taiga forests to the deserts of the Middle East, Asia contains an incredible amount of the biological and cultural diversity on earth.  Its biodiversity is affected by a wide range of human impacts, often driven by a lack of understanding about the value of biodiversity and the threats faced by species and ecosystems.  This necessitates a broad spectrum of approaches to conservation.  

The SCB Asia Region brings together experts from many nations and disciplines to address biodiversity science and policy across the largest continent. The SCB Asia Region was officially launched during the 2003 #SCBAnnualMeeting in Duluth, Minnesota. Our geographic area ranges from the Middle East to the Far East, including Russia.

Name: LyveSocial
Description:
LyveSocial is an Australian-founded technology company building a next-generation social media platform designed to reconnect people with their communities through real-world experiences. We exist to transform social media from a space of passive consumption into one of meaningful interaction, using group-based, time-limited coupons that encourage users to explore local businesses and events together.

Our platform blends artificial intelligence, privacy-first design, and behavioural economics to create a socially conscious alternative to traditional ad-driven models. Rather than monetising attention, LyveSocial inspires connection by rewarding action—users must share or create to unlock group offers, encouraging word-of-mouth and real-life engagement

We work closely with universities, community organisations, and researchers to ensure our design principles and AI models reflect public interest, prioritising mental health, ethical personalisation, and inclusion. Our business model supports local economies by helping small businesses attract groups of real customers at scale, without relying on intrusive data harvesting or algorithmic manipulation.

With a commitment to transparency, innovation, and social impact, LyveSocial is building more than a platform—we’re building a movement. Our mission is to create a healthier, more connected society through tech that puts people, purpose, and community first.

Description:
The Sustainability Academic Network (SUSAN) unites sustainability researchers, institutes, students, and organizations to join forces in combating climate change. Our platform allows users to post and share datasets, papers, conferences, job postings, local events, and grants related to sustainability. These resources are categorized across various themes—from solar energy and mining to circular economies.

We created SUSAN because sustainability efforts are growing rapidly across universities in every faculty and department. Yet, researchers often focus only on their own specialties, leading to isolated pockets of research and silos in the domain of sustainability.

Since sustainability challenges are complex and span many fields, we need to connect with colleagues in different areas. For example, within one university, professors in business, science, engineering, geography, and urban planning might all be working on solar energy projects—but remain unaware of each other’s efforts. If it’s difficult to know about projects within our own university, how can we grasp the work happening worldwide?

SUSAN aims to break down these barriers. By connecting quickly, sharing ideas, and staying informed about past and ongoing projects, we can accelerate the development of climate solutions. By uniting sustainability scholars everywhere, we encourage collaboration across disciplines and make real progress in combating climate change.

Name: Retro
Description:
Retro is a social app that feels like a joy, not a habit. It’s a friends-only photo journal where you share for yourself as much as your friends. It gently nudges you to find at least one moment each week to remember and then put that moment out there in a post so your friends know what you’re up to.

One early indicator that we’re on the right track is that our friends that deeply value privacy and safety feel comfortable enough to share photos of their kids’ faces and flight itineraries and wild parties — things they wouldn’t feel comfortable sharing elsewhere.

We started working on it when we realized something: after all that has been built in social since the iPhone, we now see less of our friends on social than we did 5 years ago. The apps that have traditionally served this purpose well have pivoted toward entertainment created by people you don’t know, and even though this content is entertaining, it also crowds out the other content that friends share with each other. So now we’re left sorting through a ton of message threads to see what’s going on with friends, or most commonly, we just don’t get that update at all. That’s a superpower lost.

Even though consumer social is insanely hard, we decided to do this together because it’s the app we wanted for ourselves, and we think it’s important that people have a place that remains dedicated to being the best place to catch up with friends and family.

So give it a whirl! If you’ve taken a photo on your iPhone in the last month, you have enough to get started. And as you use it over the course of a couple weeks, we hope it helps you appreciate moments big and small in your own life and in the lives of your friends and family.

Name: Poland People LinkedIn
Description:
O nas – LinkedIn Poland People

To inicjatywa tworzona przez ludzi i dla ludzi. Oddolna, autentyczna i pełna dobrej energii. Budujemy przestrzeń, która inspiruje, wspiera i edukuje polską społeczność LinkedIna. Łączymy osoby z różnych branż, miast i środowisk, ale wokół wartości współpracy, otwartości i dzielenia się wiedzą.

Na naszym profilu znajdziesz:

Treści motywacyjne i wspierające– historie zawodowe, które pokazują, że nie ma jednej słusznej drogi; refleksje pomagające odnaleźć się w zmieniającym się świecie pracy; głosy osób dzielących się swoim doświadczeniem, szczerze, autentycznie, z różnych perspektyw.

Wpisy edukacyjne i praktyczne porady o karierze, networkingu, szukaniu pracy i rozwoju osobistym; wskazówki, jak działać na LinkedIn i budować swoją markę w sieci; wiedza ekspercka jest dostępna, zrozumiała i przydatna.

Głos społeczności czyli przestrzeń dla każdego, niezależnie od etapu kariery; miejsce na opinie, przemyślenia, pytania i wspólne inicjatywy; dialog, a nie monolog. Wymiana, nie nadawanie.

Inspiracje z Polski i ze świata, a zatem inicjatywy i projekty pokazujące, że profesjonalizm może iść w parze z wartościami; treści poszerzające perspektywę i zachęcające do odwagi w działaniu.

LinkedIn Poland People to inicjatywa oddolna, całkowicie niezależna i niepowiązana z marką LinkedIn. Tworzona przez osoby prywatne z potrzeby dzielenia się, wspierania i budowania wartościowej przestrzeni w środowisku zawodowym.

The first in the 2023 panel series will feature distinguished New Zealand business woman – Dame Therese Walsh, the popular and talented broadcaster – Toni Street, and the successful and influential executive in Pasifika Medicine – Debbie Sorensen.
The panel has featured some of the country’s most high-profile and successful female leaders, the first five years of the series held under legacy organisation Professionelle.org.nz:

Name: Health-Thing
Description:
Dé peer-to-peer gedreven online buddy voor jonge zorgprofessionals die zorgt voor behoud. Wij zorgen ervoor dat studenten en jonge professionals met meer veerkracht en werkplezier verbonden blijven met hun passie: de zorgverlening. 

Om jonge zorgprofessionals beter te verbinden, (door)ontwikkelen wij – samen met jonge professionals – een online sociaal leerplatform waar ze anoniem en gelijkwaardig met elkaar kunnen praten, ervaringen kunnen delen en oplossingen vinden voor de uitdagingen waar zij nu op vastlopen. Het platform wordt actief begeleid zodat het écht gaat leven, iedereen zich veilig voelt en effectief van elkaar leert. 

Zorgorganisaties krijgen veel beter inzicht in de onderstroom van wat er écht speelt. Uiteraard geanonimiseerd en geaggregeerd, maar wel heel concreet.  

Jonge zorgprofessionals ervaren in de eerste jaren van hun loopbaan vaak een gebrek aan veiligheid en erkenning. Uit onderzoek blijkt dat 43% binnen twee jaar uitstroomt bij de eerste werkgever. Dat vraagt om een andere aanpak. Uit ons onderzoek blijkt dat het thuisfront de zorg-context niet altijd begrijpt en binnen de organisatie voelen jonge professionals niet altijd de ruimte om alles te bespreken. Health-Thing zorgt ervoor dat jonge zorgprofessionals wél die veilige plek hebben, als een soort Instagram maar dan anders.” 

Kortom: Health-Thing is een veilige community voor en door zorgprofessionals, ongeacht hun opleidingsniveau, zorgsector of werkgever.

Health-Thing is beschikbaar voor zorg- en onderwijsorganisaties die op een unieke wijze gaan voor het behoud van jonge zorgprofessionals.

Join the movement !!

Wij willen de arbeidsparticipatie voor hen verbeteren door hen passend te ondersteunen in hun re-integratietraject. Maatwerk leveren, met steun op het juiste moment, betrouwbare informatie en ervaringsdeskundigheid. Samen met de focusgroep, patiëntenwerkgroep, stakeholderwerkgroep en adviesraad passen we de gevalideerde Patiëntreis en Mijn Re-integratieplan aan, implementeren ze in een platform en borgen ze. 

Doel is een groot aantal mensen met een chronische aandoening te empoweren. Stakeholders werken vanuit hun perspectief mee om de aansluiting mogelijk te maken naar werk. Het platform brengt mensen bij elkaar en biedt ze steun op maat (bv. lotgenotencontact, buddy). Het project maakt 'voor elkaar' dat de doelgroep de weg naar werk weet te vinden en duurzaam aan het werk kan.

The app addresses a wide array of challenges that individuals encounter in their daily lives, providing a versatile platform for users to seek and offer various forms of support. Whether it's practical help with everyday tasks, guidance through mentoring and tutoring, sharing career advice, or providing emotional and mental support, "A Heart 2 Help" endeavors to cater to diverse needs, ensuring that no one faces their struggles alone.

Our vision for "A Heart 2 Help" extends beyond simply facilitating transactions of support; it aims to create meaningful connections that enrich and transform lives. By promoting a culture of caring and solidarity, the app seeks to make a tangible impact on individuals' well-being, fostering a sense of togetherness and community spirit.

The platform's user-friendly interface and intuitive features make it easy for individuals to connect with each other, whether they are seeking assistance or looking to make a positive impact in someone's life. By fostering a spirit of generosity and empathy, "A Heart 2 Help" aims to inspire a ripple effect of kindness and support, creating a network of individuals who are willing to lend a helping hand when it's needed most.

"A Heart 2 Help" endeavors to redefine the way we perceive support and assistance, emphasizing the power of human connection and collective goodwill. Our mission is to create a world where everyone has access to the support they need and where individuals are empowered to make a difference in the lives of others. Join us on this transformative journey as we strive to connect hearts and change lives through the power of compassion and community.

Name: JustPic - “What’s your passion ?”
Description:
JustPic - Just Passion Identity Communicator is an application with a real purpose. It is a networking platform which gives its users, an opportunity to build, follow and showcase their passion. Stay connected with other like-minded passionate individuals through passion communities which are led by Passion leaders. Participate in contests, and events created by passion leaders under different passion communities. 

Build your Passion Profile

Create your passion profile and stand out from the crowd, update your main passion and passion bio. Share your experiences and insights about your passion in your bio and incline other like-minded passionate individuals towards your passion. View others’ passion profiles and provide your review and ratings and appreciate them.

Build JustPic contacts

Avoid exchanging phone numbers and email addresses. Share your PID with other passionate people, add them to your contact list and learn more about the passions you share. Get your referral request approved to be able to access other JustPic applications.

Passion Communities

Create your passion communities which are appropriate to your passions and be a passionate leader. passTags are generated while creating the passion communities. You can be a member of different passion communities which are relevant to your passions and follow them to build your passions. Use the suitable passTags when you create posts.

Share your passion through Posts

JustPic has two types of posts namely, General posts and Passionate posts. You can share any general information which you are passionate about, it will be regarded as a General post. On the other hand, You can share your Knowledge, Experience, Advice, Look for opinions or ideas and Challenge others, it will be regarded as a Passionate post. 

Express your passion through WOWs

Showcase your passion to your JustPic contacts and passion communities by sharing videos in wows.

and More........................

Name: Walk In The Park Oslo
Description:
Velkommen til Walk In The Park Oslo, en fysisk, dynamisk #lavterskel #nettverkssamling med 4-6 treff i året. WITP har til hensikt å skape nye #relasjoner, #nettverk og #forretningsmuligheter i Oslo regionen. 

Målet er å skape mulighet for nye bekjentskaper og samarbeid i området din arbeidsplass opererer i eller for deg personlig.

Walk In The Park foregår flere steder i landet (sjekk gjerne ut Walk In The Park Romerike og Moss). Vi knytter kontakter gjennom speed-turer á 15 minutter med 3-5 nye bekjentskaper, og så bytter vi grupper slik at du får muligheten til å nettverke med så mange som mulig på 90 minutter.

Vi avslutter med lunsj for de som ønsker det og som bonus kan du oppleve nye spennende arenaer i regionen ved hvert treff.  

Walk In The Park Oslo passer for alle og er foreløpig kostnadsfritt  -  enten du søker å utvide dine bekjentskaper, kundenettverk, nye forretningskontakter eller kanskje du er på utkikk etter nye/andre jobbmuligheter?

Vi skaper verdi når vi møtes!

Name: Organise
Description:
Organise is a fast-growing startup on a mission to give everyone the tools, network and confidence to improve their life at work. Our vision is for a world in which decent, fairly paid work is available and accessible to all, and where all of us are treated with dignity and respect at work.

More than 1 million people are already using Organise. We put power in people’s hands, building a progressive force for change inside companies.

The Organise staff team pride ourselves on nimble, focused workplace campaigns. That means our team is decisive, ambitious and happy to take risks. We’re characterised by our energy and enthusiasm; we’d rather aim high and see what happens, than play it safe. We’re passionate about putting Organise members first – we believe change at work happens when more people get involved.

We're expanding our team and building out our platform to include a peer-to-peer network. We're building a space for people to build power and support each other at work pseudonymously. A space for our core members to talk to each other in a space their boss can't see. Small monthly subscriptions from members will verify their identity. The Organise network is paid for and protected by the workers. We currently operate in the UK, and are aiming to launch in the US by 2022.

Name: THE MIDDLE LIFE
Description:
Der Einfluss der Frauen ist heute überall spürbar und sichtbar. Frauen bergen ein grosses Potential in allen Bereichen. Sie sind in Familien die Entscheiderin und leisten mit ihrem Einsatz den grössten Beitrag zum Erfolg eines intakten Familienlebens. Im Geschäftsleben nehmen Frauen wichtige Positionen ein. Nicht unbedingt in hierarchisch hohen Positionen wie z.B. in Verwaltungsräten oder als Geschäftsleiterinnen, sondern in den wichtigen Schlüsselpositionen, die ein Unternehmen zusammenhalten und zum Funktionieren bringen. Sie kommunizieren dabei auf verschiedenen Ebenen. 

Frauen sind Männern heute mehr denn je ebenbürtig, wenn es um Erfolg gibt. Frauen fehlt es allerdings an Möglichkeiten sich zu vernetzen und sich somit mit Personen auszutauschen, die an gleichen oder ähnlichen Positionen im Geschäft oder überhaupt im Leben stehen. Sie sind gegenüber Männern nicht in erster Linie interessiert an einem möglichst grossen Verdienst. Sie möchten Anerkennung. Anerkennung auf verschiedenen Ebenen. 

Die STRONG WOMEN CONVENTION soll ein Treffpunkt für Frauen sein, die mit beiden Beinen im Leben stehen. Egal ob sie in einem anspruchsvollen Job angestellt, mit einem eigenen Business unterwegs oder mitten im Familienleben sind. An der STRONG WOMEN CONVENTION sollen sich Frauen auf der gleichen Ebene austauschen können, neue Impulse und Lösungsansätze bekommen, Inspiration mitnehmen und vor allem Netzwerke auf- und ausbauen können.

Name: SEO SERVICE PROVITER by Mst China
Description:
SEO (Search Engine Optimization) service providers are companies or individuals that specialize in optimizing websites for search engines like Google, Bing, and Yahoo. Their main goal is to improve a website's visibility and ranking on search engine results pages (SERPs) by using various optimization techniques.

SEO service providers offer a wide range of services that can be customized to meet the specific needs of their clients. Some of the most common services provided by SEO companies include:

Keyword research and analysis: This involves identifying the most relevant and valuable keywords for a website based on its industry, target audience, and competition.

On-page optimization: This includes optimizing the website's structure, content, and meta tags to make it more search engine-friendly and improve its relevance for targeted keywords.

Off-page optimization: This involves building high-quality backlinks to a website from reputable sources to improve its authority and credibility.

Technical SEO: This includes optimizing a website's technical aspects, such as site speed, mobile responsiveness, and URL structure, to improve its usability and search engine visibility.

Local SEO: This focuses on optimizing a website for local search results, such as Google Maps and other local directories, to improve its visibility for local searches.

SEO service providers can help businesses of all sizes improve their online presence and attract more traffic, leads, and sales from search engines. However, it's important to choose a reputable and experienced provider that uses ethical SEO practices and can deliver measurable results over time.

Name: Startup Gate EG
Description:
Startup Gate is a dynamic online platform designed to map, showcase, and support Egypt’s entrepreneurial landscape. Our mission is to connect all key players in the startup ecosystem through a centralized digital hub that fosters innovation, collaboration, and growth.

Our story? We're glad that you asked!

As founders who spent years immersed in Egypt’s entrepreneurship and innovation scene, Emmy Tawfik and Sarah Khalifa saw the same challenge repeating itself: incredible ideas and passionate founders struggling to find visibility, the right connections, and real growth opportunities. The ecosystem was thriving, yet fragmented. Information was scattered, collaborations were missed, and too many promising startups were left unseen.

We knew something had to change.

Drawing on our combined experience, we decided to build Startup Gate, a unified platform where founders, investors, mentors, and ecosystem partners could finally be listed to connect, collaborate, and grow together.

Startup Gate is backed by an Angel Network, the thing that strengthened our mission and expanded our reach, enabling us to bridge even more connections across Egypt’s innovation landscape.

And we’re just getting started.

Name: Business Network
Description:
Business Network – İş Dünyasının Yeni Buluşma Noktası

Business Network, profesyonellerin, girişimcilerin, şirketlerin ve iş dünyasının aktörlerinin bir araya gelerek bağlantı kurabileceği, iş birliği yapabileceği ve büyüyebileceği yeni nesil bir sosyal ağ platformudur.

İş dünyasında doğru insanlarla tanışmak, güvenilir ortaklıklar kurmak ve bilgiye hızlı erişmek artık her zamankinden daha önemli. Biz de bu ihtiyacı karşılamak için Business Network’ü kurduk.

Neler Sunuyoruz?
- Profesyonel Profil Oluşturma: Kendinizi ve işinizi en doğru şekilde tanıtabileceğiniz alan.
- Ağ Kurma (Networking): İş bağlantıları kurmak, sektörünüzdeki kişilerle tanışmak, iletişim ağınızı genişletmek.
- İlanlar ve İşbirlikleri: Proje, iş teklifi, ortaklık duyuruları ve hizmet alışverişi yapabileceğiniz alanlar.
- İçerik Paylaşımı ve Bilgi Akışı: Sektörel yazılar, başarı hikâyeleri, etkinlik duyuruları ve daha fazlası.

Neden Business Network?
- Çünkü burada sadece bağlantı kurmazsınız, etkileşim yaratırsınız.
- Çünkü burada sadece işinizi tanıtmazsınız, değerinizi büyütürsünüz.
- Ve çünkü burada sadece görünmezsiniz, fark yaratırsınız.

Vizyonumuz
İş dünyasının dijitalleşen geleceğinde, en güçlü ve güvenilir profesyonel topluluğu oluşturmak.

Misyonumuz
Her ölçekten birey ve işletmenin, iş dünyasında kendine yer bulabileceği, gelişebileceği ve bağlantılarla güçlenebileceği bir platform sunmak.

İş dünyası artık tek başına değil. Business Network ile bağlantılarınız sizi ileri taşır.
Sen de katıl, gücüne güç kat.

Name: Gaggle Social: Tech Networking & Hiring
Description:
Gaggle Social is known for being a unique, onshore-only, professional social network and hiring platform dedicated to enterprise applications. It streamlines tech hiring, education, networking, and business development for talent, companies, and channel partners, focusing on efficiency and eliminating traditional recruitment barriers. 

Why? Because technology hiring is too complex for the historical "One size fits all hiring approach"!

Gaggle Social streamlines your technology employment goals through industry-tailored functionality that addresses the major bottlenecks in each step of the hiring process: 

-How long it takes to digest a professional's entire technology experience
-The unmanageably large shortlists filled with unqualified applicants 
-Lengthy team interview schedule management 
-Sub-conscious biases in the hiring process
-Costly daily job spends

Gaggle connects you with the best talent and hiring solutions for tech simply, quickly, and cost-effectively with no headaches!

Search and evaluate talent from all over the U.S. based on their tech knowledge, compensation, company culture expectation, and service offers (if applicable) to fly your business' back-end operations to heights you didn't know were possible. 

Reap the benefits of posting jobs, projects, or setting up auctions for talent across the U.S. to apply for or bid on! Gaggle will match your openings with talent based on your needs and budget! 

Or, join our talent network and browse through thousands of participating clients in search of talented individuals just like yourself to tackle anything, big or small in our collaborative community of enterprise application professionals. 

Supporting hiring & contracting for

Salesforce
AWS
SAP
NetSuite
Microsoft Dynamics
Oracle
And many more!

Name: Women Future Cities
Description:
The Women Future Cities initiative, launched from the Sultanate of Oman, is a pioneering global movement designed to empower women to lead the development of smart, sustainable cities. Rooted in Oman’s commitment to innovation and gender equality, the initiative aligns with global sustainability goals to equip women with the skills, knowledge, and leadership tools necessary to shape vibrant, inclusive urban communities. This Global Initiative to Drive Women Build Happy Communities and Livable Cities focuses on positioning women as the driving force behind cities that are not only smart but also resilient, people-centered, and thriving.

The initiative is structured into three levels of engagement: Dreamer, Ambassador, and Champion, providing a progressive pathway for women to grow and make a measurable impact. Dreamers represent those embarking on their journey of learning and exploration. Ambassadors are women actively conducting workshops and initiatives to inspire and educate others, while Champions lead executive teams and drive transformational projects within their regions. These levels not only empower women but also serve as a tool to measure the initiative’s success and impact. With Head of Chapters spearheading efforts in each country, Women Future Cities fosters a global network of collaboration and innovation. From Oman to the world, this initiative aspires to create a legacy of empowered women building happy, livable cities for future generations.

 Mitä tarjoamme?

In a world where financial performance often dictates company decisions, HealthTechQuity strives to offer a refreshing source of inspiration and meaningful connections for mission-driven individuals across HealthTech, MedTech, and Biotech industries.

By fostering networking opportunities and featuring impactful stories, we aim to spotlight the innovative products and initiatives that leverage technology to improve lives, close health equity gaps, whilst building sustainable, economically thriving businesses. Ultimately questioning “how to do well by doing good?”.

We offer: 
 Connection via in-person networking events, roundtables and panel discussions with set agendas and room for healthy debate held out of Boston, New York, Miami and San Diego. Alongside a virtual LinkedIn group.
 Inspiration via quickfire 1-1 spotlights of mission-driven leaders and professionals.

Name: FIGHT CLUB CDMX
Description:
The Networking experiences for CEOs/Investors/Digital Nomads and Entrepreneurs of Mexico City happening monthly: https://www.fightclubcdmx.com/

• The experience venue will always be new every time and spectacular. To keep the FIGHT CLUB spirit the venue will only be communicated 1 or 2 days before the event itself. 
• It will always be hosted in popular areas [From Polanco to Napoles] unless it is a out-of-city hiking experience
• The experiences are mostly hosted once a month
• If you sign up on LinkedIn to our experience, you will be contacted to explain the pricing and event info and your LinkedIn will be checked to guarantee high level networking
• If you want to invite friends or enemies - any newcomers, please forward them this Registration Link received in the Calendar Blocker
• Every new visitor's LinkedIn will be checked to make sure all participants and newcomers can benefit from mutual knowledge & industry exchange
• Please get in touch with us for questions comments concerns and suggestions [PM]

Who is attending: 100-150 participants: Big Tech companies, architecture firms, start ups, automotive companies and as well investors.

How do I sign up? Every visitor's LinkedIn is checked to understand if there is value in attending. Afterwards venue is communicated with entry details in personal message.

How do I enter the group? You must come in person to the experience first to receive the invitation to join the LinkedIn group. Start here www.fightclubcdmx.com

Xoxo
Gossip Girl

Name: ENERGIZING GREECE
Description:
Energizing Greece is an initiative within a wider ecosystem whose mission is to highlight dynamics, inspirational, and visionary development actions from a Greek perspective.
The core of Energizing Greece is the mobilization of forces for targeted development, achieved through pioneering decisions, methodical planning, structured implementation and investments built upon progress, innovation, technological evolution, and the creation of a platform to help modernize the country.
To this end, the strengthening of Greece’s energy transition in line with International standards , and the necessary actions to confront the climate change within the framework defined by the 4th industrial revolution, take precedence.
Energizing Greece’s priority is to record and highlight significant programmes & contributors, to encourage the creation of bonds and the implementation of actions, which help establishing a leading international presence for Greece.
In ecosystems, participants evolve and become stronger as they improve their potential, by acquiring new skills and building relationships.
Ecosystems are founded on the dual principles of risk reduction and creating an environment for opportunity.
Networks and Communities strengthen the driving forces of cooperation between institutions, in the private and public sectors, academia, the scientific and entrepreneurial units, giving a head start to the next generation and providing support through recognized experts who have achieved, innovated and created their own remarkable paths.
Initiatives and Conferences highlight forward-looking strategies, technical know-how, innovative efforts, pioneering achievements and investments that brings Greece’s growth prospects to light within an international scope.

Bharatpreneurs is a movement to ignite the entrepreneurial spirit across India and empower MSME founders who are driving real economic change.

This initiative aims to support local entrepreneurs, bring attention to their challenges, and connect them with the right knowledge, networks, and guidance to grow.

Our mission aligns with India's journey towards becoming a 5 trillion-dollar economy, and we believe change will be driven by bold, grassroots business leaders.

Through this platform, we are collaborating with visionary individuals and institutions who share our goal of transforming the MSME landscape.

The event will feature leadership panels, expert sessions, and open discussions focused on real problems faced by small businesses today.

Founders will have the opportunity to learn, network, and explore solutions that can accelerate their business journey.

Description:
Lit Amor is a next-generation social and dating platform built to redefine how people connect, grow, and form meaningful relationships. Designed for both singles and couples, Lit Amor blends psychological compatibility, emotional intelligence, and shared personal growth into one seamless app experience.

For singles, our platform uses deep behavioral insights and a proprietary compatibility scoring system to enable smarter, more genuine connections. For couples, we offer creative, interactive tools to deepen bonds, such as shared journaling, streak challenges, and a playful social space.

Our mission is to create a safe, mindful, and emotionally fulfilling digital space where people don't just meet — they evolve together. As a growing startup with a strong vision, we're on the lookout for passionate interns who want to shape the future of love, tech, and meaningful social experiences.

Description:
PointZero is the future of social media — where freedom meets innovation.
We’re reimagining how people connect, express, and discover through a bold new experience powered by AI. With full control over what you see, real-time customization, and a personalized algorithm, PointZero puts users — not the system — in charge.
No noise. No limits. Just your world, your rules.

Name: Camphire
Description:
About Camphire

Camphire is building the single access point for AI in Germany — a platform where companies, professionals, and partners come together to close the country’s growing AI talent gap.

For AI professionals, Camphire is the place to showcase skills, projects, and research beyond a traditional CV. Our AI-driven profiling pipeline transforms portfolios, code, and publications into enriched candidate profiles that highlight both expertise and growth potential.

For companies, Camphire offers a smarter way to hire: semantic job matching, curated talent pools, and innovative models such as Talent Auctions. Employers gain faster, more precise access to scarce AI specialists while also unlocking training pathways for talent.

For partners, Camphire provides a channel to deliver upskilling, consulting, and community services directly where demand is highest.

Our vision is to make Camphire the hub for AI in Germany: not just a job board, but a community where hiring, learning, and collaboration happen in one place. With unique legal, HR, and AI expertise in our founding team — and a growing product and partner network — we’re creating the ecosystem Germany needs to thrive in the age of AI.

Name: Huut
Description:
Huut is a voice first social media platform which connects people from all over the world to build a diverse global community, united by voice. Huut reimagines a new world by bringing back the power of voice towards humanizing the social media experience.

Huut helps you to share and express your thoughts, ideas and moments with your own authentic voice creating meaningful conversations. We believe that when we empower voice, we empower the world.

Huut is a multi-lingual platform allowing everyone to express in their own preferred language. Huut is currently available in 14 Indian languages and 5 international languages.

Share your voice and join the movement.

Description: Fiuby is an innovative gaming social media platform that brings the gaming world together. Name: Motherland
Description:
Motherland is a national charity that advocates for the emotional wellbeing of rural mothers in Australia and delivers services that help build resilience and 
improve mental health outcomes.

Motherland’s mission is to eliminate the crippling isolation many rural mums 
face by connecting them to a supportive online community and offering 
support services including a mothers group program that every rural mum can access, regardless of her location.

Through the Motherland podcast, our Motherland Village program, Motherland Connect, online support network, events, and advocacy, we have become the voice and village that rural mums desperately needed but didn’t have, until Motherland.

Name: Your Friends Are Boring
Description:
Making new friends can be hard. Chances are people you meet never go surfing with you, you always end up going climbing alone, or no one happens to share the same passion for late-night taco crawls. 

It took us a while to realize it, but now it's about time you also assume the truth: your friends are boring.

The struggle is real. That's why we are creating the biggest (unboring) community of young professionals.
