For seafarers, it is a trusted hub to connect, share experiences, and access global career opportunities while keeping documents and CVs live and always up to date. For businesses, The Hood offers streamlined recruitment through group accounts, dedicated portals, and advanced reporting, helping reduce hiring time and cost while ensuring compliance and transparency. Beyond recruitment, The Hood fosters collaboration through chat, group discussions, video calls, and community features that strengthen ties across generations of maritime professionals. By putting people at the heart of technology, The Hood bridges gaps, builds trust, and empowers the future of shipping.

Name: Pomorska Platforma Offshore (PPO)
Description:
Pomorska Platforma Offshore powstała w 2020 roku z inicjatywy samorządu województwa pomowskiego. 
Jej celem jest zwiększenie udziału pomorskich i polskich firm w procesie budowy morskich farm wiatrowych oraz przygotowanie wykwalifikowanych kadr do pracy w tym sektorze. 
Nacisk jest również położony na wykorzystywanie regionalnego potencjału badawczo-rozwojowego oraz właściwe informowanie przedsiębiorców i społeczeństwa o skali prowadzonych inwestycji. 
Rozwój farm wiatrowych na Bałtyku daje nowy impuls dla małych portów zlokalizowanych na linii brzegowej województwa pomorskiego oraz szanse na rozwój gospodarczy tych ośrodków.

Name: Metal Netværket
Description:
Velkommen til Danmarks nye Metal Netværk.

Et stærkt branchenetværk, der er målrettet ejere, ledere og beslutningstagere inden for metalindustrien, herunder både producenter og underleverandører.

Skabt af branchefolk for branchefolk. Vi ser en kæmpe værdi i at gå sammen om at styrke den branche, som vi brænder så meget for. En branche, som er inde i en spændende udvikling, hvor mulighederne er mange. Vi brug for endnu flere unge talenter, ny teknologi og den bedste viden indenfor vores felt. 

Vores overordnede vision er at løfte den samlede branche. Det skal vi blandt andet gøre ved at være synlige, og fremhæve, at vi også skaber attraktive arbejdspladser for de unge. Vi vil gøre det nemmere at tiltrække den rigtige arbejdskraft!

For det enkelte medlem ønsker vi at skabe værdi ved at etablere et fællesskab, hvor der opbygges nye, stærke relationer. Vi vil give vores medlemmer mulighed for at snakke med andre, der kæmper med de samme problemstillinger og udfordringer som os selv. 

Vi vil tage brancherelevante emner op og dele viden i et uformelt, men professionelt miljø.

Som medlem i Metal Netværket får du:

•	Et større netværk
•	Gode og tætte relationer med flere folk fra branchen
•	Adgang til sparring
•	Ny relevant viden
•	Adgang til faglige kompetencer 
•	Gode events og hyggeligt samvær

Name: Oldenburger Currywurst Gesellschaft
Description:
Currywurst verbindet. Wir bringen Unternehmer:innen aus Oldenburg und der Region an einen Tisch – ganz ohne PowerPoint, aber mit Power im Gespräch.

Die Currywurst Gesellschaft Oldenburg ist ein freies Netzwerk von Selbständigen, Geschäftsführer:innen und Führungskräften aus Oldenburg, der Wesermarsch, dem Ammerland und Bremen.

Wir treffen uns jeden dritten Freitag im Monat um 12.30 zum Austausch – entspannt, persönlich, inspirierend. Immer an einem anderen Ort, um die Vielfalt unserer Gastronomie und unserer Community zu feiern.

Kein Verein. Keine Pflichttermine. Keine Mitgliedsbeiträge.
Nur echte Gespräche mit Menschen, die was bewegen wollen.

 Für dich, wenn du:
– dein Netzwerk ausbauen willst
– Unternehmergeist schätzt
– Lust auf ehrlichen Austausch auf Augenhöhe hast

 Für Stammgäste gilt: Bring deinen spannendsten Geschäftskontakt mit.
Für Neulinge: Komm vorbei, lern uns kennen – und bleib, wenn’s passt.

Name: On My Way!
Description:
On My Way is your go-to platform for immediate, impactful action. We connect individuals and institutions to create, join, and invest in sustainable opportunities, empowering you to make a difference right now. Whether it's last-minute volunteering, responding to urgent climate calls, or engaging in spontaneous acts of kindness, On My Way provides a real-time solution to the question, "I want to act. What can I do?"

 Immediate Action: Engage in meaningful actions, from quick exchanges between strangers to on-the-spot environmental efforts, tailored to your location and the immediate needs around you. Join activities led by individuals, NGOs, or communities right now.

 Empowerment: On My Way goes beyond microcosms, preconceived ideas, and stereotypes to empower everyone to initiate, lead, find support, and participate in actions that matter. On My Way connects you with others who share your passion, breaking down the barriers that often prevent us from taking action.

 Community & Connection: Our platform fosters a sense of community by connecting you with like-minded individuals, allowing you to initiate and join actions that make a real difference. It’s not just about doing something good; it’s about doing it together.

 A Catalyst for Change: With On My Way, you can be the spark that ignites change. Our platform empowers individuals from all backgrounds to become leaders in their communities, inspiring others to follow your lead.

 Innovative Features: We're excited to introduce features that will enhance community engagement, provide financial support for locally-led actions, and offer pathways for skill development. On My Way makes it easy to find others to collaborate with on the actions that matter most to you.

Join the Movement: Download On My Way now and start making a difference today. Together, we can rebuild the social fabric and create a world where everyone is empowered to act, without relying on institutions to take the lead.

Name: ASCINA - Austrian Scientists & Scholars in North America
Description:
ASciNA (Austrian Scientists & Scholars in North America) is the first and only independent network of Austrian scientists and scholars in North America, including the USA, Canada, and Mexico. The main focus of ASciNA is on its currently 17 local Chapters both in North America, as well as several strong ASciNA Alumni Chapters across Europe, which have become a “home away from home” for many of our members. Our main ASciNA-wide activities are the ASciNA Awards, which are awarded annually in the “PrincipaI Investigator” and “Young Scientist” category, and our ASciNA Mentoring Program, that connects early career ASciNA members with accomplished ASciNA members who are successful scientists or scholars in their respective field.

Having been established in 2002, our members include scientists from a diverse range of educational backgrounds, spanning from economics to physics, from life sciences to marine biology and the arts. We offer information, help newly arrived scientists orient themselves in their new surroundings, provide career development support and networking opportunities, organize events, and representation of the interests of Austrian scholars and scientists.

ASciNA maintains a strong cooperation with official Austrian institutions such as the Federal Ministries, Universities, and Funding Agencies.

The key areas include:

- Fire safety
- Electrical safety
- Gas safety
- Lift safety
- Asbestos management
- Water hygiene
- Damp and mould
- Tree management
- Playground safety
- Construction design management
- Other associated risk factors for tenant and resident safety.

The Social Housing Safety Network Scotland is independently run and led, as part of the wider Housing H&S Compliance UK Ltd brand.

Smesh tüm iletişim bilgilerinizi, sosyal medya hesaplarınızı ve satış kanallarınızı fiziksel bir ürün kullanmadan paylaşmanızı ve potansiyel müşterileriniz ile iletişiminizi sürdürülebilir hale getirmenizi sağlayan bir platformdur.

Smesh kullanıcıları birbirleri ile QR kod, NFC ve Smesh ID ile iletişim bilgilerini paylaşabilmekte ve alabilmektedirler.
Kartvizit okuyucu sistem sayesinde karşı taraf Smesh kullanmasa da Smesh, OCR teknolojili kartvizit okuyucu sistemi ile kağıt kartvizitleri anında dijital hale getirir.
Karşı taraf Smesh kullanmasa da webde açılma özelliği ile Smesh kullanıcıları bilgilerini karşı tarafa aktarabilirler.

Name: About Business
Description:
Effektives Networking für dein Business: Unser About Business Event bietet gezieltes Vernetzen mit Gründern, Geschäftsführern und Verwaltungsräten, um spannende Kontakte und potenzielle Geschäftspartner zu treffen.

Stehlunches oder lange Abende mit Apéro kennen wir alle gut. Dabei etwas Smalltalk und mit viel Glück ist ein neuer Kontakt dann evtl. hilfreich für das eigene Business. Meist erweitert man jedoch einfach sein Netzwerk, aber die neuen Kontakte bringen einem dann doch nicht viel weiter. Genau dies möchten wir mit unserem About Business Event ändern.

Ziel dieses Events ist es das Vernetzen für zukünftiges Business in den Vordergrund zu stellen. Dabei möchten wir nicht auf den Smalltalk verzichten, diesen jedoch gezielt und bewusst einsetzen. Das bedeutet, dass jeder Teilnehmer genügend Infos über die anderen Teilnehmer erhält und so den Smalltalk explizit mit potenziellen Businesspartnern oder Kunden anvisieren kann.

Bewusst und gezielt werden zum Event nur folgende Personen eingeladen: Geschäftsführer, Gründer, Verwaltungsräte, Athleten und Politiker. Zusammengefasst sind dies alles Entscheidungsträger, welche somit bei spannenden Kontakten gleich einen ersten Schritt angehen können.

Name: LinkedIn Coach
Description:
Viele Experten, Unternehmer und Führungskräfte sind brillant in ihrem Fach – aber online unsichtbar.
Das kostet wertvolle Chancen: weniger Kunden, schwaches Employer Branding, verpasste Investorenkontakte.

Wir ändern das.
Wir machen Dich sichtbar auf LinkedIn – ohne Show, ohne Stress, ohne zusätzliche To-do-Listen.

 Unser Ansatz:
•	Minimaler Zeitaufwand – wir übernehmen die Arbeit im Hintergrund, Du profitierst von den Ergebnissen.
•	Authentische Positionierung – keine Copy-Paste-Texte, sondern Dein Auftritt, der Deine Persönlichkeit und Kompetenz trägt.
•	Messbare Ergebnisse – +200 % Profilaufrufe, Direktanfragen in nur 2 Wochen, planbare Sichtbarkeit statt Zufall.
•	Ganzheitliches System – von der Analyse über die Strategie bis hin zu Content und Optimierung.

 Das Ergebnis:
•	Du wirst wahrgenommen als Thought Leader in Deiner Branche.
•	Du ziehst Kunden, Partner, Investoren und Talente an – ohne Dich zu verbiegen.

Endlich sichtbar. Ohne Theater. Ohne Stress.

 Wer bin ich und was macht mich anders?
Ich bin Jürgen Kob, LinkedIn-Coach mit 35 Jahren Erfahrung zwischen Finanzwelt, Digitalisierung und Positionierung. 
Dich erwartet kein Social-Media-Berater, der gerade TikTok entdeckt hat, sondern Verwaltungsrat, Vermögensverwalter, Unternehmer – ich kenne Dein Tagesgeschäft und die Herausforderungen!

Ich helfe Dir, Dich messerscharf zu positionieren, ein glaubwürdiges Profil zu gestalten und die richtigen Signale zu senden – ohne stundenlange Bastelarbeit oder Social-Media-Druck.

 Was Du erwarten kannst:
• Eine Positionierung, die Deine Stärken und Deinen Unterschied sichtbar macht.
• Ein Profil, das Deine Expertise und Persönlichkeit unterstreicht.
• Eine Content-Strategie mit Wirkung – ohne täglichen Posting-Stress.
• Effizienz durch smarte Tools: Prozesse vereinfachen, Inhalte entwickeln, Aufgaben automatisieren – das spart Zeit für das, was zählt.

Ich bin Dein Guide, der den Weg kennt und Dich ohne Umwege ans Ziel bringt – fokussiert, effizient, auf

 Solide ne fait pas d'accompagnement/ conseil

Si vous avez besoin d'espoir, de concret et d'utile, vous êtes au bon endroit.

Name: The Fruit of Knowledge
Description:
The Fruit of Knowledge is the first Psychedelic Directory for a rapidly expanding new industry with very similar traits to the cannabis industry 10 years ago.  

The burgeoning psychedelic industry has several critical components that will influence its development and success. The Fruit of Knowledge will provide a portal to access a diverse yet interconnected verticle.

1. Research and Development: This is a crucial aspect of establishing the safety and efficacy of psychedelic compounds for treating various mental health conditions like depression, anxiety, and PTSD.
 
2. Manufacturing and Supply Chain: It is essential to develop sustainable and safe methods for cultivating psychedelic plants or synthesizing psychedelic compounds.
 
3. Regulatory Landscape: Advocacy and lobbying efforts are needed to influence policy changes around psychedelic use, potentially leading to increased research funding and rescheduling. Regulatory bodies like the FDA will play a crucial role in establishing approval pathways for psychedelic-assisted therapies.

4. Healthcare Delivery: Training therapists and other healthcare professionals in safe and effective psychedelic-assisted therapy protocols is vital.
 
5. Public Education and Access: Shifting public perception away from the stigma surrounding psychedelics towards a more informed and open view of their therapeutic potential.
Accessibility: Ensuring equitable access to psychedelic-assisted therapy.

Additional Considerations:

Indigenous Rights and Knowledge: Respecting and collaborating with indigenous communities who have used psychedelics for millennia is crucial.

Investment and Business Models: The industry will need sustainable business models to support research, development, and therapy access.

Ethical Considerations: Maintaining ethical standards throughout research, development, and clinical practice is paramount.

These are some of the critical components of the psychedelic industry.

Name: Visible Voice - Connecting Talent with Opportunities
Description:
Welcome to VisibleVoice! 

We are a LinkedIn series dedicated to showcasing the achievements, interests, and talents of individuals who are actively seeking new career opportunities. Our mission is to provide a platform that goes beyond traditional resumes, offering an interactive and engaging way for job seekers to increase their visibility in the job market.

At VisibleVoice, we believe that everyone deserves an opportunity to shine. Our virtual coffee chats bring together passionate individuals from various professional backgrounds, providing them with a space to share their stories, skills, and aspirations. Through insightful conversations, we aim to connect talented individuals with potential employers in our extensive network.

Why choose VisibleVoice?

Increased Visibility: Our LinkedIn series highlights the accomplishments and passions of job seekers, giving them an additional platform to stand out in the job market.

Networking Opportunities: By participating in our virtual coffee chats, individuals have the chance to expand their professional network and connect with potential employers who are seeking their unique skill sets.

Elevating Communication Skills: Our engaging conversations allow participants to showcase their excellent communication and public speaking abilities, further enhancing their appeal to potential employers.

Join us on this exciting journey as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity. Together, let's make job hunting a more personal, enjoyable, and effective experience.

[Disclaimer]:
VisibleVoice is not a job placement agency or recruitment service. We provide a platform for job seekers to increase their visibility and connect with potential employers. The final hiring decisions are made solely by employers and participants are responsible for conducting their due diligence during the job search process.

Name: Immigrant Buddies
Description:
When immigrants first arrive in the US, it's often a challenge for them to adjust to a new life smoothly and efficiently. Immigrant Buddies connects new immigrants with Buddies (local mentors and friends) who help them navigate resources and integrate into America. 

Any new immigrant can sign up for support, regardless of what they came for (refugee/asylum, work, school, family, business), and what type of Visa they hold. Buddies can be anyone who wants to support or befriend immigrants, whether they're a native-born American or an immigrant who has been here for a while. 

We operate immigrantbuddies.org, a peer-to-peer support web platform. Immigrants can find Buddies based on the areas of help they can offer, which include: finding employment, learning American culture, becoming friends, understanding healthcare, document assistance, transportation, financial aid, daily skills/living assistance, learning English, and others. Buddies will be able to find immigrants as well. The two sides can connect and message through the platform. The Immigrant Buddies platform is simple and accessible, without stringent requirements. There are safety mechanisms such as initial calls to verify profiles, with eventual technical processes such as background checks.

We aim to be an inclusive, diverse and inspiring platform for scholars and stakeholders from a broad range of disciplines to shape and implement regional contributions to pressing global ocean and sustainability challenges.

Our ambition is to
- Facilitate innovative ocean research, education and engagement to deliver greater benefits for ocean health and society.
- Strengthen disciplinary excellence and transdisciplinary communication that enables the co-creation of transformative projects.

Join us in building a sustainable future for our ocean and beyond.

2) To enable caregivers and patient advocates to easily and meaningfully connect in a safe online community, with others in similar roles — so they are “seen”, “heard”, and “understood.” Whether communicating about caregiving, patient advocacy, or personal interest topics, My Care Friends provides many ways for community members to Connect, Share, and Support each other.

3) To bring about greater awareness on local, regional, and national levels, of the need for significantly increased support of caregivers in light of the growing shortage of caregivers. The stress of which causes an exponential financial, physical, emotional, and psychological strain on individuals and families.

Name: De4K
Description:
Västerbottens Landshövding Helene Hellmark Knutsson brinner för att synliggöra företagande bland kvinnor och har tillsammans med Sparbanksstiftelsen Norrlands Riskkapitalstiftelse startade hon en plattform för kvinnor som äger, driver eller investerar i företag. Denna plattform heter De4K och står för Kapital, Kompetens, Kontakter och Kunder.

De4K syftar till att lyfta företagsfrågor med olika tematiska inriktningar med mötesplatser runt om i Västerbotten. Plattformen är tänkt att vara ett komplement till redan existerande lokala nätverk. 

Under 2024 har plattformen vidareutvecklats till att nu även innefatta Västernorrlands län på initiativ av Carin Jämtin, landshövding i Västernorrland.

English

Västerbotten County Governor Helene Hellmark Knutsson is passionate about making entrepreneurship visible among women and has, together with Sparbanksstiftelsen Norrlands Riskkapitalstiftelse, started a platform for women who own, run or invest in companies. This platform is called De4K and stands for Capital, Skills, Contacts and Customers.

De4K aims to highlight business issues with different thematic orientations with meeting places around Västerbotten. The platform is intended to be a complement to existing local networks.

During 2024, the platform has been further developed to now also include Västernorrland County, initiated by Carin Jämtin, Governor of Västernorrland.

Name: Amintro Inc.
Description:
Amintro Inc. is a technology company dedicated to keeping families healthy and whole for life through our innovative and specialized social platforms and mobile apps; Amintro Friends and Amintro Family. 

AMINTRO FRIENDS – Community and Friendship for Adults 50plus
Free to join, Amintro Friends is designed for people over 50 who are looking to connect, make new friends, and engage in meaningful social interactions. Amintro Friends encourages offline connection, with opportunities for members to meet in person or participate in local events. Whether looking for new friends or sharing fun moments, Amintro Friends combines the ease of social platforms with a focus on inspiring adults over the age of 50 to live their best life.

AMINTRO FAMILY – Community and Support for Family Caregivers of Older Relatives
Free to join, Amintro Family is a unique social platform designed specifically to help individuals who are navigating the challenges of caregiving for older family or friends. It serves as a supportive space where family caregivers can connect, share experiences, and access helpful resources. It fosters a sense of community among people who understand the emotional and practical challenges of caregiving, offering both emotional support and helpful tools. Whether users are seeking expert resources, connecting with others in similar situations, or sharing personal experiences, Amintro Family provides a safe, focused environment where caregiving journeys can be navigated together.

Business Solutions
Amintro Friends and Amintro Family are separate platforms, each with its unique demographic and user objectives. Description:
Die Rheinische Runde zur Streitbeilegung hat das Ziel, den fachlichen Austausch innerhalb der Rechtsanwaltsszene im Rheinland zu fördern und einen Raum fürs Netzwerken zu bieten. 

Alle zwei Monaten organisieren wir Treffen für Prozessrechtsanwält*innen, bei denen zunächst ein Impulsvortrag zu einem rechtlichen Thema mit anschließender Diskussion in den Abend einleitet. Im Nachgang bieten Häppchen und Getränke den Teilnehmer*innen Raum, um bestehende Kontakte zu pflegen und neue Kontakte zu knüpfen. 

Die Örtlichkeit, das Thema sowie die Vortragenden wechseln bei jedem Treffen.

Die Initiatoren der Rheinischen Runde zur Streitbeilegung sind Ilka Beimel und Patrick Rode.

Kom langs voor een bezoek!
Wij hebben nog een aantal open categorieën waarvoor we op zoek zijn naar enthousiaste ondernemers. Wij laten slechts één persoon per branche/specialisatie toe. Het veroveren van een plekje aan tafel biedt dus unieke ondernemerskansen. Wie interesse heeft om eens te komen kijken en de sfeer te proeven kan zich via de website van ZakenNet De Kamper Steur opgeven als gast. Of gewoon via LinkedIn een privéberichtje sturen.

Aanbevelingsmarketing
Aanbevelingsmarketing wil zeggen dat de aangesloten ondernemers goed kijken in hun netwerken of zich daar ook zakelijke mogelijkheden voordoen voor  andere afdelingsleden. Als dat het geval is, vragen ze hun relatie of dat lid contact met ze kan opnemen voor een kennismakingsgesprek of het doen van een aanbieding. Zo fungeert de gehele ZakenNet Afdeling in feite als verkoopteam voor zijn leden en dat leidt steevast tot extra omzet: eenvoudig, maar bijzonder effectief.

Die value sharing group betreibt verschiedene B2B-Portale, die praxisorientierte Tipps, Projektbeispiele, Hintergrundinformationen zu Trends und Best-Practice-Erfahrungen, in den jeweiligen Foren teilen. 

In der Wirtschaft entstehen oft Werte, die jedoch unbekannt bleiben, besonders auch bei kleinen und mittleren Unternehmen. 

Unser Ziel ist es, die teil unbekannten Projektergebnisse, Referenzen und Wertschöpfungen in fokussierten Foren zu teilen, jedoch nicht durch langweilige Pressemitteilungen oder plakative Marketing- und Werbebotschaften. Stattdessen betrachten wir die Ergebnisse kritisch, führen Interviews und helfen dabei, technischen Knowhow-Trägern, den nutzen einfach verständlich zu formulieren und zu verbreiten. 

Auf Community-Ebene werden Lösungen diskutiert und persönliche Gespräche und Kontaktvermittlungen angeboten, um eine praxisnahe Unterstützung bei der Suche nach bewährten Lösungen, Tools, Methoden und Dienstleistungen zu bieten.

Name: Erhvervsnetværk Thy-Mors
Description:
https://www.nielsgamborg.dk/indhold/lixberegner.htmFormål:
Erhvervsnetværk Thy-Mors er en medlemsejet erhvervsforening, hvor formålet er at hjælpe medlemmerne til vækst og meromsætning. Det sker gennem opbygning af stærke relationer mellem medlemmerne af erhvervsnetværket, og på den baggrund skabe rammerne for markedsføring gennem relationer og forretningsnetværk. Medlemmerne betragter hinanden som en stor salgs- og markedsføringsorganisation, der alle arbejder for hinanden.

 

Hvem er vi:

Erhvervsnetværk Thy-Mors er en registreret erhvervsorganisation, ejet af medlemmerne. Sammensætningen har stor bredde og medlemmerne er beskyttet af brancheeksklusivitet, som sikrer, at du som medlemmer kan arbejde frit, uden at kompromittere konkurrencehensyn.

 

Hvad kan vi:

Erhvervsnetværk Thy-Mors samles til ugentlige forretningsmøder, hvor medlemmerne får adgang til at søge efter hjælp, grundlæggende handler om hjælp til at få nye kunder, men nogle gange også er hjælp til andet som er et aktuelt behov, fx at finde nye dygtige medarbejdere.

Medlemmerne forventes at have en professionelle tilgang til erhvervsforeningens formål, og de stærke relationer give en afslappet og glad atmosfærer.

 WHY SHOULD YOU JOIN?

Name: SHEXON
Description:
At SHEXON, we are driven by the vision of creating a thriving community where bicultural talent can access professional networks, gain valuable insights, and find the guidance they need to succeed in the job market.

The Challenge:
More than half of international graduates leave the Netherlands within a year of graduation. Despite over 400,000 job vacancies, many talented individuals struggle to find suitable employment due to a lack of professional networks and insufficient information about the local job market.

Our Solution:
SHEXON is a community-based platform that connects international graduates with successful alumni from similar disciplines and cultural backgrounds. By facilitating the exchange of experiences in bicultural career events and offering personalized guidance through paid one-on-one mentorship, we empower bicultural talent to navigate their career paths more effectively.

For Alumni:
We organize events that enable alumni to give back to their communities by sharing their job market experiences and insights with current students and recent graduates. Your role as an alum is incredibly important – your experience and mentorship can make a significant impact, helping international graduates overcome challenges and thrive in their careers.

For Companies:
We help organizations assess, understand, and enhance their Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) status through scans, surveys, interviews, and training. Our bicultural career events boost employer branding and connect companies with top international graduates. We support firms in showcasing diversity, fostering belonging in international teams, and attracting skilled talent. This is a unique opportunity to demonstrate values, strengthen inclusion, and build a diverse, high-performing workforce.

Get Involved:
We are looking for forward-thinking companies and dedicated alumni to join us. Together, we can stop the waste of talent and create meaningful connections that benefit everyone involved.

Name: Young Irish Entrepreneurs Network
Description:
Hello there! 
Welcome to the Young Irish Entrepreneurs Networking Group Instagram page! 

The Young Irish Entrepreneurs was set up to help young, talented and aspiring entrepreneurs find likeminded people. Being an entrepreneur can be a lonesome journey at times. That is why having a networking group full of other aspiring entrepreneurs can be very helpful in keeping you on track. Also, it gives you access to a group of people to chat to about your ideas and reassure you that you’re not mad for wanting to work for yourself! 

At the moment we hold a meet up call on zoom once a month but hope to make these more frequent as more people join! We are also looking into doing in-person meet ups somewhere in Ireland in the not too distant future. 

If you are an entrepreneur and would like to join the group, give the page a follow, drop a message and we’ll get you added in as quick as we can! 

Looking forward to networking with everyone in the group! 

Chat soon

Name: Famous Short Video
Description:
Famous: Short Videos. Real Vibes. Global Connections.
In a world overflowing with fleeting likes, filters, and endless scroll, Famous brings something refreshing — a platform where short videos spark genuine connection and spread good vibes worldwide.
We believe short-form video can be more than quick entertainment. On Famous, every swipe is a chance to discover creators who inspire, communities that uplift, and conversations that matter. Whether it’s a daily update, a creative challenge, or a live stream moment, Famous is designed to capture authenticity, not perfection.
 Why Famous?
Share Short Videos Daily → Express yourself through quick, authentic clips that highlight your vibe, creativity, and story.
Good Vibes First → Our community is built on positivity, encouragement, and celebrating individuality.
Go Live, Go Global → Broadcast instantly and connect in real time with friends, fans, or new audiences.
Talk Rooms That Matter → Move beyond passive scrolling — join meaningful conversations with people who share your passions.
Celebrate What Makes You, You → No pressure, no fake trends, just the freedom to express your real self.
At Famous, we’re redefining what social media means. It’s not about chasing validation — it’s about building real connections, enjoying uplifting content, and discovering voices that resonate. We envision a global stage where creators, dreamers, and everyday people shine through the power of short videos.
 Whether you’re posting your daily vibe, starting a conversation, or simply looking for positive energy, Famous is your space to connect, share, and grow.
Join the movement. Share your vibe. Spread the good.
Download Famous today and see how short videos can create lasting impact.

Our platform also features podcasts and a dedicated jobs section, making it easier for legal professionals to discover and apply for relevant opportunities. In addition, the events section curates all major law-related events across India, ensuring accessibility and convenience for legal practitioners nationwide.

While the legal tech sector is still in its growth phase, many companies are emerging with innovative solutions. However, end-user readiness remains a challenge. Through Kacheri Diaries, legal tech companies can showcase their products and receive direct feedback from their target audience.

As part of our ongoing efforts to bridge the gap between law and technology, we are also building KD SaaS—a powerful legal-tech suite tailored for law firms, lawyers, and legal startups. This SaaS platform aims to streamline everything from legal drafting and document automation to client management and real-time collaboration. With KD SaaS, we’re creating intuitive tools that empower legal professionals to work smarter, faster, and more efficiently in a digital-first legal landscape.

When you think of law, Kacheri Diaries should be the first name that comes to mind—a one-stop solution for all legal needs.

Name: DieLogistikerinnen
Description:
Die Logistikerinnen ist ein Netzwerk für Frauen aus allen Querschnittsbereichen der Logistik.

Wir stehen für DAS, was längst nichts Besonderes mehr ist:
Frauen in der Logistik sind nicht mehr wegzudenken!!!

Egal ob, als Logistikleiterin, KI-Spezialistin, Bauleiterin, Land Acquisition Mager, Vertrieblerin, in organisatorische Funktion oder der Kommissionierung.

Frauen in der Logistik sind keine Neuheit, sondern die Grundpfeiler und der Alltag – hier darf sich der ein oder andere Wirtschaftszweig ein Vorbild drannehmen.

Genau das wollen wir in unserem Netzwerk hervorstellen und zeigen.
Unsere Netzwerktreffen haben den Erfahrungsaustausch, Weiterentwicklung und Zusammenarbeit im Fokus.

Bei unseren Netzwerktreffen sind Frauen aus allen Teilbereichen der Logistik herzlich willkommen!
Egal welche Position oder Erfahrungsstufe!

Einmal im Jahr wird es ein großes Forum geben
"Logistik von Frauen für alle"
Zu diesem sind natürlich auch unsere männlichen Kollegen einladen.

Name: Celo platform - ahol minden perced értéket teremt
Description:
A Celo platform digitális eszköz és felület a fenntarthatóság kommunikációjára. 

Vállalatod nevében keresed, hogy hogyan köteleződhetne el a cég fenntarthatósági értékek mellett? A Celo platform étlapot kínál vállalatod brandjéhez hű fenntarthatósági ügyek megtalálásához, amelyek a cég fenntarthatósági és ESG jelentésbe is belefoglalhatóak. Partnereink számára jól célzott marketingfelületet biztosítunk, emellett olyan eszközt adunk a kezükbe, mellyel a választott ügyet a Celoval együtt népszerűsítik. Vállalatok így élő fenntarthatósági ügyeken keresztül, közvetlenül kapcsolódnak fogyasztóikhoz és munkavállalóikhoz, növelve a márkahűséget és erősítve a munkáltatói márkát. 

Magánszemélyként érdeklődsz? A Celo platform összefogja a fenntarthatósági ügyeket, és segít megtalálni a Tiédet, úgy, hogy még az idődbe is beleférjen. 

Nonprofit szervezetet képviselsz? A Celo platform népszerűsíti az ügyedet, hogy hozzájuss minden erőforráshoz, amelyre szükséged van az ügy előmozdításához, olyan vállalkozások és magánszemélyek segítségével, akik osztoznak a szervezeted által képviselt értékekben.

Name: ConnectHER Idaho
Description:
Our mission is to provide safe, inclusive events for professional women and business owners to connect, build life-long relationships, enhance their personal development and thrive within their industries.

While we do highly encourage members to build genuine business connections, this is not an environment for pushing products or services. In lieu of this, we will offer opportunities for members to share about their businesses and their expertise through key-speaking and panel discussion events.

ConnectHER is also dedicated to the community and will use our platform to elevate non-profits across Idaho. If there is a non-profit you are passionate about and would like to see at an event, let us know!

We plan to keep these events FREE of charge as long as possible. If any members are interested in becoming an event sponsor, please let us know. There will be ample opporunity for businesses to leverage those sponsor dollars as a means of getting their name out to the network.

If you enjoy ConnectHER Idaho and would like to become more involved, contact us for information on committee involvement. We would love to have you on board!

Description:
Narrate . Navigate . Elevate

Wir lieben Storytelling. Bei Bevise dreht sich alles darum, dir und deiner Brand eine Plattform zu bieten – und zwar mit einer Stimme, die authentisch Deine ist. Unsere Spezialität? Als Content-Experten, Autoren und Ghostwriter setzen wir auf Qualität, nicht nur Quantität. Wir entscheiden gemeinsam, welche Kanäle für dich Sinn machen. Das schließt, neben regelmäßigem Content, auch Vorträge, Reden, Artikel und Buchprojekte nicht aus.
Wir setzen auf gründliche Recherche und echte Beziehungen zu unseren Kunden. Unser Ziel ist es Stories zu erzählen, die nicht nur gehört, sondern gefühlt werden und so echte Reichweite schaffen. Bist Du bereit, mit sinnstiftenden Projekten einen Unterschied zu machen? Lass uns gemeinsam Deine Geschichte erzählen.

Name: JESNetwork
Description:
The JES Network, was established by 《旭茉JESSICA》 in 2021 to provide a platform to connect our women of influence.

OUR AIM
As HK’s leading women’s media, 《旭茉JESSICA》 is dedicated to connecting, inspiring and empowering women.

Over the last two decades, we have honoured 200+ women in leadership from HK, Greater China and globally, with the 《旭茉JESSICA》 Most Successful Women Award, in recognition of their individual achievements and contributions to society.

OUR MISSION
Build a community to CONNECT female leaders and aspirational women and youths in Greater China and Asia.
 
INSPIRE 
members of the community, through sharing of experience, expert knowledge and know-how across through physical / online events, forums and seminars as well as exclusive curated content. 
 
EMPOWER 
women to build an influential community, increase engagement and mobilize the JES Network, driving entrepreneurial and individual growth, sustainability (socially, environmentally and economically), with particular focus on women in technology, and women in sports, in the Greater Bay Area, China and Asia.

about 《旭茉JESSICA》 
《旭茉JESSICA》 was launched in 2000, as a monthly glossy women’s magazine, aiming to serve the needs of the executive woman of the new millennium in HK and empower women to pursue their dreams and fulfill their life potential.

Since 2000, 《旭茉JESSICA》has honoured women from HK and China with the Most Successful Women Award, in recognition of their achievements and contributions to society.   This award is true to the core DNA of the 《旭茉JESSICA》brand, in celebration of women's accomplishments and contributions to HK and Greater China.

The Iconic Women and Women of Excellence Awards were later introduced, in acknowledgment of female pioneers, with inspirational careers and experience.

JESSICA continues to take initiatives to challenge boundaries on our journey of transformation as a multi-media platform with diversified channels to connect our audience and society.

Description:
Sosyal medya hizmetleri alanında 8 yıllık tecrübesiyle faaliyet gösteren sosyalgram.com.tr, Instagram’dan Twitter’a, YouTube’dan Facebook ve TikTok’a tüm popüler platformlarda kullanıcılara dikkat çekici profiller yaratma imkânı sunmaktadır.


Profesyonel bir kadroya sahip olan ve “yüzde 100 güvenli, hızlı, kaliteli hizmet” prensibiyle çalışan firma, sosyal medyada hedeflerini gerçekleştirmek isteyenlerin 1 numaralı tercihidir.


Müşteri memnuniyetini önceliği olarak belirleyen sosyalgram.com.tr’in geniş ürün yelpazesi içinde her ihtiyaca yönelik çözümler bulunmaktadır. 


Bireysel kullanıcıların yanı sıra ticari alanda faaliyet gösteren şirketler ve markalar da firmanın sosyal medya uygulamalarından faydalanabilmektedir.


Bugüne dek yüzbinlerce sosyal medya kullanıcısının tercihi olan sosyalgram.com.tr, kaliteli ve güvenilir hizmet anlayışıyla her geçen gün yeni müşteriler kazanmaktadır. 


Hali hazırda fenomen olan kullanıcıların da tercih ettiği firma, şifre paylaşmadan işlem yapma imkânı sunmakta ve uygun fiyatlarla fark yaratan sonuçlar sağlamaktadır.


Hem satış öncesinde hem de satış sonrasında 7/24 canlı destek hizmeti bulunan sosyalgram.com.tr ayrıca SSL güvenlik sertifikası ve 3D Secure sistemine sahiptir ve web sitesi üzerinden ödeme yapma süreci sorunsuz şekilde gerçekleşmektedir.

– Meetups

– Paddel wedstrijden

Investering
Het programma, de organisatie, de begeleiding en de locatie bepaald de hoogte van de investering. Description:
[PLEXUS CONFERENCE, December 4th-7th, 2025, Split& Zagreb, Croatia]  

The main goal of Plexus is to provide a platform for leaders in clinical medicine to share their invaluable knowledge and skills with physicians and medical students from around the world through carefully crafted hands-on workshops. Enjoy Plexus 2025 during the most wonderful time of the year in a city with one of the best Christmas markets in Europe. 

At this year’s Plexus, we aim to bring together renowned experts from leading institutions such as Cleveland Clinic, Mayo Clinic, Harvard University, and others, to host workshops where they will present the most important clinical skills and knowledge from the medical field where they have the most experience.  

Participants will learn about possible the clinic and actionable knowledge that they can apply in their clinical daily practice. The overarching goal is for the participants to learn how to recognize, diagnose and/or treat a patient with a certain condition.

Name: nodes.sh
Description:
Es tut sich einiges in unserem schönen Bundesland in Sachen LoRaWAN und IoT. Neben vielen großartigen privaten Initiativen, Projekten und Forschungsarbeiten, hat sich auch das Land Schleswig-Holstein, genauer das Zentrale IT-Management des Landes Schleswig-Holstein, auf den Weg gemacht, LoRaWAN als Technologie für das Internet der Dinge in Schleswig-Holstein zu etablieren und sie für eine breite Öffentlichkeit zugänglich zu machen. Hier setzen wir als nodes.sh // Die IoT & LoRaWAN Community des Landes Schleswig-Holstein an und wollen die bestehenden Netzwerke und Akteure zusammenbringen und den direkten Draht zu den Aktivitäten des Landes Schleswig-Holstein herstellen.
Du solltest unbedingt dabei sein, wenn Du …

... Dich mit Gleichgesinnten über die neuesten Use Cases und Trends rund um LoRaWAN und IoT austauschen möchtest. 

... Dich mit Lösungsanbietern, Anwendern aus Wirtschaft, Verwaltung sowie Ver- / Entsorgung, Wissenschaft / Forschung, Interessenverbänden und Vertreter:innen der Zivilgesellschaft im Kontext LoRaWAN und IoT vernetzen möchtest.  

... mehr über die Zukunftspläne des Landes Schleswig-Holstein für ein offenes und landesweites LoRaWAN-Netz erfahren und dabei mitreden möchtest. 

... erfahren willst, wer wir sind und wie wir Dich zukünftig bei Deinen Aktivitäten im Bereich LoRaWAN und IoT in Schleswig-Holstein unterstützen können.

 
nodes.sh
Tel.: 0451 88 88 126
Mail: moin@nodes.de
 
Im Auftrag des Zentralen IT-Management Schleswig-Holstein

Name: BNI Salzburg - Kärnten
Description:
BNI Salzburg & Kärnten – Wo Unternehmer wachsen, Beziehungen zählen und Erfolg gemeinsam entsteht.

Erfolg ist kein Zufall. Er entsteht dort, wo Menschen sich gegenseitig unterstützen, vertrauen und gemeinsam an einem Ziel arbeiten.
Genau das ist der Gedanke hinter BNI (Business Network International) – dem weltweit größten Unternehmernetzwerk für Empfehlungsmarketing.

In der Region Salzburg & Kärnten vernetzen wir engagierte Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer aus allen Branchen, um durch gegenseitige Empfehlungen neues Geschäft zu generieren, Vertrauen aufzubauen und nachhaltige Partnerschaften zu schaffen.

Unsere Mitglieder treffen sich wöchentlich in professionell organisierten Unternehmerteams – online oder persönlich – um sich auszutauschen, Kontakte zu teilen und voneinander zu lernen.
Jedes Mitglied vertritt dabei ein exklusives Fachgebiet, wodurch Überschneidungen vermieden und Synergien gezielt gefördert werden.

 Fakten, die überzeugen:
• Über 340.000 Mitglieder weltweit in mehr als 10.000 Unternehmerteams
• In Österreich wöchentlich über 2.400 aktive Unternehmer:innen
• In Salzburg & Kärnten über 180 Mitglieder in 8 Teams – Tendenz steigend

 Unsere Werte:

Wer gibt, gewinnt.

Aufbau von Vertrauen durch Kontinuität und Verlässlichkeit.

Persönliche Weiterentwicklung durch Feedback, Training und Mentoring.

Geschäftlicher Erfolg durch systematisches Netzwerken.

BNI Salzburg & Kärnten steht für Wachstum, Qualität und ein Unternehmernetzwerk, das funktioniert.
Denn hier gilt: „Aus Kontakten wird Vertrauen. Aus Vertrauen wird Geschäft.“

 Erfahre mehr über unsere Unternehmerteams, Veranstaltungen und Möglichkeiten der Mitgliedschaft unter https://bnisalzburg.at/

"Investors Table"

2-Startups submit pitches to gain visibility, while investors get exclusive access to handpicked, high-potential startups across various sectors.
3-A simple subscription model for investors ensures seamless access to vetted opportunities, making the investment process strategic and efficient.

"Idea Community"

1-A job marketplace helping startups find skilled professionals to bring their visions to life.
2-Certified startups offer valuable opportunities for freshers and experienced professionals to join dynamic, growth-focused teams.
3-Idea Community connects talent with growing startups, supporting strong team-building for sustainable growth.

Together, Thinkers Club, Investors Table, and Idea Community form the world’s first comprehensive startup ecosystem. TIC is committed to making entrepreneurship accessible, achievable, and successful for all.

Description:
Welcome to our Interprofessional Critical Care Network (ICCN). Here, we provide a platform for physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, pharmacists, and other professionals in the field of critical care to come together and exchange knowledge, experiences, and insights. Our primary aim is to stay updated with the latest research and advancements in critical care so that we can provide the highest level of care to our patients.

At our community, we understand the importance of collaboration and learning from one another. Through engaging discussions, webinars, conferences, and networking opportunities, we foster a supportive environment where members can share their expertise, ask questions, and seek guidance from peers. Our community strives to be an inclusive space that values diversity and encourages active participation from all members.

By joining our critical care community, you will have access to a wealth of resources, such as research papers, case studies, industry news, and expert-led discussions on various topics related to critical care. Whether you are a seasoned professional or just starting your career in critical care, our community is here to facilitate your professional growth and development.

ABOUT THE NETWORK
እሷ! (Isua) Network is a membership-based organization that connects and supports women business owners and executives across diverse industries in Ethiopia. The Network offers a platform for peer-to-peer networking, coaching, and training, as well as access to experienced mentors who guide members through business challenges and opportunities.

Launched in March 2023, the እሷ! (Isua) Network is proudly supported by Renew Capital in partnership with Global Affairs Canada. The initiative is designed to empower women entrepreneurs and strengthen Ethiopia’s private sector ecosystem by addressing barriers such as limited access to capital and gender-based challenges.

PEER SUPPORT AND PARTNERSHIP
Despite the growing number of women entrepreneurs in Ethiopia, many still face challenges that limit their business growth. The እሷ! (Isua) Network provides a safe and empowering space for women executives to build connections, share knowledge, and form partnerships that drive sustainable success.

Through peer support, capacity building, and partnership facilitation, the Network helps women entrepreneurs become market leaders in their industries. Members also gain access to an exclusive directory of business leaders, enabling collaboration and mutual growth among women-led enterprises.

Computerized showcasing is a tremendous umbrella term that covers different regions from SEO to blog composing and circulation channels to spending plans. In this aide, we'll assist you with understanding the vital mainstays of computerized showcasing, empowering you to fabricate your own advanced promoting technique to upgrade publicizing through web-based channels like web search tools, your sites, online entertainment, email, and versatile 

Now that you know the essentials of a social media marketing strategy, it’s time to put it into action. Your social media marketing plan is the roadmap to carrying out your strategy. It puts structure around your efforts so you can measure your success and make sure you’re spending your resources wisely. Here’s how to create your social media marketing plan:

Choose your platforms: Choose based on your target audience, platforms popular for your industry, as well as your bandwidth. Only take on the number of platforms you can actively keep up with. You can always start with one and then add on more slowly as you get the hang of them.
Set goals and objectives: These should be simple and task-like to start, like post once a day for a month, get your profiles set up, or do a competitive analysis. Once you get into a rhythm and gather insights, you’ll be able to set more specific and strategic goals like increase your following by X% or publish X [content types you’ve found your audience likes] per month.
Report and adjust regularly: Use each platform’s analytics to identify which posts generate the most engagement, whether you’re getting more followers, and to see your audience demographics. Harness and scale up what works and nix what doesn’t.

Name: Dialogue Academy for Young Women
Description:
DANA was born from the Dialogue Academy for Young Women, an OSCE-led initiative that has empowered multiple generations of young women from Prishtinë/Priština. Over the years, the academy has provided participants with tools for mediation, conflict resolution, negotiation, and leadership, while also creating lifelong friendships and professional networks that transcend political and ethnic divisions.

Recognizing the need for a sustainable and structured network that extends beyond the academy, alumnae came together to form DANA—a platform where members could continue engaging, learning, and initiating change together. Since its inception, DANA has grown into an alumnae-driven space for mentorship, project collaboration, and advocacy.

The Dialogue Academy Network of Alumnae (DANA) is a dynamic and growing network of young women who are committed to fostering peace, dialogue, and collaboration. As an alumnae-driven initiative, DANA connects hundreds of women leaders, activists, and changemakers who have participated in the OSCE Dialogue Academy for Young Women—a program that has, for years, provided a unique space for cross-community engagement, leadership development, and peacebuilding.

DANA is more than a network—it is a sustained movement where alumnae continue their commitment to dialogue and cooperation beyond the academy, working on initiatives that bridge divides, promote gender equality, and create opportunities for young women to lead in peace processes, governance, and public life.

Networking and meeting new people comes with challenges. 
* Sometimes you have a limited amount of time at an event and you don't have enough time to explore all the opportunities available. 
* Sometimes you meet people you don't want (or need) to meet and end up talking longer than preferred. 
* Sometimes you don’t know how to start a conversation or know what to talk about. 
* Other platforms don’t offer the gratification of meeting people in person instantly. 
* Scheduling time to meet a new person may not come to fruition.  

Here are some quotes from our user testing:
“No photos?! That’s awesome.”
“I like the way it’s organized.”
“It’s super in-the-moment.”
“More organic, more sophisticated…”

“I like the thrill of it!”

Name: Global Climate Finance Forum (GCFF)
Description:
Welcome! This page is for members of the Global Climate Finance Forum (GCFF) committed to advancing concrete climate finance action and collaboration.

 Our Purpose
•	Track progress on GCFF 2025 commitments 
•	Share resources, tools, updates, and opportunities to accelerate impact
•	Connect across regions, roles, and sectors to foster collaboration and peer learning
•	Support future GCFF cohorts and aligned initiatives

 Our Shared Vision
We’re building a just, inclusive, and locally led climate finance system with the Global South at its heart. Together, we aim to:
•	Mobilize capital to the Global South
•	Support Global South SMEs, investors, and ecosystem enablers
•	Tackle systemic barriers - risk perception, currency mismatch, and policy gaps
•	Build a lasting community of practice for catalytic climate finance

 How to Engage
This is an active, collaborative, and practical space. Use it to:
•	Share updates and insights
•	Post opportunities and upcoming events
•	Flag challenges or requests for support
•	Celebrate progress and milestones

Let’s build on the energy of Montego Bay—and keep shaping the future of climate finance, together.

Name: HR soulmates
Description:
HR soulmates – wir sind mehr als ein Netzwerk.
Wir stehen für für mutige, strategisch wirksame und vor allem gesunde HR Arbeit.

Unsere Arbeitswelt verändert sich. Und HR steht mittendrin – zwischen Geschäftsführung und Belegschaft, zwischen Leistungsdruck und Mental Load, zwischen Kulturarbeit und Controlling. Doch an wen kann sich HR wenden? 

HR macht einsam. Wir haben uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, das zu ändern.

HR soulmates ist eine österreichweite Community für moderne HR-Professionals, die mehr wollen als Buzzwords und Phrasen.
Wir sind ein Safe Space für echten Austausch, psychologische Sicherheit, Business Impact – und ehrliche Fragen, auf die es nicht immer einfache Antworten gibt.

Was wir tun:
Wir schaffen Räume, in denen HR aufatmen, auftanken und wachsen kann.

Unsere Formate:
 Online Lunch & Learn: Monatliche Impulse zu Themen wie z.B. Positive Leadership, Konfliktmanagement, Kulturentwicklung & Mental Health.
 HR Afterhour: Offline-Treffen in kleinen, vertrauten Runden – zum Ranten, Austauschen und Lachen. In Graz und Wien. 
 WhatsApp-Gruppe: Der tägliche Draht zur Community – für Fragen, Tipps, offene Ohren und manchmal auch ein virtuelles High Five.

Wie funktioniert das?
Die HR soulmates Community ist aktuell ehrenamtlich geführt.

 Mitglied wirst du, indem du unserer geschlossenen LinkedIn-Gruppe beitrittst:  HR soulmates LinkedIn Gruppe https://www.linkedin.com/groups/10025439/

 Bleib auf dem Laufenden über Events, Projekte & neue Formate:
 Folge unserer LinkedIn-Unternehmensseite.

Woran wir glauben:
 An HR, das Haltung zeigt.
 An smarte Vernetzung, weil niemand alles allein lösen muss.
 An Community statt Einzelkampf.
 An den Mut, Dinge besser zu machen.
 An gesundes Arbeiten – nicht als Luxus, sondern als Voraussetzung für Erfolg.

Wenn du eine HR-Welt mitgestalten willst, in der Menschen zählen:
Dann gehörst du zu uns.

Willkommen zu deinem Safe Space,
Willkommen bei den HR soulmates

Instead of likes and algorithms, zeroone is built around collecting. Collecting helps artists earn earlier and build real audiences, while supporters back the artists they believe in.

Under the hood, zeroone handles ownership, provenance, royalties, and payments by design, so creators can focus on making work, not managing infrastructure.

Our communities across Japan, Iran, Turkey, South Korea, Europe, and the US have grown almost entirely organically, driven by creator demand rather than paid acquisition.

zeroone replaces passive scrolling with ownership and participation, turning cultural interest into aligned, long-term support.

Zwink isn’t just another dating app—it’s a "companion finder". Whether you’re looking for someone to share your memes with, rant about your day, or just vibe with, Zwink’s got you.

Vi vill att du ska upptäcka hela vår region och det utbud som finns. Därför varvas träffarna mellan Linköping och Norrköping där vi utforskar olika platser till varje träff.

 Bli en del av Bright East 
Anmäl dig och få information om kommande träffar och event! Genom din registrering kommer du att få inbjudningar, uppdateringar och diverse information rörande nätverket via e-post och sms. Att delta på Bright Easts träffar är helt kostnadsfritt! Registrera din mail via länken nedan.

 Arrangörer
Vi som driver nätverket Bright East är Östsvenska Handelskammaren, Lundbergs Fastigheter och Linköping Science Park. Vår ambition med nätverket är att du som deltagare ska lämna varje träff med en inspirerande, härlig känsla och se fram emot nästa tillfälle!

In fact, Anobii is the place where you can discover interesting books and keep track of what you've read. To be clear: we are not book experts, nor do we expect all Anobians to be writers or critics: our goal to read more together (or alone), to inspire and to be inspired, to learn, to meet new friends. In short: sharing interesting ideas. To learn and have fun, and to find the next book to read.

Description:
Attentive: Built for what others won’t touch.
In a world where most tech consultancies shy away from ambiguity and risk, we lean in. Attentive specializes in solving what feels impossible—projects too complex, too undefined, or too broken to fix.
Our proprietary WITO Handback Model—Walk In, Take Over—is not just a framework; it’s an execution philosophy. We enter high-stakes technology environments, drive projects to completion against rigorous KPIs, and then hand back full ownership to our customers. They operate the success. They claim the win. We scale the next.
This isn’t just consulting. It’s operational turnaround with precision, velocity, and repeatability.

Name: duCharcha
Description:
duCharcha | Shaping Young Minds Through Structured Charcha

DuCharcha is the first-of-its-kind, purpose-built platform designed to host live, structured Charcha and discussions in a fully automated virtual environment.
Built for the next generation of thinkers, duCharcha empowers students in schools, colleges, and institutes to sharpen their communication, critical thinking, and leadership skills through real-time, competitive Charcha.

 Participants can:
1. Charcha on system-generated or self-created topics
2. Engage supporters to strengthen their stance
3. Present arguments in front of a live audience
4. Receive audience votes to determine the winner

 Who is it for?
High schoolers, college students, and learners across institutions are guided by teachers to participate in topic-based Charcha that encourages learning beyond textbooks.

 Whether you’re an educator looking to engage your students or a student ready to find your voice, duCharcha is your platform to speak, compete, and evolve.

Schoolers (teenagers), Colleges, and Institutes will participate in Charcha scheduled by their Teachers. Participants will be other students from the school or even from within the same grade.

duCharcha - The world debates here!

iPhone 
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ducharcha/id6741090837

Android
https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.duonomic.ducharcha

Name: Airluum
Description:
Our generative AI app focuses on simplifying the way you build family trees. With our advanced AI algorithms, tracing your lineage becomes intuitive and insightful. Join us as we redefine the way you explore your heritage and make AI easy!

It was created by parents for parents knowing that someday, as adults, our kids will want to know the family history that they might be too young to appreciate today. 

Those parents, who developed Airluum, are a team of highly motivated, dedicated, and passionate problem solvers who met in college while studying engineering. After moving on from other successful endeavors, they decided to create Airluum, a time capsule that preserves their children’s past and inspires their future.
The benefit is that Airluum reaches beyond our founders and allows you to preserve your family history safely and securely.

Name: Veklar
Description:
No individual algorithms, no analysis or profiling, no sponsored publications, anonymous likes and follows, absolute respect for privacy and personal data, clear, non-partisan moderation.

We defend a free and independent Internet.
No profiling, no targeted advertising, no sale or exploitation of data, no ideological moderation.

We don't pretend to know what's good for you.
No algorithm uses your data to decide what you should see, follow or like. No sponsored publications appear in your activity feeds.

We protect your privacy and discretion.
Likes and follows are anonymous on Veklar, no one can use them to analyse or target you, and none of this information is exploited.

We keep your data safe.
Your data is stored in France, protected by French and European laws, and is not shared with anyone.

We are working to ensure France's and Europe's digital sovereignty.
Veklar is a 100% French project and our partners are hand-picked. All are European and all are committed to respecting privacy.

Name: LinkedinLocal Tanzania
Description:
What's LinkedIn Local & Why Should You Attend?

#LinkedInLocal is a series of networking events spreading its wings around the world where LinkedInners like you and me, can meet up for no other reason than getting to know each other, to inspire, motivate and grow each other collectively. It’s a meetup concept originally created with the purpose to meet her online LinkedIn connections face-to-face, offline. It was then developed with the purpose is to unite people from all walks of life, in one facilitated event, to genuinely get to know the humans behind the LinkedIn profiles.

What's LinkedInLocal Tanzania?
#LinkedInLocalTZ brings this global movement to Tanzania by providing platforms for professionals in the city to expand their offline network.

What to Expect?
Every gathering is different. But, the minimum of what you get in all sessions are: i) Networking with people in your City ii) Meeting experts who will be invited as panelists.

Who Are the People Behind LinkedInLocal Tanzania?
LinkedInLocal Tanzania is led by Alex Rweyemamu. and will be co-hosted by any LinkedInners who love networking and meeting people. 

And One More Thing...
Sales or any other intentions other than networking is STRICTLY prohibited during the gatherings. If anyone caught doing so, she/he will be asked to sing and dance for all of us. I don't think anyone would want that.

#LinkedInLocalTZ #LinkedInTanzania #LinkedInLocal #meetupTZ

Philanthropy

You become part of a business community. In addition to exchanging clients and referral sources, you can also benefit from the business experiences of other group members. Learning what has worked and not worked for other business owners is a great advantage to your own business.

Name: SoloBudd
Description:
SoloBudd enhances solo travel by connecting adventurers with like-minded travelers and local hosts in real-time. We empower solo travelers to explore confidently, connect meaningfully, and experience destinations authentically while addressing key challenges: companionship on your own terms, safety concerns, and finding genuine local experiences.

What makes SoloBudd unique:
- Smart Connection Technology: Our platform facilitates meaningful matches based on compatibility factors that matter for travel companionship.
- Safety-First Approach: Comprehensive verification and intuitive safety features give travelers peace of mind when connecting with others.
- Distinctive User Experience: Our visually striking interface breaks from conventional design, creating an experience as unique as the journeys our users take.
- Local Integration: We partner with community-based hosts to provide travelers with authentic experiences that benefit local economies and foster cultural exchange.
- Versatile Engagement: Whether seeking spontaneous meetups or planning future connections, our platform adapts to diverse travel styles and social preferences.

SoloBudd is more than an app—it's a platform that transforms how people experience the world solo. We support the independence and freedom of solo travel while offering features that enhance the journey and foster connections that lead to unforgettable memories. 

Join us in redefining solo travel—where independence meets connection, safety meets spontaneity, and authentic experiences are shared on your own terms. SoloBudd: For those who don't wait.

Welcome to Data Cracker!
At Data Cracker, we’re passionate about empowering individuals and businesses with the tools, knowledge, and strategies they need to thrive in the digital age. Name: Education Hub Trier WFG/BNT/LK TR-SAB
Description:
Das Ziel des eduHUB ist es, Bildungseinrichtungen und Unternehmen über die Plattform zu vernetzen. Der eduHUB bringt Absolventinnen, Absolventen sowie Schülerinnen und Schüler bereits während ihres Bildungsprozesses mit Unternehmen zusammen, um wertvolle Interaktionen und Partnerschaften zu fördern.

Der eduHUB verknüpft Bildungseinrichtungen und Unternehmen auf einer gemeinsamen Plattform miteinander und bringt Schülerinnen, Schüler, Studierende und Absolventinnen, Absolventen bereits während ihres Bildungsprozesses mit Unternehmen zusammen. Die Plattform ermöglicht nicht nur die Verbindung von Schülerinnen, Schülern und Studierenden mit Unternehmen, sondern auch die Organisation von interaktiven Projekten, Terminen, Veranstaltungen, Vorträgen und Führungen. Dies schafft wertvolle Möglichkeiten für den Wissensaustausch, die berufliche Orientierung und die Entwicklung von Fähigkeiten und Talenten.

Der eduHUB fungiert als Vermittler zwischen Bildungseinrichtungen und Unternehmen und fördert eine nachhaltige Zusammenarbeit. Glaubt daran, dass diese Partnerschaften nicht nur Bildungseinrichtungen und Unternehmen, sondern auch den Schülerinnen, Schülern und Studierenden zugutekommen, indem sie wertvolle Einblicke in die Arbeitswelt bieten und ihre beruflichen Perspektiven erweitern.

Der eduHUB ist eine Brücke zwischen Theorie und Praxis, die es den zukünftigen Fachkräften ermöglicht, sich frühzeitig auf den Arbeitsmarkt vorzubereiten und sinnvolle berufliche Kontakte zu knüpfen. 
Der eduHUB zielt darauf ab, einen Beitrag zur Entwicklung der zukünftigen Arbeitskräfte zu leisten und gleichzeitig die lokale Wirtschaft zu stärken.

Description:
Das Ernährungsforum Zürich ist die Plattform der Gestalterinnen und Förderer eines nachhaltigen Ernährungssystems im Raum Zürich.

Unsere Vision: Zürich isst gut.
Die Stadt Zürich hat ein gerechtes, zukunftsfähiges und innovatives Ernährungssystem, das den Bedürfnissen von Menschen, Tieren und dem Umweltschutz gleichermassen gerecht wird. Die Stadtzürcher*innen sind informierte Konsument*innen und haben überall Zugang zu nachhaltig erzeugten Nahrungsmitteln zu Bedingungen, die für Bauern und Bäurinnen, Lebensmittelhersteller*innen, Händler*innen, Gastronomen wie auch für Konsument*innen fair sind.

Name: drigmo.com
Description:
Food excites, surprises, delights, and connects us. It‘s art, culture, entertainment, love, and more all wrapped into one.

But when it comes to food apps it feels like we‘ve been stuck in a vacuum of 15-minute delivery boringness 10 years after Foursquare left the stage.

Meanwhile we‘re living in a golden age of restaurant discovery. Everywhere we consume content we get peppered with amazing eats we can‘t miss out on. But how to remember all these places?

Drigmo helps people to remember their restaurants. To get the most out of IRL.

Name: BAYSTEN
Description:
Baysten promises speed, savings, and certainty to companies while enhancing the experience for talents. For companies, this means results within 2 days, eliminating the need for job postings on numerous portals, no upfront payments (Baysten charges a comparatively small fee based on actual hirings — a win-win), no long-term contracts, no hidden costs, no marketing, and no branding concerns. For talents, it means personalized service, free career advice leading to better career development, more opportunities, increased effectiveness, no self-promotion, and — last but not least — more quality time with their loved ones. This is made possible through the following pillars of our business model: 

1. Our long-term engagement with dynamic talent communities, accessible to anyone through Baysten; 

2. Cutting-edge technology; and 

3. Recruiting agents who oversee communities and deliver qualified candidates to our customers. 

We are a Munich-based startup launching a new platform that will transform the way business people interact thanks to AI and our innovative business model. We believe that the speed and preciseness of engagement will change drastically, enhancing human interaction, quality of collaboration, and overall productivity.

CROs, CSOs, and Global VPs of Sales

Enterprise Sales · Global Sales Leadership · B2B Sales · C-Suite Selling · Revenue Growth · Sales Strategy · Sales Enablement · AI in Sales · Deal Closure · Business Development · Global Networking · Thought Leadership

GSN is where the world’s top sales leaders connect, share knowledge, and shape the future of enterprise selling. If you are driving growth in complex B2B environments and want to stay ahead of the curve, this is your network.

Name: Zentrais
Description:
Zentrais is building The Integrity Economy.

A new standard for how humans and AI think, decide, and act together — judged by behavior, not claims.

As AI increasingly shapes decisions at scale, integrity can no longer rely on intention or messaging. It must be designed, measured, and verified. Without that shift, trust erodes and markets fail.

Zentrais exists to make integrity operational.

We design systems where integrity is measurable, auditable, and scalable. Not a value statement. Not an ethics layer. A working framework embedded into how decisions and interactions actually happen.

Our platform aligns human judgment with machine scale. Humans are not replaced. AI is not unchecked. Both are held to a shared, verifiable standard.

What we’re building:
-A behavior-driven integrity framework for Humans + AI
-Verifiable systems that reward consistency, accountability, and truth
-A new economic model where trust becomes infrastructure

Zentrais is built as an open, extensible system, designed for strategic integration and collaboration.

We work with investors, partners, and organizations ready to test integrity at the system level, not just talk about it.

We build in public. Decisions, tradeoffs, and failures included.

Founder-led. Capital-efficient. Preparing for MVP launch.

If you believe proof matters more than promises, this is where you belong.

Zentrais
PROOF OVER PROMISES.
The Integrity Economy for Humans + AI.

Name: Founders Hunter
Description:
Você já imaginou ter acesso a um ecossistema exclusivo para empreendedores e fundadores de startups, onde é possível se conectar com pessoas que compartilham os mesmos desafios, metas e ambição de crescer? Essa é a proposta da Founders Hunter — uma aceleradora de startups criada por Eduardo Assunção e por mim, Marcos Lacerda, um fundador que conhece na pele as dificuldades de empreender no Brasil e no mundo.

Minha jornada começou há mais de 8 anos, quando criei a EdTech Aplicativo Escolar, uma plataforma de gestão para instituições de ensino que conectava pais, alunos e professores. Apesar do sucesso inicial, enfrentei barreiras reais para escalar: falta de capital, ausência de mentores, dificuldade em acessar investidores e pouca visibilidade.

Foi nesse cenário que percebi: eu não era o único. Milhares de outros empreendedores também estavam travados, não por falta de competência, mas por falta de acesso — acesso a capital, conexões e orientação estratégica.

Foi assim que nasceu a Founders Hunter. Uma aceleradora com foco em resultados reais, que conecta fundadores a investidores, mentores e oportunidades concretas de crescimento. Um ecossistema de startups que compartilha experiência, apoio e acesso a capital para quem está construindo soluções relevantes para a sociedade.

Kostenlose Version (Benutzerkonto) für alle, um kostenlose Events und Aktivitäten zu planen und an kostenlosen und kostenpflichtigen Aktivitäten und Events teilzunehmen:

• Erstelle, verwalte und überblicke deine Gruppen, Aktivitäten und Events.

Bezahlte Version (Business-Konto) für Trainer, Vereine, Unternehmen, Zentren und Event- Hosts zum Planen und Verkaufen von kostenpflichtigen Aktivitäten und Events:

• Plane Events allein oder mit deiner Gruppe von Hosts.
• Plan Events mit einem festen Termin oder einer ersten Terminumfrage, um einen Termin zu finden.
• Plan Event- Serien und füge jederzeit Termine hinzu oder bearbeite sie.

• Behalte jederzeit den Überblick über den Event-Status aller Event-Teilnehmer.

Um ein Business-Konto zu erstellen, schreib uns einfach eine E-Mail an ask@sunnyclock.com.

Name: #OTD2030
Description:

It is a beautiful work in progress and we want input from change makers around the world. 

But here the gist of it so far…..

OTD 2030 is regular international meetings, a resource of best practice models and initiatives from around the world, no matter how small they are, will have practical steps on how to take positive risk, deliver person centred rural and remote aged support, LGBQTIA+, CALD leadership programs, positive psycho social support and a call to arms for our Elders.

It is also a collection of perspective of change makers, that will help on your learning journey, that is how change happens in a safe place. 

Open the doors gives hope and encouragement to OPEN THOSE DOORS by 2030, in an egoless inclusive platform of global knowledge transference.

Did I forget anything? Yes.....

It’s a place for those who are infused with a curiosity, which makes them imagine a better way to ensure a life well lived for our elders yet don’t feel confident enough, or feel discouraged, to challenge current practice & systems or to speak up. 

It is a place for those that hunger for change & believe that we can actually do it, to see what others do & know that we are not alone in your beliefs - that change is within our reach. #OTD2023

Name: Immiducation
Description:
Immiducation is a career and education network of immigrants by immigrants. 

Canada plans to welcome 1.23 million immigrants by 2023. With the Economic category accounting for more than half of this target. According to Global Affairs Canada, in 2020, International students contributed $22 billion to the Canadian economy. These immigrants however are not only faced with the cultural shock of adjusting to a new country, but an environment that has a high unemployment rate and specifically, underemployment due to the barrier of “Canadian experience” especially if you are an underrepresented minority. This lack of acceptance or recognition of foreign education and work experience creates a strong divide and limits the success of an immigrant. There is a divide between what the government of Canada wants for immigration and the realities on ground for professional immigrants.

Immiducation is here to bridge this gap. Immiducation is a global network of professional Immigrants supporting and accelerating immigrant success through learning programs & resources, community and job matching.

Name: AkiBA
Description:
Akina Baba Wa Afrika (AkiBA) is a support network founded to address the unique challenges faced by African men in the diaspora, many of whom often experience isolation, economic strain, and psychological stress while living away from home. Recognizing the need for a community that fosters growth and solidarity, AkiBA was created to provide a space where African men can come together, share experiences, and support one another in overcoming the pressures of life abroad.

Founded with a vision to promote African self-reliance and leadership, AkiBA focuses on a wide range of initiatives designed to nurture both the mental and economic well-being of its members. These initiatives include peer-to-peer psychosocial support, entrepreneurship forums, career development programs, and investment opportunities that help African men build wealth and secure a prosperous future for themselves and future generations, even while away from their home countries.

The name AkiBA, derived from the Swahili word for "savings," reflects one of the network's core values: promoting a culture of financial discipline and teaching the importance of saving. AkiBA guides members towards smart investment options, aiming to create pathways for generational wealth creation and economic empowerment.

In addition to financial growth, AkiBA is dedicated to "saving" the African man from the loneliness and emotional pressures that often accompany living in the diaspora. By fostering strong social connections and creating a robust peer network, AkiBA ensures that no man has to navigate these challenges alone. Through shared knowledge, collective support, and a commitment to self-improvement, AkiBA empowers African men to thrive mentally, socially, and economically, regardless of where they are in the world.

Name: CRAFT Project
Description:
The Social Innovation Ecosystem Strengthening project (CRAFT) is designed to promote social entrepreneurship and amplify the impact of social and impact-driven initiatives throughout Europe. Our approach involves organizing events, summits, and creating a digital ecosystem to foster stronger connections and collaboration among social innovation actors. By establishing a European peer-to-peer academy and collecting best practices and tools, we aim to empower social entrepreneurs and support organizations, ultimately leading to sustainable change within the European social innovation ecosystem.

The significance of strengthening the social innovation ecosystem cannot be overstated. A robust ecosystem is essential for addressing societal challenges, promoting inclusive economic growth, and driving positive social change. By forging connections between social entrepreneurs, SMEs, accelerators, investors, industry, philanthropy societies, universities, and public entities, we can unlock the full potential of social innovation. Our project recognizes the need to foster collaboration, knowledge sharing, and access to resources in order to create a thriving ecosystem that nurtures innovative solutions to complex problems.

Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or EISMEA. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Everyone wants to progress in their career, but not everyone knows where to start. That’s where Real Mentors Network helps.

The Real Mentors Network community supports all professionals at every level of their professional growth with access to world-wide experts that match with mentees based on goals. Our platform automates access to quality mentorship connections through our custom algorithm, built to give equal access for all professionals to uplevel their skills and confidence - across mentors and mentees alike. 

Founder and DEI expert, Tamara Thorpe has spent over a decade helping leaders and organizations address equity and inclusion - leveraging mentoring as a key strategy for organizations to foster a culture of belonging. 

Real Mentors Network gives everyone the opportunity to connect and progress further in their career, with support from other experienced professionals.

Rückschläge gehören zum Leben einfach dazu. Aus Misserfolg kann etwas Neues, etwas Großartiges und vor allem etwas Erfolgreiches entstehen. Diese Einstellung hat sich insbesondere in Deutschland noch nicht etabliert.

Jeder spricht gerne über seine Erfolge, Misserfolge gelten als Versagen. Failing Out Loud möchte das ändern & die Fehlerkultur revolutionieren.

Made with  für Karlsruhe & Region.

Ook onderwijsinstellingen en gemeenten/provincie kunnen/kan zich bij ons aansluiten. Een vindplek voor maatschappelijke organisaties in Limburg en voor (professionele) vrijwilligers die ons navolgende statement onderschrijven.

"Op strategisch niveau is er een gebrek aan beleid waarin de onafhankelijke professionele vrijwilliger een volwaardige positie inneemt binnen beleidsvorming.
Dit is opmerkelijk, aangezien juist vrijwilligers en de daaraan verbonden maatschappelijke organisaties vanuit intrinsieke motivatie en ervaring waardevolle bijdragen leveren.
De praktijk leert echter dat veel waardevolle initiatieven stuiten op de weerbarstige systeemwereld, waar bureaucratie, posities, controle en cijfers zwaarder lijken te wegen dan daadwerkelijke maatschappelijke opbrengsten. Vrijwilligers, die doorgaans niet handelen vanuit financieel belang maar vanuit betrokkenheid en idealisme, behalen met beperkte middelen vaak indrukwekkende resultaten. Het feit dat hun inzet niet stopt zodra er geen financiële vergoeding meer tegenover staat, onderstreept hun duurzame betrokkenheid"

Interesse om aan te sluiten?
Stuur een e-mail naar info@apollovitaal.nl
