Description:
Quadzio connects high school students with alumni from their high school and hometown who are now in college for real, honest campus tours and unfiltered advice. 

Because let’s face it: traditional college tours are one-size-fits-all. Restrictive. Generic and impersonal. They’re polished, rehearsed and designed to impress everyone, which often means they don’t speak to anyone.
We believe the best way to figure out college is by talking to someone who’s been exactly where you are. Someone from your town, your school, your shoes.

With Quadzio, you don’t just walk the quad. You sit in a lecture at the business school. Grab lunch in the dining hall. Hit up the campus coffee spot. Get the real story on Greek life. No pressure from admissions reps. No glossy brochures.
Just personalised, real talk from students who’ve been through it.

Whether you're deciding between schools, curious about dorms, or trying to get the vibe of campus, Quadzio helps you get answers you can actually trust.

Built by students, for students.

We’re now recruiting our first wave of Quadzio Ambassadors across the country. If you're in college and want to help others through the process, visit quadzio.com to sign up.

Name: Erhvervskvinder Fyn
Description:
Velkommen til Erhvervskvinder Fyn.
Erhvervskvinder Fyn er et netværk for aktive kvinder, der ønsker at dele erfaringer og sparre med andre kvinder. Vi er en blandet flok af ledere, virksomhedsejere og ansatte, der kommer både fra den offentlige og den private sektor. 

MEDLEMSMØDER
Erhvervskvinder Fyn holder 10 medlemsmøder om året. På alle møder er der et fagligt indhold i form af et foredrag, virksomhedsbesøg eller lignende. Enkelte møder har et mere kulturelt indhold. Der er altid spisning og mulighed for at dyrke netværk med andre af foreningens medlemmer. 

Emnerne spænder vidt, men relaterer sig på forskellig vis til den professionelle kvindes arbejde, liv og virke. Prisen per gang er ca. kr. 250 for medlemmer og for gæster ca. 300 kroner. Enkelte arrangementer kan være dyrere. 

BLIV MEDLEM
Vil du være medlem - eller bare vide mere om Erhvervskvinder Fyn - er du velkommen til at kontakte bestyrelsen via denne kontaktformular. Som medlem af Erhvervskvinder Fyn er du velkommen til også at deltage i de arrangementer, som de andre afdelinger af Erhvervskvinder afholder.  

Kontingentet er kr. 1.500,- om året (fra 2023 er kontingentet kr. 2000). Det dækker et kalenderår. Melder du dig ind i løbet af året, bliver kontingentet reduceret forholdsmæssigt. 
Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.

MØD OS - KOM MED SOM GÆST
Vil du gerne møde os? Du kan deltage som gæst ved to medlemsmøder, inden du melder dig ind. Gæster betaler ca. kr. 300,- for at deltage i et medlemsmøde. 

Der er et fagligt indhold og spisning ved alle arrangementer. Du kan læse mere om, hvordan du tilmelder dig som gæst ved at klikke på knappen nedenfor.
Vi glæder os til at se dig. 

SOM MEDLEM AF ERHVERVSKVINDER FÅR DU:
- Et tværfagligt professionelt kompetencegivende netværk og forum for udvikling, sparring og inspiration.
- 8-11 arrangementer årligt med spændende foredragsholdere.
- ErhvervsKvindeNyt i form af lokale nyhedsmails.
- Invitation til Erhvervskvinders landskonferencer.

Sustainability is a diverse and complex journey. When it becomes a career, daily life often fills up with endless projects, KPIs, detailed reporting, and ever-evolving trends and standards

Name: Harten4Groep Beuningen
Description:
Over ons
De Harten4 Groep is in 1995 opgericht door een aantal actieve inwoners uit Beuningen die hun gemeente een warm hart toedragen. In 2020 bestond Harten4Groep 25 jaar. Door COVID 19 is dit helaas niet groots gevierd, maar binnen de mogelijkheden zijn er wel activiteiten geweest zoals een mooie  gezamenlijke Sunset March bij De Oversteek en bezoek aan De Bastei in Nijmegen.
Beuningen gevoel
De Harten 4 Groep is stevig geworteld in de Beuningse samenleving. Ruim 150 mannen en vrouwen die wonen en/of werken binnen de gemeente en een leidinggevende, bestuurlijke, maatschappelijke of ondernemende functie vervullen, delen het ‘Beuningen-gevoel’.
Leefbaar Beuningen
Beuningen heeft veel te bieden. De gemeente is omgeven door prachtige natuurgebieden, er zijn uiteenlopende – zeer succesvolle – bedrijven gevestigd en ook op cultureel, maatschappelijk en historisch gebied is er veel om trots op te zijn!

De Harten 4 Groep ontplooit initiatieven die Beuningen ‘op de kaart zetten’ en die de goede verstandhouding tussen de vier dorpen van de gemeente verder versterken. Tevens ondersteunt Harten4Groep initiatieven, die bijdragen aan een goede leefbaarheid in de vier kerkdorpen in de gemeente.

Netwerken met een Missie
Voor de leden is de Harten 4 Groep ook een platform voor samenwerking, uitwisseling van informatie en voor het leggen van sociale en zakelijke contacten. Tijdens de ca. zes bijeenkomsten per jaar wordt aandacht besteed aan actuele ontwikkelingen binnen de gemeente, krijgen de leden een ‘kijkje in de keuken’ bij Beuningse ondernemers of worden culturele of maatschappelijke initiatieven bezocht.
Naast het informatieve aspect staan onderling contact, gezelligheid en kwaliteit hoog in het vaandel. De bijeenkomsten worden door de Harten 4 leden zeer hoog gewaardeerd en leiden regelmatig tot nieuwe projecten, die weer ten goede komen aan wonen en werken in de gemeente Beuningen.
Voel jij je betrokken bij de gemeente Beuningen? Bezoek de website en maak kennis.

Name: CBWN - Connected Business Women Network Canada
Description:
We are committed to providing service and support to female business leaders, entrepreneurs, business executives and home based sales leaders who have both successful and developing businesses and careers.

Ilona Makar began the initial networking franchise in Calgary under another company name in 2009. In 2010 met Debbie Van Camp who also had a similar networking franchise in another area of Calgary. They joined forces that same year, building on what they had learned that worked within their own groups and started a new networking company. CBWN was born! 

Given the success of CBWN in Calgary, the decision to open up new markets was made and Connected Business Women Network was born. The new name is a reflection of not only our mission but also, our desire to provide Edmonton business women with the same benefits and experiences Calgary Business Women have come to know and expect.
 
CBWN allows you to...
- Build real relationships to increase leads and promote business growth
- Develop relationships and network with people you know, like and trust
- Savvy group of female entrepreneurs, executives and business professionals
- Networking events are informative and high energy
- Group with a sincere desire to help each other grow personally and professionally

What’s different about CBWN?
Pay as you come (early-bird ends one week prior)
Monthly meeting
$49 for your networking and lunch, $55 after early bird pricing.
$45 for vendor/showcase table
Maximum of two reps from direct selling companies
Speakers at our meetings are from our group and their sessions are aimed at providing value and are educational in nature
Support from within the group – Access the brilliant minds and talented individuals who are in your network.
Volunteer positions at every meeting to help you be top of mind with the group
Nurturing, supportive, friendly and collaborative members
Come away every meeting with solid contacts, leads and with a dose of inspiration to last you all month long!

WHY CBWN
CBWN is committed to providing an inclusive, membership free option to participate in every CBWN event, right from your first meeting.  This has become our signature standard.   Women’s business organizations have been instrumental in shaping the nature of contemporary networking organizations. With the proliferation of women business in the previous decades, many women formed structured, well-organized groups that met to network and provide professional support. These groups were created not as service clubs but as bona fide networking organizations . Don’t put all your eggs in one basket; one type of business organization won’t serve all your needs. Consciously select a well-rounded mix of networking groups.  We believe there is room in the marketplace for all networking groups.  Come out and be part of the most sought-after women’s networking group.


We invite you to a meeting of learning and inspiration for professional women in business. We have at least one meeting a month and you are able to come when it fits in your schedule.

Name: Kring Culemborgse Bedrijven
Description:
Culemborg is een bedrijvige gemeente met een actief ondernemersklimaat. KCB-bijeenkomsten zijn een uitgelezen kans om nieuwe ondernemers te leren kennen, over branchegrenzen heen te kijken en ervaringen te delen. Dit alles vanuit de KCB-gedachte: je versterkt elkaar als ondernemers als je elkaar kent en begrijpt.

De KCB organiseert tweemaandelijks bijeenkomsten met interessante (lokale) sprekers uit het bedrijfsleven en gemiddeld twee bedrijfsbezoeken. Een ideaal platform om ideeën uit te wisselen, samen te werken en te netwerken. 

Wilt u verder kijken dan uw eigen bedrijf? Meedenken, samenwerken en u betrokken voelen bij de lokale (ondernemers)gemeenschap? Meld u aan! Geïnteresseerde vertegenwoordigers van bedrijven en instellingen, ondernemers in de gemeente Culemborg kunnen zich met onderstaand formulier aanmelden als kandidaat-lid. Het bestuur zal uw aanmelding toetsen aan de statuten en daarna contact met u opnemen.

De contributie bedraagt € 250,- per jaar; het lidmaatschap loopt per boekjaar. Opzeggen lidmaatschap kan minimaal 4 weken voor aanvang van het nieuwe seizoen, ofwel voor 1 augustus.

Op dit moment zijn er zo’n 140 leden; allemaal bedrijven en allemaal gevestigd in Culemborg. Leden worden automatisch opgenomen in de ledenlijst en mailinglijst en worden d.m.v. een nieuwsbrief geïnformeerd over nieuwtjes en bijeenkomsten. Hierin staat ook altijd een link om je hiervoor aan te melden. Er zijn 6-8 bijeenkomsten per jaar, met inloop vanaf 17:30 uur en altijd met eten erbij. Bij de bijeenkomsten mogen maximaal 2 vertegenwoordigers per organisatie aanwezig zijn.

Voor meer informatie: zie www.kcbculemborg.nl

Name: Meetball
Description:
One App, every event. Ask what you need, offer what you know. 
Meetball is a Social Network built by 100s of people from all over the world to solve one problem: Meeting the right people at events sucks!

It's an open Startup: If you like what were' building and you can help us scale, reach out!

How it works
Meetball flips networking on its head. Instead of chasing people who can help, the help comes to you. We create a safe space for people to ask real questions and share what they need. Then others can reply:
“Me Too” - to connect with people who resonate with their question
”I Can Help” - to connect with people offering their help

It turns “Does anyone know…?” into “I can help!” which makes real connections happen around a shared purpose. Meetball simplifies networking across all events, creating one portable network instead of leaving your connections stuck in single-event apps.

Name: Black Women Parlay
Description:
Founded by Leanne Mair, Black Women Parlay is a global community of Black women on the same wavelength. We are future-forward, we want to see change, we know there are hurdles, but the fact that we are here and standing shows that we fight to overcome. 

Parlay can just mean to speak, but it also means to speak freely and without restraint. This is what we do here. We allow all of our melanin to shine through it all of it glory!

This community isn't about transactions, but about building relationships and uplifting each other. If at some point, business things happen, then fine, but this isn't the purpose of it. We leave the selling at the door.

BWP is a space for us to share our joys, our sadnesses and our bougie too and also to share what we are reading and how we are growing. The focus is enriching each other.

This isn't just another community, this is the ONLY place to be as Black female game-changer, who wants to uplift herself and those around her. 

It is the sisterhood you chose and the one you didn't even know you needed.

It is a private, recommendation only network to make sure the community keeps its focus and purpose in mind and in action.

We need to be able to challenge each other without worrying about if there is another motive. This is what BYP should be and give.

An opportunity to bond, to connect, to develop, to break down any sort of scarcity mindset and to reconnect with our power as a collective of Black women.

WELCOME!

Name: PlotTwist (formerly Fourplay Social)
Description:
Hi Friends,

We’re Danielle and Julie, cofounders of PlotTwist, healthcare providers (Danielle is a nurse practitioner and Julie is a physician assistant), best friends from college (WE ARE Penn State), and yes, also two people looking for community. So, just know: WE GET IT.

We know what it’s like to live in the most populated city in the United States and to still feel lonely. To want to chime in with that group of friends laughing in the elevator, but to look down at your phone instead. To bookmark every trivia night, open mic, book club, and kickball league seen on TikTok, but to chicken out at the last second because you don’t want to go alone. 

BUT we also know this: when we’re together, we never fear saying yes to anything. And this “yes” mentality is what leads to the loudest laughs, the most unbelievable stories, and the richest feeling of human connection. 

Life should feel social, fulfilling, and safe. It should be full of unexpected plans, connections you didn’t see coming, and core memories with your favorite people. That’s why we built PlotTwist. Because when you show up with someone who feels safe, you’re suddenly free to meet people who are new and your world expands in both directions: closer to the people you love and deeper into your community.

We’re building PlotTwist because we’ve made it our mission to give every person the confidence they need to feel plugged into their community. We’re building for a world where social circles overlap, people mix freely, and everyone feels like they belong.  

Lastly, we just wanna say: to the lifelong friends we’ve met through PlotTwist - we adore you, to the guys we’ve double dated through PlotTwist who are forever part of our single life lore - we love you (even if you didn’t love us back... your loss, tbh), and… to the people we haven’t met yet but will because of PlotTwist - we’re ready when you are.

With love,
Danielle and Julie

Wanna have more fun with us? Follow @joinplottwist on IG and TikTok

Name: K4M2A
Description:
It's 2025, and it seems that we as humans might not survive to see the next 100 years. When you step out your front door, you don’t think twice about whether the essentials of life will work. The water flows from your taps. The lights turn on. The shelves are stocked with food. Life feels stable, dependable. But beneath this illusion of stability lies a harsh truth: we are standing on the edge of collapse. 

The systems we rely on, our food, energy, and environment are under enormous pressure. Climate change is speeding up. Resources are running out. Inequality is growing across the globe. 

For decades, we’ve chosen convenience over sustainability, profit over purpose, and competition over collaboration. We’ve created a world that feels built for today but is falling apart for tomorrow.

And now, as 2025 approaches, the cracks are everywhere. Floods and fires are destroying entire communities. Wars over water, energy, faiths and beliefs are getting worse. Hunger, sickness, and displacement are spreading fast.

The question we must ask is simple: What kind of future do we want?
Will we let everything crumble, or will we work together to create a world where humanity can thrive?The choice is ours but time is running out.

That's why we built K4M2A.

Imagine a world with no barriers of language, culture, or philosophy. No isolation or division. Just a seamless, global community united in the pursuit of enlightenment. This isn’t just a dream; it’s the future we are building at K4M2A.

We’ve reimagined what it means to connect spiritually and created a platform designed to remove centuries of barriers to global awakening.

Name: fortuite
Description:
Fortuite is the next big thing in social networking, with a potential in the trillion-dollar range.

Unlike other social networking apps that make us hyperconnected but lonely, Fortuite is a game-changer because it focuses on building authentic relationships the old-fashioned way. It doesn't use methods of enforcement that are too invasive of privacy and security, and it welcomes people of all ages and social levels. This gives everyone involved a very rewarding opportunity.

As Bill Gates said, "Humanity's greatest advances are not in its discoveries but in how those discoveries are applied to reduce inequity."

That's what Fortuite is doing by revolutionizing the way we fight loneliness by taking people from Virtual to Real using the latest cutting-edge AI that respects your freewill, neurology, and psychology discoveries. Unlike other apps, Fortuite is unique because it's based on emotional AI, ensuring that people safely meet like-minded individuals in curated groups and specific venues that have been designed to increase the feeling of empathy by the founder of modern semiology in architecture.

Fortuite knows that socializing is one of the most important physical and mental needs of our species, and it's determined to stop the epidemic of loneliness that affects 30% of the world's adults. But the problem of loneliness is not just a public health concern; it also has a major financial impact on the global economy. Fortuite is addressing this issue by providing a scalable and profitable solution that not only improves the lives of its users but also makes them more productive. By doing so, Fortuite is contributing to achieving 8 of the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

It's time to join the Fortuite community and Be yourself. Make friends.

- Accessible alternatives to pharmaceuticals.

For Health & Wellness Retailers:
- Build engaged customer communities around health goals and product ecosystems.
- Increase Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) via ongoing personalized recommendations.
- Faster time from health problem realization to purchase.
- Rich customer data for personalized marketing (fully compliant with GDPR/HIPAA).

- Open APIs to access aggregated, real-world health intervention data.

Name: Clinical Research: Jobs, News, Trends, and Updates
Description:
Welcome to Clinical Research Updates

In the rapidly evolving world of healthcare, staying informed about the latest developments in clinical research is paramount. Whether you're a seasoned researcher, a healthcare professional, a student, or simply someone passionate about medical advancements, our page is dedicated to bringing you the most insightful, accurate, and timely updates from the realm of clinical research.

Our Mission

At Clinical Research Updates, our mission is to bridge the gap between complex scientific findings and the broader community. We strive to:

Educate: Break down intricate research studies into digestible content, ensuring that both professionals and enthusiasts can grasp the significance of new findings.

Inform: Provide timely news about breakthroughs, ongoing trials, regulatory changes, and technological advancements in clinical research.

Engage: Foster a community where ideas are exchanged, discussions are encouraged, and collaborations are born.

Inspire: Highlight stories of perseverance, innovation, and dedication within the clinical research community, motivating others to contribute to this vital field.

Why Clinical Research Matters

Clinical research is the backbone of modern medicine. It is through rigorous trials and studies that we validate the efficacy and safety of new treatments, understand disease mechanisms, and pave the way for innovative therapies. The implications of clinical research are vast:

Improved Patient Care: By validating new treatments, clinical research directly influences the quality of care patients receive.

Disease Prevention: Studies often lead to insights that help in preventing diseases before they manifest.

Economic Impact: Successful trials can lead to the development of drugs and therapies that boost the healthcare industry's economic growth.

Global Health Advancements: Collaborative international research efforts address global health challenges, ensuring better outcomes worldwide.

Name: We THRIVE
Description:
We created We THRIVE as a result of not finding an all-inclusive networking platform or organization for Women in Las Vegas. Every networking group we have been part of, has always been specifically designed to cater to a targeted demographic. Although this is great and has served us well throughout our careers, we felt something was missing. We decided to take the “work” out of “network” and created a safety “net” for all Women who are looking for a space where they can thrive, regardless of what stage of their life they are in.

At We THRIVE we aim to TRANSFORM, EMPOWER and CONNECT Women from all walks of life; by designing an environment where trust, wellness, leadership, and the love for living a full life; is represented in everything we do. We do not screen for titles, income, age, ethnicity, or profession. 

We recognize that people need to genuinely connect, more today than ever before. Our circle allows Women to do just that, not only in a classroom setting, but also while performing other activities that fill their hearts, minds, and souls.

We host monthly events where we educate on trending topics, we connect with one another at a higher level, and we bring fun into our lives. At We THRIVE, we believe that all areas of our lives are connected and to live happy, we must fuel those areas alike. Consequently, we organize outings closed to members only, where we create memorable and transformational experiences together.

We THRIVE is not a networking platform, it is a genuine circle of friends willing to collaborate with each other and live a fuller life.

If you are in Las Vegas and striving to find your place, we welcome you with open arms to THRIVE with us!

Our members come from a wide range of manufacturing backgrounds

Avishkar passes on an average  250 Quality References per

members.

We believe in the philosophy of "Givers Gain" and always put

through our members. We can't wait to see what the future holds for
Avishkar!

Name: Plausible Gaming
Description:
Plausible Gaming provides a looking-for-group platform that helps elite gamers find teammates in under 5 minutes.

A competitive gamer with thousands of hours in-game faces a dilemma: searching for days to find the right squad, or jumping into the game and accepting random teammates with differing languages, skills, and playstyles. The more elite, the more frustrating, important, and commercial this choice becomes. Accepting an in-game mismatch often results in lost games, team kills, or rage quits. Settling for this choice comes from not having the time (or patience) to look for the right squad.

Our Generation 3 app uses advanced data to solve the right language, skill level, and playstyle in under 5 minutes—10 times faster and with more features than our closest competitor. This level of team building not only improves a competitive gamer’s elite skills while offering more fun and flow, but it also puts them on the path to competitive gaming glory!

Det starter med kaf’….eller måske det starter på en NetWalk

-------------------

Name: Master the Failure
Description:
Притеснявате ли се от неуспехи? Имали ли сте провали, които още преживявате? Е, не сте сами 

Master The Failure е събитие, на което известни хора от различни сфери на бизнеса разказват за своите провали и какви уроци са научили от тях. Предприемачи, хора от корпоративния свят, артисти, писатели, IТ, ресторантьори ще ви разкажат действителни истории за техните неуспехи от първо лице и изводите, които са си направили. След всяка презентация ще имате възможност да зададете лично въпроси към тях.

Идеята на Master The Failure е да разчупва парадигмата около неуспехите и провалите, като нещо, от което се срамуваме и крием. Да започнем открито да говорим и споделяме за тях, като преживявания, които са ни помогнали да научим ценни уроци, да израстваме и да се развиваме.

Master The Failure е за всички хора, които търсят вдъхновение и ценни уроци за своето развитие. Нашата мисия е да овладеем провалите и да ги използваме като скрита сила. Всеки един от нашите лектори е доказателство, че не трябва да се страхуваме от провалите, а да ги приемаме като част от нашия житейски път.

Харесайте страницата ни и бъдете първите, които ще научите кога е следващото ни събитие!

Name: BetBoard
Description:
BetBoard is taking the industry by storm, addressing the ongoing concern that is a lack of credibility in the sports betting space. 

BetBoard is a digital platform that brings together sports enthusiasts who enjoy betting on sporting events. It provides a space for users to connect, share their betting experiences, exchange tips and strategies, and discuss upcoming and live sporting events. With live lines populating, you can also place bets with your preferred OSB. Focusing on credibility, BetBoard ensures the content creators and pick makers are credible sources via the BetBoard Credibility Scoring System. 

Here are some key features that BetBoard offers:

1. Community Interaction: Users can engage with each other through our public feed. Share your insights, discuss betting strategies, or seek advice from more experienced bettors. Dive into specific events for an event focused forum. 

2. Credibility is KING! With time-stamped posts, you can track earlier picks and comments made on the social feed with our “then and now” feature. This shows the event score and odds at time of post vs. what it is live. 

3. Betting Insights and picks: users have the ability to post free picks and content or monetize their following with paywalled posts. Successful bettors can unlock entrepreneurship!

4. Leaderboards: Users can follow and track helpful and successful bettors. Earn tokens from paywalled picks and tips from the community as you climb. 

5. Credibility Scoring System: The platform has organized a scoring system similar to a credit score for successful bettors, helpful content creators, and content moderators as well. This score is shown on every user's profile to determine who is a credible source. Leverage this to build your following on your way to becoming a BetBoard Legend.

Name: Kakuma-Kalobeyei Refugee Initiatives Network (KKRIN)
Description:
Kakuma Kalobeyei Refugee-led Initiatives Network is a Network of organizations led by refugees in the Kakuma Refugee Camp and Kalobeyei settlement, which advocate, empower, support, and promote collaboration among RLOs/CBO, UNHCR, Humanitarian agencies, and the government.

Kakuma and Kalobeyei are both refugee camps in Kenya hosting thousands of refugees from different countries who have fled conflict, persecution, and other forms of violence in their home countries. These communities face many challenges, including limited access to education, healthcare, and employment opportunities. Despite these challenges, refugees in Kakuma and Kalobeyei have shown incredible resilience and resourcefulness, working to build a better future for themselves and their families. The Kalobeyei-Kakuma Refugee-led Initiatives Network is a platform for RLOs/CBOs to come together, share knowledge and resources, and collaborate on initiatives to help improve the lives of all refugees living in the camps.

Our mission is to advocate and empower refugee-led organizations/community-based organizations in Kakuma Refugee Camp and Kalobeyei settlements, promoting collaboration and supporting initiatives to address the needs of our communities.

Our vision is of a future where refugee-led organizations in Kakuma and Kalobeyei areas have the tools, resources, and support to lead their communities, foster social and economic development, and contribute positively to the region's overall growth and prosperity.

Objectives

•	To increase access to resources for refugee-led organizations in Kalobeyei and Kakuma settlements.
•	To advocate for RLOs/CBOs to increase awareness of refugee issues, locally, nationally, and internationally, ensuring they participate in decision-making processes that affect their lives.
•	To strengthen the capacity of refugee-led organizations to lead, innovate, and address the challenges faced by the communities they serve.

Name: Amaryllis | Vrijwilligerswerk
Description:
Vrijwilligerswerk Amaryllis staat midden in de stad; letterlijk en figuurlijk! Vanuit ons kantoor aan het Zuidvliet, en tijdens activiteiten en wekelijkse inloopmomenten in diverse wijken/dorpen stimuleren, verbinden en promoten we het vrijwilligerswerk in de Gemeente Leeuwarden. 

We zijn partner op het gebied van vrijwillige inzet voor (toekomstige) vrijwilligers en voor organisaties die met vrijwilligers (samen)werken. We geven advies (op maat), trainen, organiseren kennissessies & thema/ambitiebijeenkomsten, fungeren als intermediair voor b.v. vragen naar individuele vrijwillige inzet, verbinden Leeuwarder vrijwilligersorganisaties en (toekomstige) vrijwilligers o.a. via onze vacaturebank www.samenleeuwarden.nl (waar gemiddeld zo’n 450 vacatures te vinden zijn),  en vertalen landelijk beschikbare kennis in ons vakgebied naar de lokale situatie (bijvoorbeeld op het gebied van schuldhulpverlening, eenzaamheid en laaggeletterdheid). 

Kortom, we profileren ons steeds meer als expertisecentrum vrijwillige inzet. Dagelijks ervaren we de meerwaarde van het feit dat we als onafhankelijk partner in vrijwilligerswerk in staat zijn om overzicht te houden over het geheel waardoor we een unieke positie innemen in de gemeente Leeuwarden.

Iedere werkdag ben je tussen 10:00 en 16:00 van harte welkom aan het Zuidvliet 620 te Leeuwarden, waar één van onze (vrijwillige) bemiddelaars graag met jou op zoek gaat naar dé geschikte vrijwilligersvacature. Uiteraard kun je ook via onze website op vacatures reageren, www.samenleeuwarden.nl. Vragen kun je mailen naar vrijwilligerswerk@amaryllisleeuwarden.nl of bellen naar (058) 30 30 400.

Name: Ignite Talks Berlin
Description:
Ignite — Inspiration and New Ideas for Tomorrow’s Evolution

Die brandneue Eventreihe »Ignite« hat das Ziel, sich als regelmäßig stattfindende Veranstaltung zu etablieren. Designer*innen, Kreative und Interessierte erhalten hier eine Plattform, um die Verbindung und Verantwortung des Designs in Bezug auf Themen wie Nachhaltigkeit, gesellschaftliche Verantwortung, Diversität und nachhaltige Wirtschaftlichkeit zu erkunden.

In Vorträgen und anschließenden Diskussionen werden die Teilnehmer*innen mit den Herausforderungen und Möglichkeiten des (Grafik)Designs konfrontiert. Sie erhalten praktische Tipps und Werkzeuge, um ihre eigenen Projekte und Arbeitsweisen zu überdenken und zu verbessern.

Das Hauptziel dieser Eventreihe ist es, das Bewusstsein für die Auswirkungen von Designentscheidungen auf die Gesellschaft zu schärfen und Designer*innen zu ermutigen, ihre Arbeit nachhaltiger und verantwortungsbewusster zu gestalten. Zusätzlich soll die Gelegenheit geboten werden, sich miteinander zu vernetzen und somit ein nachhaltiges Wissensnetzwerk zu knüpfen.

Ignite ist eine Initiative von Patrick Marc Sommer/typoint und Jan Erlinghagen/CRU Brand Consultancy.

Name: Courtly
Description:
Courtly is a full-stack AI-powered SaaS tournament management platform combined with a consumer-facing sports ecosystem, built to digitize and unify every aspect of racquet sport operations.

AI-Driven Tournament Management (SaaS)

Courtly offers an end-to-end, fully automated tournament management suite designed for federations, leagues, clubs, and event operators:

Smart Registration: Player onboarding, category allocation, and eligibility checks

Automated Draws & Scheduling: AI-generated brackets, match sequencing, and court allocation

Referee & Official Management: Centralized referee assignment, match oversight, and approvals

Live Scoring & Results: Real-time score updates with instant leaderboard and bracket progression

Operations Dashboard: One unified panel to manage tournaments at scale with minimal manual intervention

This replaces fragmented, manual processes with a scalable, error-free, and time-efficient system, enabling operators to run events seamlessly across cities and countries.

Consumer App & Sports Network

On the consumer side, Courtly functions as a connected sports platform for players, coaches, and venues:

Player & Coach Discovery: Find and connect with like-minded players and certified coaches

Court Discovery & Booking: Explore nearby courts and availability

Live Scores & Match Tracking: Follow games, tournaments, and personal match history

Communication & Groups: Create private groups for teams, academies, leagues, and communities

Social & Community Layer: All interactions—games, events, messaging, and updates—happen within one ecosystem

One Platform. One Ecosystem.

Courtly bridges event infrastructure and everyday play, creating a single system where tournaments, players, coaches, venues, and communities coexist.

By combining AI-led tournament automation with a high-engagement consumer network, Courtly is building the default digital backbone for the global racquet sports economy.

Założycielami DesignCursor są Kamil Zieliński i Dagmara Wierzbowska.

Name: Pride in Tech
Description:
Pride in Tech is a community that exists to make the working world a kinder and safer space for queer people. 

We host unique networking initiatives via our event programme, working in collaboration with the wider tech community, businesses, and brands who are passionate about creating a more equitable working world. We are PROUD to be a certified B Corp and stand with a network of organisations committed to putting people and the planet over profit. With our fantastic hosts and panel members, we aim to reduce the negative impact of the economic and professional hardships that disproportionately affect the LGBTQIA+ population. We also deliver podcasts, blogs and workshops. Check out our website for more information. 

This is a comfortable and supportive space for LGBTQIA+ folk and allies alike, a platform that seeks to raise queer voices and put the spotlight on their talents in a climate where they’re so often ignored. 

We are part of Trinnovo Group, a community-led recruitment and advisory business on a mission to build diversity, create inclusion, and encourage workplace innovation. Our diversity, inclusion, equity, and belonging approach to business enables us to create career access for underrepresented individuals everywhere.

Name: Department of Instrumentation, CUSAT – Alumni Network
Description:
The Department of Instrumentation at Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has been a pioneer in Instrumentation and Control Engineering in India. Established with the vision of developing highly skilled professionals, the department has consistently advanced education and research in areas such as Industrial Automation, Process Control, Biomedical Instrumentation, Robotics, IoT, and AI-driven Smart Systems.

Equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories, a dedicated faculty team, and strong industry collaborations—including partnerships with leading institutions, research organizations, and international universities—the department has built an outstanding track record of producing graduates who excel in industry settings. Its commitment to innovation is reflected in a dynamic curriculum designed in consultation with global industry experts to meet international standards, complemented by an impressive placement record.

Adding to this legacy, the Instrumentation CUSAT Alumni Network serves as a vibrant platform connecting accomplished alumni across diverse industries. Our graduates, spread worldwide, are driving advancements in cutting-edge technologies, research, and entrepreneurship. The network fosters a strong sense of community and lifelong learning, while actively supporting the next generation of engineers through professional networking, mentorship programs, and collaborative initiatives.

Name: NON PLUS ULTRA
Description:
NON PLUS ULTRA – Ihr Partner für nachhaltiges und effektives Unternehmenswachstum

NON PLUS ULTRA – Business Unit der api GmbH mit Sitz in Baesweiler, verfolgt die Mission Unternehmen dabei zu unterstützen, nachhaltig und effizient zu wachsen. Mit einem Team von Experten, darunter Achim Heyne, Inhaber und Gründer der api GmbH, mit einem Jahresumsatz von 1,3 Mrd. Euro und 850 Mitarbeitern.

Bei NON PLUS ULTRA haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, Kunden jeder Größe und Branche, die notwendigen Schritte aufzuzeigen, um erfolgreich zu werden. Mit unseren bewährten Maßnahmen und Strategien ersparen wir unseren Kunden unnötige Lernprozesse.

Unsere Experten, die sich auf die individuellen Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden konzentrieren, bringen herausragende Fachkenntnisse und umfassende operative Erfahrung mit. 

Unsere Schwerpunktbereiche umfassen maßgeschneidertes Networking für Unternehmer, die Rekrutierung hochqualifizierten Fachpersonals sowie Programme zur Mitarbeiterentwicklung und - Bindung. Wir sind fest davon überzeugt, dass ein erfolgreiches Wachstum nur durch die richtige Ausrichtung auf diese drei Schlüsselbereiche möglich ist. Bei NON PLUS ULTRA wissen wir, wie diese Bereiche erfolgreich bewirtschaftet werden können, und stehen Ihnen als verlässlicher Partner zur Seite.

Gründung der Business Unit: 2023
Mitarbeiteranzahl: 11-50 
Webseite: Startseite | NON PLUS ULTRA (non-plus-ultra.de)

Name: Asena Club
Description:
Asena Club is Chicago's premier high-status networking platform for ambitious influencers, entrepreneurs, and business leaders. We cultivate a dynamic community where top-tier professionals connect, collaborate, and scale their ventures across the Chicago, Naperville, Schaumburg, and Hoffman Estates Metropolitan Area, and throughout Illinois, Indiana, and Wisconsin, USA.

We provide unparalleled networking opportunities for those in banking, shipping, technology, ICT, telecom, mobile, electronics, chemicals, port, real estate, and consultancy. Asena Club empowers CEOs, CFOs, CTOs, CIOs, CMOs, CCOs, and individuals in marketing, media, social, professional trading, import/export, recruitment, and human resources.

Our platform is a catalyst for startups, scale-ups, and established brands, fostering connections with angel investors and facilitating growth in the digital age. We serve professionals in finance, Fintech, AdTech, Healthtech, AgriTech, agriculture, and agribusiness, and those focused on sustainable and renewable energy or oil and gas.

Chicago, the "Windy City," is a global leader in innovation and economic diversity. Asena Club is proud to be at the heart of this thriving ecosystem, serving the #1 destination for engineering, business, and tech graduates and a consistent leader in corporate relocations. Our members include leaders from Walgreens Boots Alliance, Boeing, Archer Daniels Midland, Caterpillar, Allstate, McDonald’s, Jones Lang LaSalle, Discover Financial Services, and Baxter.

Asena Club embraces cutting-edge technology, including AI, cloud services, and software development, to enhance networking and collaboration. We understand the dynamics of trade, shipping, Smart City development, and the vital role of universities.

Join Asena Club to access an exclusive network that fuels your success.

Name: Wemon
Description:
El comienzo de la industria de las redes sociales se basaba en una ecuación muy sencilla:
Red social = dating + ocio + bienestar, es decir:

-> Si eres una app de dating, no eres una red social, sino de citas.
-> Si eres una app de fotos y vídeos, no eres una red social sino de entretenimiento.
-> Si eres una app de planes, no eres una red social sino de ocio.

¿Dónde esta esa app que te permitía saber que fiestas o planes te rodeaban? ¿Esa app que te facilitaba conocer gente andando por la calle? ¿Esa app en la que subías fotos sin tanto prejuicio?

Es hora de dinamizar la vida, es hora de traer de vuelta la esencia básica de las redes sociales, es hora de crear una.

Name: The CEO's Den
Description:
The CEO's Den is a space where audacious minds who refuse to settle for mediocrity convene to discuss great business ideas intended for the transformation of the socio-economic status of various communities.
We are a tribe of innovators, risk-takers and dreamers who are both convicted and persuaded of the impact we can bring into this world through pursuit of entrepreneurship. 

MISSION
The Den is designed to bring together  CEOs of small enterprises who are tired of going it alone and want to connect and collaborate to fuel their entrepreneurship journey and ignite their creativity sparks.

GOAL:
To what end ?? ICONIC BUSINESS BRANDS

VALUES:
 1. We embrace the unknown and take bold steps towards our goals
2. Thinking  outside the box  is one of our mantras when looking for   innovative solutions
3. We lift each other through therapy role-playing.
4. Also, we are continuously learning, evolving and pushing ourselves to scale our ideas.
5. Creating an impact on the societies we hail from is a value we deeply regard.

BENEFITS 
A. Joining us will grant you access to exclusive events and workshops that fuel your courage to start a business.
B. One can gain mentorship and coaching from experienced entrepreneurs who have started alone, those who have transitioned from 9 to 5 and those who know the nook and cranny of current market trends.
C. The den also has a diverse network of small business owners who understand your journey.
D. There are discounts and perks from partner businesses to support your business setup and marketing success 
E. We are a community that will be your cheerleader in case you are short of inspiration to continue.

MEMBERSHIP
The Den is open to small business owners from all industries who share our values and desire to excel.

LEADERSHIP
Founded by entrepreneurs who have overcome obstacles and a team of skilled business owners dedicated to helping you start, grow and sustain your entrepreneurship.

Name: OPEN MOUTH
Description:
Wir wollen beim Open Mouth Hamburg Food Festival eine einzigartige Plattform schaffen, die Menschen durch die Kraft von Essen, Kultur und Gemeinschaft vereint. Wir streben danach, die Vielfalt kulinarischer Traditionen zu feiern, indem wir Geschmackserlebnisse aus aller Welt präsentieren. Gleichzeitig setzen wir uns für Bildung ein, indem wir Einblicke in nachhaltige Ernährung, Kochkunst und die Geschichten hinter den Lebensmitteln ermöglichen.Wir verpflichten uns dazu, eine inspirierende Umgebung zu schaffen, die nicht nur den Gaumen erfreut, sondern auch den Geist bereichert. Unser Food Festival fördert den direkten Kontakt zwischen Erzeugern und Verbrauchern, um Transparenz und Wertschätzung für hochwertige Lebensmittel zu fördern.
Durch die Förderung von kulturellem Verständnis, sozialer Interaktion und lebenslangem Lernen möchten wir eine positive Veränderung in der Art und Weise bewirken, wie Menschen Essen erleben und mit ihrer globalen Gemeinschaft in Verbindung treten. Unser Ziel ist es, eine nachhaltige, inklusive und inspirierende Plattform zu schaffen, die Menschen dazu ermutigt, bewusste Entscheidungen über ihre Ernährung zu treffen und eine gemeinsame Leidenschaft für gutes Essen zu teilen.

Name: Orbita
Description:
What is Orbita?

Orbita is a global community that unites Russian-speaking people all over the world. Today, the Orbita Mir community has over 5,000 people from 17 countries, from Argentina to Australia. It consists of 4 geographical branches of independent communities that continue the values of Orbita Mir:

 Orbita Russia
 Orbita Serbia
 Orbita England
 Orbita France

Today, Orbita Mir is represented by 10 Orbita satellites that hold regular live events in 4 countries. Orbita Mir satellites are people, affairs, and communities born, raised, and cultivated in the house of values that crystallized with the help of the Orbita Mir team.

History of the project
The project has existed in its current form since 2023 and was preceded by several non-profit initiatives, including "Boomerang of Good" and the "Delo" club, which was created more than four years ago.

The goal of Orbita
The goal of Orbita is to provide comprehensive support to Russian-speaking emigrants, ensuring they can study effectively, work successfully, and live happily, fostering their growth and well-being in their new homes.

Orbita is People, Actions and Communities.
ORBITA is an environment where simple values live:

 courage
 happiness
 synergy
 originality

In Orbita, we like to grow and strive together.

Our mission in action:
Setting Ambitious Goals
Making Our Voices Heard
Focusing on Growth
Finding Purpose
Connecting and Supporting Each Other
Educating
Creating Opportunities
Expanding Our Impact

Success stories in Orbita are the small and big actions of an original, courageous, and happy person who is not afraid to live in synergy.

Клубът носи ново име и ново начало, но стои върху стабилна основа – опита и визията на основателката Илияна Търнина, доказала се като основен двигател в изграждането на успешни корпоративни структури и бизнес мрежи за жени в България. Заедно с нея стои и силния ръководен екип, който подкрепя общността от самия й старт.

SheCircle обединява дами с богат професионален път, които вярват в силата на създаването на стойност – не само за всяка отделна дама - член, но и за обществото. Това е мястото, където опитът среща вдъхновението, а бизнесът – смисъла.

Вижте как да заявите своето членство на нашата платформа https://www.shecircle.net/.

Name: Agentur Pacemaker

Der Name "Pacemaker" wurde für die Agentur gewählt, um die zentrale Rolle und den Mehrwert zu verdeutlichen, den ich meinen Kunden bieten möchte. Ähnlich wie ein Pacemaker beim Marathon helfen wir den Läufern, ihre Zielzeiten zu erreichen, indem ich ihnen das nötige Tempo vorgebe und sie motiviere.

Als begeisterter Marathonläufer mit über 10 absolvierten Läufen verstehe ich die Bedeutung von Ausdauer, Zielstrebigkeit und dem richtigen Tempo. Diese Erfahrungen fließen auch in meine Arbeit als Social Media Marketing ein.

In der Welt des Social Media Marketing möchte ich meinen Kunden helfen, ihre Ziele zu erreichen und ihre Markenpräsenz zu stärken. Ich möchte der Antrieb und die treibende Kraft sein, die ihnen dabei hilft, in diesem dynamischen und wettbewerbsintensiven Umfeld erfolgreich zu sein. Indem ich meine Expertise und mein Fachwissen einsetze, geben ich den
Unternehmen das richtige Tempo vor und unterstützen sie dabei, ihre Ziele zu erreichen.

Der Name "Pacemaker" symbolisiert auch die Tatsache, dass ich meinen Kunden als Orientierungspunkt und Vorbild dienen möchten. Wie Läufer einem Pacemaker folgen, möchten wir, dass die potenziellen Endverbraucher den jeweiligen Unternehmen folgen, um wichtige und spannende Informationen über sie zu erhalten.

Name: grape
Description:
Where to eat made easy ! 
Real videos from real customers.

Problem:
Are you familiar with choosing a restaurant based on Google star ratings?
Only 3% of people leave reviews, while 93% consult them. They're not verified, yet we make decisions based on this shaky system.
There’s no incentive to post, no authenticity, and no verification.
You could also use Instagram or Tiktok to find a place, very unlikely that you're close by.

Solution:
At Grape, we’re rethinking how people share their experiences by turning every video into cash – that’s the incentive.
We’re riding the wave of snackable content – short videos like on TikTok, Instagram, Snap, or BeReal – bringing authenticity.
We’re also solving the GDPR compliance issue that giants like Google Reviews and TripAdvisor fail to address – thanks to our patented technology.

Market:
We’re targeting the hospitality industry (cafés, hotels, restaurants), where there’s a clear correlation between a restaurant’s Google rating and its revenue.

Mass adoption:
With Grape, it’s simple: every user becomes an influencer, an ambassador. And everyday people like you and me can now find places based on real, authentic video experiences.
Our technology is patented, scalable, and already live.

Strong team of advisors – from an LÉPINE award-winning patent expert to the CPTO of Taster and the former Head of Partnerships at Sunday.

Solid founding team – self-made, with a top-tier CTO and a globally-minded CEO.

Our Mission: To strip away the guesswork of hiring and replace it with human validation. Whether you are looking to grow your career, share your expertise, or build a team, Zealoq provides the clarity you need to move forward.

Let’s build a career world based on reality, not keywords.

Name: grape
Description:
L'application qui transforme les vidéos en euros !

Grape, c'est quoi ? 
Grape transforme les petites vidéos en grandes opportunités. Elle connecte une communauté qui partage, explore et s'inspire mutuellement. Grape s’appuie sur le snack content – des vidéos courtes, dynamiques et faciles à consommer – pour capturer l’attention dans un monde où tout va très vite. 

Une idée simple et efficace : 
Aujourd'hui, les vidéos courtes comme les reels ou stories sont partout.

Grape permet de donner une vraie utilité à ces moments partagés : transformer des vidéos du quotidien en récompenses concrètes.
Pourquoi les vidéos ? Les vidéos racontent mieux qu'une photo ou un texte. Elles montrent un endroit, une expérience ou un moment simple avec émotion. 
Grape utilise cette énergie pour mettre en valeur chaque instant partagé. Dans un format court, elles captent l'attention, inspirent et créent un lien direct avec ceux qui les regardent. 

Un fonctionnement simple : 
Avec Grape, chaque vidéo partagée rapporte directement de l'argent. Il n'y a pas d'intermédiaire ou de système compliqué. Plus de moments partagés, c'est plus de récompenses.

Partager pour inspirer : 
Grape aide à trouver de nouveaux lieux, des bonnes adresses ou des idées sorties à travers des vidéos vraies et simples. Chaque personne qui partage contribue à une communauté qui aime explorer et s'inspirer des expériences des autres.

Quatre verticales exploitées : 
Grape se concentre sur quatre moments clés : manger, boire, sortir, dormir. Ces expériences du quotidien rassemblent tout le monde et offrent des vidéos utiles pour trouver les meilleures idées, adresses et recommandations.

Des moments authentiques : 
Pas besoin de faire des vidéos parfaites. Grape donne de l'importance à des moments sincères et naturels. Elle remet au centre ce qui compte vraiment : des partages qui parlent à tout le monde. 

Avec Grape, chaque vidéo compte, chaque moment partagé peut être utile et chaque découverte a sa place.

Name: Girls under Quarantine
Description:
Girls Under Quarantine е онлайн общност, насочена към жени на всякаква възраст, целяща да предостави сигурнa и подкрепяща платформа за тяхното личностно и професионално развитие. Създадена през 2020г. във Фейсбук по време на пандемията на шега, с една единствена идея - да сближи жените в България, чрез развлечение и споделяне на изкуство, през дългите карантинни дни. В последствие групата започна натурално да расте от уста на уста, до ден днешен, където има над 3 000 члена.  Платформата се стреми да създаде виртуално пространство, където жените могат да споделят свои преживявания, да получат съвети и да се насочат към възможности за развитие.

Един от основните аспекти на Girls Under Quarantine е подчертаната важност на солидарността и подкрепата между жените. Фейсбук групата позволява на членовете на общността да споделят свои преживявания, съвети и вдъхновяващи истории. Тук жените могат да създадат приятелства и  да получат взаимна подкрепа и вдъхновение.

Girls Under Quarantine има амбицията да се развива като важен ресурс за млади жени, които търсят подкрепа, вдъхновение и възможности за развитие както в личния, така и в професионалния аспект. Със своята ангажираност към солидарността и растежа на жените, този сайт има желание да издига общността като силен глас в света на женското развитие и овластяване.

Name: Doubble
Description:
Something is wrong with how we meet new people.

Meeting new people is supposed to be exciting, spontaneous and fun. Yet, datings apps have turned it into a monotonous routine. 

All dating apps claim to be different, but they are essentially all a speed dating game played in solo mode with a pool of strangers. 

It’s a game of swipe, match and “hey, what’s up” chats that rarely lead anywhere. 

Sometimes you miraculously get past the boring smalltalk, dodge the ghosting and actually meet! 

But more often than not, the date you “won” feels like a boring coffee interview.

We deserve better than that. 

That’s why we are creating a different experience of meeting new people. 

What if instead of playing this speed dating game by yourself, you are playing a different game and this time it's with your friends?

Instead of the coffee date interview, it’s more like going to a spontaneous party with your close friends and bumping into a crush. 

If we can bring our vision for this social network to life, a spontaneous adventure of meeting new people with your friends will always be just a few clicks away.

Name: OnlyCoders.net
Description:
OnlyCoders.net is a community that connects employers, candidates, and recruiters through an AI-powered job board. It matches tech talent based on skills, location, visa status, and other key factors, ensuring a fair and unbiased process for everyone. 

At OnlyCoders, we recognize that resumes alone cannot fully capture a candidate's expertise and potential.

Our founder, Giuseppe Muci, the CTO of a prominent financial research company, faced significant challenges in finding skilled software developers to fill crucial positions. This experience motivated him to create an inclusive environment where coders can freely exchange knowledge with one another.

This invaluable information is leveraged by OnlyCoders' experienced recruiters to identify the perfect candidates for various roles, providing tailored staff augmentation solutions for permanent, contract, and freelance opportunities.

What sets us apart from our competitors is our unique ability to tap into an advanced AI model specifically designed to analyze insights shared by users on our platform. This model goes beyond simply parsing candidate profiles; it articulates clear reasons why each candidate is an excellent match for particular roles. Additionally, it ranks candidates based on their individual skill sets, empowering us to pinpoint the best fit for each position with unparalleled precision.

Join us at onlycoders.net and experience the future of recruitment, where knowledge meets opportunity!

Dwarsdenker van het Jaar! Een ode aan de dwarsdenker

In een wereld vol conventies vinden wij inspiratie in de dwarsdenkers. Zij slaan nieuwe wegen in, doorbreken barrières en tonen ons de kracht van anders denken en positieve verandering.

Bij “Dwarsdenker van het Jaar” draait het niet om gewone evenementen, maar om het vieren van onconventionele ideeën en inspirerende verhalen. Waarom? Omdat we geloven in de kracht van vernieuwing en positieve verandering, en we willen anderen aanmoedigen hetzelfde te doen.

Wanneer?
16 november: Bekendmaking van de genomineerden.
11 december: Bekendmaking van de winnaar van de "Dwarsdenker van het Jaar".


#PositieveVerandering | #DD23 | Join the movement!

Name: The Full Stack
Description:
We build platforms that enable developers to grow a network and connect to teams to build the most amazing things.

Why this matters?

There is a global shortage of 40 million developers worldwide, yet 10.2 million still get overlooked. We, as developers, love solving problems and building product. But we're not good at selling ourselves. Developers, very often, undersell themselves on paper. A resume filter has an inherent bias toward good academic credentials, yet 64% of the global developer population are self-taught, without the "suited" academic credentials. We are typically discovered through who you work for or who you know, not for what you can build.

Frustrated with how developers get discovered and get connected to other developers and teams, we founded a company with a mission to make this easier and simpler with a better experience.

Opportunity comes around when you expand your network. We believe in the power of building your own network. We believe showing off what you can build and expressing your story yields results. And importantly, we believe in human connection, resulting in a better and more inclusive experience for all. We're building a platform centred around community and the belief that showing off what you can build will help you grow your network and make your best career moves.

We named it The Full Stack.

Name: BANGKOK ST ANDREW'S SOCIETY
Description:
About Bangkok St Andrews Society

The Bangkok St. Andrew's Society was established in 1890 by a small group of expatriate Scots stationed in what was then Siam and is the oldest of the 4 "loyal" societies (St. Patrick's, St. David's and St. George's) in Thailand. 

Over the years it has gone through many developments but remains true to its original roots as a Society for Scots, those of Scots descent and those with an interest in all things scottish to meet and celebrate the Scottish culture.

Name: Amealio
Description:
Amealio is building an AI-powered platform to reimagine food, joy, and togetherness. 

Beyond delivery, we craft personalized, soul-filled experiences — blending AI, Food, and community to turn everyday meals into moments of connection. 

Recognized by Google AI, ONDC & Antler VC. Join us in building the Experience Economy.
 About Amealio:
What started as an idea is a passionate team, relentlessly building something we believe can reshape how the world experiences food, joy, and togetherness. While platforms have made delivery fast and convenient, they’ve left something out. The soul.  They operate on discounts and deliver transactions — not experiences.  

Today’s platforms serve generic menus, discounts on deliveries. There’s no personalization, no emotional connection, and no space to discover or celebrate the everyday magic in life.


Over 101 million Indians live with diabetes. Many avoid lactose. Millions more have unique cultural preferences or dietary needs. People don’t just want food — they want relevance, excitement, and care.  People are spending not just for convenience — but to enjoy, to celebrate, and to feel seen. Food universally connected people has been so for 1000’s of years.

That’s where Amealio comes in. now  vision to create a platform for people to connect people and spread happiness
We’re not just delivering food.We’re delivering joy.Curated experiences.Moments that become memories.

Whether you’re stepping out or staying in, Amealio helps you discover, plan, book, and enjoy moments that feel made just for you personalized. Explore experiences for everyday occasions turn those moments into memories, meet and connect with people in your vicinity in our hyper local community form meaningful connections and conversations over food. 

We're building a new category: the AI-powered Experience Economy — where food, entertainment, and community come together in one seamless, personalized journey.

Name: SWiiFT
Description:
You’ve just landed in a new country, you’re filled with excitement for adventure, but you have so many questions. “Where do I start? What do the locals do? How do I tap into the culture? Before you know it, it’s time to go back home! Do you ever end a trip feeling like you didn't have the chance to fully get to know the city or place you were in? If so, you're one of the many people that relates to "travel FOMO". 
 
At SWiiFT, we personally understand this problem so we're designing a solution that connects travellers with locals for them to gain unique and culturally-immersive experiences. After all, what better way to experience a new city and what it has to offer than from the perspective of a local?

Our ultimate goal at SWiiFT is to spark genuine connections between people from different cities, backgrounds and cultures. To that end, the SWiiFT app matches users based on an extensive profile, personality and compatibility assessment. We want our travellers to experience the true essence of any place they decide to head to through their connections; and to provide our locals with the opportunity to share the wonders of their home-cities with the rest of the world.

Join the waitlist on our website! 
IG: @swiift.app

Name: Minds Igniting the Future
Description:
MIF2025: MIF2025: Promoting, Mapping & Funding European Tech 

Europe is bursting with innovation. From cutting-edge AI applications and sustainable energy solutions to advanced biotech and deep tech. European startups and tech companies are developing groundbreaking products and services with the potential to make a global impact. 

Yet, many of these innovations remain under the radar, struggling to connect with the right partners, investors and customers.

To bridge this gap and give the European tech sector the boost it deserves, we created MIF2025 - Minds Igniting the Future - an innovative platform designed to bring tech companies together, increase their global visibility and foster collaboration and growth.

MIF2025 is more than just a platform - it’s a dynamic ecosystem where European tech companies, startups, investors and innovators come together to connect, share ideas and shape the future. 

Through the MIF2025 web and mobile app, businesses and professionals can:

 Showcase Innovations – Present your latest products, technologies and solutions to a global audience.

 Network & Collaborate – Find the right partners, suppliers and investors within the European tech sector.

 Host Interactive Presentations & Masterclasses – Share expertise through live sessions, videos and interactive content.

 Join Online Tech Events – Participate in virtual summits, hackathons, investor pitches and meetups.

 Attract & Train Talent – Recruit top talent and offer training through online courses and mentoring programs.

 Share Updates & Industry News – Keep your network engaged by publishing company updates, product launches, and tech trends.

Name: Logoscientia
Description:
Logoscientia heeft vanuit de kernwaarden gezelligheid, samenwerking, verbinding, erkenning en kennisdeling de volgende missie en visie geformuleerd:

Missie
Als alumnivereniging voor de master-geschoolde logopedist organiseert Logoscientia activiteiten, die het mogelijk maken dat leden elkaar vinden en gevonden kunnen worden. Hiermee bevordert Logoscientia binnen een gezellige, ongedwongen sfeer samenwerking en kennisdeling tussen haar leden onderling. Vanuit de onderlinge verbinding die hieruit ontstaat, beoogt de vereniging een brug te slaan met haar omgeving (Universiteiten, studenten, logopedisten en andere geïnteresseerden en belanghebbenden) door met hen de gezamenlijke kennis te delen en samenwerking te zoeken. Op deze wijze draagt de vereniging bij aan de erkenning van het belang van een goede wetenschappelijke onderbouwing van de logopedische vakgebieden.
Visie
Logoscientia is de “Knowledge Community” van de toekomst in Nederland van wetenschappers in de logopedie, die laagdrempelig bereikbaar is voor logopedisten met wetenschappelijke vragen vanuit de praktijk.

We call it Network for Good because every ticket sold supports powerful causes like helping to prevent the sex trafficking of children through our major events. We also host more intimate gatherings, like wine and food experiences, hiking events, and this year, an NFG team will Sleep Out at the G, supporting local charities through unique, meaningful experiences.

Attendees also gain access to a trusted network of NFG-aligned businesses. If you're looking for service providers or partners, we guarantee warm intros to our top “Givers”—those who consistently support our mission and deliver real value.

It’s a true win-win: great business connections and a greater social impact. 

Interested in attending or hosting an event?

 Call Tara, GM of IDS and Co-founder of NFG, on 1800 231 929
 Email: nfg@idssecurity.com.au

Let’s use business as a force for good.

Name: Bluetick
Description:
Bluetick is a cutting-edge digital visiting card app designed to revolutionize the way professionals network and exchange information. Our app allows you to create a personalized digital card with all your contact information, including your social media profiles, website, and email address. 

With Bluetick, you can easily share your digital card with anyone, anywhere, and at any time, eliminating the need for traditional paper cards. Our app also offers advanced features such as analytics that allow you to track your card's performance and see who has viewed it.

Bluetick is a must-have tool for entrepreneurs, salespeople, freelancers, and anyone looking to build meaningful business connections. Join our community and start sharing your digital card today!

Name: Global Tech Advocates Web3.0
Description:
Imagine a bustling community of blockchain enthusiasts, united by their passion for the transformative potential of blockchain technology. They come from all over the world, from diverse backgrounds and professions, and they are all part of the Global Tech Advocates (GTA )family. Whether they are part of the original GTA network or the more recently formed GTA Blockchain group, they share a common vision of building a better future through innovation.

We have now expanded and replaced the TLA Blockchain group with the Global Tech Advocates (GTA) Blockchain group. The GTA Blockchain group stands out as a hub of knowledge and opportunity. It offers a wide range of resources for those looking to deepen their understanding of blockchain, from educational workshops and online courses to networking events and conferences. Through the group, members gain access to a global network of like-minded individuals, all eager to share their experiences and insights.

But the group is more than just a collection of resources. It's a vibrant community that is part of the larger GTA family. Members of the program can collaborate with other GTA groups to share their expertise and develop new opportunities. They can tap into the extensive global network of the GTA family to expand their reach and impact.

Follow us on Twitter @GTA_Blockchain

Description:
Agorare is a mobile application aimed at helping content creators monetize their activities through a community support platform.

On Agorare, users have the opportunity to support their favorite creators in their work while showcasing the projects and content they endorse on their profile and sharing them with their community.

This new approach transforms the relationship between creators and their audience, making fans active participants in their passion and ambassadors for their favorite artists.

Name: Voiijer
Description:
Explore, Share, and Connect with Voiijer - Where Nature Stories Come Alive.
Download now in the Apple App Store.

At Voiijer, we’re not just an app—we’re a movement for the curious, the passionate, and those who seek a deeper connection with the natural world. We built Voiijer to be the ultimate hub for explorers everywhere, whether you’re scaling remote peaks or discovering hidden gems right in your backyard. Our platform empowers a global community to share their unique journeys through stunning visuals, videos, and sounds that capture the essence of their adventures.

Our mission is simple: make it possible for anyone to share, learn, and connect around the stories our planet holds. Partnering with world-renowned explorers and scientists like Meg Lowman, Sylvia Earle, Bob Ballard, Dawn Wright, Kathy Sullivan, and Bob Atwater, we’ve brought their incredible insights and perspectives to Voiijer, inspiring our community to push boundaries in their explorations and understandings of the natural world.

In just a short time, we’ve grown from 0 to 10,000 passionate users who bring their nature stories to life, and this momentum led to our recognition as Apple’s App of the Day on Earth Day. 

Thanks to incredible PR coverage and features in Forbes, TechCrunch, Yahoo Finance, New You, and Today’s Esquire, we’re building a platform that ignites inspiration, encourages protection, and creates a sense of unity across continents.

Ready to explore more? Join our community of explorers, scientists, and storytellers. 

Follow us on social: 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@voiijer
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/@voiijers
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@voiijer
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/@voiijer

Name: The Gals
Description:
Hi Hi! It’s Madeline and Chloe.

We believe deeply in the power of women and authentic connections. The Gals Dinner Club is designed to bring together mid-to-late-career women who value meaningful support, laughter, and professional camaraderie.

Our vision? A series of intimate, curated dinner parties where remarkable women across the region meet, share, and build genuine, lasting connections that uplift and inspire.

Due to an overwhelming response, we've moved to a referral-only application process, with final selections made by our committee. While we may not be able to include everyone right away, we’re incredibly grateful to all who expressed interest—you’re a part of what makes this community so special, and we’re excited to grow in ways that may include everyone in the future.

Looking forward to creating more memorable gatherings with you all!

Our primary goal is to establish a welcoming hub where users can connect with fellow investors, engage with experts, and use our revolutionary tools to conduct due diligence with confidence. We are steadfast in creating an innovative and user-friendly experience, ensuring that investing is not only accessible but also enjoyable for everyone.

What sets us apart are our unique features and a visually stunning, intuitive UI design. We firmly believe that investing should be an enjoyable and straightforward endeavor, devoid of intimidation or confusion. Our platform is a testament to this belief, with a user-friendly interface and advanced features that transform investing into a pleasurable experience.

Description:
Erhvervslivets Kulturpris er skabt for at hylde og synliggøre de mest visionære samarbejder mellem erhvervs- og kulturlivet. På tværs af brancher nomineres både mindre virksomheder og store organisationer, i ønsket om at inspirere så mange som muligt til at udfordre potentialet mellem kunst og erhverv.

Prisen er mere end en hæder. Den er en vision om at samle erhvervslivet om kunsten og kulturen som drivkraft for bl.a. innovation, vækst og forandring og som sammenhængskraft i en verden, der har brug for visioner og mod.

Stan World is a Fandom League Metaverse where fans of artists stan together while earning rewards for their contributions, 24/7.

Fans of artists from all over the world gather in & join Stan World's virtual fandom hangouts to party: streaming music videos together, chatting with friends, dancing together, and capturing photos, just as they would in real life.

Name: Fempower
Description:
What We Do

For the experienced entrepreneur
We showcase you, your company and your story. 

We accelerate your network amongst our community, facilitating collaboration between members.

We connect you with women interested in job opportunities at your company or those seeking mentorship, enabling meaningful contribution and to furthering the cause of female empowerment.

For the aspiring entrepreneur
We give you resources ranging from stories and articles to podcasts and interactive events to build your skillset and further your goals.

We connect you to founders who can guide and mentor you and serve as a database of millennial female founders spanning several industries across India.

We assist you in securing a potential internship or job opportunities with members of our entrepreneurial community.

Why We Do It

As aspiring entrepreneurs ourselves, we recognize the lack of a platform that provides the much needed support and guidance to female founders in India. Our mission is to strengthen the female entrepreneurial community in India by creating a network of diverse leaders that can share their hurdles, experiences, and success stories. Through targeted networking and mentorship, we want to foster your personal and professional growth. Let us be the ripple that brings along the wave.

Name: Yrittäjärinki-Suomi
Description:
Yrittäjärinki-Suomi yrityssivu on osa Yrittäjärinki-Suomi yhteisön tarjontaa suomalaisille yrittäjille ja heidän yritystensä, tuotteidensa/palveluidensa esille nostoa ja tunnettavuutta. Yhteisölle löytyy myös yksityinen ryhmä, johon yrittäjät ja sellaisiksi itsensä identifioivat voivat liittyä keskustelemaan keskenään yrittäjyyteen liittyvistä onnistumisista ja haasteita, verkostoitumaan ja vertaistuen äärelle ilman liittymismaksuja.

Tälle sivulle pyritään nostamaan suomalaisten yrittäjien postauksia liittyen yrittäjyyteen, pitäen mukaan myös yritysesittelyitä perinteisesti hieman vähemmän tukea saaneita markkinointi/myyntipostauksia. Oman yrityksesi postaukseen liittämällä häshtägin #yrittäjärinki tiedämme että haluat postaustasi nostettavan esillle ja tukeamme omaan näkyvyyteesi. 

Postausten valinta tapahtuu adminien toimesta ja heidän harkintansa mukaisesti.

Name: Your Big Sister
Description:
Your Big Sister is 1:1 mentorship through either video calls or WhatsApp - whatever you're more comfortable with. 

Having consistent, nurturing support whenever you need it. Whether it's specific advice you need or just a safe space to vent - the calls are catered to whatever you need in the moment, with the end goal always being you feeling supported, being heard and thinking positively. 

 COMING SOON is the online community; a sisterhood you never knew you needed. 

A safe space for advice, shared experiences, and honest conversations, we are all here to uplift, support, and empower each other, just like a real big sister would. From self-care rituals and life advice, to funny stories and amazing recommendations, you'll find everything you need in this sisterhood. 

For the girls who don’t have a big sister, or just want more of them. Navigate obstacles, milestones, self-growth within the community, together - all while having fun!

Name: Wishew
Description:
Wishew is a social technology company redefining how humans connect through a new digital language built around real wishes.

We believe that wishing is a primal form of communication — one capable of restoring depth, empathy, and purpose to the way people interact online.

Our mission is to engineer a social infrastructure where emotion and technology coexist seamlessly, enabling a more conscious, collaborative, and human digital culture.
Through this lens, every wish becomes data with meaning, and every connection becomes an act of collective intelligence.

At Wishew, we are not designing another platform — we are designing a new interface between humanity and technology.

Join us in shaping a new generation of social networks, one designed for humanity.

Description:
De Nederlandse Vereniging voor Aanbestedingsrecht (NVvA) is in 1995 opgericht, met als doel een onafhankelijk forum te zijn voor alle betrokkenen op het gebied van aanbestedingsrecht.

Sinds de oprichting maakt de NVvA een gestage groei door. Inmiddels telt de vereniging ruim 750 leden, voornamelijk werkzaam in: overheidssector, wetenschap, rechterlijke macht, advocatuur, consultancy en bedrijfsleven.

Name: Health Tech Idaho
Description:
Health Tech Idaho is a nonprofit 501 (c)(3) organization that supports innovators and entrepreneurs in Idaho, and surrounding areas, by building an ecosystem and network of peers, mentors, prospective future clients and capital. 

We recognize the first and most critical step for early-stage innovation is to give it connectivity to an ecosystem and network of peers, mentors, prospective future clients and capital. 

Health Tech Idaho holds events, provides mentorship, and collaborates with ecosystem partners to accelerate innovators and disruptors of healthcare and health tech in Idaho, the Mountain West, and the Pacific Northwest. This hub for visibility, communication, and events, allows entrepreneurs, startups, early-stage companies, and capital providers to interact and leverage their strengths because together we can give innovation the best opportunity to thrive.

Name: bub AI
Description:
Backed by experts from Meta, Lyft, and BeReal, recognized as a Top 3 finalist in MIT's Venture Accelerator Program (VAP), and alumni of Draper University’s accelerator.
_____________________________________________________________

Social apps today trap us in mindless scrolling or dead group chats that rarely lead to genuine connection. People are more digitally connected yet lonelier than ever.

Bub AI changes that. Our AI agents—"Bubs"—transform social interactions into personalized, playful, and meaningful moments. Whether it's friends, hobby groups, university communities, dating mixers, or events, Bubs create interactions uniquely tailored to your interests and social style.

Customize or choose your Bubs, and they'll deliver daily "Sparks"—interactive challenges, mini-games, thoughtful matchmaking, and engaging conversations designed to foster real connections without the effort, awkwardness or social-media fatigue.

Stop scrolling. Start connecting.

Name: Social Networking Club
Description:
Liv & James believe that networking should be more than just business talk it should be fun! We've noticed that traditional networking events can feel a bit too serious, so we decided to shake things up. We're here to inject the joy back into networking, giving you the chance to connect with others in a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.

Our events are designed to help you get to know one another as individuals, not just as your professional titles. Whether you're taking a break from being mum, dad, wife, or husband, our gatherings offer you the space to just be yourself. No pressure, no formalities, just great company, good vibes, and plenty of laughs.

All our events are ticketed and, since it's still networking, it's fully business expendable. But here's the twist, while making business connections is great, it's not the main focus. Instead, we encourage you to relax, have a drink, enjoy the activities, and truly connect with the people around you.
