Shaku Live is an Indian live streaming and talent platform that allows users to go live, showcase their talents, and earn money. The platform offers a wide range of categories for streamers, including gaming, music, comedy, lifestyle, and more. Shaku Live is also known for its instant payouts, which means that streamers can receive their earnings immediately after their streams end.

In addition to being a platform for streamers, Shaku Live is also a social platform where users can interact with each other and make new friends. Users can watch live streams, send gifts to their favorite streamers, and participate in live chats. Shaku Live also offers a variety of games and activities that users can participate in.

Shaku Live is available on Android and iOS devices. The platform is still in its early stages of development, but it has quickly gained popularity in India. It is currently one of the top live streaming apps in the country.

Here is a summary of the key features of Shaku Live:

Live streaming: Users can go live and showcase their talents to a global audience.
Instant payouts: Streamers can receive their earnings immediately after their streams end.
Wide range of categories: Streamers can choose from a wide range of categories, including gaming, music, comedy, lifestyle, and more.
Social platform: Users can interact with each other and make new friends by watching live streams, sending gifts, and participating in live chats.
Games and activities: Shaku Live offers a variety of games and activities that users can participate in.
Shaku Live is a great platform for streamers who want to showcase their talents and earn money. It is also a fun and engaging social platform for users who want to watch live streams and interact with others.

Name: PartnerMe
Description:
PartnerMe is an AI-driven platform that matches business connections through a friendly, chat-based interface. It begins by requesting the user’s explicit consent to share personal information—name, email, role, background, aspirations, achievements—so potential connections can see it. The AI then collects details on what the user is looking for in new business people to connect with and uses this data to offer relevant matches.

Upon receiving these recommended matches, users can review profiles and choose to connect or decline. If the user decides not to meet with someone, PartnerMe gently inquires about the reason, then (in the background) sends that feedback to its matching system to improve future recommendations. PartnerMe sends new matching requests to the user, presenting fresh possibilities and gathering further feedback.

Scheduling meetings is seamless. PartnerMe can automatically coordinate a time by syncing all parties’ calendars—finding the earliest mutually available slot—or the user can specify their own availability. If the user wants to see more potential matches, PartnerMe can also fetch additional profiles.

If something is unclear, PartnerMe politely clarifies. If any request strays from the goal of matching business people, PartnerMe remains on track, ensuring that it’s only used for professional networking.

The result is a streamlined, secure, and constantly improving system that saves time, reduces friction, and makes meeting valuable new connections easier than ever.

Name: Forum App
Description:
Forum is an application that connects the youth with organisations that provide opportunities, such as travel opportunities, projects, scholarships, conferences, training and competitions. Our goal is to help the youth so they become socially more active and open.  

The problem is two-sided. First, most organisations do not have enough resources for an effective marketing strategy. Also, their promotion cannot reach their target audience and is not cost-effective. Sometimes the quality or quantity of the applicants is not adequate. These problems are present in most EU countries. On the other side, the youth is faced with several problems in society. Most opportunities are promoted via Facebook and email, although young people do not tend to use these platforms. It is hard to find relevant and worthwhile opportunities, because of the information overload. 

Forum is the answer! This platform creates an information channel between the two sides. The youth can use the application for free. They will receive a personalised feed every day, which contains relevant posts of opportunities. There are other functions such as filtered search engine and gamification that motivates them to apply for more opportunities. Organisations, for example, universities, NGOs, institutes and student organisations, can pay for a monthly subscription so that they can promote cost-effectively while reaching their target audience. 

We are working hard on creating Forum. Our application is already out, check it out!

Our mission is simple: bring people offline, together, with purpose—and let AI learn by living through us.

Name: Rézo France
Description:
Rézo | La communauté qui connecte académie, recherche et entreprise 

Rézo révolutionne les connexions entre étudiant.e.s, chercheur.se.s et entreprises en créant le premier écosystème collaboratif français dédié à l'enseignement supérieur, la recherche et l'innovation.

Notre mission

Mobiliser l'écosystème ESRI en créant des ponts durables où les talents trouvent leurs opportunités, où les chercheur.se.s valorisent leur expertise, et où les entreprises accèdent à l'innovation de pointe.

Notre solution

- Pour les étudiant.e.s : Career center centralisé (stages, thèses, alternances, emplois), forums thématiques, mentorat et formations, networking bienveillant
- Pour les chercheur.se.s : Partenariats R&D, monétisation des savoirs, recrutement de talents, valorisation de l'expertise
- Pour les entreprises : Collaborations R&D, veille technologique, recrutement ciblé, accès aux innovations académiques

Notre approche

Une plateforme complète combinant :

- Communauté active et forums de discussion
- Career center intelligent
- Apprentissage collaboratif
- Innovation partagée
- Facilitation des collaborations recherche-industrie

Notre différence

- Aligné avec le rapport ministériel Pommier-Lazarus sur la valorisation de l'ESRI
- Solution 100% française garantissant souveraineté numérique et conformité RGPD
Développée par des experts issus du monde académique qui comprennent réellement les enjeux
- Approche centrée utilisateur et impact mesurable

Rézo transforme l'écosystème français de l'enseignement supérieur, de la recherche et de l'innovation pour répondre aux défis nationaux : valoriser les talents, accélérer les collaborations et positionner la France en leader de l'économie de la connaissance.

Name: Influential Woman
Description:
At Influential Woman, we are deeply passionate about creating transformative experiences tailored for women who want more from life.

Too often, women in our modern society grapple with the expectation of being superhuman. 

Many of us feel compelled to push ourselves to the brink, working relentlessly, juggling numerous responsibilities, and nurturing our social connections, all while yearning for precious moments of self-care and recharge.

Numerous women have shared with us the voids they feel in their lives, and I've a huge desire to help more women unleash their magic and greatness so they can cultivate a life they truly cherish—one brimming with fulfilment and live at their highest excitement level every single day.

Our approach involves facilitating connections with remarkable women, encouraging high level thinking, prioritising self-love and personal well-being, and fostering a sense of balance that can significantly alleviate the burdens of stress.

So, we extend a warm invitation to you to join our movement, where we champion the act of prioritising ourselves unapologetically so we can be our authentic self.

We're currently crafting an opportunity where women can rejuvenate in a nurturing and family feel environment while forging meaningful long term connections with others.

This is a sanctuary for women who are Entrepreneurs, Business Leaders, CEOs, Managing Directors, HR Directors, Sales Directors, and Operations Directors to network, establish professional connections, and form friendships with like-minded individuals who share a passion for making a positive impact on this planet.

Our mission is to help over 100 women in Scotland to unleash their inner power and greatness, irrespective of the male-dominated environments they may work in.

This is an exclusive, invitation-only community, reserved for women who lead with their hearts.

At Influential Women, we take immense pride in celebrating the remarkable achievements of women

Name: Better Women Better World (BW2CLUB)
Description:
Better Women Better World is a startup dedicated to empowering women and girls from different backgrounds and cultures. At Better Women Better World, we believe in the power of collaboration and community to drive positive change.  
BW2CLUB, our flagship project, is a diverse digital platform and mobile app designed to support and connect women and girls from around the world. Through BW2CLUB, women and girls can communicate, enjoy cultural exchange, participate in empowering events, embrace their creativity, generate meaningful bonds, and explore opportunities for growth and empowerment.
BW2CLUB is a support network app designed to provide a safe and nurturing space for women and girls to feel safe, share their stories and struggles, and support one another. We have taken the essence of a community and given it a digital makeover. At its core, BW2CLUB stands for inclusivity, empowerment, and solidarity. Through this platform, we aim to break down barriers, foster a sense of community, and empower women to achieve their full potential. While we witness the positive impact of our work daily, we are also committed to creating a broader societal change through our dedicated campaigns and initiatives.
Since our launch, which was in February this year, BW2CLUB has garnered significant traction, with over 370 users from more than 22 countries joining our community within just two months. All of this was achieved with zero budget for marketing, organically and through word of mouth.

Name: Pizz'n'Meet Club
Description:
Una business community nata su LinkedIn che si incontra su invito in pizzeria per creare relazioni autentiche.

Una storia che parte dalle conversazioni.

Pizz'n'Meet Club nasce da un'idea semplice: le migliori connessioni professionali non avvengono negli eventi affollati o nelle conference room fredde. 
Avvengono quando ci si siede insieme, si condivide un piatto e si parla davvero.

Zero pitch aggressivi, zero vendita
Non si compra e non si vende nulla. Si parla, si ascolta, si condivide.

Relazioni prima delle opportunità
Le opportunità arrivano quando meno te lo aspetti, ma solo se le relazioni sono genuine.

Chi c'è al tavolo
Professionisti di ogni generazione e background, uniti dalla voglia di costruire relazioni autentiche.
Investitori, Imprenditori, Founder, Visionari, Manager, Consulenti, Freelance.

Come funziona
Tre semplici passaggi per entrare nella community.

1) Ti unisci alla conversazione su LinkedIn
Segui Pizz'n'Meet Club, interagisci e fatti conoscere attraverso contenuti e commenti autentici.

2) Richiedi l'invito
Quando senti che è il momento giusto, richiedi il tuo invito. Valutiamo ogni richiesta con cura.

3) Ci vediamo in pizzeria
Parliamo, ascoltiamo, connettiamo. Niente presentazioni formali, solo conversazioni genuine.

Gli incontri sono a numero chiuso per garantire conversazioni di qualità. Richiedi il tuo invito per ricevere i dettagli.

Dove siamo
Dove poteva nascere Pizz'n'Meet Club?

Per il momento siamo a Napoli.

Ma non mettiamo limiti alla provvidenza.

"Stay Tuned. Stai senza penzier." Semi Cit.

Name: Common Roots Networking & Connections Group

We are locally built, with diversity and equality at the forefront- but also internationally connected, providing optional commission and referral bonus opportunities to its members. We meet virtually weekly, in-person monthly, and connect to the national Network Lead Exchange community regularly. This is more than just a networking group, but a collective of local businesses working together to build community and grow our unique customer bases.

Common Roots is more than just networking, it's about building connections. Although group engagement and accountability are important, meetings are not mandatory. We instead encourage engagement in other ways through roles, referrals, and by participating at our many tabled events throughout the area.

If you are a small business owner, entrepreneur, manager, or just an overall curious business minded individual, the best way to learn more is at one of our virtual Tuesday morning meetings to see what it's all about! You can register to visit us at our website.

Name: Gewina: Belgian-Dutch Society for the History of Science and Universities
Description:
EN: Gewina is the Belgian-Dutch society for the history of science and universities. It was founded in 1913 and unites 300 researchers and other enthusiasts who are interested in the history of science, medicine, and universities. 

Gewina publishes Journal for the History of Knowledge (JHoK) and the magazine Wonderkamer. Additionally, Gewina organizes events and meetings taking place in Belgium and the Netherlands. 


FR: Gewina est la société Belgo-Néerlandaise pour l'histoire des sciences et des universités. Fondée en 1913, elle réunit 300 chercheurs et autres passionnés qui s'intéressent à l'histoire des sciences, de la médecine et des universités.

Gewina publie le Journal for the History of Knowledge (JHoK) et le magazine Wonderkamer. En outre, Gewina organise des événements et des réunions en Belgique et aux Pays-Bas.


NL: Gewina is het Belgisch-Nederlands genootschap voor wetenschapsgeschiedenis en de geschiedenis van universiteiten. Het is opgericht in 1913 en verenigd circa 300 onderzoekers en andere belangstellenden die geïnteresseerd zijn in wetenschaps-, medische- en universiteitsgeschiedenis. 

Gewina publiceert Journal for the History of Knowledge (JHoK) en het tijdschrift Wonderkamer. Daarnaast organiseert Gewina evenementen en bijeenkomsten die in België en Nederland plaats vinden.

Yhdistys haluaa moniammatillisella verkostoitumisella edistää hyvän johtajuuden, uusien rakenteiden ja toimintatapojen sekä vaikuttavien hyvinvointiteknologioiden käyttöönottoa sekä tukea sosiaali- ja terveydenhuollon palvelujen uudistumista yhteisin teoin ja aloitteellisuuden kautta.

Toiminta-ajatuksensa toteuttamiseksi yhdistys järjestää vuotuiset Terveys ja talouspäivät, muita koulutustilaisuuksia ja opintomatkoja jäsenilleen, tekee aloitteita sekä antaa lausuntoja palvelujärjestelmän toimivuudesta muutoksentekijänä ja vaikuttajana. Yhdistys julkaisee aikakauslehteä ja on yhteistyössä ulkomaisten vastaavien yhdistysten kanssa.

• Sponsoren verenigingen en evenementen in de Liemers ,

We nodigen gemeenten, ondernemersverenigingen en lokale partners uit om mee te denken, ideeën aan te dragen en samen te bouwen aan een sterk fundament. Samen maken we De Liemers sterker, levendiger en verbonden!


 Volg Liemers lokaal hier op LinkedIn om op de hoogte te blijven van inspirerende verhalen, lokale bedrijven, initiatieven en evenementen.

Name: Association Of Business Leaders & Entrepreneurs
Description:
Association of Business Leaders and Entrepreneurs (ABLE) Navi Mumbai is a non-government, not for profit Section 8 registered company. Established in 2019, ABLE stands as a catalyst for business growth and success, a beacon of innovation and growth, dedicated to fostering the development of entrepreneurs, startups, and SMEs across diverse sectors.

The Association is a vibrant platform enabling the development of Entrepreneurs, Startups, SMEs from the manufacturing, service sectors and allied industrial / business sectors. The Association integrates SMEs, corporates, banks, investors, policy makers, Young & Women entrepreneurs and Start–Ups to establish and enhance their contacts for better business growth and expansion.

The Association organises various activities to impart knowledge, skills, scale and provides a platform for promotion of products and services, enhancement of contacts for the business growth, utilisation of unique marketing and branding facilities, advanced technology for improvement of capabilities & productivity, quality assurance, utilisation of benefits and avail of various incentives, Government schemes as well as business and investment opportunities in the era of Make-In-India.

The Association also provides unique support to SMEs, Young & Women entrepreneurs and Start–Ups to convert business ideas and new concepts into profitable business ventures as well as strengthening family manage businesses for better development as well as transition, succession planning and transformation. Opportunity of becoming part of the Association as its members, which entitles for special support, and privileges in their entrepreneurial/business endeavour.

Name: One Dating App
Description:
OneDatingApp is a dating platform designed for people seeking genuine, long-term relationships. Unlike typical dating apps that rely heavily on surface-level interactions, OneDatingApp focuses on deep compatibility by using an advanced AI algorithm to match users based on shared values, goals, and relationship dynamics.

We understand that finding the right partner involves more than just swiping through profiles. 

Our in-depth questionnaires are designed to explore what really matter: communication, personal growth, lifestyle choices, and more. 
Users are matched based on their answers to key life questions, providing a more holistic and meaningful connection.

How It Works

* In-Depth Questions: Users are invited to answer a series of meaningful questions covering topics like relationship goals, communication styles, personal growth, and spiritual beliefs.
* AI-Powered Matching: Our AI algorithm then generates compatibility scores across different life categories, helping users understand why they may be a good fit with their match.
* Focused Conversations: Unlike other dating apps where users can chat with multiple people simultaneously, OneDatingApp encourages focused, one-on-one conversations, fostering deeper connections.
* Verified Users: We take user safety seriously. Every profile is verified, creating a trusted community of individuals who are genuinely interested in meaningful relationships.

Our Mission Our mission is simple: to help people find real connections based on more than just a photo. We’re redefining the online dating space by offering an app where quality outweighs quantity. We believe that by focusing on what truly matters in a relationship, we can help people find "the One."

Name: WeAreDoc

Les professionnels de santé font face à plusieurs défis :
- Trouver des remplaçants ou des repreneurs s’appuie encore majoritairement sur Facebook ou WhatsApp : des outils pratiques mais ni adaptés, ni sécurisés, ni professionnels.
- Accéder à une information fiable et ciblée selon leur spécialité, ce qui reste long et complexe.
- S’informer et s’accompagner sur la gestion du cabinet, l’installation, l’organisation et la vie libérale.

Les plateformes généralistes ne répondent pas aux codes ni aux besoins spécifiques des soignants.

WeAreDoc crée enfin un espace communautaire sécurisé, moderne et pensé uniquement pour les professionnels de santé.

 Professionnels de santé, inscrivez-vous gratuitement sur WeAreDoc, le réseau social pensé par et pour vous !

Name: WeLocally
Description:
WeLocally ist eine gemeinwohlorientierte Plattform, die auf der in Wien etablierten Plattform imGrätzl basiert. Sie ist Andockpunkt für alle, die was auf die Beine stellen (wollen). Auf der Plattform teilen sich lokale Macher*innen (Selbstständige, Vereine, Kunst- und Kulturtätige uvm.) Ressourcen (z.B. Raum), verbinden sich in Kooperationen, stärken sich gegenseitig, bekommen Sichtbarkeit für ihre Tätigkeiten und Events und werden in der Umsetzung ihrer Ideen unterstützt. Die Tools (Raumteiler, Geräteteiler, lokales Crowdfunding, Schaufenster etc.) sind einfach zu bedienen und mehrhheitlich kostenlos nutzbar.

2021 wurde WeLocally gemeinsam mit den lokalen Macher*innen und Projektpartner*innen in ausgewählten Kärntner Gemeinden sowie der Leader-Reagion Mühlviertler Kernland entwickelt. WeLocally ist aktuell zudem in Linz und Graz verfügbar. Die Plattform ist durch den Innovationsprozess der letzten Jahre geeignet für große Städte gleichermaßen wie für Kleinstädte, Stadtregionen oder ländliche Regionen. Weitere Regionen oder Städte sind jederzeit herzlich eingeladen, sich anzudocken, ihren lokalen Macher*innen die kostenlosen WeLocally-Tools zur Verfügung zu stellen und Teil der WeLocally-Community zu werden!

Das WeLocally-Team bringt jahrelange Erfahrung mit communitybasierten Plattformen mit. Zudem werden aktuelle Themen rund um WeLocally (z. B. Stadtteil-/Ortskernbelebung, Leerstandsaktivierung, Raumbedarfe lokaler Macher*innen, kooperative Raumnutzung) in Forschungsprojekten bearbeitet.

Name: SocialKut
Description:
O mundo mudou... e as redes sociais também.

O Facebook, que um dia foi símbolo de conexão entre pessoas, se transformou em uma verdadeira plataforma comercial. O foco deixou de ser o usuário. Hoje, sabemos de escândalos sobre dados de usuários vendidos, sua privacidade é negociada, e o que você vê na sua timeline é decidido por quem paga mais, não por quem você ama ou quer acompanhar.

A SocialKut nasceu justamente desse vazio deixado. Uma rede social feita por pessoas e para pessoas. Tudo começou com um desejo simples: trazer de volta a essência do Orkut, aquela época em que as redes eram realmente sociais. Criamos uma plataforma que inicialmente carregava a nostalgia do Orkut, mas nossos próprios usuários pediram mais: uma identidade única, brasileira, moderna e com uma pegada totalmente nossa.

Assim nasceu a SocialKut, com um design exclusivo, pensado para gerar conexões reais, fortalecer comunidades e devolver ao usuário o controle do seu próprio espaço digital.

 Aqui, privacidade é lei. Não vendemos dados, não manipulamos seu feed, não colocamos o dinheiro acima das conexões humanas. Somos uma rede social livre, transparente e comprometida com você.

Estamos prontos para levar a SocialKut para um novo patamar. E você faz parte disso. Precisamos de você, sua presença, sua voz, sua energia.

 Junte-se a nós. Seja protagonista da mudança. A Socialkut começa aqui, e começa com você.

#SocialKut #RedeSocialDeVerdade #ConexõesReais #Privacidade #FuturoDigital #Inovação #BusinessSocial

We're here to help you kickstart your career with resources, advice, and inspiration.

The Justice Dialogue is designed to provide guidance about making this decision and navigating the challenges that come along with it. We'll also be releasing a weekly newsletter filled with tips and tricks for getting ahead in your field.

Our goal is always to generate conversations around these issues—and hopefully start some conversations of your own.

Builvero fixes that.

The platform combines intelligent discovery, project collaboration, skill-based matching, and structured workflows into one place. Users can create projects, join existing ones, find collaborators based on real skills and experience, and grow through hands-on building with others. It’s a practical ecosystem built around action, not theory.

Builvero is intentionally invite-only at launch. The goal is to shape a high-quality community of people who are serious about building, learning, and creating real work together, not another passive social feed.

Whether you’re shipping code, designing interfaces, training models, analyzing data, or producing digital content, Builvero gives you a way to find the right people, build better projects, and accelerate your growth.

Name: MEDAE
Description:
The MEDAE network was initiated as part of the NATAE project, a research project funded by the European Commission from 2022 to 2026, with the aim of promoting agroecological transition in North Africa. This project, which brings together 22 partners from around the Mediterranean (research institutions, technical institutes, high-level teaching bodies, international organizations and NGOs) aims to demonstrate that agroecological approaches, adapted locally to the diversity of farming systems, can offer adequate solutions to the challenges of food systems in North Africa. In particular, the project identifies optimal combinations of agroecological practices that can be adopted by local communities, by analyzing the performance of existing agroecological practices and experiments.

The MEDAE network was born out of the NATAE project and the desire of its partners to create a sustainable community of exchanges between the various stakeholders committed to the agroecological transition in the Mediterranean. The operating principles of the MEDAE network were developed through a collaborative process with the various NATAE project partners.

The MEDAE network has been officially open to new members since September 2024.

Zugang zu allen relevanten Akteuren

از دلیلهای عمیقی که انسانها برای داشتن یک کامیونیتی میخواهند، این است که  نیاز غیرقابل انکار و تغییر به ارتباطات اجتماعیاش را از این طریق برآورده میکند و فرایند رشد و رفاه شخصی را برای خود به ارمغان میآورد.

038NXT is geboren vanuit een behoefte, namelijk een netwerk voor jonge enthousiaste ondernemers en Young Professionals betrokken bij de lokale trots, PEC Zwolle! Door middel van een netwerk met gelijkgestemden ontstaat er een nieuw duurzaam netwerk waarin wij elkaar inspireren, van elkaar leren, elkaar helpen en op die moment bijdragen aan een ieders ontwikkeling en behoefte. 

Naast een eigen skybox in het MAC3PARK stadion, ontmoeten leden van dit netwerk elkaar ook bij de activiteiten gedurende het programma dat loopt van augustus 2023 tot en met mei 2024. Naast een openings- en afsluitend evenement met de leden van 038NXT, wordt er een cyclus van drie. keer drie maanden gehanteerd, waarin themasessies, sportevenementen en groepsactiviteiten met elkaar afwisselen.

De voetbalwedstrijden bieden een laagdrempelige ontmoetingsplek en door middel van de activiteiten ondernemen wij samen met elkaar en leren wij elkaar ook buiten het voetbal kennen. Zo zijn wij niet puur afhankelijk van de voetbalwedstrijden!

Name: The Social Impact Diaries
Description:
The Social Impact Diaries offers a raw look at the anatomy of change—from the psychology of the builder to the weight of pushing against the system. We aren’t here for polished success stories or five-step guides; we’re here to stay in the mess. 

Through the eyes of changemakers, community builders, and those navigating the exhausting intersections of power and identity, we explore the honest reality of reshaping our world. We dive into the inner forces that keep people going against systems designed to push back—even when the "impact" isn’t visible or celebrated.

Throughout this journey, we’ll be grounding ourselves in three core pillars:

* Entrepreneurship as Lived Experience: Moving beyond the business plans to the actual reality of building something from nothing in a world that wasn't built for you.
* The Anatomy of People, Culture, and Societies: Deconstructing the invisible threads that hold our communities together—and the ones that pull them apart.
* Systems Building: Looking at the architecture of our world and asking what it actually takes to redesign the foundation, not just paint the walls.

This is not a sugar-coated narrative. This is the diary of the work people are doing on the ground.

Name: Invite
Description:
¿QUÉ ES INVITE?

Invite es una aplicación social que te permitirá disfrutar en grande. Podrás crear diferentes grupos con tus amigos y encontrar gente para compartir planes.

¿Te apetece hacer un copeo, ir a la playa, esquiar, de fiesta, hacer surf, jugar a pádel? En Invite podrás disfrutar de todas estás actividades y muchas más con grupos de amigos de todo el mundo.

¿CÓMO FUNCIONA INVITE?

La dinámica es muy fácil, una vez te hayas creado tu perfil de usuario podrás empezar a añadir amigos, con estos amigos podrás crear grupos. Con cada uno de estos grupos podrás buscar a otros para disfrutar de todo tipo de planes en compañía.

A través de hacer swipe en la pestaña de explora y dar likes a los grupos que más te gusten podrán surgir match. En este caso se abrirá un chat donde los miembros de ambos grupos podrán hablar.

Finalmente, tendrás acceso a una pestaña de planes en la que podrás conectar con la gente en persona.

¿POR QUÉ UTILIZAR INVITE?

A través de Invite podrás conseguir obtener aquello que más deseabas, planes en grupo. Te podrás olvidar de tener un usuario al cargo de un grupo. En Invite todo el proceso está realizado para que todos los miembros de tu grupo puedan disfrutar de la experiencia a la vez.

Name: LinkedIn Local Farnborough & Fleet
Description:
LinkedIn Local FREE Meetings in Farnborough & Fleet: A Community of Connection and Collaboration.

LinkedIn, the world’s largest professional networking platform, has revolutionised how professionals connect, collaborate, and build careers. However, beyond its digital capabilities, LinkedIn has also fostered an innovative initiative known as LinkedIn Local. These are in person networking events organised by members of the LinkedIn community to connect people in a meaningful way. LinkedIn Local meetings create opportunities for professionals to meet their online connections face to face, fostering authentic interactions and relationships.

Farnborough and Fleet, are thriving towns in Hampshire known for its aviation heritage and dynamic business environment, has embraced the concept of LinkedIn Local meetings with enthusiasm.

How to Get Involved
For professionals eager to participate in LinkedIn Local Farnborough & Fleet, engagement is straightforward:

Attend an Event: Register for our FREE upcoming events through Social Networking Club Website, www.socialnetworkingclub.co.uk or on Eventbrite or find us on Facebook and Instagram.

Be a Sponsor: Share your expertise and showcase your business to LinkedIn Local Farnborough & Fleet guests.

We can not wait to meet you at LinkedIn Local Farnborough & Fleet.

Whether you're a freelancer looking to highlight your projects, a business promoting offers, or a creator sharing knowledge and inspiration, Whatsevr helps you build an authentic digital presence. Name: Vriendschap in Twaalf Brieven
Description:
**Vanaf november 2023 kan ook jij deelnemen aan Vriendschap in Twaalf Brieven. Wil je een melding wanneer de verkoop start? Stuur een PM!**

Vriendschap in Twaalf Brieven wil via fysieke post mensen de mogelijkheid bieden om in contact te komen met zichzelf en met een Ander. Het briefcontact nodigt schrijvers uit om een jaar lang maandelijks te vertragen en te verstillen om vanuit die rust een betekenisvolle verbinding met de ander aan te gaan. 

Het initiatief is tijdens de Coronacrisis in 2020 ontwikkeld door Margreet Zandbergen tijdens haar werk bij PKA pioniersplek, Zinnig Noord. Na een aantal succesvolle spin-offs bij o.a. Huis van de Mens en Humanitas heeft het project in augustus 2023 een doorstart gemaakt. 

Vanaf november 2023 wordt Vriendschap in Twaalf Brieven als product aangeboden via de website 12brieven.nl en in boek- en cadeauwinkels. Daarnaast kunnen organisaties en instellingen een licentie (incl. ondersteuning) kopen om het project uit te zetten onder cliënten/ klanten/ medewerkers. De inhoud en vormgeving zijn aan te passen aan het doel en de doelgroep van de desbetreffende organisatie. Het concept is steeds het zelfde: twee deelnemers schrijven elkaar een jaar lang maandelijks een brief.

Vi mødes ved mere end 11 årlige netværks-arrangementer samt før og under hjemmekampene. På HBI’s erhvervsnetværksmøder får deltagerne inspiration til at udvikle egen virksomhedsprofil og via et stort velfungerende netværk mulighed for at opleve vækst og økonomiske resultater.

Kontakt Kommerciel Ansvarlig Thomas Beck-Bille på tbb@hbi.dk eller på 2615 0815 for at høre mere om, hvordan du/din virksomhed også kan finde muligheder i HBIzz netværket.

Whether it's your closest friends planning casual get-togethers or larger groups attending public events, this is your place to plan it all. NOW is used as a tool for the everyday to remind people of the simple pleasures and what keeps us present. 

Some features to mention:
Creating your clique - A clique is a group of people who come together based on common interests and the desire to hang out with one another. There are no right or wrong ideas - the clique is yours and the community will follow. 

Starting hangouts - Hangouts are events that get published in a clique, bringing everyone together in real-life. For example, create a volleyball clique and start a hangout to arrange a game. The clique will then be notified to join in. 

Creating lineups - Use lineups to share places you’ve been and discover others.  Lineups are personalized lists people create to share their favorite spots and save places to visit. 

After downloading the app, it's time to create your first clique and invite your friends to join! 

Feel free to reach out to us at info@nowhangouts.com with any questions, suggestions, or feedback you have! 

Think offline, think NOW.

Name: Sparkk
Description:
Sparkk is a unique platform that uses advanced technology and data analysis to connect people based on their profile compatibility. Our goal is to help users find meaningful and genuine connections with others who share similar interests and values.

Sign up directly on our website: www.thecircleeditions.com

To ensure that all profiles on our platform are legitimate, we use video call verification and advanced AI to verify each profile. This ensures that all members are who they say they are and helps us create a safe and trustworthy environment for users to connect with each other.

All profiles on The Circle Editions are private until we find you a compatible match. At that point, we reveal a short description about the other person to help you get to know them before you meet.

We believe that The Circle Editions is the future of online dating and we are committed to helping people make meaningful connections that last. Whether you are looking for a romantic partner or just want to meet new people and make friends, we believe that we have something to offer everyone.

Name: Strength
Description:
In a world where sports enthusiasts are spread across geographical boundaries, the need for a unifying and comprehensive sports platform is more pronounced than ever. "Strength" is born from the motivation to provide a one-stop solution for sports enthusiasts, enabling them to access diverse sports facilities, create connections, and foster a sense of community. The platform aims to bridge the gap between passion and access, making sports more inclusive and engaging for individuals, teams, and clubs.

Problem Definition:
The sports world has long struggled with fragmentation and accessibility issues. Enthusiasts often find it challenging to connect with like-minded individuals, form teams, secure grounds for matches, or access resources for skill development. This leads to missed opportunities, lack of coordination, and limited exposure. Additionally, sports clubs face hurdles in effectively managing memberships and engaging their members outside of physical meetups. The absence of a cohesive platform hampers community-building efforts and stifles growth.

Solutions Offered:
"Strength" emerges as a comprehensive solution to the challenges faced by the sports community. The platform offers a multifaceted approach, providing users with the tools needed to connect, organize, and engage. By facilitating the creation and management of sports profiles, teams, and tournaments, "Strength" empowers enthusiasts to actively participate in their chosen sports. Clubs can extend their reach by establishing an online presence, allowing members to interact virtually, thus strengthening the sense of belonging.

Objectives:
Facilitate Community Building: Strengthen the global sports community by connecting individuals, teams, and clubs through a centralized digital platform.
Enhance Accessibility: Provide easy access to a wide range of sports facilities, allowing users to book grounds for matches, practice sessions, and tournaments. etc

Name: LYNQ
Description:
We started LYNQ because we felt something was missing.

Every day, we walk past countless people in our neighborhoods, in cafés, at events, or while traveling in unfamiliar cities. Many of them share our interests, our values, our creative passions. And yet, we rarely connect. Not because we don’t want to – but because the spaces for meaningful, respectful connection have quietly disappeared.

LYNQ exists to change that.

We are a curated worldwide home for artists, creatives, and entrepreneurs – built to reconnect people with the world around them, locally and globally. Not louder. Not faster. But more intentional.

LYNQ launched less than a year ago. Today, more than 17,000 members are already part of the community, primarily in European and U.S. cities such as London, Berlin, Paris, Milan, New York, and Düsseldorf. We grow where cultural diversity, creative energy, and entrepreneurial spirit naturally come together.

We are not another platform for self-promotion – and very deliberately not a dating app. At the heart of LYNQ are people with creative drive, entrepreneurial ambition, or cultural influence who want to exchange ideas, inspire one another, and build things together.

Our approach is simple: connect digitally to enable real-life impact.

Members share new work, projects, and ideas, discover relevant events, or join Circles – curated groups around art, design, fashion, film, music, or technology. From there, conversations begin. Collaborations follow. And often, real-world encounters happen naturally – without staging, without pressure.

Name: Vayy
Description:
Welcome to Vayy – Where Connections Begin with Meaning

Vayy (companionship, in Sanskrit) is more than just a dating or matrimony app – it's a new way to meet people who are looking for something real.

We call it Datrimony – a space where dating meets intention, and matrimony meets compatibility.

Whether you're exploring a serious relationship or hoping to meet someone for life, Vayy is designed for you.

What Makes Vayy Different?

 -Meaningful Matches, Not Mindless Swipes
-We’re not here for casual hookups or algorithms based solely on looks
-At Vayy, we focus on deep compatibility – values, beliefs, goals, and emotional connection.

 Built with Independent Women in Mind
-Vayy is especially built for modern, independent women who:
-Value compatibility over social or financial status
-Are serious about finding a partner, not just a profile
-Want to date without being judged, or pressured into commitment
-May be divorced, widowed, or restarting – and want a respectful space

 Safety and Verification First
-We know your time and trust are valuable.
-That’s why we verify every profile to create a safer, kinder space for everyone – especially for women who are divorced or widowed.
-No fake bios. No creepy DMs. No nonsense.

 Datrimony: The Best of Both Worlds

-We’re redefining what it means to find your person.
-Dating apps can feel too casual.
-Matrimony sites can feel too transactional.

Vayy brings the balance – meaningful dating with the intention to grow into something lifelong.


Who Is Vayy For?

-People looking for deep conversations, not just small talk
-Divorcees, widows, or people restarting life on their own terms
-Those who want to meet someone serious – but not rushed into commitment
-Anyone tired of the extremes – and seeking something real



Real People. Real Intentions. Real Connections.

You're not just looking for "someone" – you're looking for the right one.

Our mission is laying the path to success for international students, whatever their background. While talent is evenly distributed, opportunity is not. That is why we’re levelling the playing field. We’re breaking down the old system and building a better one.

For companies: We are the easiest way to hire and engage international talent. Are you looking to hire international talent or would like to promote your business? Learn more on our company page: https://expatino.com/for-companies/

The event’s name reflects its mission:

At Andinet Umoja, attendees will:

	•	Discover new opportunities for cross-border partnerships.

Join us in Addis Ababa to connect, collaborate, and celebrate Africa’s potential for a more united and prosperous tomorrow.

#AndinetUmoja | #AfricanUnity | #AU2025 | #Collaboration | #Innovation

Name: Gippsland Social Enterprise Collective
Description:
We have a vision for a Gippsland that will nurture emerging and established social enterprises.
For the past five years, we’ve been laying the foundations—supporting local changemakers, building community, and championing a better way of doing business.

Through the Gippsland Social Enterprise Collective (GSEC), auspiced by Green Lab Futures, we’ve seen what’s possible when purpose-led people come together. From grassroots startups to mature social enterprises, we’ve worked alongside organisations who are solving real problems—creating jobs, building community resilience, and regenerating local systems.

But now, it’s time for the next phase.

We want to go deeper. Wider. Bolder.

Our renewed vision is to build an interconnected regional ecosystem—one that actively nurtures, accelerates, and celebrates social enterprises at every stage of their journey.

This next phase is about:

Scaling what works by strengthening peer-to-peer learning, shared infrastructure, and co-investment pathways.

Unlocking new energy by inviting businesses, councils, and institutions to co-create bold, place-based solutions.

Elevating our voice through storytelling, regional showcases, and advocacy that puts Gippsland’s social enterprise sector on the map.

Backing the next wave of leaders—young, diverse, values-led entrepreneurs who want to build their future right here.

We believe that Gippsland can be a national leader in the social economy.
Not just because we have the need—but because we have the talent, the creativity, and the grit.

If you’ve been part of the journey so far—thank you.
And if you’re new to the collective, this is your moment to get involved.

Whether you're running a social enterprise, working in local government, supporting community, or just believe business can be a force for good—we invite you to join us in shaping what comes next.

We have a vision for a Gippsland that will nurture emerging and established social enterprises—and the next chapter starts now.

Name: JCI Oberaargau
Description:
Wir sind das Netzwerk für junge Führungskräfte und Unternehmer in der Region Oberaargau. Wir gehören der weltweiten Organisation der Junior Chamber International (JCI) an, welche in der Schweiz rund 70 lokale Kammern mit über 3'000 Mitgliedern zählt. International sind wir in über 100 Länder auf 5 Kontinenten in 6'000 lokalen Kammern mit rund 200'000 Mitgliedern aktiv.

Politisch und konfessionell sind wir neutral. Unseren Mitgliedern bieten wir die Möglichkeit, sich in wirtschaftlich- und sozial orientierten Projekten aktiv zu beteiligen und damit einen Mehrwert für die Gesellschaft zu generieren sowie ihre Erfahrungen im Projektmanagement zu erweitern. Wir bieten ein starkes lokales, nationales und auch internationales Netzwerk über Branchen- und Kulturgrenzen hinaus. Unsere weltweit normierten Trainings folgen ganz dem Motto "be better" und bieten die Möglichkeit sich ständig weiterzubilden im Bereich Leadership, Kommunikation und Effizienz.

Name: Aligned Social
Description:
When social media started, its mission was simple: to help people make meaningful connections with people worldwide. While in some cases it does just that, it does so at a cost.

Studies have suggested that across gender and age, there are direct correlations between time spent on social media and depressive symptoms (source: Cureus).

It’s become a highlight reel, a way to disassociate, leaving us unsure if any real connection has been made… not to mention the daily pushing of certain narratives.

Yet, social media has become a routine part of life, and there have been no better options. Until now.

Name: Maraki: Explore Love and Life in Ethiopia
Description:
Introducing Maraki, the innovative app designed to revolutionize the way you find love and meaningful connections. In a world saturated with countless dating platforms, Maraki stands out as the ultimate destination for individuals seeking genuine relationships. With its user-friendly interface, cutting-edge features, and advanced matching algorithms, Maraki empowers you to discover your perfect match effortlessly.

At Maraki, we understand that compatibility is the key to lasting relationships. That's why our app utilizes state-of-the-art technology to ensure accurate and intelligent matchmaking. Our powerful algorithms take into account various factors, including personality traits, interests, values, and relationship goals, to deliver highly compatible matches. Gone are the days of endless swiping and superficial encounters – with Maraki, you can look forward to authentic connections that have the potential to blossom into something truly special.

Getting started with Maraki is a breeze. Simply create a profile by providing some basic information about yourself and upload a few eye-catching photos. Our intuitive interface allows you to customize your preferences and refine your search, ensuring that you are presented with profiles that align with your specific criteria. Whether you're looking for a long-term partner, a casual fling, or something in between, Maraki caters to your unique desires.

Once you've set up your profile, dive into the vibrant world of Maraki. Swipe through profiles of like-minded individuals, expressing your interest with a simple swipe right or pass with a swipe left. Our app also offers additional features to enhance your dating experience. Explore the "Discover" section to connect with people outside your usual preferences and expand your horizons. Engage in ice-breaking conversations with our built-in chat functionality, which allows you to get to know your matches before taking things further.

Name: Marcel, appli de rencontres littéraires
Description:
L'appli de rencontres littéraires, Marcel, ambitionne de vous aider à retrouver du temps pour la lecture et des conversations qui comptent. Elle est aussi une tentative d'alternative humaniste aux réseaux antisociaux de notre temps, dans laquelle le livre remplacerait l'algorithme comme ciment social.

L'idée est simple: une page d'accueil avec moteur de recherche, dans lequel vous entrez le titre du livre ou le nom de l'auteur que vous avez à l'esprit, soit pour matcher avec des personnes qui l'ont lu ou souhaitent le lire. Vous avez ensuite la possibilité d'envoyer des messages pour partager vos impressions, mais surtout de lancer des Clubs Marcel (clubs de lecture spontanés et éphémères) et des heures vertes (séances de lecture 60mn où chacun·e apporte son livre pour le lire en la présence d'autres).

Plus d'information sur notre version bêta sur:
https://www.instagram.com/marcel_lit/ et 
https://www.marcel-lit.fr/

Name: Newsmast Foundation
Description:
At The Newsmast Foundation, we're not another tech startup – we're a charity with a mission to revolutionise social media fostering safe, open and trustworthy knowledge-sharing communities that transcend boundaries. Free, forever. 

Our small but diverse, democratic team is dedicated to reshaping social media, one connection at a time. Our flagship projects, Newsmast and Patchwork, are open source initiatives, built on Mastodon by our experienced development team

Newsmast is our response to the social media of today. Free from algorithms and ads, Newsmast champions transparency and inclusivity, networking individuals through topical Communities built around the issues that matter. Built around trusted news, insights, and discussion and with a global audience of around 2 million users, Newsmast stands as a beacon of peer-to-peer knowledge sharing in an online world filled with uncertainty.

Patchwork empowers organisations to regain control of their social space with ease. Perfect for publishers, non-profits, and academic institutions, Patchwork provides a suite of easy to use tools tailored to your organisation’s needs. Get the most out of the web beyond Big Tech with this bespoke on-ramp to the decentralised social web, aka the ActivityPub “Fediverse”. 

Join us in building Communities where knowledge thrives, connections flourish, and curiosity sparks understanding.

Name: Voices With Vigor
Description:
Voices With Vigor is a live, virtual, conversation series that brings together extraordinary voices for intimate, unscripted dialogue. Three guests are featured each month in three one hour live shows, with online audience participation. 

“I wish to share my voice with vigor, with all who are curious.” —Susan Baumgaertel, Host

We aim to stay true to the following core principles:

 Authentic dialogue over polished presentations
 Diverse perspectives united by shared humanity
 No sales pitches or commercial agendas
 Intimate format that prioritizes genuine connection
 Community building that extends beyond the screen

The cost? Free... because some things are too important to put behind paywalls.

We live in times when authentic voices feel increasingly rare. When genuine connection seems harder to find. When the noise threatens to drown out what truly matters.

Voices With Vigor stands as a quiet rebellion against all of that.

Here are the topics we embraced in the first four months (now available to watch on-demand):

 Physician Authors
 Cancer Support Angels
 Visionary Veterans
 Caregiver Collaborators

And, here's a peek at upcoming themes for the first six months of 2026:

 Weight, What?!
 Men Who Matter
 Mental Health
 Healthcare C-Suite
 Sharing Women's Wisdom
 Politics of Medicine

These conversations happen once—live, unrehearsed, real. Miss it, and you miss the chance to be part of something that can’t be replicated or reproduced.

We believe in the power of genuine conversation to illuminate what matters most.

Voices With Vigor ... creating light with sound, one conversation at a time.

Name: Connections
Description:
Connections: Go beyond business card swaps

We are an exclusive, Dubai-based business network gathering senior executives, business leaders, and entrepreneurs seeking deeper connections.

As a member, you’ll meet people with similar experiences, while building mutual support and long-term trust. So whether you’re wading through the complexities of the Middle East market or looking to broaden your understanding across industries, Connections offers a supportive space to engage, share, and grow together.

Connections’ members include:
- Entrepreneurs
- Senior executives
- Key decision makers
- Business owners and founders
- Regional leaders across industries

What to expect:
- Multiple events a month
- A trusted community of peers
- Exchange of cross-industry insights and ideas
- Supportive environment to explore and make decisions
- Strategic vantage points of the Middle East business landscape
- An excellent opportunity to build real friendships, not just contacts

How we connect:
We gather for two coffee mornings every month. The setting is always relaxed, collaborative, and insightful. Each session covers open conversation, spotlight topics, and supportive spaces to share personal challenges and victories.

We also get together for an evening event each month. This gives us all a chance to connect on a deeper level by chatting, networking, and building trust. 

Look out for ad hoc outings and sport groups too.

Ready to connect? Drop us a message.

Name: Anchor
Description:
Anchor — Conversations That Lead to Matches

Anchor is a new-age dating platform built on a simple belief:
Real connections start with real conversations.

Instead of endless swiping and one-liners, Anchor creates a space where people can talk first — naturally, anonymously, and judgment-free. As the conversation flows, the app intelligently matches users based on chemistry, vibe, and how well they connect, rather than surface-level profiles.

 What Makes Anchor Different?
 Conversation-first matching — No swiping, no pressure, just real talk.
 Built on privacy & respect — Users can speak openly without revealing their identity until they choose to.
 Smart, meaningful match suggestions — Powered by your conversational vibe, not your photos.
 A safe space for genuine connections — Designed to reduce awkwardness, ghosting, and superficiality.

 Our Mission
To make online dating feel human again — by prioritizing interaction over appearance and connection over comparison.

 Why We Use Avatars
Our core team works across various startups and values privacy — both ours and our users'. We use avatars to communicate publicly while keeping the focus entirely on the product and the experience.

 Now Live on Play Store
Anchor is now available for early access on Android.
We’re iterating rapidly and building in public — with the community, for the community.

If you're curious about a fresh, conversation-led dating experience, give Anchor a try and share your feedback!

Name: Connect Master
Description:
Our digital business card platform is a comprehensive solution for professionals looking to create and share electronic versions of their traditional paper business cards. With a focus on convenience and efficiency, our platform allows users to easily create and customize their digital cards to match their personal brand and style.

Our platform offers a range of features to help users manage and share their digital business cards effectively. These include the ability to track the counter of how many users viewed the profile, send updates to the card automatically, and share the card via email, text message, or social media.

In addition to these practical features, our platform also boasts a sleek and modern design that makes it easy for users to create professional-looking digital business cards. Whether you're a freelancer, small business owner, or corporate professional, our platform has the tools and features you need to connect with others and share your information in a digital age.

At our company, we are dedicated to providing a high-quality and user-friendly digital business card platform for professionals. We are constantly updating and improving our platform to ensure that it meets the needs of our users and helps them connect and share their information effectively. Whether you're looking to create your first digital business card or upgrade from a traditional paper card, we have the solution for you.

Name: UNIQUE  MARKETING STRATEGY
Description:
In a world where every brand is fighting for attention, standing out requires more than just great content—it demands a unique strategy. 

Instead of chasing trends, we focused on community-driven marketing—empowering our audience to shape the conversation. 

We ditched generic ads and embraced interactive storytelling, making our customers the heroes of our brand. 

Rather than pushing promotions, we built value-first campaigns, offering insights before asking for engagement. 

Our secret? Emotional intelligence in marketing—understanding not just what people need, but how they feel. 

By blending AI with human creativity, we personalized every touchpoint, making each interaction meaningful. 

And the results? Higher engagement, stronger loyalty, and a brand that resonates. 

The best marketing isn’t about selling—it’s about connecting.

Name: Spark Platforms, Inc.
Description:
Spark Platforms, Inc. is a technology company building the infrastructure for a Bimodal Social Future. We are moving beyond the era of passive consumption to build a Post-Feed Reality an ecosystem that is voice-first, video-native, and powered by the world's first Dual-Identity campus network.

Our flagship product is Spark, the world’s first dual-identity social platform reimagining how Gen Z connects, shares, and belongs. By allowing students to toggle between a verified Real Identity and a secure Shadow Identity, we are solving the "Context Collapse" of modern social media.

Spark is the antidote to algorithmic loneliness and the performance anxiety of traditional platforms. It is a space built for Total Authenticity, where college students can engage without pressure, filters, or judgment.

 What you can Spark

CAMPUS PULSE: THE VIBE CHECK 
See what’s actually buzzing in your Real Identity. Switch between Local (your college) and Global (universities worldwide). Share moments with zero filter and zero pressure.

SHADOWS: BEYOND THE MASK 
Unload your mind in your Shadow Identity, completely anonymous. Read local secrets that are too hot for the timeline, or explore explosive global drama. Your true identity is impenetrable, secured by a unique Avatar System.

ANON CHAT: NO FILTERS 
Forge new, judgment-free connections. Match on your campus or connect globally, always hidden and protected behind an assigned pseudonym in Shadow Mode.

Spark brings back what social media forgot: the feeling of being real, seen, and part of something.

Download Spark: https://sparkthegenzapp.live/app

Join the Vibe (Instagram, X, YouTube): @sparkthegenzapp

Find us everywhere 

X: www.x.com/sparkplatforms

Instagram: www.instagram.com/sparkplatforms

YouTube: www.youtube.com/@sparkplatforms

Name: Business and Padel
Description:
Wij zijn een businessclub voor ondernemers uit het hogere segment met een passie voor padel. We combineren padel, netwerken en de organisatie van exclusieve events.

Padel is een erg populaire sport , is het de ultieme sport om je netwerk uit te breiden en heeft het een zeer sociaal karakter.

Je kan als lid van Business and Padel, je zakelijke netwerk zowel on- als offline beheren, vergroten en bereiken.  Via onze businessclub wordt het onderlinge business netwerk ingezet om de leden de mogelijkheid te bieden hun bedrijven te promoten, te accelereren of new business vanuit het netwerk te genereren.

Daarnaast hebben we onze eigen online Business and Padel WebApp Platform waar leden hun profiel kunnen beheren, kunnen netwerken, zich in kunnen schrijven voor de events en nog meer handige functionaliteiten.

Dit doen we met de organisatie van zowel padel- als niet-padel gerelateerde evenementen, in het binnen en buitenland.

Een lidmaatschap bedraagt € 1.950,-  exclusief BTW per jaar en wordt automatisch jaarlijks vernieuwd. In deze lidmaatschap zitten minimaal 4 exclusieve events, een Padel trip, padel clinic en borrels.

Name: MetaRaptors

Our mission revolves around creating an ecosystem for everyone in and outside the tokenomics environment. Creating a positive impact in the NFT and game community/industry is one of the main drives toward our investors and holders. In this way, we emphasize creating a new paradigm of gaming experiences by offering unique digital collectible MetaRaptors that can be owned, traded, and utilized within the MetaRaptors universe.

At the core of our foundation, we have four visionary founders, each bringing their expertise and passion to drive MetaRaptors' success. The expertise ranges from gaming enthusiasts and developers to creative strategists and crypto Blockchain visionaries.

Together, we have united our skills and knowledge to shape the future of (utility) NFTs and gaming. With a strong focus on innovation, transparency, and community engagement, we strive to provide an unparalleled user experience in this rapidly growing world of digital collectibles.

Join the MetaRaptors community today and immerse yourself in a world where innovation leads the way. Follow us for the latest updates, exciting announcements, and opportunities to connect with like-minded individuals who share the same passion.

Together, let's unlock the power of digital collectibles and redefine the way we experience gaming. 

Join us on this extraordinary journey! #MetaRaptors #DigitalCollectibles #NFTs #Blockchain #Tokens #Cryptocurrency #GamingRevolution #DAO #DEX

Name: Mately
Description:
Mately est la première application pensée pour faciliter les rencontres entre passionnés de jeux vidéo, que ce soit pour le loisir, la compétition ou des opportunités plus ambitieuses.

Que vous soyez joueur, créateur, coach, organisateur ou membre d’une structure, Mately vous offre un espace pour montrer ce que vous savez faire dans le gaming. C’est un profil complet, visible et partageable en un clic, pensé comme une carte de visite pour mettre en avant vos compétences, vos expériences et vos contenus. Un LinkedIn du Jeu Vidéo en devenir !

Mais ce n'est pas tout, le coeur de Mately repose sur un système d'annonces qui vous permet de trouver les personnes qu'il vous manquent. Un coéquipier pour une partie ? Un bénévole pour une équipe ? Et bien plus. 

Mately structure les connexions dans le monde du jeu vidéo : pas seulement pour jouer, mais pour valoriser chaque passion et la faire grandir. 

Si vous faites partie de cette communauté qui veut créer, recruter, s’investir ou simplement mieux jouer, prenez contact avec nous. Mately est là pour chaque mate.

ჩვენი მისია:

 ეკოლოგიური: ნარჩენების შემცირება და შეგნებული მოხმარების კულტურის ხელშეწყობა.

 ეკონომიკური: საჭირო ნივთების ხელმისაწვდომობის გაზრდა და ზედმეტი ხარჯების შემცირება.

 სოციალური: ნდობაზე და დახმარებაზე დაფუძნებული საზოგადოების მშენებლობა.

ჩვენი სისტემა:

Name: AppShowtime
Description:
Cos’è una challenge?
Le challenge sono sfide social virali su vari topic le cui azioni vengono fotografate o filmate. Vengono lanciate da Brand o influencer rivolgendosi ai propri follower, Il target sono i giovani tra i 18 e i 34 anni. Per i brand è uno strumento di comunicazione e di conversione nel funnel di marketing, mentre per chi partecipa è un’occasione per vincere premi o divertirsi.

Come evolviamo una challenge?
Nel nostro progetto vogliamo far vivere le challenge ed il loro alto engagement rate all’interno dei gruppi. Showtime sarà una community formata da tante community che interagiranno attraverso le sfide. Ci rivolgiamo principalmente agli admin di community. L’obiettivo è sfruttarli per amplificare il nostro progetto rendendolo scalabile e moltiplicando il business.

Cos’è Showtime?
E' un'applicazione social a caricamento di contenuti multimediali che si pone come aggregatore di community. All’interno dei gruppi il meccanismo di engagement è la challenge. 

Perchè? 
La nostra idea nasce dall’ intersezione di diversi problemi. Lato admin la scarsa interazione all’interno delle community. Lato utente la dispersione dei contenuti e la scarsità di challenge. Per entrambi la pericolosità degli ambienti online a causa dell’ampia accessibilità e dell’assenza di moderazione delle sfide.

Come? 
Spazi chiusi come le community, diversi gradi di privacy e la moderazione degli admin garantiranno la sicurezza dei gruppi incoraggiando le persone ad aprirsi e condividere esperienze. Le challenge stimoleranno gli utenti a esprimere la loro creatività generando una partecipazione più attiva e costante. 

Perché ora? 
Showtime si inserisce e mette assieme i principali trend dei social network: la community, la challenge, il gaming per socializzare, la dipendenza dal feed e l’attivismo online per un cambiamento offline. 

Fase di sviluppo? 
Il progetto si trova attualmente in fase pre-seed. Sono già state sviluppate UX, UI ed il 30% del MVP.

Name: Apostolic Chamber of Commerce
Description:
The Apostolic Chamber of Commerce is here to help Apostolic-owned businesses thrive, we do this through education, networking, support, and more.

Business Development
The Chamber is a robust business development platform.  Given the choice we believe that businesses, churches and individuals would rather do business with people who believe what they believe. 

Unfortunately, there has not been a way to search likeminded businesses out.  The Chamber’s online business directory, advertising and networking opportunities offer members historically unseen growth potential! 

Legal Defense
The World is becoming more hostile to Apostolic values.  This will impact believers operating in the public space!  The Chamber maintains a network of Apostolic attorney’s and a financial war chest ready to defend both Apostolic businesses and UPCI licensed ministers facing persecution for preaching Biblical truths. 

Education
Just as the Bible lays out a blueprint to be a successful spouse, parent and employee it also lays out principles that make successful leaders and entrepreneurs.  From Cain (farmer) and Abel (rancher) to Lydia (wholesaler) the Bible is full of business owners.  As the son of general contractor, it’s entirely possible Jesus himself grew up in the home of an entrepreneur!

The Chamber offers entrepreneurs and leaders tools taken directly from the pages of Scripture that will help them take their organization to the next level!

Young Professionals
ACoC is a place where young professionals can grow their career, expand their network and get involved in a Christ centered community while giving back. The Chamber plans to develop future Apostolic leaders by providing ambitious young professionals with the opportunity to build relationships, serve the Kingdom and engage with civic, business and church leaders.

Networking
We need each other. The chamber is excited to offer opportunities for networking with like-minded business owners of all levels and industries.

Name: Mr Damp
Description:
Mr Damp is a leading social network for damp proofing, waterproofing, and timber preservation, founded in Scotland, United Kingdom in 2010 by five nationally recognized companies with damp proofing and waterproofing expertise. The platform has grown to become the go-to destination for everything related to damp and moisture issues, providing high-quality information, resources, and community support to its users.

At Mr Damp, our mission is to empower homeowners, DIY enthusiasts, and industry professionals with the knowledge, tools, and resources needed to protect their homes and buildings from damp and moisture issues. We believe that by connecting tradespeople and homeowners, we can foster collaboration and knowledge-sharing that will benefit everyone involved.

Our target audience includes homeowners, property managers, architects, builders, and tradespeople who are interested in learning more about how to prevent, treat, and maintain a damp-free environment. We aim to provide value to our users by offering a comprehensive platform that includes informative articles, how-to guides, product recommendations, and a community forum where users can ask questions and share their experiences.

At Mr Damp, we are committed to providing our users with the highest level of service and support. We strive to create a platform that is easy to use, informative, and engaging, and we are always looking for ways to improve and expand our offerings. Our ultimate goal is to help our users protect their homes and buildings from damp and moisture issues, ensuring a healthy and comfortable living environment for years to come.

Our platform is designed to educate and inform users on all aspects of damp proofing, waterproofing, and timber preservation. We offer expert advice, tips, and solutions to help users prevent and treat a range of damp and moisture issues, including rising damp, penetrating damp, condensation, and timber decay.

Name: Retired But Ready
Description:
Welcome to Retired But Ready!

At Retired But Ready, we believe that retirement is not the end of the road but the beginning of a new adventure. Our mission is to empower retirees and those approaching retirement to embrace this exciting phase of life with enthusiasm, purpose, and a sense of community.

What do we have today for the retirees?

The overpopulation of younger and non-retired populations on existing social media platforms makes it hard for retirees to find a dedicated space for their minds. The entire world's retired population wants to connect with the people from their era. They want people on the matching wavelength who understand the importance of that old jazz music, that old song, and that old movie. They want a space where they can talk about the older things in their lives that no longer exist or have completely lost their essence in this new digital world. No other platform offers a dedicated space just for retirees. They are vulnerable and also feel left behind among the latest trending topics and invaluable discussions and post threads among the youngers, millennials, and non-retirees.

Who We Are?

Retired But Ready is the world's first and ONLY digital platform dedicated to retirees aged 50+. We, a passionate team of professionals who are not retired, understand how to give back the respect and value of the lives of the people who have shaped today's world. At Retired But Ready, retired professionals from different fields of life will come together, connect, create their groups, chat, attend webinars, create their events, and also match up with the new interesting retired profiles, who will continue to become their new friends and life partners for their remaining good years of life. Retired But Ready is not just limited to the networking aspect for retirees but will also be a platform for non-retirees to hire retired professionals for any kind of job, part-time work, and consultations.

Tra i nostri prodotti di punta vi è la telecamera Dual View Sportcam 4K, progettata per rivoluzionare la registrazione e l'analisi delle attività sportive dello sport di massa. Questa telecamera, dotata di due obiettivi 4K che registrano a 180° in un'unica immagine panoramica, automatizza le operazioni di un cameraman ed i un videomaker.

La SDM Cam è collegabile alla pIattaforma, dove i possessori possono creare palinsesti video, monetizzatili ed  accessibili dai propri utenti in streaming on demand. Step by step, implementeremo la piattaforma con la tecnologia OTT per le dirette in live streaming.

I am available to help you grow your practice through the strategic use of LinkedIn, blogging, podcasting, video (both pre-recorded and live), as well as overall social media training. 

I am invited to keynote law firm meetings, events and retreats, and I am available to teach, coach, and provide direction when it comes to marketing and social media.

I would love to discuss how I can help you and your firm solve your needs.

Name: Bump Social Inc.
Description:
Current socials, aptly called social ‘media,’ drop users on a conveyor belt of unidirectional broadcasting and consuming content. Instead, we envision a digital space for friends to co-create. 

Just as the content we see is fed to us, so too is the very process in which these apps are built. Someone builds it and feeds it to us, someone uses it; then the first someone optimizes it to keep you hooked. Instead, we foresee the space itself to be co-created by builders and users.

Amidst the great search for the “next big social,” we propose an experimental project — to create it collectively. 

- A collective output of shared memories that you can build and reminisce on years down the line
- A space to help facilitate intentional, intimate interactions while collectively creating shared memories

This is our call to action, our commitment to a product created for and by a mission-driven generation.

Name: Senjorų pasaulis
Description:
„Senjorų pasaulis“ - virtuali mokymosi ir bendravimo erdvė vyresnio amžiaus žmonėms. Siekiame, kad vienišumo jausmą ir socialinę atskirtį dėl amžiaus patiriantys žmonės kuo ilgiau galėtų būti aktyvūs, sveiki ir savarankiški. Vadovaudamiesi tokiomis vertybėmis kaip sveikata, bendruomeniškumas, pagarba sau ir aplinkai, smalsumas bei atvirumas „Senjorų pasaulis“ buria virtualų bendraminčių klubą, kuriems rūpi sveika gyvensena, orus bendravimas, socialinis aktyvumas ir nauji ryšiai. 
Mes tikime, kad sveika ir laiminga senatvė yra sąmoningų ir nuoseklių pastangų rezultatas, pasiekiamas per kartų bendradarbiavimą. 
Šiandien „Senjorų pasaulyje“ kiekvieną ketvirtadienį, ketvirtą valandą galite pasiklausyti paskaitų pačiomis įvairiomis temomis NEMOKAMAI, užduoti klausimą lektoriui ir pabendrauti su kitais besijungiančiais. Norintiems daugiau, siūlome įsigyti klubo narystę, bei lankyti 5 modulius atspindinčius viso gyvenimo mokymosi koncepciją, dalyvauti vaikščiojimo iššūkiuose ar keliauti kartu po Lietuvą aplankant bendruomenės narius ir susipažįstant su naujais bendraminčiais.

Name: Parents in Law
Description:
Parents in Law is a network and events organisation for parents who work in the legal industry, launched by lawyers for law firms and their people. 
 
Parents in Law was started by two like-minded lawyers (Laura West and Sarah Arnold) who saw a need for an organisation to support both parents and those hoping to be parents working in the law and law firms in navigating the challenges of combining the journey to parenthood and parenthood with a career in the law. Parents in Law is for anyone working in the law for one of our member firms. It’s for those who hope to be parents, expectant parents, and parents with children of all ages (including grown up ones!) as well as our member firms employees who manage parents. 
 
Our firm members are all committed to supporting their employee and partner parents, and know that myriad business benefits result when parents are best placed to manage the 'juggle' between the work/home balance, return to work after periods of leave (whether maternity, paternity, post baby loss  or adoption leave) and hold an enhanced contact book. 
 
Parents in Law started by creating a network of parents working in the law, to harness the collective knowledge in the sector for common good via networking opportunities, peer support, mentoring and business development opportunities for those we are collectively calling "parents" regardless of whether or not they have a child. We will shortly be organising our first events. 

In due course we will also look to support our member firms and parents and parents to be through difficult conversations, for example, around IVF treatment, miscarriage or baby/child loss by connecting managers with parents who can share their first hand experiences of the same and other educational and fun projects which make balancing our most important job (being mum or dad!) with a successful career in the law. 

If you think your firm would be interested in becoming a member, contact us on hello@parents-in-law.com.

Name: De JongerenTop
Description:
JONGEREN PARTICIPATIE

Het doel van JongerenTop is om jongeren een structurele stem en invloed te geven op beleid en uitvoering van organisaties en overheden. Als we jongeren serieus nemen, betekent dit ook dat een JongerenTop altijd samen met, voor en door jongeren wordt georganiseerd.

Een JongerenTop (JOT) is een bijeenkomst waarin een groep van minimaal 25 jongeren vanuit verschillende achtergronden met elkaar in gesprek gaat over een bepaald onderwerp. Naast het gesprek is beleving en ontspanning een belangrijk onderdeel van een JOT. Dit kan in verschillende vormen, bijvoorbeeld door workshops (cultureel of sportief), excursies en/of speurtochten. Per doel en vraag kijk je naar wat de beste invulling is. Dit wordt altijd gedaan in samenwerking met jongeren zelf: wat zouden zij willen? Waar moet de JongerenTop aan voldoen zodat zij zelf mee zouden doen?

We halen de jongeren graag uit hun comfortzone door de groepen tijdens de gesprekken en de beleving te mixen. Het doel is om kennis, begrip en verschillende perspectieven bij elkaar te brengen. Juist jongeren van verschillende scholen, achtergronden en uit verschillende delen van het land hebben boeiende gesprekken. Samen laten we ze vaak iets ondernemen, dit is een verrijking voor de output, maar ook voor de jongeren zelf.

Description:

Rozwijamy współpracę biznesową przez budowanie relacji i wymianę doświadczeń podczas spotkań na żywo i w ramach społeczności online, a także szereg inicjatyw organizowanych w ramach sieci. 

Efekty takiej współpracy to między innymi:

 możliwość pozyskania klientów, dostawców, partnerów czy wspólników - bezpośrednio wśród członków sieci lub dzięki poleceniom

 oszczędność setek godzin i tysięcy złotych dzięki uczeniu się na doświadczeniach (i błędach) innych przedsiębiorców

 wzbogacenie życia zawodowego i prywatnego dzięki regularnym spotkaniom w grupie ludzi dzielących podobne wartości i mieszkających w tym samym regionie

 wyrównanie szans względem firm z bogatszych regionów Polski

Działamy w atmosferze zaufania i wzajemnego szacunku, z nastawieniem na szukanie rozwiązań zamiast narzekania. 

Jest to pierwsza taka inicjatywa nastawiona na działanie w obszarze całego województwa - nie tylko Lublina lub wybranych miast.
