Name: Mehr-Ghar
Description:
A Safe & Creative Community Space in Lyari by the People of Lyari. Mehr Ghar is open to everyone, regardless of gender, caste, ethnicity, and religion.

About Us:
Mehr Ghar is an Flagship initiative of Mehrdar Art and Production - It is an arts based community space for learning & open dialogue that features a small café space, studio, library, meeting room and event hall where we hosts poetry readings, meetups with writers, talks, debates, theatre performances, film screenings, open mics, jam sessions and standup comedy.

Lyari has experienced the worst violence in the last two decades. People of this area have faced immense trauma, pain, and discrimination. Young people needed “Hope” to build communities and restart their lives. Mehr Ghar is an initiative to build upon that “Hope” 

We encourage, empower & engage young individuals, local youth groups, artist community, local stakeholders and community based organization to build the social change through Arts, Creative Expression and Open Dialogue. 
The place has become a centre of cultural and intellectual activities that contributing to Sustainable Development Goal 16, focusing on Peace, Justice, and Strong Institutions.

Since March 2021, Mehr-Ghar has hosted hundreds of activities, ranging from trainings/workshops, poetry readings and film screenings, to vibrant debates on critical issue with support and participation of local communities, stakeholders, musicians, asrtists, writers, filmmakers, local leaders. 
Mehr-Ghar has contributed to revitalizing Lyari’s Cultural Landscape and has provided an alternative, independent safe community space discourse to local people.

We welcome every organization, universities, companies, donor agencies, activists, scholars, artists and active citizens to come forward, join hands, and support us to unleashing the potential of young people from our community.

Name: Euregio Connect
Description:
Welkom bij Euregio Connect
Welkom bij Euregio Connect, het toonaangevende netwerkplatform dat bedrijven, overheden en onderwijsinstellingen uit de Euregio verbindt volgens het Triple Helix-model. Door deze unieke samenwerking tussen de drie sectoren creëren we een ecosysteem waarin innovatie, groei en duurzame oplossingen centraal staan.

Euregio Connect brengt u in contact met een divers netwerk van professionals en organisaties die samen werken aan het aanpakken van economische en maatschappelijke uitdagingen. Via onze thematische communities en ons inkoop- en verkoopplatform bieden wij u toegang tot waardevolle inzichten, voordelige deals en de nieuwste trends op gebieden als Digitalisering & AI, Duurzaamheid & Energie, Arbeidsmarkt & HR, en meer. U kunt actief meedenken, praten en profiteren van de voordelen van Triple Helix-samenwerking.

Verbind. Ontwikkel. Groei. Word lid van Euregio Connect en ontdek hoe samenwerking in de Euregio uw organisatie naar een hoger niveau kan tillen.

Name: HEN – Hørsholm Erhvervs Netværk
Description:
Inspiration, sparring og netværk

HEN – Hørsholm Erhvervs Netværk er for dig, der driver virksomhed i Hørsholm eller omegn. Uanset du er nystartet eller har drevet firma i mange år, om du har en enkeltmands- eller større virksomhed, om du sælger til erhverv eller private – så kan vi styrke dig, og du kan styrke os.

Hvor tit mødes vi?
Vi mødes seks til otte gange om året til:

• Foredrag
• Gå-hjem-møder
• Netværksarrangementer

Få personlig sparring
Med HEN Sparring får du mulighed for gratis sparring og rådgivning i et fortroligt rum fra andre medlemmer. Udvælg tre til fire deltagere fra vores ekspertpanel, der skal være din bestyrelse for en dag. I to timer har du dem til rådighed i et fortroligt rum. Dette er guld værd til at sætte retning for din virksomhed.

Hvem er med?
Spændende, entreprenante erhvervsfolk der brænder for at netværke. Du kan se navnene på HEN.dk.

Hvad koster det?
Man betaler for et årsmedlemskab, og den aktuelle pris står på HEN.dk. Prisen er lav, fordi foreningen er non-profit og har lave omkostninger.

Udvid dit professionelle netværk:

• Få sparring fra andre virksomhedsejere og ledere

• Lokalt erhvervsnetværk i Nordsjælland

• Stor værdi for pengene

• Non-profit netværk

• Netværk er bedre end kold kanvas!

Name: Third Eye Thirst
Description:
At Third Eye Thirst, we’ve spent the past nine years pioneering the spiritual social media space, growing our accounts to over 7 million followers—organically and without paid ads. What began with a single account has evolved into a network of over 20 highly engaged platforms, including Synchronistic and SelfLoveHealer, each reaching millions of followers. As early adopters in the spiritual niche, we’ve been dedicated to providing positive, uplifting content daily.

In addition to managing our own brands, we’ve helped other companies and influencers grow their presence, contributing to the organic growth of over 10 million followers across various accounts. Our expertise spans content creation, social media strategy, rebranding, and marketing. We also offer consulting services to startups and businesses, helping them launch successfully and implement effective social media strategies.

Being in touch with potential investors and increasing the number of such investors is an essential element of success in the fundraising process. 

Unicorns Club helps you showcase your potential and strengths to investors and get your updates delivered in a flash, not just to the investors who follow you but also to those who might be interested. So you can focus on the stuff that matters — on your traction.

Our dream is to create a thriving space where awesome ideas can flourish, boosting the economy and tech scene. We're here to support entrepreneurs on their journey and connect them with the right investors who share their passion for success.

Join us on this exciting journey!

Ich freu mich, wenn genau du Teil dieses Führungskollektivs wirst.

Description: Personen met meervoudige problematiek op diverse domeinen ervaren beperkingen in het sociaal en maatschappelijk functioneren. Zij ontwikkelen lichamelijke en geestelijke kwetsbaarheden en ondervinden ongelijke behandeling, onveiligheid, gebrek aan inkomen en relaties. Deze personen hebben behoefte aan hulp (los van bestaande schotten en financiering). Zij staan open voor samenwerking met naasten, hulpverleners en met elkaar. Netwerkzorg-Rijnmond is ervan overtuigd dat een vertrouwd netwerk kwetsbare personen weer in hun kracht kan zetten. Dit formele en informele netwerk ondersteunt kwetsbare personen met een hulpvraag. Samen met naasten, omgeving, gemeenschap en professionele organisaties realiseren we een wederkerige werkwijze. Deze werkwijze verbindt zelfhulp, ondersteuning, zorg en behandeling voor kwetsbare personen. Het stelt de persoon in kwestie centraal en vergroot, waar mogelijk, de eigen regie en empowerment. Dit met het doel om de kansen op herstel op verschillende vlakken, inbedding in de gemeenschap en op een gezonde leefomgeving zo groot én duurzaam mogelijk te maken. Netwerkzorg-Rijnmond werkt sector overstijgend tussen het medische- en sociale domein in een toegankelijk netwerk van voorzieningen.

Name: warkende helden
Description:
Warkende helden is een netwerk voor werkende ambitieuze young professionals in de Achterhoek. Wij brengen in een informele setting mensen met elkaar in verbinding, ongeacht (opleidings)achtergrond, ervaring en vakgebied. 

Ons doel? 
Een omgeving creëren waar gelijkgestemden in gesprek kunnen gaan met elkaar. Over ideeën sparren, kennis en ervaring delen, een hulpvraag stellen, mensen leren kennen, een workshop volgen, uitdagingen bespreken, een aantal voorbeelden van wat warkende helden in beweging wil zetten. Dit ongeacht opleidingsniveau, functie en vakgebied. 

Waarom warkende helden? 
Het initiatief is ontstaan vanuit de behoefte die wij, Vera en Maud, hebben: het gesprek aangaan met andere young professionals. In de Achterhoek zijn diverse netwerken, maar al snel merkten wij dat we net buiten de boot vielen. Wij zijn namelijk geen ondernemer of manager. 'Dat kan anders', dachten wij. Dus hebben we de handen uit de mouwen gestoken en zijn we aan de slag gegaan met 'warkende helden'. Een initiatief waar iedere werkende young professional terecht kan. 

Wat gaan we doen?
Periodiek zullen er avonden georganiseerd worden om gezamenlijk de verbinding te zoeken en natuurlijk voor het angoan. Dit middels o.a.: 
- informeel samenzijn (onder het genot van een hapje en een drankje) 
- sprekers uit te nodigen 
- workshops te geven 
- een interessant en actueel onderwerp centraal te stellen 

Heb jij ideeën, heb je iets wat je eens in de groep wilt gooien of ben je benieuwd wat warkende helden voor jou kan betekenen? Stuur dan een mailtje naar info@warkendehelden.nl

Name: Female Leaders Club
Description:
Female Leaders Club | Voor vrouwelijke ondernemers met visie, lef en een bewezen business

De Female Leaders Club is het netwerk voor vrouwelijke ondernemers die niet wachten op kansen, maar ze zelf creëren.
Voor vrouwen die hun plek innemen, die bouwen aan groei — zakelijk én persoonlijk — en die weten: echt leiderschap ontstaat in verbinding.

Onze leden zijn ervaren ondernemers met een gevestigde onderneming op hoog niveau (jaaromzet vanaf €150.000).
Ze runnen teams, investeren, schalen op. Ze zoeken geen businesscoach of borrelclub, maar gelijkgestemden.
Een krachtige community waar eerlijkheid, kennisdeling, strategie en support vanzelfsprekend zijn.

We werken met taskforces, masterminds en strategische sessies rond thema’s als internationalisering, AI, zichtbaarheid, teamontwikkeling en financiële groei.
Niet oppervlakkig netwerken, maar bouwen aan iets dat blijft.

Je bent al ver gekomen. Maar je hoeft het niet alleen te doen.

Luister de Female Leaders Podcast voor eerlijke gesprekken over ondernemen op topniveau, via Spotify of Apple Podcasts
Meer weten of je aansluiten? Kijk op www.femaleleadersclub.nl

Female Leaders Club — Voor vrouwen die hun leiderschap durven claimen.

Name: Vayy
Description:
Welcome to Vayy – Where Connections Begin with Meaning

Vayy (companionship, in Sanskrit) is more than just a dating or matrimony app – it's a new way to meet people who are looking for something real.

We call it Datrimony – a space where dating meets intention, and matrimony meets compatibility.

Whether you're exploring a serious relationship or hoping to meet someone for life, Vayy is designed for you.

What Makes Vayy Different?

 -Meaningful Matches, Not Mindless Swipes
-We’re not here for casual hookups or algorithms based solely on looks
-At Vayy, we focus on deep compatibility – values, beliefs, goals, and emotional connection.

 Built with Independent Women in Mind
-Vayy is especially built for modern, independent women who:
-Value compatibility over social or financial status
-Are serious about finding a partner, not just a profile
-Want to date without being judged, or pressured into commitment
-May be divorced, widowed, or restarting – and want a respectful space

 Safety and Verification First
-We know your time and trust are valuable.
-That’s why we verify every profile to create a safer, kinder space for everyone – especially for women who are divorced or widowed.
-No fake bios. No creepy DMs. No nonsense.

 Datrimony: The Best of Both Worlds

-We’re redefining what it means to find your person.
-Dating apps can feel too casual.
-Matrimony sites can feel too transactional.

Vayy brings the balance – meaningful dating with the intention to grow into something lifelong.


Who Is Vayy For?

-People looking for deep conversations, not just small talk
-Divorcees, widows, or people restarting life on their own terms
-Those who want to meet someone serious – but not rushed into commitment
-Anyone tired of the extremes – and seeking something real



Real People. Real Intentions. Real Connections.

You're not just looking for "someone" – you're looking for the right one.

Name: TellDem
Description:
Our mission : Restoring responsible social debates online.

At TellDem, we believe that social media should be more than endless scrolling. 

Our unique concept : Spark meaningful conversations by delivering a daily question on a trending topic. Everyday users can vote and share their thoughts on a new shared topic. For each post, users can choose to express themselves either anonymously or publicly. 

Each day brings a fresh discussion, fueling an ever-evolving space of ideas, opinions, and insights. We’re building a platform where engagement means learning, not just consuming. 

Join us in shaping the future of social interaction!

---
Notre mission : Restaurer un espace de débats responsable en ligne

Chez TellDem, on pense que les réseaux sociaux peuvent (et doivent) être plus que du scroll sans fin.

Notre concept : chaque jour, une question sur un sujet qui fait l’actu. Les utilisateurs votent, donnent leur avis, en anonyme ou en public.

Chaque jour, un thème commun, des réponses multiples. Parce que les débats méritent mieux que des commentaires jetés à la va-vite.

TellDem, c’est une plateforme où s’engager et apprendre, pas juste consommer du contenu.

Rejoins le mouvement et participe à la conversation.

« Pour partager les moments de ta vie, il y a Facebook, Insta ou Snap. Pour vivre ces moments, il y a Frimake ! »

Frimake est depuis toujours l'application leader sur le marché des sorties amicales et elle reste aujourd'hui la seule application utilisable GRATUITEMENT et SANS AUCUNE PUBLICITÉ.

Marre des heures passées sur ton téléphone à contempler la vie des autres ?
➥ Sors et fais-toi de nouveaux potes dans la vraie vie avec Frimake, l’app la plus festive d’Europe 
➥ Tu vas rencontrer une communauté unique, ouverte et qui a envie de profiter à fond de sa vie.

Que tu sois en couple, célibataire, que tu aies déjà plein d’amis ou pas vraiment … Rejoins-nous, tu vas kiffer les sorties amicales proposées :
➥ Raclettes party, randonnées, jeux de société, grillades, badmintons, cinémas ou juste des soirées Netflix & Chill autour d’un apéro.
➥ Sache que toutes les activités sont proposées par des membres comme toi car l’objectif reste de se faire de VRAIS potes.

Tu l’as compris, Frimake va changer ton quotidien :
➥ Fini le temps passé à chercher ses amis dispos pour sortir…
➥ Tu ouvres l’app et tu sors direct, même à la dernière minute 

Tu as l’air tenté(e), mais tu ne sais pas encore ce qui t’attend vraiment ?
➥ Va voir sur notre site les dizaines de chaînes TV qui sont allées à la rencontre des Frimakers et ont validé Frimake pour toi (M6, BFM, FRANCE 2, NRJ, FRANCE INTER…)
➥ Tu as notre Insta aussi (frimakeapp), tu y trouveras des photos de nos membres lors de leurs sorties, c'est inspirant !

Pour nous rejoindre, voici les liens :

 App Store : https://apple.co/2L23MY1
 Play Store : https://bit.ly/2OqnFKi

À de suite...

Name: Docintur
Description:
In today's fast-paced world, healthcare needs to be more connected and accessible than ever. That's where Docintur comes in—a comprehensive health platform designed to bridge the gap between patients, healthcare professionals, and suppliers.

 What is Docintur?
Docintur is an innovative platform available on both the App Store and Google Play, catering to various user types with tailored solutions. Our platform is built to support seamless communication and collaboration within the healthcare ecosystem.

 Key Features:
-User-Centric Design: We offer unique interfaces for patients, healthcare professionals, and suppliers, ensuring that each user enjoys a customized experience.
-B2B2C Model: By integrating suppliers, Docintur is not just a platform for connecting patients and healthcare providers but also enhances the supply chain in the healthcare sector.
-Continuous Improvement: With regular updates and enhancements, we are committed to evolving our platform based on user feedback and emerging needs in the healthcare landscape.

 The Journey Ahead:
At Docintur, our mission is to create a more efficient healthcare environment. We are excited about the future and the potential to expand our services further. Stay tuned for upcoming features and initiatives that will enhance your healthcare experience!

Join us on this journey towards a more connected and accessible healthcare system!

#Docintur #HealthcareInnovation #HealthTech #PatientCare #B2B2C

Esto me ha ayudado a relacionarme con marcas, pequeños negocios y principalmente con clientes que buscan publicidad y crecimiento para sus negocios. Abarcando las áreas de: 
- Grabación (Estabilizador y Drone)
- Investigación
- Guión (Storytelling)
- Edición (Creatividad, Voz en Off, Premiere Pro)
- Organización (Calendario y Estilo en feed)
- Publicación (Historias, Videos, Fotografías)
- Comunicación (Antes y Después de las publicaciones)
Siempre me ha gustado aprender y profesionalizar lo que hago, actualmente sigo mejorando y subiendo la calidad para ampliar y convertirlo en un emprendimiento aunado al hobby.
La figura que manejo es una cuenta comercial/pública como @SoyCharlie.pdf

Description:

The digital generation can now honor, remember and learn about the people who came before them, on there own terms. 
We are Memorialine. Bridging the amazing past to the amazing future.
Memorialine connects personal stories to global databases, providing a broader and lasting legacy for our loved ones. Memorialine proudly serves B2B, B2C, and C2C needs, allowing for decentralized peer-to-peer interactions and opening new revenue streams.
Marketplace
Our marketplace provides an extensive range of products for the entire funeral industry. These include both digital products, such as apps, and physical items, all branded under our name and manufactured globally, including in Europe, the USA, and the Far East. 
Memorialine aims to be a truly global platform, inclusive of all continents.
To learn more, please contact us through our website. We look forward to sharing your journey both past and forward.

Name: Força
Description:
FORÇA | فُرْصَة
Where Ambition Meets Belonging

FORÇA is the first private, women-only networking platform built for ambitious professionals across the MENA region. Rooted in cultural understanding and designed with intention, FORÇA provides a secure, verified, and value-driven space for women to connect, collaborate, and grow — both personally and professionally.

What makes FORÇA different

Trust-first community: Every member is vetted through LinkedIn and identity verification to ensure a credible, secure environment.

Culturally aligned: FORÇA respects the diversity of the region, welcoming conservative, married, and career-focused women who seek authentic connection.

High-intent networking: Our model prioritizes curated, real-life events designed for meaningful engagement — not passive scrolling.

Focused and distraction-free: No content feeds, no noise — just access to valuable connections, opportunities, and a strong support system.

Our Mission
To address the growing sense of isolation among women in major cities like Dubai and offer a platform that turns professional ambition into shared growth, opportunity, and community.

FORÇA is more than an app — it is a movement redefining how women in the Middle East build their networks, grow their influence, and support one another.

FORÇA is a product of FORSA TECH FZE, a UAE-registered technology company.

Name: The Vanguard
Description:
Welcome to The Decisive Decade. 

A time when the line between technological advancement and obsolescence is razor-thin, and the future of our national defense hangs in the balance.

The stakes?

Higher than ever.

The adversaries?

Faster and more agile.

Our industry’s response?

Frankly, it's not enough.

That's where we draw the line, and where you come in.

I held consultations with many of you on how best to act at the individual level to reorient the posture of our Defense Industrial Base and National Security sector.

Some asked me to start a newsletter.

Some asked me to start a podcast.

Some asked me to coach them.

Some asked me to generate digital coursework to help them grow as leaders and innovators.

None of these alone were enough to get the job done.

Even combined, they were missing something....

I learned we were missing a sense of community beyond the business roundtables and thumbs up emojis.

A community that had all of the above and so much more.

I heard you.

LinkedIn wasn't enough.

I saw a knowledge being siloed and divided among hundreds of podcasts, newsletters, and social media profiles.

Our main source of interaction is plagued with spam, self promotion and spies.

Why are we making it easy for them?

We acknowledged the requirement for action and…acted!

Enter...

The Vanguard.

Our Mission?

To unite leaders and innovators in the defense and aerospace industries to foster growth, communication and industry capacity.

Together, we ensure our nation has the tools needed to fight and win in the decisive decade ahead.

Your decision to join Vanguard enlists you in a cause, and places you forward with likeminded professionals with a sense of urgency in their guts.

The Vanguard is where we rally to amplify our impact, sharpen our professional acumen, and secure connections with purposeful action.

We will lead the Defense Industrial Base, each from our own niche of expertise, but from a collective foundation designed for purpose.

Name: BNI PORTUCALE | Norte Interior e Porto - Portugal
Description:
O QUE É O BNI? 
O BNI (Bussiness Network Internacional) é a maior e mais bem sucedida organização de referências de negócios do mundo.
O princípio da organização assenta na construção de relações de confiança, promovendo a troca de referências entre os seus membros e gerando assim oportunidades de negócios. De forma a potenciar os negócios em exclusividade, cada grupo BNI permite apenas uma empresa por cada área de atividade.  
Os Membros BNI aumentam, em média, o seu volume de negócios em 20% no seu primeiro ano de afiliação. O nosso Grupo é composto por um conjunto de Empresários dinâmicos, focados e devidamente preparados para potenciar os negócios dos seus parceiros, através da sua rede de contactos.
O BNI PORTUCALE pretende afirmar-se como um grupo de referência em Portugal pela sua persistência e coesão, pela capacidade de gerar negócios entre todos os seus membros, e assim, contribuir para uma sociedade mais empreendedora, cooperante e solidária. 
O BNI PORTUCALE é atualmente o grupo mais antigo de Portugal, celebrando 18 Anos de existência em 3 de Maio de 2024. Desde a sua fundação, tem apresentado recordes históricos de faturação, ultrapassando os 27.000.000,00 €.

Es ist mir eine Herzensangelegenheit Selbständigen, Unternehmerinnen und Frauen einen Raum zu geben sich mit ihrem Business zu zeigen, sich zu vernetzen und gemeinsam in Verbundenheit erfolgreich zu sein.

Dabei stehen persönliches Wachstum und Entwicklung im Business nebeneinander. Ein erfolgreiches Business ist für mich mittlerweile ohne spirituelle Ausrichtung nicht mehr denkbar. 

Die Qualität der Abende ist geprägt von Offenheit und Authentizität.

Wenn du dich angesprochen fühlst, sei gerne bei einem unserer nächsten Termine dabei!

Name: Seenc
Description:
Have you noticed how LinkedIn has shifted from being a professional networking platform to something that resembles a content-heavy social media site? Automated messages, mass outreach, and an obsession with building “personal brands” have made it less authentic and more about quantity than quality.

How many people are we connected to yet will never interact with? How many professionals have we crossed paths with in real life without ever knowing? I’m always eager to meet new people and create business opportunities, but every time I find myself in places of interest—like hotels, gyms, cafes, or conferences—I realize how many potential connections I miss out on. I constantly ask myself: how many opportunities have I let slip away?

That’s why we created Seenc.

Our goal? To build a platform where communities form naturally, driven by shared experiences and passions—whether it’s creating new business partnerships, finding your next tennis buddy, or connecting with someone who shares your love for live music.

TurismeVærket er et karrierenetværk for os der arbejder med turisme til daglig og som savner sparring og et fællesskab med ligesindede indenfor branchen. 

TurismeVærket holder til i Region Syddanmark, hvor vi på skift vil bevæge os rundt i hele regionen, når vi tager på inspirationsbesøg, rundvisning, foredrag, events og meget mere. 

FORMÅL:
Et netværk, hvor vi vægter sparring og vidensdeling højt. Hvor vi kan diskutere relevante problemstillinger indenfor turisme og hjælpe med at løse dem - i fællesskab. 

Et netværk, hvor vi kan støtte hinanden, bruge hinandens kompetencer og viden eller udvikle nye samarbejder på tværs af brancher indenfor turismen eller destinationer. 

PRAKTISKE INFORMATIONER & DELTAGELSE:

Netværket startede i 2023 af Gitte, Julie og Signe. 
Første møde blev afholdt den 6. september i Kolding. 
Se alle events for mere information. Vi opdateret løbende denne LinkedIn side med relevante nyheder og diskussioner. 

Der afholdes netværksmøder hver 2. måned og altid den første onsdag mellem kl. 16.30-18.30.
Der vil max være 16 medlemmer og det kræver at man er et aktivt medlem og er med til min. 3 x møder om året. 

OBS! Der er i øjeblikket en venteliste på optagelse til TurismeVærket. Men send gerne en mail til Gitte Hoeg Andersen hvis du vil ansøge om at være med. Får vi nok tilmeldinger kan det være vi kan starte endnu et hold i regionen. Send en mail til: gitteh60@hotmail.com. 

Årligt kontingent: 300 DKK 
(dækker småudlæg, gaver til oplægsholdere osv.)

Er du nysgerrig og vil du høre mere, har du en god idé til et emne eller skal vi komme forbi din virksomhed, jamen så smid os en kommentar, en besked eller send en mail til Gitte Hoeg Andersen: gitteh60@hotmail.com.

Vi glæder os til at se dig!

Name: Skill india startups
Description:
Skill India Startups are innovative ventures that aim to bridge the gap between workforce skills and industry demands in India. These startups are at the forefront of a rapidly evolving landscape, where technology, education, and entrepreneurship converge to empower the country's youth and enhance their employability.

Key characteristics of Skill India Startups include:

Skill Development Focus: These startups prioritize skill development and training, offering a diverse range of courses and programs to equip individuals with the abilities required for various industries, such as IT, manufacturing, healthcare, and more.

Digital Learning: Leveraging the power of digital technology, Skill India Startups often provide online platforms and e-learning tools to make education accessible to a wide audience, breaking geographical barriers and enabling self-paced learning.

Industry Alignment: They collaborate closely with industry partners to ensure that the skills taught are in line with current and future workforce needs, facilitating smoother transitions from education to employment.

Job Placement Services: Many Skill India Startups offer job placement services or connect students with job opportunities through partnerships with companies, thereby enhancing the employment prospects of those who complete their training programs.

Entrepreneurship Opportunities: Some startups encourage entrepreneurship and innovation, not only by equipping individuals with skills but also by fostering an entrepreneurial mindset, promoting startups and self-employment.

Government Initiatives: Skill India Startups often align with government initiatives and policies, making use of government-sponsored schemes and grants to expand their reach and impact.

Inclusivity: These startups typically focus on inclusivity, reaching out to marginalized communities, women, and individuals from diverse backgrounds, ensuring that skill development opportunities are available to all.

Name: Muslim Womens Business Network MWBN
Description:
Ever felt out of place in traditional networking spaces? We know the struggle: ambitious Muslim women too often feel alone in the business world.

That’s why we created MWBN, The Muslim Women’s Business Network.
Because Muslim women in business deserve more than a seat at the table. We deserve a vibrant community, a space where faith, values, and ambition are celebrated, not sidelined.

At MWBN, you won’t find awkward small talk or cliques.
Instead, you’ll find:
 A supportive, like-minded community that understands your journey, your challenges, and your aspirations.
 A structured networking system that actually works, with referrals, spotlights, and visibility built right in.
 Business and personal development, delivered in practical, actionable ways (because nobody needs another fluffy seminar).
 A hybrid model, online consistency + in-person connection so you can grow your business or career without sacrificing your life.

This is networking with a difference. Not just swapping business cards, but sharing opportunities, celebrating wins, and actively supporting one another. Around here, your fellow members don’t just cheer for you, they help you reach your goals.

And yes, we’re structured. Yes, we’re professional. But we’re also dynamic and energising, because Muslim women in business can lead with purpose, passion, and confidence.

So, if you’re a Muslim woman who’s tired of playing small, tired of feeling like you’re building your business or career alone, or tired of not finding your place in networking circles, welcome home.

This is more than networking. This is community, growth, and empowerment.
This is your team, your collaborators, your circle of trusted support.

Our platform streamlines hiring, communication, and project execution, making the entire process faster, simpler, and more transparent for everyone involved. Unlike traditional lead-generation models, HVAC service providers don’t pay per lead—allowing their expertise and reputation to speak for itself, and letting their work do the selling.

 Instant matching between qualified techs and owners
 Vetted profiles you can trust

Whether you're a technician looking for consistent, high-quality work, home owner looking for someone to fix your AC, or a business owner needing reliable help on demand — HVAC Service World gives you the tools and visibility to move faster and work smarter.

We’re not just connecting people. We’re powering the future of HVAC. providers any where, any time, in any field of expertise.

Thus, the Hub will facilitate the effective participation of West Africa's climate civil society in the GST by providing a platform to engage all interested stakeholders on the priorities that highlight their expectations. The formation of the Hub was commissioned by the ClimateWorks Foundation and was executed by the West African Science Service Centre on Climate Change and Adapted Land Use (WASCAL) and the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) of South Africa.

Name: Wnet | Networking Women
Description:
𝗚𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝘄𝗮𝗰𝗵𝘀𝗲𝗻!
Wnet vernetzt Frauen in Südtirol und unterstützt sie dabei, sichtbar zu werden und persönlich wie beruflich zu wachsen. Wir gestalten mit, wir entscheiden mit – für mehr Geschlechtergerechtigkeit.

Wir setzen Impulse im öffentlichen Diskurs und bringen Frauen gezielt in Führung – auf gesellschaftlicher, politischer und wirtschaftlicher Ebene.

→ Unser Netzwerk, unser Verein
Wnet vereint Frauen aus Wirtschaft, Management und Dienstleistung. Durch Mentoring, Coaching und gegenseitige Unterstützung fördern wir individuelle Karrieren und kollektives Wachstum. Wir schaffen Verbindungen, die tragen – über Branchen und Generationen hinweg.

→ Gesellschaftliche Wirkung
Wir engagieren uns in Gremien wie der Allianz für Familie und dem Landesbeirat für Chancengleichheit und pflegen starke Beziehungen zu Partnernetzwerken.
Wir machen auf strukturelle Ungleichheiten aufmerksam, geben Frauen eine Stimme und gestalten Veränderung mit – für mehr Gerechtigkeit, Vielfalt und faire Rahmenbedingungen in Südtirol und darüber hinaus.

→ Karriereförderung
Ob Impulstagung, Expertinnen-Treff oder Stammtisch: Wir fördern Austausch, Sichtbarkeit und Wissenstransfer.
Der Leitgedanke „Karriere möglich machen“ begleitet uns seit der Gründung als ESF-Projekt im Jahr 2006 – und trägt bis heute.

→ Jahresmotto 2025: #Netzwerke & #Netzwerken
Wir organisieren regelmäßige Veranstaltungen, halten unsere Mitglieder über landesweite Fraueninitiativen auf dem Laufenden und fördern den Dialog – digital und analog.

Wnet zählt über 150 Mitglieder. Der Verein wird ehrenamtlich geführt – unter der Leitung von Präsidentin Kathrin Pichler und Vizepräsidentin Katia Endrizzi gemeinsam mit einem engagierten Vorstandsteam.

Willkommen sind alle Frauen, Männer und Interessierte, die unser Ziel der Gleichstellung mittragen. 

 Melde dich bei uns: info@wnet.bz.it

Name: MateMachine
Description:
MateMachine is a city-embedded civic infrastructure platform designed as long-term urban infrastructure for structured, real-world human conversation and connection.

The system combines a fully built, multi-feature digital platform with partner-owned physical locations deployed at city scale. The digital layer coordinates participation and continuity, while the physical layer is delivered through an asset-first real-estate partnership and franchise model.

MateMachine is well past the concept stage. It has been developed over several years with 90+ contributors, is protected by international PCT patent filings, and has been behaviorally validated through early activations in Canada with ~40,000 real-world interactions.

Global rollout is now being prepared, launching from Dubai and expanding into major international cities through:
• a scalable digital platform, and
• partner-owned physical locations where early asset owners retain 100% ownership and appreciation.

MateMachine is not a dating or entertainment product. It is urban social infrastructure—designed for a post-AI world where real presence, meaning-based systems, and face-to-face human interaction become increasingly valuable.

Name: SupportUkraineNOW
Description:
On February 24, 2022, at 5am Kyiv time, Ukrainian cities woke up with the most terrifying alarm clock – the sounds of the massive bombing. This was it – Russia had escalated a full-scale war against Ukraine.

Since then, Ukrainian Global Shapers have united forces with the global community of 14,000 members to consolidate all efforts in addressing the war in Ukraine. Today, the initiative SupportUkraineNow (SUN) by Global Shapers has grown into the most comprehensive guide on how foreigners can help Ukraine. Overall, on the 12th day of war the SUN had reached 350k visitors and processed 1000+ requests.

What is SupportUkraineNOW?

It is a resource to help with:

1. Donating to official funds

2. Joining a protest in your city, influence your authorities, spread the word on social media

3. Sending humanitarian help to Ukraine

4. Joining the foreign legion

5. Hosting Ukrainian refugees, and helping them locally: humanitarian help, legal aid, emotional support

6. Hiring Ukrainians


And behind the scenes, the SUN team works on the coordination of foreign help and volunteers. As of now, we’ve developed a requests support team, legal aid team, humanitarian aid coordination, and fund verification team.

This project represents a model of how the international community can organise a humanitarian response to all kinds of crises. The role of volunteers is, first of all, to support and back up a government by being fast-paced and self-organised. The last two weeks during which the war in Ukraine has unfolded have shown that the global society is united like an invisible web all over the world. All international communities you have ever been part of will be an asset for you in order to pull the right strings and reach much-needed help.

At the same time, we focus on those activities in which we have expertise. For others, we engage local volunteers or professionals in other countries. That helps us engage new expertise and grow.

Name: CrowningArts
Description:
We are a group of artists who have decided to change the online world of art. As the digital age develops, it is necessary to create a new way to appreciate art in the noisy world of social media. That is why we are starting an exciting new movement.

Our goal is to allow artists to pursue their passion with no obstacles and encourage them to achieve and create. The reward for this work is ultimately success, recognition and last but not least money.

Nowadays, social media platforms are oversaturated with content created almost purely for mass appeal. This leaves a negative impact on the world of art and its community. It is a real shame that we have allowed for this unique phenomenon of mankind to exist without integrity within the digital space.

We aim to change this situation and preserve art as an essential aspect of our culture, and that is why we have decided to create a new networking platform for artists called Crowningarts.

On this platform, we are connecting artists and their creative capabilities with fans, sponsors and institutions. In addition, we wish to inspire artists and children with artistic ambitions to pursue their passion.

They will also be able to get validation from unique users of Crowningarts, Judges. These are real working artists, who are able to use our special ranking tool to promote the best art on the platform. This tool allows Judges to rate the best artists on the platform in the Top Artist chart.

Crowningarts is created by artists for artists, and that is why we have decided to distribute a part of Crowningarts annual yield among our users. By buying a Golden Crown Coin, you directly support out platform and become it's co-founder.

If you are passionate about art, whether you are a creator, an investor or only an art lover, you can join us today in creating a new home for art on the internet.

CrowningArts team.

Dlatego zapraszamy do wzięcia udziału w naszej akcji „Dzień bez hejtu”, która odbędzie się we wrześniu 2024 roku!

Dołącz do nas, publikując pozytywne posty, udostępniając inspirujące historie i wspierając osoby, które tego potrzebują. Użyj hashtagów #DzieńBezHejtu oraz umieść przygotowane grafiki, aby pokazać swoje zaangażowanie i inspirować innych do działania.

Razem możemy sprawić, że internet stanie się miejscem bardziej przyjaznym i bezpiecznym dla wszystkich. Pamiętajmy, że każdy z nas ma wpływ na to, jak wygląda nasza wirtualna rzeczywistość. Zróbmy to razem!

Name: Travis and Sigrid
Description:
"There are different ways people explore London – and cycling around with your cat now appears to be one of them.


A year ago Travis Nelson, 45, was made redundant. Looking for a new sense of direction he started taking his cat Sigrid on his bike, the four-year-old Norwegian forest feline sitting in a basket on the front surveying the sights as the pair sauntered through the capital.

Travis and Sigrid have since built a cult following on Instagram, broadcasting their daily travels through the likes of England’s Lane, Hampstead Heath and Hyde Park.

Through his rides with his “best friend”, the Belsize owner has brought together two worlds not commonly associated – cycling and cats. The pair have even attended protests and parties together, including the Pride Ride. 

Travis, who spends up to four hours per day putting together the videos and managing social media, told the Ham&High: “Everyone is always quite surprised and happy to see Sigrid on the bike and it’s just a non-stop trail of people waving, smiling and shouting ‘hey there’s a cat’.  

“It sounds a little strange but it's as if you're spreading joy, like a trail of happy people everywhere we go. It’s quite fun.”

Travis continued: “It’s been a stressful year, being out of work is no fun so it's nice to meet happy people every day, and Sigrid likes it a lot.

“She always seems to love going outside. She'll stand at the door and whine. She sees me messing with my bike and she starts running around getting excited, it’s her favourite thing to do.” 

Travis, whose background is in software engineering, says his partnership with Sigrid, who is deaf, has helped build a sense of purpose and routine while out of work, much of it during lockdown.  

The 45-year-old has leash-trained Sigrid, and the pair often walk through England’s Lane – Barrett's butchers and Chamomile Cafe among the local fans."

Buurtverbondenheid leidt tot sociale steun en een gevoel van saamhorigheid. Het versterkt de gemeenschap en stelt haar in staat om problemen als eenzaamheid, leefbaarheid en onveiligheid zelf aan te pakken. Daarmee worden professionals ontlast en maatschappelijke kosten bespaard.

Buurtverbondenheid vraagt om gastvrije ontmoetingsplekken waar buurtbewoners elkaar zien, spreken en samen dingen kunnen ondernemen. In veel buurten ontbreken die plekken. Vaak is er wel ruimte beschikbaar, maar door een gebrek aan slagkracht, kennis en geld functioneren deze plekken niet optimaal.

Met het initiatief Netwerk Ontmoetingsplekken wil Stichting Bijzondere Plekken daar structureel verandering in brengen. We inspireren, faciliteren en versterken de gangmakers en mogelijkmakers van ontmoetingsplekken. Dit doen we lokaal.  Netwerk Ontmoetingsplekken Amersfoort (NOA) is reeds gestart.

Onze stijl is direct, menselijk en moreel scherp.
Geen zichtbaarheid zonder geloofwaardigheid. Geen interactie zonder intentie.

Want in een tijd waarin algoritmes sturen, framing versluierd is en publieke ruimte steeds vaker digitaal wordt, kiezen wij voor communicatie die klopt; in toon, in timing en in betekenis.

Niet alles wat je kunt zeggen, moet je willen zenden.
Wij helpen je het verschil te maken tussen bereik en vertrouwen.

Description:
Shipmates Network is a global community created to connect seafarers at every stage of their maritime journey. Whether sailing, on leave, training, or retired, we provide a space where seafarers can build meaningful connections, access opportunities, and feel supported both at sea and at home.

We bring together individuals from all ranks, departments, sectors, and ship types, offering a community that understands the unique challenges and lifestyle of working at sea. Members can network with peers worldwide, join discussions, access webinars, receive insights from industry professionals, and take part in surveys designed to highlight the real needs and experiences of seafarers.

Shipmates Network also serves as a bridge between seafarers and the wider maritime industry. Companies can connect directly with relevant seafarers for panels, podcasts, conferences, and specialist insights. Charities and welfare organisations can share initiatives and reach the audiences they aim to support more effectively.

Our goal is to create an inclusive, accessible environment where every seafarer, whether outgoing or quiet, new or experienced, feels welcomed and able to engage in a way that suits them. With a dedicated community and plans for in-person events from 2026, Shipmates Network is committed to strengthening connection, opportunity, and community across the maritime world.

Join our LinkedIn Group: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/16375015/
Instagram: @shipmates.network

Name: ConnAct
Description:

Naast het “WerKans” platform heeft de ConnAct VZW in 2022 een nieuw welzijn – en tewerkstellingsplatform opgestart, nl. “JobSTER” en focust zicht hier op jongeren met afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt, maw. jongeren die de verbinding met zichzelf en de maatschappij kwijt zijn.

Als 3de platform zal in 2023 “OpnieuWerk” opgestart worden en zal zich focussen op mensen (mama’s, papa’s, …) dewelke lange tijd (bewust) niet actief zijn geweest op de arbeidsmarkt en moeilijkheden ondervinden om opnieuw te solliciteren.

Op deze manier wil ConnAct zowel de positie van werkzoekenden op de arbeidsmarkt versterken als voldoen aan de schaarste op diezelfde arbeidsmarkt als inzetten op het welzijn van deze doelgroepen. Om dit te realiseren werd de Magiplant site als thuisbasis voor (1) welzijn- en (2) ambachtelijke tewerkstellingsplatform = “jobcarrousel” ontworpen. De Magiplant bevindt zich aan de stadsrand in Mechelen.

Welcome to The Executive Assistant Club! 

Founded in Luxembourg, The Executive Assistant Club is dedicated to creating a global community of Executive Assistants, Personal Assistants, and other administrative professionals across the world.

Our mission is to advocate for the profession and ensure it remains relevant and high-performing in this ever-evolving, tech-driven world.

We’re excited to share that the Club is transitioning from a local to a global community, driven by our desire to make networking and self-development training more accessible for all EAs and PAs. By removing barriers of accessibility and location, we aim to create a community that anyone can join, no matter their schedule or geographic location.

What to expect

- Have a voice in the future of online safety: Join the network where leading brands help shape the future of online safety.

- Act with confidence, backed by insight: Get the insight your team needs to act faster and stay ahead of change.

- Solve complex issues, together: Work with peers and experts to tackle online safety challenges in real time.

- Turn regulation into action: Move from compliance to leadership with a clear, principle-based framework.

- Show you’re serious about standards: Earn recognition for your commitment to online safety and build trust through our independent audit.

Name: Adme
Description:
The problem:
On one hand, Brands need to advertise genuine content created by people but:
 a - Social networks only distribute the content created by brands
 b - Hiring professional influencers to request them to create content is not automated
 c - People are posting a lot of spontaneous photos with brands, products, and places that can be sponsorable but there is not a mechanism to do that.
And, on the other hand, 
 d - social networks users, are posting a lot of content with brands, products, and places, generating influence to their friends and followers, but no one is paying them for that
Solution
 - Adme lets brands sponsor content created by people (based on a brief or just spontaneous) in addition to letting people post on their social networks walls content created by brands as well.
 - All social network users are considered influencers. And for the first time, their spontaneous photo will be paid.

Without Adme:
 a - Brands' content is delivered by the platforms only. It is not possible to ask people to post them on their walls.
 b - Not automated. Brands contact influencers or their agent directly. Prices are not standardized.
c - Not possible
d - Social networks users continue posting branded photos making brands enjoy the benefits of their influence without rewarding content owners for that

Name: Lasken.AI
Description:
There is an incredible amount of useful business information on the open web. Most of it is public. Most of it is updated all the time. And most of it is hard to use.

Company websites change. New partnerships appear. Teams grow. Products evolve. The information is there, but it is scattered, messy, and difficult to keep track of.

Lasken makes this information usable. Powered by real time public web data and AI.


We continuously collect public web information, organize it around real companies and markets, and keep it up to date. Instead of digging through pages, you get a clear picture of what is happening and what has changed.

You can ask real business questions and get answers you can work with. Not guesses. Not static lists. Not outdated snapshots.

Focusing on Healthcare information which is fragmented and changes fast. Providers, digital health companies, pharmacies, and MedTech businesses are constantly evolving, but reliable insight is hard to maintain. Lasken brings this information together and keeps it current, so teams can make decisions with confidence.

Lasken does not tell you what to do.
It helps you understand what is actually going on.

Know more. Decide better.

For healthcare or custom intelligence projects, contact
Patric Jarchow (patric.jarchow@lasken.ai)

- VERYTHING IS IN FRONT OF YOUR EYES
Keep the vehicle in sight at all times.
One of the main areas of use of the program is the ability to track cars. Currently, companies or car fleet owners can track their cars, receive notifications and determine traffic zones regardless of their location and time by placing a GPS device on their cars and registering them in a mobile application. Here, the user has the option of tracking one or more objects.

- OUR ADVANTAGES
The most prominent feature of our system.
A mobile application user can have tracking capabilities by inviting their friends to the application based on their permission. After the friend request is sent, the object is reflected in the friends list. After appearing in the list, by clicking on the name of the user, it is possible to see his location and other indicators.

Name: Gebiedsopgave Centraal Holland
Description:
Centraal Holland ligt tussen het IJsselmeergebied, de kust en het rivierengebied en bevat onder andere de metropoolregio’s Utrecht en Amsterdam en het Groene Hart. Vanuit het rivierengebied loopt het Amsterdam-Rijnkanaal door Centraal Holland over in het Noordzeekanaal. De sluizen en het gemaal- en spuicomplex in IJmuiden verbinden het kanaal met de Noordzee. Centraal Holland herbergt bijna een kwart van de Nederlandse bevolking, levert dag en nacht een cruciale bijdrage aan de economie en gaat op de schop voor een groot aantal nationale en regionale bouw- en ontwikkelopgaven. Tegelijk is het gebied heel kwetsbaar. De zeespiegel stijgt en de bodem daalt. De grenzen van het watersysteem zijn bereikt. Het gebied is nu al zeer gevoelig voor wateroverlast én watertekort. De omvang, complexiteit en samenhang van de opgaven in het gebied vragen om een brede maatschappelijke afweging.
Centraal Holland doorloopt in 2023 een proces om als deelgebied in het Deltaprogramma vertegenwoordigd te zijn. Om de opgaven voor waterveiligheid, zoetwater en ruimtelijke adaptatie te bundelen, samen met de ruimtelijke sector op te pakken en sturend te maken voor de ruimtelijke ontwikkeling, heeft Centraal Holland een effectieve vertegenwoordiging in het Deltaprogramma nodig.

Name: CannaSpace
Description:
CannaSpace is a new social media app & marketplace built for the cannabis space in mind. The 2.0 version will be the world's 1st private & world's 1st collective social media where users have control and buy-in.

CannaSpace will be for adults only. We will use KYC methods to ensure a user is an adult.

By private, I mean it will be privatized:

1. Users will have the ability to have anonymity.

2. It will have functionality where users can control which friends can see which content a user posts.

3. Messaging will have PGP (pretty good privacy) end to end encryption; the search action will have functionality which protects users and their privacy.

4. We will attempt to disable the device screenshot action or block it so other users cannot capture your content to share outside of our space.

5. We will limit the ability to copy visible data from the space.

6. Users retain the ownership rights of their own data.
(Every other social media makes you sign a user agreement. In this user agreement, the company tells you that as soon as you post content/data to their platform, you forfeit your ownership rights of your own content/data, and that the social media company takes ownership of your content/data. They state that they can & will do anything they want with your data, and they do.)

7. We will not share or sell a user's data without their consent.


It will be collective & users will have control in the sense:

1. We will often poll users or changes we want to make & for many changes we want, we will let the users vote on whether or not to make the change.

2. We will allow our users to submit feedback or suggestions to us. We will reward a user that makes a submission/suggestion to us that we utilize. Most likely with a financial incentive. (YES! We're going to pay you.)

3. We will allow users to edit & change the UI of their profile and homepage.

4. Users will have the option & ability to buy company shares and essentially become an investor.

+ more 2 come.

Name: Online Marketing & Graphic Design
Description:
Digital Marketing:

Digital marketing refers to the practice of using various digital channels and tactics to promote and sell products or services. It encompasses a wide range of activities, such as search engine optimization (SEO), pay-per-click (PPC) advertising, email marketing, social media marketing, content marketing, and more.

In digital marketing, the ultimate goal is to reach and engage with the target audience, build brand awareness, and drive conversions. Digital marketers use a variety of tools and techniques to achieve these goals, such as analytics tools to track and measure performance, A/B testing to optimize campaigns, and marketing automation to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.

In today's digital age, digital marketing is essential for businesses of all sizes to remain competitive and reach their customers where they spend their time - online.

Graphic Design:

Graphic design refers to the art of creating visual content, such as images, logos, and layouts, to communicate a message or idea. Graphic designers use various elements such as typography, color, and composition to create visually appealing and impactful designs.

In the digital age, graphic design plays a crucial role in creating the visual identity of a brand or product. Graphic designers work with clients to understand their goals and requirements, and then use their creative skills to bring those ideas to life. They may create designs for a variety of media, such as print materials, websites, social media, and more.

Good graphic design not only looks aesthetically pleasing but also helps to communicate a message or story effectively. It can also enhance brand recognition and loyalty, and ultimately contribute to the success of a business or organization.

Name: Young Eurasian Scholars Network
Description:
About Us:

The Young Eurasian Scholars Network is a vibrant community of young political analysts dedicated to fostering a deeper understanding of the Eurasian region. Our network goes beyond the traditional boundaries, encompassing all regions of the vast and diverse Eurasian continent. We bring together passionate young scholars and enthusiasts with a shared interest in the region's politics, history, culture, and socio-economic dynamics.

Mission:

Our mission is to create a dynamic platform that promotes collaboration, knowledge-sharing, and cooperation among the next generation of Eurasian researchers, analysts, scholars, and enthusiasts. By breaking down geographical barriers and transcending disciplinary boundaries, we aim to cultivate a rich and multidimensional perspective on the complex issues facing the Eurasian region.

What We Do:

Yearly Summits: We organize annual summits that serve as a focal point for intellectual exchange and engagement. Through these gatherings, participants can explore emerging topics, cutting-edge research, and innovative ideas shaping the Eurasian landscape.

Research Conferences: Our network hosts research conferences that provide young scholars with the opportunity to present their work, receive feedback from peers and seasoned experts, and foster collaborations that transcend borders.

Expert Workshops: We facilitate workshop programs connecting young scholars with experienced professionals. This initiative aims to nurture talent, guide research endeavours, and encourage novel approaches to studying the region's intricacies.

Joint Initiatives: The Young Eurasian Scholars Network actively encourages and supports joint initiatives among its members. Collaborative projects not only enhance the quality of research but also promote cross-cultural understanding and cooperation.

Name: The Haurun Club
Description:
The Haurun Club: Where Trust Meets Privilege

Our founder emerged from the council estates of East London and Essex, navigating a torrent of change that reshaped life for himself and his immediate family. It was amidst this backdrop of transformation—where resilience and ambition became daily companions—that the vision for The Haurun Club first took root. 

Shaped by these formative experiences, The Haurun Club was conceived as a sanctuary built on absolute trust, rigorously excluding fakes and individuals whose presence would undermine its ethos with negativity or destructive intent. Membership is strictly by invitation, and those selected engage through our private social networking platform and at exclusive, members-only events and gatherings.

Founded in the heart of London in 2022, The Haurun Club stands as a rarefied haven for the world’s most influential leaders, entrepreneurs, and the social elite. More than a club, it is a digital sanctuary—rooted in luxury and privilege—where access itself is the ultimate distinction. Here, luminaries from across the globe connect within a carefully curated environment, where refinement, opportunity, and trust are the foundation stones.

Exclusivity is not simply a promise at The Haurun Club; it is the very lifeblood of our community. 

The club was established with a singular vision: to create an environment where the privilege of belonging transcends material wealth, measured instead by one’s influence and the integrity of connections formed.

Guided by the belief that true modern luxury is defined by access and meaningful relationships, The Haurun Club reimagines the timeless adage, “Membership has its privileges,” positioning itself as a testament to the idea that influence and opportunity are today’s most coveted currencies.

SOOKSOOK

        L’identification est un élément clé de notre approche, nous fournissons des outils pour identifier les dangers, les risques, les zones, les implantations, la signalisation, les équipements, le matériel et l’outillage. Nous avons également une forte dimension sécurité-prévention, avec une dématérialisation des formulaires de sécurité tels que les travaux en hauteur, la consignation, le moment sécurité, l’analyse de risque, etc.

        Nous proposons plus de 10 formulaires de prévention pour différents moments sécurité tels que pour les électriciens, les mécaniciens, les professionnels du génie civil, les monteurs d’échafaudages, les peintres, etc. 
Nous mettons également à votre disposition des outils pour le suivi et la traçabilité tels que des rapports, des historiques, des inventaires, des plans, des schémas, des documentations, des stocks, des inspections, des dépannages, la fiabilité, le retour d’intervention, la remontée d’anomalie et d’ archivages.

La communication est également une priorité, avec la possibilité de s’abonner, de contacter, d’obtenir des informations, de faire de la planification d'évènement, des tâches à faire, d’interagir, de garantir la transparence et la disponibilité ainsi qu'un module de visioconférence.

Name: LetTalk
Description:
LetTalk est le réseau social ultime qui vous met en contact avec les personnes de votre communauté locale et internationale. Vous pouvez tout y trouver : Stories, Rencontres, Actualité, Buzz, Photos, Vidéos et bien plus.

L'application est divisée en 2 modes:

1) Le mode LetTalk ou réseau social

Suivez vos ami(e)s, partagez votre quotidien ou découvrez les dernières infos d’autres personnes à travers le monde. Parcourez votre communauté, où vous vous sentirez libre d’être vous-même et de partager tout ce que vous voulez, de vos instants quotidiens à vos meilleurs moments.

Exprimez-vous et communiquez avec les gens proches de chez vous :
- Publiez des statuts, photos et vidéos dans votre fil d'actualité
- Échangez des messages instantanés avec vos ami(e)s.
- Faites des rencontres amoureuses avec les célibataires
- Poster ou commenter anonymement

LetTalk vous offre plusieurs fonctionnalités intéressantes :
- Filtrer le fil d'actualité par les plus récents, populaires, vidéos, photos
- Définir le rayon de recherche des publications
- Être Anonyme ou non afin de ne plus créer plusieurs comptes fake
- S'abonner aux chaînes locales et communes
- Suivre les personnes (Talker) autour de vous

2) Le mode FLOV pour le Dating avec les célibataires proches de chez vous.

LetTalk propose également le mode FLOV (Flirt & Love) uniquement dédié aux rencontres amoureuses qui a déjà mis en relation plus de personnes que n'importe quelle autre application de rencontre au Cameroun, Abidjan et partout ailleurs. Nous sommes toujours à vos côtés pour vous aider à faire de nouvelles rencontres.

Le principe de FLOV est très simple et efficace: Matchez, Discutez, Rencontrez-vous. Si une personne vous plaît, Swipez vers la droite sur son profil. Sinon, Swipez vers la gauche. Lorsque quelqu'un like aussi votre profil, c'est un Match ! Et vous pouvez commencer à chatter.

Rejoignez nous sur FLOV, la plus grande communauté de jeunes et de célibataires au monde.

Được khởi xướng bởi Phái đoàn Liên minh châu Âu tại Việt Nam, mạng lưới Cựu Du học sinh EU (EU Alumni Network - EAN) là sáng kiến nhằm tạo ra một nền tảng chất lượng cao, kết nối với cựu sinh viên đến từ các chương trình giáo dục khác nhau do Liên minh châu Âu và các Quốc gia Thành viên điều hành.
 Tháng 10/2022, Mạng lưới EAN chính thức được ra mắt với mục tiêu thúc đẩy các tương tác, đối thoại và quan hệ đối tác, thông qua các hoạt động góp phần vào hiểu biết chung về các nguyên tắc, giá trị và chính sách của EU, tăng tiềm năng hợp tác trong tương lai giữa EU và Việt Nam.
 Nếu bạn từng đi du học tại một Quốc gia Thành viên EU và mong muốn tham gia Mạng lưới, mời bạn đăng ký tại đây: https://bit.ly/ean-registration 
-----
 Initiated by the European Union Delegation to Vietnam, the EU Alumni Network (EAN) is an initiative aimed at creating a high-quality platform connecting alumni from various educational programs funded by the European Union and its member states.
 In October 2022, the EAN was officially launched to foster interactions, dialogue, and partnerships through activities contributing to a common understanding of EU principles, values, and policies, and enhance cooperation potential between the EU and Vietnam in the future.
 If you have studied in an EU member state and wish to join the network, please register here: https://bit.ly/ean-registration

Name: Equedi
Description:
At Equedi, we're building a social network that will be with students throughout their entire academic journey and where their data is owned by them. Equedi is a privacy-centric academic social network where students have equitable access to a professional network of peers, colleges, programs, and careers in order to achieve personal success. Equedi will not only teach students the benefits of networking and building a resume earlier, but will also enable student communities, even global ones, to thrive and stay connected. Through our partners, students will also be able to discover relevant opportunities, such as summer programs & scholarships, so they can pursue their dreams. 

Equedi is a safe digital space for students to connect. The Equedi platform is protected by the leading content moderation API, has safeguards in place to prevent bullying and harassment, and uses best-in-practice data security, such as encryption in transit and at rest, to ensure students have a safe place to professionally network & put their best foot forward. Finally, Equedi doesn’t use K-12 student data for targeted advertising and never sells identifiable data. We don’t want to skirt around data privacy laws, we want to champion them.

***Our Manifesto***

Who We Are: 

We are All Good People—a diverse, vibrant community of kind-hearted, talented, and ambitious individuals from all walks of life. *We believe in the power of diversity—in backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences—to enrich our community and expand our collective potential.
*We believe that growth is not just about accumulating wealth but about enriching lives—socially, creatively, intellectually, and emotionally.

Our Purpose: 

AGP exists to foster meaningful interactions that infuse Social, Human, Creative, and Financial Capital into the lives of our members. We are committed to making the world more connected, compassionate, and exciting by providing a platform where good people can meet, learn, share, and grow—both online and offline.

How We Connect:

*Open Access: We are not an exclusive club; we are a welcoming community. We offer free membership to ensure accessibility for all, believing that great ideas and meaningful connections thrive in open and inclusive environments.
*Curated Streams and Topics: We understand that each person has unique interests and goals. That’s why we are organized into dynamic groups and niche sub-groups, allowing members to find their tribe and deepen their connections based on shared passions.
*Attraction, Not Promotion: We don’t chase new members; we attract them. Our growth is driven by the satis.

Name: TableNetwork
Description:
TableNetwork is an empowering space for dynamic business owners and entrepreneurs to share experiences, avoid pitfalls and grow.
Join the community by posting this URL into your browser: https://bit.ly/JoinUs_TableNetwork
Learn, inspire, educate, collaborate and ultimately celebrate success together. 

Business owners often spend thousands on advisors every month to help them take their business to the next level. Non-Execs provide experience but they sometimes lack relevance. They can feel out of touch. And often they can feel uninvested in your business. 

The bottom line is that good support mitigates risk, increases adaptability, enables sustained growth, and often much more. 

In an ideal world business owners would sit around a table together each month and, instead of competing, they would be advisors for each other. They would help each other navigate challenges and steer each other around the changing market. Taking part would lower the risk of getting irrelevant or unknowledgeable advice and thereby reduce risk and increase opportunities. Businesses would grow sustainably by efficiently solving problems and navigating changes to their market’s landscape. 
This ideal world exists. It’s called TableNetwork. 
Welcome to modern business.

Name: Mentorplan
Description:
Mentorplan – Beskæftigelsesrettede indsatser, ungeindsatser og sociale indsatser (§85)

 Beskæftigelsesrettede indsatser
Mentorplan hjælper borgere med at finde og fastholde job. Vi møder borgerne, hvor de er – både fagligt og personligt – og tilrettelægger indsatsen efter behov. Vi tilbyder afklaring af jobmuligheder, CV- og ansøgningshjælp, praktik- og løntilskudsforløb samt opfølgning og støtte til fastholdelse i jobbet. Vi har et stærkt virksomhedsnetværk og sikrer konkrete jobmuligheder.

 Ungeindsatser
Vi arbejder med unge, der ikke trives, er på vej ud i et usundt miljø eller er i kriminalitet. Vi samarbejder tæt med Kriminalforsorgen, Jobcenter, psykiatri, skoler og misbrugscentre for at sikre en samlet indsats. Forløbene omfatter UKN-forløb, håndtering af misbrug og psykiske udfordringer, etablering af fritidsjob og ADL-træning (økonomi, bolig, struktur). Vi fungerer som en stabil støtte og hjælper med at træffe de rigtige valg.

 Sociale indsatser (§85)
Vi tilbyder støtte i hjemmet, hjælp til økonomi, netværk og struktur i hverdagen. Indsatsen tilpasses den enkelte og kan inkludere ADL-træning og støtte til sociale relationer.

 Helhedsorienteret tilgang
Vi samarbejder med Kriminalforsorgen, Fodlængeteamet, Jobcenter, psykiatri, skoler, misbrugscentre, praktiksteder og frivillige organisationer som Gadejuristen, Retshjælpen og Café Exit.

 Mentorplan består af erfarne ildsjæle med baggrund i politi, socialområdet og beskæftigelse. Vi arbejder struktureret og professionelt for at skabe varige resultater.

 Læs mere på www.mentorplan.dk

Name: People Like Me
Description:
The city is full of women like you – strong and ambitious, carrying the weight of teams, targets, and often toddlers, but where are these women? 

Truth bomb: spending another Tuesday night scrolling through Linkedin, pretending those 47 'meaningful new connections' are actually meaning something is a lie. They don't.

That's why we created People Like Me, the anti-networking network for women in marketing. No podiums, No pitches and No Powerpoints. Just real women having real conversations that only happen when you find your people. 

Our community emerged from a simple observation: traditional networking events aren't serving our deeper need for meaningful relationships. Big events, conferences and conventions don't cut it. We want small, intimate and informal connections. 

We're for women who are over perfectly curated LinkedIn posts and would kill for an honest conversation about a big challenge, a new role or just wanting to connect after a bad day at the office. 

Brilliant women, being brilliantly human, in London, a city that sometimes feels like it was designed by an algorithm.

Name: Working Group on Indigenous Food Sovereignty
Description:
The Working Group on Indigenous Food Sovereignty (WGIFS) is an Indigenous-led network dedicated to advancing Indigenous food sovereignty through relationship-building, knowledge mobilization, and systems transformation.

For over two decades, WGIFS has supported Indigenous communities, leaders, and networks in strengthening land- and food-based practices rooted in Indigenous law, governance, and biocultural heritage. Our work centers Indigenous leadership while engaging allies, institutions, and decision-makers to address the systemic conditions shaping food insecurity, land dispossession, and environmental injustice.

WGIFS works at the intersection of land, food, health, and governance, advancing decolonizing approaches to food systems that move beyond income-based solutions toward structural change. This includes supporting Indigenous foodland conservation, rematriation of land, community-led food economies, and land-based healing and wellness.

Through research, facilitation, education, and movement-building—including initiatives such as the Toolkit for Indigenous Food Sovereignty, the Wild Salmon Caravan, and the Indigenous Food and Freedom School—WGIFS contributes practical tools, critical analysis, and ethical frameworks to support accountability in policy, planning, and practice.

We work alongside Indigenous Nations, organizers, and communities, as well as allies in research, philanthropy, government, and civil society, to foster cooperation, restore Indigenous foodlands, and build just and regenerative food systems for present and future generations.

Name: Up4
Description:
Remember the days when grabbing a quick bite or drink with friends was effortless? If not, you aren't alone.

Introducing Up4—the app that helps you stop scrolling through other people's memories and start making your own again.

Think of Up4 as a modern "away message" for when you're up for doing something—no matter how simple or spontaneous. Whether it's catching a game with your football buddies or letting a few friends know your meeting was cancelled and you're free for lunch, Up4 makes it easy. It’s not about sending invites; it's about passively letting a few specific people know what, where, and when you're doing something.

We all have those moments when we want to reach out but stop ourselves—thinking our friends are too busy, or that it’s been too long. With Up4, you can skip the uncertainty and go straight to doing. No pressure, no formalities—just genuine reconnections with the people who matter.

Up4 isn’t about making new friends or gaining followers. It’s about reconnecting with those you already have. Consider it a drawbridge to your personal life: when it's GREEN, you’re up for something; when it’s RED, you’re not. Simple.

Our goal is to strip the "media" out of social media and bring back real, meaningful connections. Let your friends know what you're Up4—they're probably up for something too.

Join us on Up4 and make those moments happen again.

Con RoomIn, puedes crear fácilmente salas de Zoom públicas que son visibles para toda la comunidad, lo que facilita la conexión con otras personas que comparten tus intereses, pasiones y objetivos.

Crear una sala de Zoom en RoomIn es sencillo y directo. Solo elige un título para tu sala y selecciona entre una amplia variedad de temas que reflejen mejor tus intereses. Desde negocios y educación hasta socialización y networking, hay un tema para todos.

Una vez que hayas creado tu sala, será visible para toda la comunidad de RoomIn durante 40 minutos. Esto le da a cualquiera que esté interesado en unirse la oportunidad de conectarse contigo y participar en tu reunión virtual. Si necesitas planificar con anticipación, RoomIn te permite programar tu sala hasta con dos semanas de anticipación, para que todos tengan suficiente tiempo para asistir.

El número de usuarios que pueden unirse a tu sala está determinado por el tipo de cuenta de Zoom que tengas. Ya sea que estés usando una cuenta gratuita o una suscripción paga, RoomIn facilita la conexión con otros y el compartir tus experiencias virtuales.

Pero RoomIn es más que una plataforma para alojar reuniones y eventos virtuales. Es una comunidad de personas afines que están apasionadas por mantenerse conectadas, compartir ideas y construir relaciones en un mundo virtual. Con RoomIn, puedes descubrir nuevas personas, unirte a conversaciones sobre una variedad de temas e incluso crear tus propios eventos virtuales.

¿Por qué esperar? Descarga RoomIn hoy mismo y únete a la creciente comunidad de usuarios que están utilizando la tecnología para mantenerse conectados, compartir experiencias y construir relaciones en un mundo virtual.

Living abroad is a journey and it’s easier when we do it together. Whether you are a brand seeking growth or a professional looking for a reliable network, Biz Bize provide the tools to help you succeed.

Name: Spark Social
Description:
Spark Social is a purpose-driven innovation ecosystem that enables people to mobilize capital with purpose—transforming action into lasting wealth across financial, personal, and social dimensions. At the heart of Spark Social is a bold belief: true wealth is not measured in dollars alone, but in purpose, wellbeing, and shared values.
Our mission is simple yet transformative: “mobilizing capital with purpose to build lasting wealth.”
Spark Social is built as a Total Value Ecosystem, bringing together individuals, organizations, and communities to co-create value that is financially viable, personally fulfilling, and socially impactful.
At the centre of this ecosystem is Spark Village (Grow with Purpose) — a wellbeing and community investing platform dedicated to advancing the purpose pillar of Spark Social. It is designed for individuals, corporates, and institutions to channel purpose-driven capital and action-based activities toward building community capacity and shared wellbeing, transforming the way people and organizations invest in a better future.
Spark Village creates value through its wellbeing investing model, which connects Purpose Capital, community participation, and wellbeing engagement within one cohesive platform. It guides individuals and organizations to enhance their financial, lifelong learning, mental & physical, and social wellbeing—building the foundations for sustainable growth.
By linking the act of contribution with the experience of growth, it transforms purpose into practice—aligning financial resources and human actions to strengthen resilience, enrich wellbeing, and sustain lasting wealth.

Name: Steez
Description:
Steelo is a revolutionary platform designed to redefine the relationship between creatives, fans, and investors in the digital creative industry. By leveraging Polygon 2.0’s blockchain technology, Steelo aims to establish a decentralized web and mobile platform where all participants benefit through revenue generation, profit sharing, social standing, and entertainment.

The primary goal of Steelo is to enable creatives to thrive independently, shifting the focus from quantity to quality in artistic output, creating a social investment platform, and adapting to the rapidly evolving digital art, NFT market, and social media landscape. The platform caters to two primary audiences: Content Creators and Fans/Investors, offering them various features including a token marketplace, customizable spaces for brand building, and a dedicated hub for fostering community.

Steelo's unique selling point is the integration of token-ownership into every feature of the platform, allowing benefits such as group chat access and exclusive content to be tied directly to token ownership. This not only strengthens Steelo's value proposition but also enhances the user experience.

The company generates revenue through a commission on the value of first-hand and second-hand Creator token sales, a portion of the value of Creator subscriptions, the cost of Creator placement ads, and the price of Steelo Tokens.

In summary, Steelo is poised to disrupt the current creative industry dynamics by directly addressing artist and fan challenges, offering a secure and compliant platform, and creating a mutually beneficial ecosystem. Through diligent monitoring of KPIs and agility in the face of regulatory changes, Steelo is optimally positioned to succeed in the evolving creative industry.

Name: Textmi - Prioritising Privacy
Description:
Txtend is an instant messaging platform where you can send messages and multimedia the most secure way possible. Because, we believe privacy is a fundamental right for everyone. The mission of Txtend is to ensure that no user data is tracked or used for any kind of benefit of any third party.

Txtend is built using state-of-the-art encrypted peer-to-peer network which eliminates the need of a central storage server and hence making it impossible to track or record any form of private user information.

We are proud to share that Txtend is entirely envisioned and developed in India, by Indians from scratch. ‘Txtend’ is a product by Interesting Technologies Private Limited, India.
