Name: RedAbissi España
Description:
Nosotros somos “social", ¿y vosotros?
 No pienses  en el clásico laboratorio de contenidos, para eso hay profesionales mucho mejor preparados que nosotros. En Redabissi nos ocupamos del Social Trade Marketing. Nos gusta dialogar con los minoristas y las marcas que creen aún en el importantísimo y fundamental rol que juega el punto de venta físico.
¿Nuestro cliente típico? Fácil, empresas interesadas en las micro comunidades de sus socios comerciales (¿y quién no?), deseosas de tomar de la mano a los comerciantes  y acompañarlos al éxito de las ventas en tienda. "Pero estas empresas tienen sus propias agencias de comunicación", y bla, bla, bla... Qué fastidio!!! Cuántas veces lo hemos explicado: NO SOMOS UNA AGENCIA DE COMUNICACIÓN "CLÁSICA", HACEMOS QUE LAS EMPRESAS SE COMUNIQUEN CON LOS CONSUMIDORES A TRAVÉS DE LOS CANALES SOCIALES DE SUS MINORISTAS!
¿Simple? Probad a preguntarle a vuestro Social Media Manager o a vuestra agencia: extenderán los brazos, os mirarán a los ojos y os explicarán que pensar en publicar un post simultáneamente en las páginas sociales de 100, o incluso "solo" 50, minoristas es una empresa titánica, con casi ninguna posibilidad de éxito y altos costos.
También os explicarán que sería fantástico tener una herramienta que pueda hacer "esa cosa", y aquí es donde entramos nosotros, el muy de moda Redabissi, listo para colaborar con empresas y  agencias.
Después de todo, si Costa Crociere, Aboca, Hoya, Peg Perego, Nomination y al menos otras 100 grandes empresas están trabajando con nosotros, debe haber una razón!
Se me olvidaba: Social Trade Marketing.
¿Te parece increíble? Contáctanos y hablemos de ello

Name: Kommunity
Description:
Dans un monde du travail en pleine évolution, il est essentiel de renforcer les liens entre collègues, de favoriser l’engagement et d’améliorer le bien-être au travail. 

C’est ce que propose Kommunity, une solution clé en main permettant aux entreprises de bâtir une véritable communauté interne, à leur image.

Kommunity offre une plateforme privée et personnalisée avec des modules activables à la carte, adaptés aux enjeux spécifiques de chaque entreprise :

 Marketplace interne : Achat, vente, prêt ou don d’objets entre collègues pour promouvoir la seconde main et la circularité.
 Échanges de services : Favorisez l'entraide et les partages de compétences entre collaborateurs.
 Organisation d’événements et d’activités : Créez des moments de convivialité pour renforcer l’esprit d’équipe.
 Covoiturage : Encouragez les déplacements partagés pour une mobilité plus durable.
 Sondages et défis collectifs : Impliquez vos équipes dans des initiatives internes engageantes.
 Concours et récompenses : Valorisez l’implication de vos collaborateurs et créez une dynamique positive.
 Communication interne : Un fil d’actualités et des espaces d’échange pour fluidifier les interactions au sein de l’entreprise.

Kommunity ne se limite pas à créer du lien : il favorise un bien-être durable en entreprise en améliorant l’engagement, en renforçant la culture d’entreprise et en réduisant l’isolement professionnel. De plus, notre approche écoresponsable encourage la réutilisation des ressources et réduit l’empreinte écologique des organisations.

Des acteurs majeurs comme Proximus, les Cliniques Universitaires Saint-Luc et la Clinique Notre-Dame de Grâce ont déjà fait confiance à Kommunity pour renforcer la cohésion interne et répondre aux enjeux du bien-être au travail et de la durabilité.

Prêts à transformer votre entreprise en une communauté engagée et soudée ?

Born out of the 𝗛𝗮𝗿𝘃𝗮𝗿𝗱 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗟𝗮𝗯, WndrTrip is backed by a founding team from Harvard Business School and Harvard School of Engineering. We’re getting ready to launch - and we’re building the go-to brand for the next generation of travel.

𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗪𝗲 𝗗𝗼
Our platform brings together three groups:
1. 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘀 - influencers, experts, and storytellers.
2. 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗿𝘀 - travelers who crave authentic and social adventures.
3. 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 & 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿𝘀 - local hosts, guides, and providers who deliver immersive experiences.

𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝗜𝘁 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
WndrTrip provides the technology that powers discovery, booking, payments, logistics, and community engagement - so creators can focus on storytelling, explorers on discovery, and local partners on hospitality.

𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗜𝘁 𝗠𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀
Travel isn’t just about places; it’s about people and platforms that connect them. WndrTrip is building the future of social and community-driven travel.

Name: NZNH
Description:
NzNh : Soutenir la Nouvelle Génération du Cinéma 
Le cinéma évolue, mais les inégalités, la centralisation et la précarité des artistes et techniciens persistent. L'intermittence du spectacle, déjà fragile, va continuer d'être mise à rude épreuve ces prochaines années.

 Pourtant, une nouvelle génération est en train de transformer l'industrie. Nous voulons être à leurs côtés pour l'accompagner et l'aider à façonner un cinéma plus accessible, plus humain et plus collaboratif.

C'est pourquoi nous avons créé NzNh , une application pensée par et pour les artistes et techniciens , avec trois piliers fondamentaux :
 Faciliter les échanges grâce à notre mise en relation.
Élever son esprit avec une librairie de ressources précieuses.
 Structurer son parcours grâce à une feuille de route claire et actionnable.

Sur un marché aussi vaste, nous avons fait un choix audacieux : individualiser l'expérience . Plutôt qu'une plateforme généraliste, nous avons conçu un outil sur-mesure , un véritable espace de travail collaboratif , où chaque talent peut évoluer à son propre rythme, avec des ressources et un réseau adapté à ses ambitions.

Ce projet, lancé en solitaire, s'est aujourd'hui transformé en une aventure collective : nous sommes 5 entrepreneurs, issus de milieux différents, mais animés par une vision commune .

Une nouvelle génération arrive, plus engagée, plus sensible aux enjeux environnementaux, sociétaux et artistiques . Le cinéma que nous regardons aujourd'hui façonne les talents que nous rencontrerons demain .

Mon écrivain préféré disait : « Dans la vie, il faut bien être quelque part. »
Nous avons choisi d'être partout , aux côtés de ceux qui créent, innovent et transforment le 7ᵉ art.

Nous soutenons, c'est soutenir le cinéma de demain.
 Nous rejoindre, c'est rejoindre un mouvement.

Deze kandidaten melden zich aan op ons platform. Ze kunnen rustig afwachten tot bedrijven hen benaderen die echt aansluiten bij hun wensen en eisen. Dit geeft bedrijven de kans om direct in contact te komen met gemotiveerde professionals die perfect passen bij hun organisatie.

Elke maand kun je als bedrijf onbeperkt zoektochten starten. Voor iedere zoektocht zetten we gerichte campagnes op die jouw vacatures promoten onder relevante kandidaten. Het resultaat? Een constante instroom van gekwalificeerd talent, volledig afgestemd op jouw behoeften.

De kandidaten die niet worden benaderd, blijven beschikbaar voor andere bedrijven. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat talent nooit verloren gaat en altijd de juiste plek vindt.

Wil jij jouw vacatures op een efficiënte en moderne manier invullen? Neem contact met ons op en ontdek hoe MoreToWork jouw wervingsproces naar een hoger niveau tilt.

Description:
There's a global social media fatigue, and connections online feel superficial, which leaves many people lonely. That's why we created PenPal, a social matching platform for building meaningful relationships with a physical touch. Members can chat, and create postcards digitally, that are then sent physically via mail without ever sharing their address publicly.

PenPal is a platform for thoughtful communication, where people can connect and share exciting stories and passions with new friends to build lasting relationships. To achieve that, we bridge the gap between digital and physical communication.

You match with like-minded members from across the globe and communicate through personalized postcards and direct messages with each other. Writing a real card fosters genuine communication, and people can slow down from the daily pace of life.

Our members are part of an open and safe community where everyone is welcome – and can be themselves. You can learn about languages, countries, cultures, and traditions. We hope to contribute with that to a more inclusive, tolerant, and understanding society on a global scale.

Målet er å skape mulighet for nye bekjentskaper og samarbeid i området din arbeidsplass opererer i eller for deg personlig.

Vi avslutter med lunsj for de som ønsker det og som bonus kan du oppleve nye spennende arenaer i regionen ved hvert treff.  

Walk In The Park Hamar passer for alle og er kostnadsfritt  -  enten du søker å utvide dine bekjentskaper, kundenettverk, nye forretningskontakter eller kanskje du er på utkikk etter nye/andre jobbmuligheter?

Name: Çalışan Mutluluğu Hareketi
Description:
Çalışan Mutluluğu Hareketi

Çalışan Mutluluğu Hareketi, Mutluluk Ofisi tarafından desteklenen bir sosyal sorumluluk hareketidir. Amacımız, ülkemizde çalışan mutluluğunun önemine dikkat çekmek ve bu alandaki farkındalığı artırmaktır. 

İnanıyoruz ki, mutluluk paylaştıkça artar ve küçük katkılar büyük değişimlere vesile olabilir. Hareketimiz, yılların birikimiyle oluşturulan deneyimlerin ışığında, çalışanların mutluluğunu artırmayı ve pozitif bir etki yaratmayı hedeflemektedir.

Çalışan Mutluluğu Hareketi aracılığıyla yapacağınız katkı ve destekler sayesinde toplumumuz için büyük bir fayda yaratabileceğinize, bu faydanın ise sizde çok olumlu bir etki bırakacağına inanıyoruz. Harekete geçerek çalışan mutluluğu ile ilgili başkaları için bir şeyler yapmayı daha özgür, şeffaf ve kolay hale getirmek istiyoruz.

Siz de bu harekete katılarak toplumumuz için önemli bir fark yaratabilirsiniz. Başkaları için bir şey yaptığımız her an, bizi daha iyi bir kişi ve toplumumuzu daha iyi bir yer haline getirir. Her bir eylem bir diğerine ilham verir. Siz de bizimle birlikte bu önemli konuda fark yaratmak ve ülkemizde çalışan mutluluğunun ciddiye alınmasını sağlamak için bize katılabilirsiniz!

Unutmayın, Mutluluk Ciddi Bir İştir!

Name: SoulMatcher - Premium Dating App
Description:
We are excited to introduce you to our cutting-edge startup that is poised to revolutionize the social apps landscape. We are here to meet the increasing demand for social connections and provide innovative solutions to individuals seeking meaningful  relationships.

We understand that current social and dating apps have been criticized for issues like inaccurate matching, poor user experience, and negative impact on mental health and safety. That's why we have leveraged the expertise of mental health professionals to provide accessible assessments and help individuals improve their overall experiences and find their perfect matches.

At SoulMatcher, we are at the intersection of three most growing markets: dating, psychology and HR. Our improved AI matching algorithms are based on personality type and relationship potential assessments, offering users limited matches with other users who have the highest potential for building strong relationships.

We prioritize the mental health and well-being of our users and provide support, including access to mental health professionals and support groups.  

Our app has two modes for finding a soulmate, conventional mode, where you can map by standard filters, and innovative mode, where you can map based on personality, including the shadow sides of personality. We offer a freemium model, with free features such as matching, profile customization, and chatting, as well as premium features such as incognito mode, AI matching by geolocation, etc.

Our team consists of experts in psychology, marketing, UX, development, and project management, with a passion and commitment to delivering an innovative solution.  

At SoulMatcher, we believe that love is always an action. Sign up today and take the simple steps to start your journey to finding your perfect match based on science and psychology, not just photos or flashy words.

Name: BUZZOONS
Description:
Obsah na sociální sítě od A až po (Gen) Z.

Nastartovali jsme třeba TikTok HELL Energy, který během 5 měsíců nasbíral 135k sledujících a stal se nejsledovanějším mezi energetickými nápoji v Česku. Tvořili jsme virály pro Škoda Auto, Xiaomi nebo Koupelny Syrový. 

Umíme virály a správu sociálních sítí, rozumíme trendům. Ať už vaše sociální sítě potřebují klasickou údržbu, nebo radikální proBUZZení, jsme vaši lidé. Pomáháme značkám zaujmout na platformách, kde vyrůstá další generace zákazníků.
Vytváříme obsah, který rezZonuje. Od strategie přes videoprodukci až po community management. Z malých značek děláme větší, těm velkým pomáháme rozšířit online revír. Rozumíme (nejen) mladé cílovce Gen a Alpha. A když je třeba, jsme rychlí jako střela – videa z eventu dodáme do 12 hodin.

Svěřte nám:
 Kompletní videoprodukci a virální obsah (TikTok, IG Reels, Shorts)
 Social media a community management
 Copywriting
 Influencer marketing
 Kreativní koncepty & strategii

Úspěchy:
 HELL Energy: 135k sledujících na TikToku za 5 měsíců
 Škoda Auto: globální virály s milionovými dosahy
 Xiaomi ČR: přes 82k sledujících bez placené propagace
 Koupelny Syrový: videa, co přivedla zákazníky do prodejen
 IAMWORK: tisíce sledujících i poptávky přes noc
 Red Bull & Rock for People: video kampaně, které frčely

Kdo jsme? 
Začali to dva bratranci, kteří prožívali dětská dobrodružství v Orlických horách a teď sdílejí vášeň pro tvorbu smysluplného obsahu. Dan v roce 2021 tvořil první videa pod názvem Kluci z Myčky. Přidal se Dominik a společně projekt proměnili ve virální hit. Pak se zrodili BUZZOONS – divoká tlupa, která pomáhá firmám vyniknout v obsahové džungli. Jsme akční a kreativní – trochu babooni, co rozumí TikToku i algoritmu. S nadšením tvoříme obsah, který zaujme a vyvolá ten pravý bZzukot kolem značek našich klientů. Vytáhneme z vás to nejlepší a ukážeme to světu. A hlavně: umíme vyvolat po umíme vyvolat pořádný BUZZ. 
 Virální obsah, který posune vaší značku!

Name: Sea Way
Description:
(English below)

Sea Way APS è un’associazione che nasce dalla presa di coscienza del problema dello skill mismatch, ovvero la divergenza tra le informazioni acquisite durante un ordinario percorso di studi e le competenze richieste dalle imprese.
Le conseguenze di tale problema sono apprezzabili in termini di tempo e denaro che le imprese devono impiegare per formare i neoassunti.

Muovendo da questo presupposto, Sea Way fornisce un concreto aiuto ai giovani laureati che vogliono lavorare nel settore “Blue Economy”, assicurandosi che questi abbiano le competenze richieste dalle imprese del settore, di tal modo, garantendo un vantaggio competitivo in sede di colloquio. 

Nel nostro piano d’azione, i vertici sono l’Università degli Studi di Genova, le imprese operanti nel settore marittimo, e le società che impartiscono corsi di formazione. In questo triangolo, Sea Way si pone all’esatto centro.

Sea Way APS is an association that was born from the recognition of the “skill mismatch” issue, that is the difference between what students learn during their studies and what companies require them to do. As a consequence, such companies have to invest time and money in training new hires.

From this assumption, Sea Way provides a concrete aid to young graduates who want to work in the “Blue Economy”, having care that they have the skills that companies require and, by doing that, guaranteeing a plus during job interviews.

Our roadmap develops between Università degli Studi di Genova, the companies operating in the maritime field, and companies that provide training courses. Within this triangle, Sea Way put itself in the very middle.

Name: Offline Women
Description:
Offline Women is a curated community for women dedicated to providing a space for real human connection away from screens.

We believe that real life happens when we are present with each other, and our events are a direct invitation to step away from the digital and into an unplugged, shared experience.

Every event is a purposefully small and elegant gathering. Our philosophy is simple: we forge genuine connections through real experiences.

We are committed to fostering a supportive community where you can find genuine conversation and feel truly welcome.

We purposefully limit our group size to ensure every connection is meaningful, and every person feels seen.

Belonging is created through frequent interactions, plus persistent caring.

We leave you with this wisdom that inspires us to keep showing up for this community:

“We have all known the long loneliness
and we have learned that the only solution is love
and that love comes with community.
It all happened while we sat there talking, and it is still going on.”
—Dorothy Day

Description:
Welcome to the New Girls’ Club!

# WHAT WE ARE

We are a network and a platform for women to capitalise on their potential and help others realise theirs, irrespective of background or age. 

In a world where “old boys’ clubs” were historically synonymous with connections, power and success, we’re helping build a levelled, equitable world where these terms are completely redefined. A community that connects women together to inspire, guide and support each other  in life and in work – this is the New Girls’ Club.

# OUR MISSION

Our mission is to bridge the gender gap through helping level the playing field, by empowering women to embrace their own potential in a collective manner through honest dialogue, exposure and opportunity.

# HOW IT WORKS

Stage 1: Regular Meet-Ups - Where we invite experts & talents across different industries to mingle and host workshops, with, of course, plenty of time for authentic discussion and networking.

Stage 2: Mentorship Mix-and-Match - Connecting women who are at the start of their careers (or undergoing career transitions) to women with experience, expertise and advice.

Stage 3: Our full-blown online platform which will be your portal to all kinds of networks, workshops, events and job opportunities to support your ambition & potential!

Join us and step into a community of unparalleled guidance and inspiration by women, to women.

Name: Revolution.Social Podcast
Description:
Revolution.Social is hosted by technologist and community advocate Rabble, a.k.a. Evan Henshaw-Plath — who was Twitter’s first employee and hired Jack Dorsey. In weekly interviews, Rabble will interview thought leaders, technologists, academics, and more about the need for a new social media "bill of rights." 

Just as the original Bill of Rights protected individual freedoms from government overreach, we need fundamental protections from corporate control and surveillance capitalism. This is the start of a conversation about what developers are building, how they're building it, and what consumers need to be asking for. 
Guests will include Jack Dorsey (former CEO & co-founder of Twitter); Kara Swisher (host of On with Kara Swisher, co-host of Pivot); Cory Doctorow (science fiction author & former editor of Boing Boing); and Taylor Lorenz (founder of User Mag, host of Power User).

Description:
Merhaba! Ben bir sosyal medya danışmanıyım ve Instagram’da satışlarınızı artırmak etkili stratejiler yaratmanız konusunda planlı ilerlemenize yardımcı oluyorum. Ürün ve hizmetlerinizin tanıtımını yapmak için aşağıdaki stratejileri kullanabilirsiniz daha fazlası için iletişime geçmeyi unutmayın.

Görsel İçerikler: Ürün veya hizmetlerinizin çekici görsellerini paylaşın. Kaliteli ve etkileyici fotoğraflar, takipçilerinizin dikkatini çeker.
Hikaye Anlatımı: Paylaşımlarınızda hikaye anlatımını kullanın. Ürününüzün veya hizmetinizin nasıl hayatları kolaylaştırdığını anlatın.
Hashtag Kullanımı: İlgili hashtagleri kullanarak paylaşımlarınızın daha fazla kişiye ulaşmasını sağlayın. Örneğin, #moda, #sağlık, #alışveriş gibi popüler hashtagleri tercih edebilirsiniz.
Etkileşim: Takipçilerinizle etkileşimde bulunun. Yorumlara cevap verin, beğenileri takip edin ve hikayelerde sorular sorun.
Hikaye ve Canlı Yayınlar: Instagram hikayeleri ve canlı yayınlar, takipçilerinizle daha yakın bir ilişki kurmanızı sağlar. Ürün tanıtımları için bu özellikleri kullanabilirsiniz.
Unutmayın ki her markanın hedef kitlesi farklıdır. İyi analiz yaparak, hangi stratejilerin sizin için en etkili olduğunu belirleyin.

Name: Enumma
Description:
Enumma is a social media app, focused on music, where influential fans rally for emerging artists and share in their financial success.

With stories of artists breaking out on social media we’re already seeing glimpses of a future where single individuals with a lot of social clout will launch the next generation of stars—and that’s the future we’re going after. 

Although our goal is to enable a new type of socioeconomic system for artist propulsion powered by fans, at a deeper level we want to encourage artists to pursue their true sound and calling and inspire others to do the same in their own lives.

We’re a small, remote team, working out of different cities in Mexico and the US, but we also collaborate with dozens of individuals and many companies in these and other countries. If you identify with our mission and resonate with our cultural jams, we encourage you to reach out to us.

At Global Ties Club, we believe in the power of connections, personal growth, and community support. Established with the vision of fostering meaningful relationships and empowering individuals, our club transcends traditional boundaries.

Our Mission:
We are dedicated to creating a supportive environment where members can network, learn, and grow both personally and professionally. Our mission is to inspire ambition, encourage leadership, and promote mutual respect among our diverse community.

Join us at Global Ties Club and become a part of a vibrant community where your aspirations are nurtured, your potential is celebrated, and your journey to success is our shared endeavor. Together, let’s forge meaningful connections and inspire one another to reach new heights. Welcome to a world of endless possibilities.

Name: Crossroad Connections
Description:
To use the medium of business and the relationships it affords to provide an opportunity to share the love and healing of God through Jesus Christ our Savior and Messiah; to encourage each other through the Word of God and to lift up our community and economy in prayer.
We believe there is a loving God who longs to see people healed, delivered and set free from our messes to have an actual living relationship with a living God.
Outside of business we all have lives, family, struggles and victories. We are always taught to keep it separated- to some degree that may be needed, but to a large extent, we as individuals are a singular entity, it’s hard, near impossible, to be at your best in either Personal or Professional if the other is suffering. 
The intent of this group is to provide deeper connections with each other through Faith. This is a strictly No Judgment zone. All are welcome, but we will be providing encouragement and hope through the only way we know and have experienced- and that is through the love of God through the person of Jesus his son, Biblical principles and the pure Gospel. 
“I believe one of the next great moves of God is going to be through the believers in the workplace.”— Billy Graham, in the 1970’s
So, here’s an invitation to come, be encouraged by the Goodness of God, let’s pray for our companies, our community and economy, bring your questions, your encouragement, your challenges and your hope. We don’t promise to know everything, but we do promise to provide an opportunity meet and learn and grow together. 
And together, we can impact our community for the better.

Name: HUMUSE
Description:
Humuse - Instructions for human use - the solution to all problems in human relationships 

Our project is an innovative platform where we help people to create the most comfortable and happy relationships, both in already established couples, and with new partners and even parents! We have created a unique online platform where everyone can clearly express their boundaries, likes and dislikes, and deeply reveal their personality for others to understand. We believe that openness is the key to harmonious relationships. Share your guidelines with your partners, parents and friends. Respect other people's boundaries and people will begin to respect yours. Join us and create your own path to true relationship comfort!

We live in a world in which most areas of life are subject to some kind of rules, be it the Constitution, work instructions, traffic rules, growing plants and even cooking recipes. But the most important area of our lives, relationships, the place where we expect to feel happiness, love and support, operates on principles that no one prescribed, and everything is left to chance. And because of this, one family member lives more or less relaxed, while the second is forced to suffer and adapt. And here we are talking not only about romantic relationships, but also about the relationship between parents and teenagers. Don’t you think it’s time to change this paradigm and start living comfortably and happily for each of us? It's time to teach each other to respect our personal boundaries!

Description:
ConexAmericas: Empowering the Future of Fintech in the Americas

ConexAmericas core goal is to become the leading catalyst for innovation and transformation in financial technology across Latin America and Silicon Valley. Our mission is to revolutionize the fintech landscape by driving continuous innovation, fostering cross-border collaborations, and creating an ecosystem where groundbreaking ideas can thrive. We unite fintech founders, professionals, advisors, consultants, software engineers, and technology providers to support the growth and success of emerging companies throughout the Americas.

Bridging Latin America and Silicon Valley

A Network of Expertise and Opportunity

Name: Gewaechshaus Network
Description:
Filmmaking in the German-speaking world is still shaped by a white gaze that usually conceptualizes diversity within cliché-ridden narratives and as an issue for marginalized groups – despite a quarter of the population in Germany and Austria having a migrant background.These diverse realities of life are, unfortunately, rarely reflected in film.
 
We want to change that!
 
Amidst heteronomy, racism, and the search for identity and expression in a predominantly white industry, we desperately need a safe space to support BPOC filmmakers. Through multifaceted stories and perspectives, told assertively and autonomously, we want to bring diversity into the mainstream – in front of and behind the camera. We want to make film a relevant medium for all, where everyone feels seen and inspired to participate.

Name: SIO - ondernemersvereniging Hengevelde
Description:
SIO staat voor Samen In Ondernemen. Een belangrijke doelstelling voor de Hengeveldse ondernemersvereniging met circa 120 leden. Het delen van kennis en ervaring maakt ondernemen aantrekkelijker en plezieriger. Ook heeft de krachtenbundeling een positieve uitstraling op het woon- werk- en leefklimaat. Samen staan we sterk.

Belangenbehartiger
Als belangenbehartiger vertegenwoordigt Ondernemersvereniging SIO haar leden op politiek en maatschappelijk vlak. Dit doet ze rond onderwerpen als economische ontwikkeling, veiligheid en leefbaarheid. Waar mogelijk promoot SIO de gemeente Hof van Twente, met Hengevelde in het bijzonder.

Activiteiten SIO
SIO bevordert de onderlinge contacten tussen de Hengeveldse ondernemers en ondernemingen. Voor haar leden organiseert ze netwerkavonden, bedrijfsbezoeken en activiteiten rond actuele onderwerpen. Ook steunt SIO maatschappelijke doelen die van positieve invloed zijn op de leefbaarheid in Hengevelde en omgeving.

amoji puts the pieces back together by providing social support services which nurture pre-existing relationships through different phases of chronic health journeys.

ASF's vision er at styrke netværk, skabe inklusion og udbrede arabisk kultur blandt studerende og nyuddannede. 

Vi ønsker at:
- Opbygge et stærkt netværk for arabiske studerende, nyuddannede og alle med interesse for arabisk kultur.

A place to meet people, discover what’s happening near you, and stay connected both online and in real life (IRL).

Over the next few months, we’ll bring you behind the scenes, introduce you to Patrick and Paul our co-founders, and share how we are shifting the focus to community and connection.

Shift is now live in US & Canada app stores. Next, stop Ireland.

Our global rollout begins January 1, leading up to one mighty worldwide celebration on St Patrick’s Day 2026.

Pop over to GetTheShift.app today. The craic is only starting… you’re officially in!

Name: Nima- Børn og Ungehjem
Description:
Vi har igennem mange års arbejde på forskellige institutioner, gjort os mange erfaringer ind i den socialpædagogiske indsats der leveres på området, og vi har fået kendskab til forskellige måder at drifte disse steder på.
Vi har en bred erfaring indenfor det socialpædagogiske felt, hvor vi har arbejdet med forskellige problemstillinger på flere forskellige niveauer. Dette har øget vores bevidsthed om, at der flere steder er et behov for et mere målrettet, specialiseret og individuelt tilbud. Dette har bidraget til, at vi nu i en længere periode har drøftet hvordan vi kan løfte kvaliteten for børn og unge, ved at åbne et lille sted, med kerneopgaven i fokus, og en klar socialpædagogisk indsats.

Vores postulat er, at de fleste børn og unge med massive udfordringer, kommer fra en tilværelse der er præget af overlevelsestilstand, hvilket gør at der ikke har været det tilstrækkelige grundlag for at arbejde i dybden med den unges udfordringer.
Vi er i praksis optaget af, hvilket udviklingspotentiale der ligger i relationsarbejdet, og hvordan vi formår at være autentiske og nærværende rollemodeller. Vi har særligt fokus på hvilken betydning gennemsigtighed, forudsigelighed og inddragelse har, for den enkeltes tryghed i hverdagen. Vi tror på, at når vi vægter at have et lille sted med få beboere, hvor der er mulighed for afskærmning, så giver det mere rum til at arbejde i dybden med den enkelte.

 

 

Med venlig hilsen

 

Hanne Irina Halling

Medejer & Souschef

 

SPIRA Børn – og Ungehjem

Tlf:. 61 46 56 19

 

www.opholdsstedetspira.dk

Description:
Bij Groene Dromers draait alles om een duurzamere wereld. Wij geloven dat kleine veranderingen een groot verschil kunnen maken. Ons doel? Jou inspireren om bewuster en duurzamer te leven.

Met praktische tips, kledingruils, inspirerende lezingen en andere creatieve activiteiten bieden we jou handvatten om op een toegankelijke manier duurzamer te leven. Of je nu wilt starten met plantaardig eten, vaker de fiets wilt pakken, je huis wilt verduurzamen of gewoon nieuwsgierig bent naar hoe je meer kunt bijdragen aan een gezonde planeet.

Duurzaam leven is niet alleen goed voor de aarde, maar ook voor je portemonnee. Veel duurzame keuzes, zoals minder energie verbruiken, spullen hergebruiken of seizoensgebonden eten, blijken vaak ook goedkoper te zijn. Een echte win-win dus!

Daarnaast omarmen we het concept van slow living: een bewuste, langzamere levensstijl waarin je meer geniet van de kleine dingen, minder druk ervaart en meer tijd hebt voor wat echt belangrijk is. Door te vertragen kun je met meer aandacht leven, en dat draagt bij aan zowel jouw welzijn als dat van de planeet.


Laten we samen dromen van een groener morgen.

Name: co-bro community
Description:
People often assume ideas are born in boardrooms, accelerator programs, or fancy networking events.

Co-Bro didn’t.

It started on an ordinary evening, over a cup of chai and a plate of samosas.

I had just wrapped up a draining workday. Next to me was a freelancer, equally tired from his client deadlines. What started as small talk turned into a deep dive into design, copy, and the realities of building things from scratch. No pitches. No awkward intros. Just two people vibing over shared struggles and passions.

That conversation felt different. It wasn’t “networking.” It was real.

One meetup became two. Then three. Soon, we found ourselves meeting regularly—sometimes in cafés, sometimes in small flats, sometimes just during spontaneous late-night tea runs. The energy was always the same: curiosity, collaboration, and a sense that we were building something together without even realizing it.

That’s when the idea clicked:

 What if we could design more of these serendipitous, low-pressure, high-impact connections?

Not official “meetups” with name tags and coupons. Not forced agendas. But natural collisions between freelancers, creators, founders, and builders—where conversations flow, ideas spark, and genuine friendships form.

That became the seed of Co-Bro.

We never wanted it to be a “club.” Instead, it grew into a culture. Sometimes it’s a Google Meet with three people. Sometimes it’s a late-night brainstorm with four. Sometimes it’s just someone dropping, “Chai at 9?” in the group chat, and suddenly a handful of us show up.

It’s casual. It’s cool. And it’s powerful.

Because the truth is—
we’re not trying to “network.”
We’re trying to belong.

Name: Loula
Description:
Votre voiture roule peu ? Partagez la avec un locataire de confiance sur des périodes définies et générez un revenu régulier !

RDV sur notre site : https://www.loula-autopartage.fr/

En France, 10 millions de voitures restent inutilisées tandis que 15 millions de personnes souffrent de précarité mobilité. Résultat ? Un frein à l’emploi, à l’autonomie et un gaspillage énorme.

 Loula révolutionne la mobilité en lançant la première plateforme d’auto-partage longue durée entre particuliers. Contrairement aux locations classiques, limitées à quelques jours, Loula propose une solution flexible de 2 à 12 mois.

 Les propriétaires gagnent de l’argent sur une voiture qu’ils n’utilisent pas ou peu.
 Les locataires accèdent à un véhicule sans les coûts d’achat ni d’entretien.

 Impact direct :
 Écologique – Moins de production de voitures, moins de pollution.
 Sociétal – Plus d’accès à la mobilité, à l’emploi, plus d’autonomie.

Loula s'articule autour de 3 piliers : 
 Connecter - Loula connecte les propriétaires de voitures sous-utilisées aux locataires en quête de mobilité.
 Sécuriser - Avec des contrats et une assurance sur mesure, Loula assure un partage en toute sérénité.
 Accompagner - Tout au long du partage, nous guidons et assistons nos utilisateurs à chaque étape.

Avec Loula, chaque voiture trouve son utilité, chaque conducteur une solution adaptée. Et si on roulait vers un futur plus intelligent ?

Description:

Our vision: To improve the mental and physical health of as many people as possible – by making it effortless to find the right wellbeing provider anytime, anywhere. Happy. Healthy. Life. 

Millions of people struggle to find the right therapist – whether for massage, mental health, fitness, or other wellbeing services. Existing booking platforms are often impersonal, cold, and limiting. As a result, customers book “blindly,” with more than 70% reporting disappointing, low-quality experiences – and many ultimately stop investing in their health.

yipi changes that. We make booking personal, premium, and fun. With AI-powered, people-focused search filters, a curated selection of high-quality, trusted providers, authentic therapist profiles, and the ability to connect before booking, yipi helps customers find the right match – 24/7, from anywhere. And all of this in the most intuitive and engaging way. On yipi, people book people – not companies.

At the same time, yipi empowers providers to grow their business: attracting new clients, simplifying booking management, enhancing their premium image, and unlocking valuable insights. 

yipi – it’s all about people.

Name: Kismet Konnections
Description:
We are a community offering a tailored range of services to suit our ever-growing network. Our mission is to create a safe space for people to come together to build lasting connections. 

Our KKMatchMaking service is for members looking to seriously meet their future love.

Profile circulation
A limited version of your profile is circulated on a number of platforms to scope for interested individuals in you.  
The profile is shared without name and photos to protect identity and unsolicited approach.  Only registered members of the service can access your full profile and profile photos.

Profile Interest Process (for Registered Members of the Match Making Service)

1.	Look at the latest list of profiles that is sent to you. See which profiles you are interested in and note them down. 
2.	Then search for their profile pics on the KK ONE DRIVE. The filenames of the photos are profile IDs e.g KK1xx.
3.	If you like any of the profiles and happy with their pics, you can let me know and I will approach them to see if they are interested in your profile (and pics).
4.	If they are also interested I share both of your names and email addresses (or if you are happy for me to share your phone numbers I can do that too).

Assisted MatchMaking 
•	The admin team makes recommendations of suitable profiles to match.
•	If both parties agree to the match, we share names and email addresses (or phone numbers if agreed) to initiate the connection.

To become a member of our community or register for KKMatchMaking, visit our website:
kismetkonnections.com or email admin@kismetkonnections.co.uk

Name: VWBO
Description:
Het VWBO of Verbond van West-Brabantse Ondernemingen ontstond in 1966 met een duidelijke missie: het behartigen en verdedigen van de belangen van zijn leden, bedrijven die hun activiteiten vanuit de prachtige regio West-Brabant ontplooien.

Deze missie is in de loop der jaren niet veranderd. Het blijft cruciaal de gemeenschappelijke belangen van ondernemingen in deze regio te verdedigen. Mobiliteit, veiligheid, de situatie van de arbeidsmarkt, ruimtelijk ordening, fiscaliteit, communicatie met de overheden … het zijn stuk voor stuk sleutelelementen om de economie en de ondernemingen in West-Brabant te doen bloeien en groeien.

Doelstellingen:

Het VWBO wil de industriegebieden in de regio beter ontsluiten en toegankelijk maken. Onder andere het verbeteren van het openbaar vervoer is hierbij cruciaal.

Ook de (brand)veiligheid van de industriegebieden en gemeenten staat hoog op de agenda, net als de netheid en afvalverwerking in de West-Brabantse gemeenten.

Verder mikt het VWBO op een betere samenwerking tussen bedrijven. Via netwerken kan deze bevorderd worden en kan nog beter opgekomen worden voor gezamenlijke belangen.

Tot slot is de relatie met de lokale besturen prioritair. Een goede verstandhouding helpt bij het bemiddelen en realiseren van de doelstellingen. In deze zijn goede communicatiekanalen van en naar het lokale bestuur van groot belang.

Realisaties:

In zijn bijna vijftig jarig bestaan heeft het VWBO tal van realisaties op zijn conto kunnen schrijven. Zo was het verbond betrokken bij diverse veiligheids- en preventieplannen, onder andere pilootprojecten inzake de bewaking van industriegebieden. Ook projecten inzake brandbestrijding werden opgezet.

Name: BinkBee
Description:
En un mundo donde las oportunidades están en todas partes… pero las conexiones correctas casi nunca se encuentran, surge una pregunta inevitable:

¿Por qué el networking, algo tan esencial para crecer, sigue siendo tan ineficiente?

BinkBee nace para potencializar las conexiones profesionales, en eventos y fuera de ellos, en un café, en un restaurante, en un coworking, de forma inteligente e instantánea. 

Nace de la convicción de que las mejores ideas, los mejores negocios y las mejores historias comienzan con una conexión correcta. Pero esas conexiones no deben depender del azar, del tiempo disponible, ni de la suerte de toparse con la persona indicada.

Nuestra misión es simple y poderosa: Ayudar a cada profesional a encontrar, en segundos, lo que antes tomaba horas o jamás sucedía.

BinkBee utiliza inteligencia artificial para revelar oportunidades escondidas, acercar a quienes pueden potenciarse mutuamente y transformar cada evento en un espacio donde las posibilidades realmente se abren. Queremos que la gente salga de un networking diciendo: “valió la pena, encontré exactamente lo que buscaba”.

Porque creemos en un futuro donde nadie pierda oportunidades por no saber con quién hablar. Un futuro donde las conexiones no solo se crucen… sino que impacten.

Esta es nuestra visión. Este es el propósito que nos mueve.

Muy pronto en México.
BinkBee: conexiones inteligentes e inmediatas.

Genom vårt nätverk strävar vi efter att lyfta fram de röster som kanske inte alltid når fram, men som utgör ryggraden i samhället och behöver en mer framträdande plattform för att höras.

Besök vår hemsida för att utforska och upptäcka en skiftande samling talare som kan addera värde och insikter till ditt event eller sammanhang. 

Kontakta oss gärna för att diskutera hur vi kan hjälpa just din organisation att hitta den perfekta rösten för att inspirera och engagera.

We geloven in de kracht van persoonlijke connecties en willen een netwerk bieden waar ondernemerschap gedijt.

De Gooische Diner Club is bedoeld voor ondernemers, professionals en enthousiaste netwerkers in het Gooi en de regio Gooi en Vechtstreek. Het is dé plek waar culinaire verfijning samengaat met exclusief zakelijk netwerken. Of je nu gevestigd bent in het Gooi of daar werkt, onze club biedt unieke kansen om te netwerken, te genieten van heerlijke diners en waardevolle zakelijke connecties op te bouwen. Een smaakvolle en verrijkende ervaring voor ondernemende geesten.

Enthousiast?  Waar wacht je nog op? Ontdek de smaak van succes en meld je nu aan via onze website! Sluit je aan bij de Gooische Diner Club en laat culinair genieten hand in hand gaan met zakelijk succes.

Name: BNI Synergy - Aprilia, Italia
Description:
LA NOSTRA VISION

Siamo il ponte che connette imprenditori e professionisti di Aprilia e di 
altri territori, generando un ecosistema di crescita basato su relazioni 
autentiche, su collaborazione e sullo scambio di opportunità. Crediamo 
che il vero valore del business nasca dalla condivisione e dall’azione, 
dal rispetto per le tradizioni e guardiamo a strategie di crescita 
innovative. Il nostro capitolo è un trampolino di lancio per chi vuole 
accrescere il proprio giro d’affari attraverso connessioni di qualità, 
alimentate dalla fiducia reciproca e dalla visione comune di un futuro 
più prospero. 
Condividiamo, agiamo e cresciamo insieme, perché solo 
unendo le forze possiamo migliorare il modo di fare impresa, 
spingendo le aziende in avanti con sinergie strategiche.


Fondata nel 1985, BNI è l'organizzazione di scambio referenze più vasta e di successo a livello mondiale. I nostri Membri sono professionisti e imprenditori che si aiutano reciprocamente ad aumentare il proprio giro d'affari grazie al Givers Gain (chi dà riceve).
Ogni settimana, in migliaia di gruppi in tutto il mondo, i Membri si incontrano con altri professionisti e imprenditori per costruire ed alimentare relazioni a lungo termine basate sulla fiducia reciproca e scambiare referenze di business di qualità.

La partecipazione a BNI permette l'accesso a formazione professionale erogata da esperti del settore e l'opportunità di fare networking e business con centinaia di migliaia di Membri BNI in tutto il mondo.

BNI . Changing the Way the World Does Business

Name: Reach Out Party
Description:
Reach Out Party is a eight week mastermind for people ready to find their voice, find their people, and redefine their relationship to networking forever.

Life really is about who you know — dream jobs and careers, deep romances and friendships, great ideas and stories, all started with one person bold and curious enough to reach out to another. 

Applications are open: reachoutparty.com

The Party is for you if:

You have a network, you have experience, but the more people you meet and the more established you are, the more disjointed and overwhelming your network feels.

You know there is more. You know you need to make a change and level up in your life, but the how is unclear. You have a fire in your belly, but something is holding you back.

You understand the importance of making and nurturing connections, but you don’t have time to reach out consistently.

You’re taking a bold leap. You’re looking for whats next in your career, you’re starting your own business. You know your people are out there, but finding them feels scary.

Networking is not your thing. You are not used to reaching out to strangers. You don’t like feeling performative, sterile, and boring. You value meaningful connection but not at the cost of being transactional.

You know deep down that reaching out is worth it. You know that the more shots you take, the more likely it is you’ll make one. You have that little glimmer of hope. Sparkle in your eye. You are, somewhere, deep down, slightly delusional and believe that maybe, MAYBE reaching out could actually change your life.

We practice tangible tools for digital networking and share gratitude with purpose, so that you can create a bigger, better, more connected life and career - one reach out at a time.

Name: Thallo
Description:
Thallo's Purpose and Vision:
Thallo reimagines how social responsibility is done. It is a platform that connects youth with community-based organisations (NGO's, NPO's and charities), and empowers them to drive social change. Simultaneously, organisations are provided with funding, visibility and direct community engagement. By 2030, having a Thallo profile will be the norm - a platform designed to empower organisations to flourish, while providing individuals with a way to track and showcase their contributions to their local communities.

The Problem:
Supporters lack visibility into credible organisations, they don't understand/see their impact, or remain unaware of volunteer opportunities. 
At the same time, organisations struggle to engage directly with supporters and have limited ways to demonstrate growth, showcase impact, and build trust.

The Solution:
A social media platform that bridges the gap between supporters and organisations, providing organisations with a platform to directly engage with supporters, and allowing supporters to interact with them to develop a digital Thallo profile that keeps record of all their social responsibility.

Vrouwen In Zaken: netwerkclub voor vrouwelijke ondernemers in/rondom
Hoogeveen.

Vrouwen In Zaken verbindt met gelijkgestemde professionals, deelt ervaringen en bouwt aan waardevolle relaties. 

Wij zijn een gevarieerde groep zelfstandige vrouwen die samen komen om te netwerken, om van elkaar te leren en om te kunnen sparren met iemand uit een ander beroepsveld die alles totaal anders ziet, of juist om ervaringen uit te wisselen met een mede ondernemer die dezelfde uitdagingen tegenkomt. 

Tijdens de verschillende bijeenkomsten zijn de gesprekken en contacten zeer waardevol, deze geven herkenning, inspiratie, nieuwe inzichten en vooral veel energie. 

Dit is dé netwerkclub die speciaal is opgericht voor vrouwen zoals jij, om te verbinden, te delen en te groeien, vanuit een branche besloten community waarin van elke branche één zakenvrouw is vertegenwoordigd. 

Ben je geïnteresseerd? Meld je dan aan bij Vrouwen In Zaken en laat jouw ondernemerschap bloeien, waarbij gezelligheid altijd voorop staat!

Contact via vrouweninzaken@gmail.com

Name: Hult Prize Al-Azhar University
Description:
About Hult Prize Al-Azhar University

Hult Prize Al-Azhar University is more than just a competition — it is a movement of young changemakers united by one vision: to build a better, more sustainable world through social entrepreneurship.
As part of the global Hult Prize Foundation, our campus community empowers Al-Azhar students to transform ideas into impact, inspiring them to create startups that address the United Nations’ Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

 Our Vision

To establish a generation of young innovators from Al-Azhar University who lead with purpose, creativity, and compassion — shaping solutions that uplift communities, empower others, and create lasting change both locally and globally.

 Our Mission

Our mission is to ignite the entrepreneurial spirit within students, guiding them to design business models that solve real-world problems.
We aim to bridge the gap between ideas and execution through mentorship, skill development, and an ecosystem that supports creativity, sustainability, and social impact.

We believe that every student at Al-Azhar University has the potential to make a difference — all they need is the right opportunity and support to turn their passion into purpose.

 Our Values

-Innovation – We embrace creativity and new ideas as the foundation for progress.
-Empowerment – We support students to take initiative and believe in their ability to make change happen.
-Collaboration – We grow stronger through teamwork, diversity, and shared purpose.
-Integrity – We act with honesty, responsibility, and respect in every step of our journey.

Impact – We measure success not by words, but by the positive change we create in our community and beyond.

 Why Hult Prize Al-Azhar University?

Because we believe in the power of youth.
Because we believe in the power of ideas.
And because we believe that change starts here — at Al-Azhar.

 Be Part of the Change. Empower. Innovate. Impact.

Name: Cobuntu
Description:
Cobuntu is a community-powered platform where creators, brands, and communities grow, engage, and monetize—together.

We believe influence shouldn’t be dictated by algorithms or follower counts, but by meaningful interactions inside trusted communities. That’s why Cobuntu connects three key audiences into one shared ecosystem:

 Content Creators
Creators can join relevant community hubs, contribute UGC (user-generated content), build a following, and monetize through their own digital product catalog—all without needing to become full-time influencers or run ads.

 Communities-as-a-Business (CaaB)
Independent communities can host their own hubs, sell products like courses or events, run engagement challenges, and attract sponsorships—all while maintaining control over the quality and values of their space.

 SMEs & Enterprises
Brands can create their own branded community hubs or sponsor existing ones to engage directly with creators and audiences. They gain authentic visibility through curated UGC, not intrusive advertising.

What makes Cobuntu different is that we’re not another social media platform, and we’re not a tool. We’re an infrastructure—a new layer where community, commerce, and co-creation meet.

With a freemium model for creators, monthly plans for communities, and scalable hosting options for brands, Cobuntu is designed to grow sustainably—with integrity at its core.

We’re currently onboarding early community leaders, creators, and SME sponsors ahead of launch. If you're building a brand, nurturing a community, or creating content with purpose—we’d love to hear from you.

 Based in Portugal
 Built for global collaboration
 Powered by belief in the next generation of digital influence

Name: Alumnik
Description:
Alumnik is a startup designed to make alumni connections seamless through our disruptive social media platform which makes individual Institutional Platforms a "Thing of the Past". AlumniK is the go-to app for all your alumni needs, keeping you connected with your alma mater from not only your institutions but also other renowned university alumnis as well.

Experience the power of "Konnecting Nostalgia to Progress" with our app. Get the latest updates, meaningful contents, news and events, create digital townhall, take advantage of centralized communications, and stay connected with your alumni community. 

Key Features and Benefits:

1) Tailored Features & Digital townhalls: Unlike generic social media platforms, our solution offers tailored features designed exclusively for educational institutions. This includes campus-wide event management, community forums, interest-based groups, and career development opportunities.

2) Enhanced Engagement: Our platform encourages active participation, enabling students, faculty, and alumni to interact, share ideas, and collaborate effectively. This fosters a sense of belonging and connection, resulting in increased engagement rates.

3) Centralized Communication: We provide a central hub for all campus-related communications, ensuring that important announcements, updates, and discussions are easily accessible to all members of the educational community.

4) Personalized Content: Our intelligent algorithms deliver personalized content to users, increasing relevance and ensuring that individuals receive information that resonates with their interests and goals.

5) Seamless 360 Degrees communication with no more "one-way" communications and updation of email lists. You should be able to reach anyone from your alma mater for mentoring, job references, Internships, international study programs, scholarships and many more.

6) Institutions do not need to maintain any individual alumni networks and can benefit from Alumnik

Name: Kokanin
Description:
We have built a new age social networking platform. Disrupting the industry with our game changing solution!

The Name Kokanin: In Japanese 交換 (Kōkan) Means  Exchange / interchange

Hence the name Kokanin.com Exchanging information thru networking.

Kokan - Exchanging
in - Information

Hi everyone, I’m Syed Ahmed, founder of Kokanin.com.
After attending hundreds of networking events, I realised something:
Most events don’t actually create meaningful connections.
You meet random people…
Business cards get lost…
There’s no follow-up…
And most conversations lead nowhere.
So we built Kokanin.com — a smart networking platform designed to fix this.
With Kokanin, you can:
•	Discover who’s attending
•	Find the right people to meet
•	Share digital business cards
•	Book meetings
•	Get AI-driven match suggestions
•	And continue networking long after the event
Our goal is simple:
Make networking smarter, faster, and meaningful.
We just launched early access — and we need your feedback.
Join us at www.kokanin.com
Let’s build the future of networking together.

Name: Master Minds kvinnligt företags nätverk
Description:
Välkommen till Master Minds, nätverket där kvinnliga entreprenörer inte bara växer, utan också har kul på vägen! 

Vi vet hur det känns: idéerna snurrar, listan på saker att göra är lång och ibland önskar man bara någon som förstår. Master Minds är platsen där vi samlar kvinnor som vill dela sina erfarenheter, stötta varandra och ha roligt medan vi bygger våra företag.

Här kan du som medlem kostnadsfritt lägga upp ditt företag, visa vad du gör och inspirera andra. Vill du tipsa om en smart idé, ett verktyg som funkar, ett event eller bara något roligt som andra kvinnor kan ta del av? Här är det fullt tillåtet! Du skriver in i idelådan på hemsidan och vi lägger upp det. 

Tänk dig: du scrollar genom sidan och hittar nya idéer som du aldrig hade tänkt på, hittar någon att samarbeta med, eller får ett tips som gör din vardag enklare. Och bäst av allt, du får göra samma sak tillbaka! 
Varje kvinna här bidrar med sin kunskap, sina erfarenheter och sin energi, så alla blir vinnare.

Tillsammans blir idéer större, motivationen starkare och resan roligare. Det här är platsen där du kan fråga, tipsa, inspirera och helt enkelt hänga med likasinnade kvinnor som förstår vad det innebär att driva företag.

Master Minds är mer än ett nätverk, det är ett community där idéer föds, samarbeten startar och skratt delas. Oavsett om du är ny i entreprenörsvärlden eller erfaren företagsbyggare, finns det plats för dig här.

Kom med, lägg upp ditt företag, dela dina bästa tips, få nya idéer och upptäck hur roligt det kan vara att växa tillsammans med andra kvinnliga entreprenörer. Tillsammans skapar vi framgångar och har kul på vägen!

Name: Mastodonned Ltd.
Description:
Mastodonned Ltd is an online marketplace for all kind of services related to Mastodon and other opensource, federated social networks like PeerTube, Diaspora, Pixelfed, Funkwhale, Pleroma etc. 

Recent Twitter takeover by Elon Musk and subsequent controversial policy changes, employees sackings etc. created an environment of uncertainty on this popular microblogging platform. This also resulted in mass exodus and
search for an alternative microblogging platform. 

MASTODON EMERGED AS THE WINNER

A previously almost unknown opensource and federated microblogging network called Mastodon which resides on Fediverse platform suddenly became a hot favourite. 

FEDERATED & DECENTRALISED SOCIAL NETWORK

Extensive media coverage of Mastodon and Fediverse made non technical microblogging veterans aware of the concept and technology behind federated and decentralised social networks. This made them a fan of supporters of Mastodon and other Fediverse based Social Networks.

And overnight, foundation of a multibillion ecosystem and and economy was laid. Mastodon did to the Social Networking market exactly what Linux did to Server O/S market and WordPress did to Content Management (CMS) markets decades ago!

A MULTI-BILLION DOLLAR ECOSYSTEM & ECONOMY  AROUND MASTON IS UNDER FORMATION

Yes, it's already happening. But :

PROBLEMS WITH MASTODON

1. By Nerds . For Nerds :-)
2. No proper marketplace for service. 
3. Documentations that confuses non-nerds :-)

--------------------------------------------
SOLUTION: MASTODONNED SERVICE MARKETPLACE
-----------------------------------------

A professional online marketplace & information hub for everything related to Mastodon & other opensource federated network! 

REVOLUTIONARY & EVOLUTIONARY: Mastodonned has been launched under the Employees & Community Ownership Scheme of 4IR4ALL Venture Studio, an integral part of the non-profit 4IR 4ALL Ltd. 74% shares are held by employees & freelancers

Name: Hänga
Description:
HÄNGA
EN: [Hang-a] meaning: «to hang out with someone or somewhere»
NO: [Heng-e] [Heng-a] betyr «at sosialisere seg, omgås på en enkel måte»
SE: [häng-a] är ett svensk slangord för att «umgås på ett avslappnat sätt»

Just as the name implies, HÄNGA is a social community with a mission to connect people by hanging out together. Connections, ever so fleeting, improve your well-being and contributes to your happiness. Did you know that a good network is more effective than exercise and healthy food and that it increases your life expectancy with 10 years!? It is time to give connections the importance it deserves, and start hanging with Hänga!

We started to build the HÄNGA platform and its community just when the Pandemic hit us, so we have been on hold for a while. We are now back on track, expanding our community and in order to provide countless moments and opportunities for you and others to explore the social universe, we need “HÄNGA HOSTS”. A HÄNGA HOST is a person-like you!- whom wants to share a passion or interest with others through holding a “hang”. Hangs can be anything from philosophical talks at a café, to kayaking, or visiting an art show. Maybe time to be a chef for a night and have a pop-up restaurant in your home? Or perhaps you want to take a group of people to the hidden gems of your town’s nightlife? It is time to make some memories, share experiences, meet new people and have fun. Only your imagination is your limitation :)

Name: OneMood
Description:
We are solving what today’s social media platforms overlook, the emotional well-being of a generation.

Most apps expose your identity and focus on showcasing highlights, often leading to anxiety, comparison, and loneliness. OneMood flips that narrative. We are building a space where feelings come first, not followers. It is a platform for private & open conversations that help the generation to get emotionally strong.

A safe, honest, and judgment-free space, because in today’s world, mental health deserves more than filters.

How it works:

1. Share & Invite: Share your mood to invite DMs. Tag it 'Private' for private conversations or 'Public' to have open conversations.
2. Publish Open Conversations: Simply "Leave" a Public Chat to freeze the conversation and publish it to the feed.
3. Engage with open conversations: Open conversations become community stories. Readers can be a part of it by reacting and commenting on specific messages inside the conversation.

Key Insight:
Real emotions. Real connection. Zero judgment

Launching on 23rd January, 2026

Name: femme FOUNDERS
Description:
Our roots were once Women In Business Wales, after snowballing support that reached across the UK it was evident that we needed to branch out wider.  That’s how femme FOUNDERS was created with one clear purpose, to bring together the women who lead, inspire, and shape the future of business.  

We know the reality of building a business. The long days. The self-doubt. The decisions no one else sees. The moments where resilience is tested and leadership feels lonely. Running a business can be isolating, especially when you’re the one carrying the vision, the risk, and the responsibility. That’s exactly why femme FOUNDERS exists. femme FOUNDERS is more than a network. 

It’s a collective of ambitious women building serious businesses, together. 

A space where collaboration replaces competition. Where knowledge is shared openly. Where growth is intentional. And where women are supported not just to survive in business, but to scale, secure funding, explore growth options, and lead with confidence. We connect women to the conversations, opportunities, and rooms that matter, from strategy and financial clarity to funding pathways, investment readiness, and long-term vision.

This is a community for women who are building, evolving, and thinking bigger. 
Because no founder should have to do it alone.
This is where founders become leaders. And leaders build what lasts.

Name: Future Moves
Description:
Future Moves is a social enterprise supporting young people aged 16–27 in making choices across seven life domains:
finances, mental health, work, education, housing, personal development, and entrepreneurship.

In 2026, our primary focus is on finances and mental health, as financial stress and mental pressure often go hand in hand and play a decisive role in young people’s future perspectives.
We reach young people early through our community (FutureFam) and offline activities, help them create clarity around their questions, and guide them step by step towards existing support, knowledge, and opportunities within these domains. In doing so, we act as a connector: young people are at the center, while partners remain strong in their own roles.

Amsterdam-Zuidoost is our starting point and living lab, where we deepen and further develop our approach. From there, we will expand in 2026 to Amsterdam-Oost and Nieuw-West, using a lighter, neighborhood-based model built on what works in Zuidoost.

We use digital tools and AI in a supportive way to understand patterns and needs and to strengthen collaboration across the ecosystem.

In this way, we contribute to sustainable future perspectives for young people, with a strong focus on prevention, proximity, and scalability.

Description:
Velkommen til Walk In The Park Moss, et lavterskel #nettverkstilbud som har til hensikt å skape nye #relasjoner, #nettverk og #forretningsmuligheter i Moss og omegn!

Dette er en fysisk nettverkssamling med 4-6 treff i året. 
Målet er å skape mulighet for nye bekjentskaper og samarbeid i området du bor eller din arbeidsplass opererer i. 

Walk In The Park foregår flere steder i landet (sjekk gjerne ut Walk In The Park Oslo og Romerike). 
Vi knytter kontakter gjennom speed-turer á 15 minutter med 3-5 nye bekjentskaper, og så bytter vi grupper slik at du får muligheten til å nettverke med så mange som mulig på 90 minutter.

Vi avslutter med lunsj for de som ønsker det og som bonus kan du oppleve nye spennende arenaer i regionen ved hvert treff.  

Walk In The Park Moss passer for alle enten du søker å utvide dine bekjentskaper, kundenettverk, nye forretningskontakter eller kanskje du er på utkikk etter nye/andre jobbmuligheter?

For å kunne gi deg mer relevant informasjon er viktig at du melder deg på påmeldingslinken før hver samling. 
I retur får du en e-post med praktisk informasjon om selve dagen!

Vi ser frem til å møtes!

Grounded in real observations and events, my work highlights how misuse of authority harms employees and institutions. I aim to build a platform for transparency, equal accountability, and ethical professionalism to strengthen both people and organizations.
#EqualRightsEqualAccountability
For organizations, providing equal employment rights is not enough; equal accountability must also be a core objective. True transparency is achieved only when responsibility and answerability exist at every level.

Name: Grapevine Local
Description:
Grapevine Local is a free-to-use, social media platform developed with one, highly significant, aim - namely, to boost the economies and general well-being of local communities throughout the UK.

We will principally achieve this in two ways:
1.	The Grapevine Local platform
Raise awareness amongst residents of everything that their local shops and businesses offer.
2.	The Grapevine Local debit card 
Increase the buying frequency, with those local shops and businesses, by offering a free to use debit card.

This community focussed ethos combined with cutting edge FinTech is at the heart of Grapevine Local’s unique appeal.

GL’s debit card which will be known as the Grapevine Local Club Card, will provide customers with a GL account, which they can use at participating local businesses, who will offer discounts and special offers on their range of local products and services to those card holding customers. For local businesses the GL debit card will be a game changer. Though some may run a loyalty card scheme none will have one which benefits the whole community and operates in a multiple of local stores.  This community ethos will encourage greater loyalty, increase local sales and help boost the well-being of everyone locally. 

For the first time, local consumers will have a loyalty product which gives them the same benefits as those provided by the national multiples.

Together, residents and businesses will be demonstrating a strong commitment to their  local community. This community engagement generates positive word of-mouth, bolstering reputations and attracting more customers, with a greater sense of loyalty.


#hyperlocal #localcommunity #localbusiness #loyaltycards #debitcards

Hi! I'm Rachel, owner of JR Social Media Co — where 21 years of teaching experience meets modern social media strategy.

Here's my story: After two decades in the classroom, I know a thing or two about connecting with people, adapting on the fly, and creating content that actually engages your audience. Teaching taught me that every student (and every business) learns differently — so why would social media be any different?
What my teaching background brings to your business:
 Personalized strategies — Just like I tailored lessons for each student, I create social media strategies that fit YOUR unique business needs
 Creative content that works — Years of making complex topics engaging? That translates perfectly to making your brand irresistible
 Ready to pivot — If something isn't working, I adjust quickly (trust me, classroom management teaches you to think fast!)
 Consistent, reliable posting — The same dedication I brought to lesson planning, I bring to your content calendar
 Results that make sense — I break down analytics the same way I explained difficult concepts — clearly and actionably
My philosophy? Just like in teaching, authentic connections drive real results. I help you show up genuinely, tell your story in a way that resonates, and build relationships that turn followers into loyal customers.
Whether you're just starting out or ready to level up your social media game, I'm here to help you stand out for all the right reasons.
Ready to grow your business one authentic post at a time? Let's chat!
P.S. — This whole journey started when my daughter Joelle encouraged me to take the leap. Sometimes the best inspiration comes from unexpected places!

Hoe
Om onze missie voor regio Midden Gelderland uit te kunnen voeren zijn de lokale oncologienetwerken opgericht. Deze netwerken bestaan uit gedreven eerstelijns professionals met affiniteit voor en gespecialiseerd in zorg en ondersteuning bij kanker. De netwerken bewaken de kwaliteit van zorg en ondersteuning door middel van vastgestelde kwaliteitscriteria. Ze spelen in op recente ontwikkelingen in de zorg voor mensen met kanker, delen kennis en inspireren elkaar.
Ze kennen elkaar goed wat zorgt voor een laagdrempelige en doelmatige samenwerking.

Het Oncologie Netwerk Midden Gelderland, ONMG, bestaat uit vertegenwoordigers van de lokale netwerken en heeft als doel de lokale netwerken optimaal te ondersteunen en te faciliteren in het uitvoeren van hun missie. Denk hierbij aan thema’s als (online) vindbaarheid, kwaliteitsborging, onderzoek, samenwerking met partners zoals ziekenhuis en revalidatiecentra.

Waarom
Per jaar krijgen ongeveer 100.000 mensen te horen dat ze kanker hebben. Het aantal mensen dat leeft met kanker is nog veel groter.
Er worden voortdurend nieuwe en doeltreffendere behandelmogelijkheden ontwikkeld, waardoor de kans op langdurige overleving toeneemt. Veel mensen zullen tegenwoordig door behandeling van kanker genezen. Anderen zullen moeten leren leven met (de gevolgen van) kanker. Er blijft echter ook een groep, voor wie er (nog) weinig behandelopties zijn en voor wie palliatieve zorg nodig is.
Buiten het ziekenhuis ontwikkelt de zorg en ondersteuning zich in een hoog tempo. Het aanbod van zorg- en dienstverleners is

Name: Orbiter India
Description:
Mission Statement

To serve as India’s premier social networking platform, dedicated to empowering fresh graduates with personalized career pathways while acting as a direct bridge between unaddressed rural innovation in South India and strategic capital investment.

Our Story: Empowering India's Next Generation

Orbiter India is more than just a social network, it is a purpose-built ecosystem designed to solve two of India's most critical opportunity gaps:

 Pillar 1: Launching Careers for Fresh Graduates

We understand the anxiety of transitioning from campus to career. Our platform is India's first social network dedicated to closing the employment gap for fresh graduates.
* 1:1 Personalized Mentorship: We connect young talent directly with industry leaders for long-term, focused guidance. This helps graduates refine essential soft skills, gain market insight, and confidently navigate their job search.
* Qualities-Based Career Matching: Beyond resumes, we use advanced assessments to match a graduate’s core attributes and personality profile with suitable job roles. This ensures long-term fit, satisfaction, and better retention rates for our partner employers.
* Professional Networking: Build a meaningful network focused purely on professional development, knowledge sharing, and peer collaboration. 

 Pillar 2: Funding Rural Innovation and Driving Social Impact

Our unique social mission focuses on empowering overlooked talent in rural South India. We believe genuine innovation often comes from necessity and have created a dedicated marketplace to support it.

* Investor-Inventor Bridge: We showcase unique, low-cost, necessity-driven inventions (often created by children and youth) from rural communities. We connect these inventors directly with Angels, VCs, and philanthropists.

Competitive Edge
We are building the definitive platform for the next-gen of Indian talent, be they high potential graduates or grassroots geniuses.

Name: Corner Of Group LLC
Description:
Corner Of is the Upwork for Social Revenue. We are a B2B marketplace solving the hospitality industry's most critical problem: guaranteed foot traffic.

Our Value Proposition: We eliminate the high risk of traditional promotion by offering a service where Venues only pay for results. We connect hospitality partners to a vetted network of professional Curators (tastemakers) who bid to fill off-peak nights.

The Mechanism (B2B2C): Our system is built on a two-part platform:

The Marketplace: Venues post a "Bounty" (Gig) and enforce a strong Escrow Guarantee.

The B2C Engine: Curators utilize our A.I.-driven Group-to-Group social platform to acquire and manage the high-value audience they deliver to Venues.

Goal: To automate venue revenue and build a profitable, scalable network across major metropolitan areas.

User experience: Create a group in seconds, set your vibe and size, and match with compatible groups. When both sides approve, a shared chat unlocks and you’ll see curated venue suggestions with exclusive perks. The night plans itself - together.

Venue experience: We drive the exact crowd you want in the room with priority placement, targeted exposure, and performance-based partnerships. You get measurable foot traffic and repeat business from the right groups at the right time.

Mission: Connect people, fill venues, make the city feel smaller.

Contact: meetme@cornerof.com • cornerof.com • @cornerofnyc

Name: Pets Genius
Description:
Collecte d’avis consommateurs authentiques (UGC) via sa plate-forme de test produits sur-mesure, auprès de sa communauté ciblée, la Pets Genius Family.

Le principe est simple : toutes les marques peuvent mettre à disposition leurs produits gratuitement afin que les consommateurs puissent les tester chez eux, sans frais. 

Avant la mise en ligne, la plateforme effectue une vérification pour garantir aux consommateurs des tests produits de qualité. 
Ensuite, la communauté Pets Genius et les consommateurs référencés peuvent recevoir les produits gratuitement afin de les tester. A la suite de ces tests, une note est attribuée, ainsi que des commentaires et avis, sur la base d’un questionnaire administré et certifié par la plateforme.

Le Label Pets Genius : le seul label validé exclusivement par les consommateurs.

Pour aller plus loin, la plateforme propose également un label. Chaque année, Pets Genius récompense les initiatives les plus remarquables de l’année parmi les produits labellisés par leur communauté.

Ce label permet de valoriser le savoir-faire d’une marque/entreprise avec l’aide des consommateurs qui votent pour la meilleure référence du marché.


Petsgenius, la solution pour recruter de nouveaux consommateurs.

Name: Erhvervsnetværk Morgenfruerne
Description:
Erhvervsnetværket Morgenfruerne er et af Danmarks største netværk for kvindelige ejerledere. Vores formål er at inspirere kvindelige ejerlederes personlige lederskab og styrke medlemmernes netværk. Vi repræsenterer store og små virksomheder indenfor flere forskellige brancher.

Medlemmerne støtter og udvikler både hinanden og vores virksomheder. Alle har hånden på kogepladen hver dag og har stor fornøjelse af at mødes med andre, der ved, hvad det vil sige at drive egen virksomhed. Rollemodeller som man bliver inspireret af gennem sparring og dialog om ledelse og forretningsudvikling. 

Morgenfruerne er et udviklende fællesskab i vækst. 

Morgenfruerne startede i 2002. Ni kvindelige ejerledere deltog i det første møde med det formål at etablere et erhvervsnetværk for kvinder, hvor deltagerne kunne få ny viden, inspiration, lyst og mod til at arbejde med udfordringerne i deres virksomheder.

I 2022 fejrede vi 20 års jubilæum. I dag er der omkring 80 virksomheder med i Erhvervsnetværket Morgenfruerne, der drives som en forening. 

Der er plads til endnu flere. Du skal hverken indstilles eller bedømmes for at blive medlem. Eneste optagelseskrav er, at du er kvindelig ejerleder - enten indehaver eller medindehaver af en virksomhed.

Tag kontakt til vores formand Kirsten Kjellberg hvis du er interesseret i at vide mere

Kirsten Kjellberg 
LEDERIET

Tlf. +45 2323 4737

Name: The Hope Economy
Description:
Acreditamos que o futuro se constrói com coragem, propósito e ação.

Vivemos um tempo de urgência. De um lado, crises sociais e ambientais que se aprofundam. De outro, pessoas brilhantes, movidas por soluções reais, transformando comunidades, territórios e sistemas. O que falta não é ideia. Falta ponte. Falta acesso. Falta fluidez entre o capital, os mercados e quem já faz a diferença.

A Hope Economy nasce desse vazio — e dessa esperança ativa.

Não somos caridade. Não somos ativismo partidário. Somos utopia.

Somos um novo modelo de prosperidade, onde lucro é consequência, não fim.

Acreditamos que inovação social, empreendedorismo e impacto positivo não apenas podem — devem — caminhar juntos. Empresas, governos, investidores, comunidades, cientistas e criadores: todos têm um papel nessa engrenagem viva.

A Hope Economy é um movimento. É um ecossistema. É um mercado.
É onde capital encontra propósito,
onde negócios resolvem problemas reais,
onde impacto vira valor — e valor vira transformação.

Não estamos construindo um novo lado. Estamos construindo uma nova lógica.

A lógica da colaboração.
Da regeneração.
Do crescimento enraizado no bem comum.

Empoderamos quem já está fazendo. Aceleramos quem precisa de estrutura.
Conectamos inovação a financiamento. Conectamos soluções a oportunidades.

Não vendemos promessas. Entregamos futuro.

Name: Chall
Description:
Chall started with a simple idea: that challenges bring people together.
But like every meaningful startup journey, our story has evolved, shaped by research, user insights, and the real needs of young athletes and their communities.
After years of competing at the highest level as an Olympian and NCAA Champion, founder Leif Kristian Nestvold-Haugen understood how learning, mastery, and play drive long-term development. Through countless conversations with athletes, parents, coaches, and clubs, one insight became impossible to ignore:
most of a young athlete’s development happens outside organized practice, yet few tools support that crucial space.
This understanding led to a major strategic pivot in the fall of 2025.
What began as a platform for digital competitions has transformed into something far more impactful:
a learning companion designed to help kids and youth grow through structured challenges, playful repetition, and meaningful motivation.
Since making this shift, the response from the sports community has been clear and encouraging. Coaches, clubs, and grassroots organizations all tell us the same thing:
“This is exactly what we’ve been missing.”
Today, Chall is building what we call the homework of sports — a simple, motivating way for children and young athletes to learn, explore, and develop skills outside of formal training. A place where coaches assign weekly “challs,” and kids stay engaged through play, mastery, and self-driven progress.
We’re early in this journey, but the direction is strong — and so are the signals from the field.
The future of grassroots sports lies in empowering kids and youth to learn better, play more, and build lasting motivation beyond the limits of organized training.
And that’s the future Chall is building.
One challenge at a time.
