Name: Metropolregion Ost Berlin-Brandenburg
Description:
Die „Metropolregion Ost Berlin-Brandenburg“ ist eine der spannendsten Regionen im Raum Berlin-Brandenburg. Die Region erstreckt sich von dem aufstrebenden Bezirk Marzahn-Hellersdorf in Berlin über die Nachbargemeinden in Märkisch-Oderland, Barnim und Oder-Spree bis nach Strausberg und weiter ins östliche Brandenburg. In der Region leben etwa 500.000 Menschen – alleine in den Umlandgemeinden von Marzahn-Hellersdorf sind es etwa 150.000 Einwohnerinnen und Einwohner.
 
Innerhalb der Metropolregion-Ost gibt es zahlreiche Gewerbegebiete, die sich in guter Nachbarschaft zum Zukunftsort CleanTech Marzahn und dem neuen Europa-Standort von Tesla befinden. Hier verlaufen exzellente Verkehrsanbindungen sowohl an die deutsche Hauptstadt als auch nach Osteuropa. Darüber hinaus kennzeichnen helle und grüne Wohn- und Siedlungsgebiete, vielseitige Naherholungsziele sowie eine gut entwickelte Infrastruktur die Region. Diese Qualitäten werden von Bewohnerinnen und Bewohner, Besucherinnen und Besucher sowie von Unternehmen gleichermaßen genutzt und geschätzt.
 
Aufgabe des Regionalmanagements ist die Positionierung der Region als attraktiven Wirtschaftsstandort und sehenswertes Tourismusziel. Die Grenzen zwischen der Großstadt Berlin und den östlichen Umlandgemeinden werden kaum noch wahrgenommen, längst ist ein gemeinsamer Wirtschaftsraum entstanden.
 
 
 
Beim Regionalmanagement handelt es sich um ein Projekt. Dieses wird im Rahmen der Gemeinschaftsaufgabe „Verbesserung der regionalen Wirtschaftsstruktur” (GRW) mit Bundesmitteln und Mitteln des Landes Berlin gefördert. Es wird kofinanziert durch die Bezirksverwaltung von Marzahn-Hellersdorf, den Landkreis Märkisch Oderland sowie die Städte Altlandsberg und Strausberg und die Gemeinden Ahrensfelde, Fredersdorf-Vogelsdorf, Hoppegarten, Neuenhagen bei Berlin, Petershagen/Eggersdorf und Schöneiche bei Berlin.

Combattre les réseaux sociaux actuels, c’est avant tout combattre ce qu’ils ont déposé en nous. La soif de l’immédiateté. Le panurgisme. Le conformisme. La soumission à leurs codes de plus en plus mortifères. Le scroll zombifiant. C’est combattre une dépendance. Avoir la force d’emprunter un autre chemin, qui nous semblera au départ accidenté, pentu, insaisissable. Et qui aura pourtant le visage d’une renaissance. 

Imaginez un anti-réseau social…
Temps long. 
Sans algorithme.
Sans fil d'actualité subi. 
Sans « vanity metrics ».
Sans pub.
Basé sur le modèle éditorial de la série. 
Avec des écrits à l’espérance de vie infinie. 
L’édition de revues papier pour leur donner encore plus d’importance. 
Un lieu qui préserve notre attention et notre esprit. 

Cet anti-réseau social existe et s’appelle JIRI. 

Rejoignez-nous !

Name: International Nexus of Ambition Community
Description:
Ontdek hoe ook jij jouw ondernemersdroom in het buitenland kunt verwezenlijken! 

In 2021, tijdens mijn soloreis naar de Dominicaanse Republiek, voelde ik dat mijn businessmodel een nieuwe richting moest inslaan. Wat ik oorspronkelijk voor ogen had, werd sneller werkelijkheid dan ik had verwacht, maar mijn werkdruk werd onhoudbaar.

Het idee om het hele jaar hard te moeten werken om slechts enkele weken per jaar buiten Europa op vakantie te kunnen gaan en daarna meteen weer overwerkt te zijn na een week? Nee, dat paste niet bij mijn visie als ondernemer.

Vanaf najaar 2023 zal ik werken vanuit Nicaragua en enkele maanden per jaar vanuit België. Deze combi stelt me in staat om te genieten van het beste van beide werelden, terwijl ik mijn ondernemersdroom nastreef.

Maar ik wil niet alleen mijn eigen succes vieren. Zo ontstond mijn grotere missie: andere ondernemers ondersteunen die, net als ik, de stap naar het buitenland zetten.  

Daarom nodig ik je uit om deel te worden van de 𝗜𝗡𝗔 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘆 - wat staat voor 𝗜nternational 𝗡exus of 𝗔mbition.

In de INA community nodig ik experten & ervaringsdeskundigen uit die jou concrete tips en informatie geven, zodat jij samen met andere ondernemers aan een solide basis kan bouwen voor jouw ondernemersavontuur in het buitenland.

Samen met mijn teamleden die deze stappen hebben gezet en nu wonen en werken in Costa Rica en Spanje, kan ik niet meer wachten om mijn ervaringen te delen met jou en je te inspireren om ook jouw buitenlandse dromen waar te maken. In de INA community vind je gelijkgestemde mensen en een schat aan expertise, allemaal gericht op het helpen van jou om deze stap te zetten.  

𝗩𝗼𝗹𝗴 𝗺𝗶𝗷𝗻 𝗿𝗲𝗶𝘀 𝗲𝗻 𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗱𝗲𝗸 𝗵𝗼𝗲 𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗷𝗶𝗷 𝗷𝗼𝘂𝘄 𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗱𝗿𝗼𝗼𝗺 𝗶𝗻 𝗵𝗲𝘁 𝗯𝘂𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗸𝘂𝗻𝘁 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘄𝗲𝘇𝗲𝗻𝗹𝗶𝗷𝗸𝗲𝗻!

Description:
Notre entreprise, Sigma labs, a pour ambition de révolutionner le monde des réseaux sociaux en offrant une plateforme décentralisée et communautaire où les utilisateurs ont le contrôle total de leurs données et de leur expérience numérique. Nous sommes une Smart Up, plus humaine et sensée que les start-ups traditionnelles, car nous mettons la communauté au centre de notre stratégie.

Nous lançons notre SAFT en juin et notre ICO en septembre pour financer le développement de notre réseau social immersif et innovant, qui permet aux utilisateurs de posséder des biens virtuels, de proposer des solutions et d'être maîtres de leurs données. Notre objectif est de créer une plateforme qui offre une expérience utilisateur inégalée tout en respectant la vie privée et la sécurité des utilisateurs.

Nous sommes passionnés par l'idée de redonner le pouvoir aux utilisateurs et de créer une plateforme qui réponde à leurs besoins et à leurs aspirations. Nous avons une vision claire de l'avenir et sommes convaincus que notre approche décentralisée est la solution pour résoudre les problèmes de centralisation, de censure et de manipulation des données qui affectent les réseaux sociaux traditionnels.

En rejoignant notre communauté, vous devenez un membre actif et engagé dans le développement de notre plateforme. Vous pouvez participer aux décisions stratégiques, proposer des idées et des solutions, et contribuer à la construction d'un avenir numérique plus juste et équitable.

Nous sommes fiers de notre engagement envers la transparence, l'éthique et la responsabilité sociale, et nous sommes impatients de partager notre vision avec vous. Rejoignez-nous dès maintenant et découvrez comment notre plateforme peut changer votre expérience des réseaux sociaux pour toujours.

At synchrony, we believe every person deserves to feel confident, capable, and connected. 

Our first-of-its-kind social app Synchrony is redefining social connection for neurodivergent adults. Using AI-driven conversation support, real-time coaching, and personalized feedback, Synchrony helps build confidence in every interaction. But we’re more than just a tool — we’re a community. Synchrony creates a space for authentic friendships, meaningful belonging, and social growth.

Synchrony offers a secure, supportive platform that leverages AI chat-assist tools to empower members as they form and maintain new, independent connections. Our mission is to help more people experience the joy of relationships, belonging, and social independence. 

Key Features:

Reference Check and Verification: To ensure our community remains authentic and safe, members are required to be verified by a self-appointed reference (family member, co-worker, medical provider, etc). 

Interest-Based Matching: Similar to other social apps, members create a profile including selective personal information, their interests, hobbies, and passions. They are then matched with other members (sync-mates) with common interests.

AI Chat-Assist Tools: Knowing what to say next can be particularly challenging. That’s why synchrony seamlessly integrates AI tools to keep the conversation flowing.

We’re looking to partner with parents, advocates, and organizations to endorse synchrony and spread the word. Reach out to us to start a conversation. 

This isn’t just an app. This is synchrony.

Name: Greensnips
Description:
Greensnips ist als Start-Up aus der simplen Idee entstanden:

Social-Media-Aktivitäten einen nachhaltigen Sinn zu geben und Unternehmen eine Plattform zu bieten, das nachhaltige Engagement für jeden sicht- und greifbarer zu machen.

Wie soll das funktionieren?

User erstellen Snips und generieren auf der Plattform durch erhaltene Likes von anderen Usern Punkte. 
Diese Punkte können unsere User in nachhaltige Projekte investieren, welche von Unternehmen über unsere Plattform veröffentlicht werden. 
Sobald ein Projekt die zuvor festgelegte Anzahl an Punkten erreicht hat, wird dieses vom Unternehmen umgesetzt. 
Somit haben unsere User die Möglichkeit in ihrem Alltag & ganz nebenbei Gutes zu tun und Umweltprojekte mitzugestalten und Unternehmen bekommen eine größere Reichweite was das eigene Engagement im Bereich der Nachhaltigkeit angeht. 

Du willst mitmachen? Dann lade dir die App runter und erstelle deinen ersten Snip!
Du möchtest dein Projekt als Unternehmen über unsere Plattform präsentieren? Dann sende uns gerne eine Email an:

Info@greensnips.com

Wir freuen uns darauf, die Welt mit euch gemeinsam ein Stück besser zu machen!

Greensnips - klebst du noch fest oder machst du schon was?

Name: CafeSocial.io
Description:
Many people are struggling to build and maintain both personal and professional relationships in today's fast-paced society, despite having more opportunities to connect with others than ever before. Over time, this difficulty can result in feelings of loneliness and isolation and have serious impacts on one's mental and physical health.

The root causes of this struggle and loneliness are complex. Increased use of technology and social media has led to a decrease in face-to-face interactions, while busy lifestyles and longer work hours make it difficult for people to find time for socializing and building professional networks. The decline in local community and social connections, as well as increased mobility and geographic separation from friends and family, also contribute to this challenge.

At CafeSocial.io, we believe that everyone deserves to have close and supportive relationships, both personal and professional. That's why we're dedicated to building tools and communities where people can connect on a deeper level and form lasting connections. Whether you're looking for new friends, seeking to strengthen existing ones, or building your professional network, our goal is to create a safe and supportive environment where you can thrive.

We believe that by investing in fighting loneliness and building these communities, we can help to improve the lives of people everywhere and create a more connected and supportive world. So if you're looking for a place where you can connect with others, build meaningful relationships, and grow both personally and professionally, we invite you to join our waitlist today.

Name: BNI Straen
Description:
Liker du samarbeid og personlig utvikling, og tror du i tillegg på ideen om at den som gir, også får? Da er du noe for oss i BNI, og vi er noe for deg. Vi tilbyr en strukturert, målbar og energigivende måte å drive forretninger på.

Hvorfor BNI?

Vil du være med i en gruppe som aktivt anbefaler deg for flere forretninger? BNIs grunnidé bygger på tanken om Givers Gain – den som gir, får noe igjen – og det preger hele konseptet vårt. 

Vi utdanner deg i hvordan du skaper forretningsmuligheter ved å drive aktivt nettverksarbeid i gruppen: For at du så fort som mulig skal kunne begynne å gi og få forretningsmuligheter, gir vi deg utdanning i hvordan du styrker din personlige merkevare og tydeliggjør din kundenytte, slik at kollegene i gruppen vil anbefale deg.

Vi fokuserer på å bygge opp tiltro og skape tillit til hverandre: Når vi i gruppen blir kjent med deg og du med oss, forstår vi din kundenytte og hvilke kunder du søker, og kan aktivt anbefale deg videre i vårt profesjonelle og personlige nettverk.

Du kommer til å ha eksklusivitet innenfor ditt yrkesområde: Gruppen er bygd opp av personer fra ulike bransjer og fra store og små virksomheter, noe som skaper et bredt og sterkt team.

Hva får du som blir med i BNI?

- Partnerskap i en gruppe
- Utdanning i referansemarkedsføring / hvordan du skaper forretningsmuligheter ved hjelp av nettverksbygging
- Konkrete verktøy for forretningsnettverksbygging
- Eksklusivitet innenfor ditt yrkesområde i gruppen
- Et strukturert og velprøvd konsept 
- Personlige møter for å skape langsiktige relasjoner
- Kontinuerlig oppfølging og statistikk over resultatet ditt i et globalt forretningssystem
- En mentor den første tiden i BNI
- En BNI-konsulent som arbeider sammen med og støtter gruppen

Den beste måten å forstå hvordan BNI fungerer på, er å komme på et møte - BNI Straen møtes hver fredag 06:45 på Scandic Royal Stavanger. Ta kontakt med en av partnerere for å være med som gjest.

Vi ønsker at skabe nye forbindelser mellem kvinder i Thy, og øge vores kendskab til lokale ressourcer og kompetencer.
 
Vi skaber rum til at tale om oplevelser, der knytter sig til det at være kvinde i vores samfund, og vi giver inspiration og viden til karriere- og livsdrømme, økonomi, investering, og personlig og arbejdsrelateret udvikling.
 
Hvorfor:
Vi drømmer om et samfund med bæredygtigt arbejdsliv, mere livsglæde, mindre stress og ligestilling, og vi tror på at fællesskabet kan give os handlekraft til at ændre de rammer, kulturer og normer, der ikke er gode for os.
I Thy er vi omgivet af natur og hav, og der er langt til storbyerne. Det giver os både særlige muligheder, men også udfordringer og begrænsninger, som lægger op til andre refleksioner og samtaler, end dem man har i byen.

Helene Elisabeth Dam Jørgensen. Sociolog og forandringsaktivist
Maja Straarup Kjær. Sygeplejerske og Skribent.

Name: WokenWine (former page)
Description:
Founded by prestigious producers and a team of blockchain experts, the WokenWine platform reconciles the interests of producers, consumers and professionals by applying the founding principle of Web 3: giving back to lovers of wine the control of their ecosystem, in order to make it more virtuous.

WokenWine is a digital platform developed with producers of great wines, in which everyone can retrieve their NFT, an immutable digital property certificate linked to a physical bottle. Thus, our members will be able to sell and buy great wines in complete safety and transparency, with the greatest respect for the product and the work of producers and professionals of the wine sector. 

The founding values of the platform are Respect and Transparency: 
- Respect for wine by promoting optimal storage conditions for ageing. 
- Respect for the talent and work of the producer who assumes all the risks associated with production, protecting his intellectual property and his brand. 
- Respect for the work of the professional, thanks to which the Great Wines are enhanced and preserved in optimal conditions, helping them to stand out with the "WokenWine Transparency" label. 
- Respect for the consumer, potential victim of the sale of degraded or counterfeit wines, by providing transparency and security on the history of each bottle thanks to Blockchain and NFT technologies.

- Connection – to each other, our purpose, and the bigger picture
- Growth – steady, values-aligned, and human

- Belonging – you don’t have to fit in to be part of something meaningful

Founded by Clare, a business coach for purpose-driven entrepreneurs, Conscious Entrepreneurs was born out of a belief that if you're not okay, neither is your business. She combines practical support with a deep understanding of the emotional load of running a conscious business.

We’re building local hubs, peer mentorship, mental health toolkits, and bigger ways to connect and give back.

If you're ready to grow your business in a way that feels good—this is your space.

Description: SIXFOLD is a collaborative initiative that unites partners from the 'Smart Sensors 4 Agri-food' Partnership and a network of Living Labs across Europe, with the aim of driving innovation in the agri-food sector. Through a dynamic, regionally embedded ecosystem, the initiative fosters experimentation and collaboration, addressing barriers to innovation by involving societal stakeholders, regulators, and experts. This approach ensures a comprehensive and inclusive transition towards sustainable food systems across Europe.

Name: YouRban
Description:
Europe is expected to generate almost 700,000 tonnes of reinforced polymer waste in 2025 and YouRban aims to address this challenge in an innovative and participatory manner. The project aims to create an active and aware urban community to find creative solutions for recycling and upcycling, in particular for reinforced polymers. By promoting the values of sustainability and inclusiveness and the knowledge of circular economy processes, the project will activate an urban ecosystem involving citizens, artists, designers, architects and small-scale producers (e.g., FabLabs and artisans' workshops or Urban Factories). 

The project is developed around two pillars: a pilot project in Milan and a pilot project in Barcelona. YouRban is based on an innovative research strategy which draws on the European Union's Green Deal and New European Bauhaus initiatives, promoting workshop and training activities for artists and designers. 

The beating heart of the project is its truck, a mobile laboratory conceived as a true travelling workshop. This plant houses recycling and reprocessing technologies for end-of-life composite materials. The truck is not just a production tool, as it is also a powerful dissemination medium designed to promote the new values of the circular economy through exhibitions, artistic events and participatory activities related to the circular economy. The involvement of YouRban's partners from Italy, Spain, Lithuania and Austria ensures specialised expertise and training. 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe Framework Programme HORIZON-CL4-2023-HUMAN-01

La città è situata sulle isole costiere di Zealand e Amager e si collega alla città svedese di Malmo attraverso un ponte. Nel suo bellissimo centro storico, Indre By, si trova un affascinante quartiere rococò del XVIII secolo, sede del palazzo Amalienborg, residenza della famiglia reale.
Se ti stai per trasferire o anche se sei solo di passaggio e vuoi entrare in contatto con la community locale, contatta il Chapter Leader.

Follow us here to stay up to date on news and upcoming events, and for any inquiries contact us at: copenhagen@bocconialumni.it

Vinylly is an inclusive dating app that matches people based  on music compatibility. At Vinylly, we believe (and science has proven) that the music we love and the way we listen to it is a powerful window into who we are – connecting us on a deeper level and providing us with a solid foundation to develop and maintain lasting relationships. 

Vinylly matches users through a proprietary music profile generator or if a user chooses, an analysis of their streaming history. These combined with a few questions about the role music plays in their lives, enables Vinylly’s algorithm to provide “high volume” matches. Users have the ability to create and edit their playlists and to browse matches and press “play” when they want to connect, as well as chat and get concert tickets for first dates all without having to leave the app. 

Available now on iOS and Android in US, UK, Canada and India (Android), Vinylly was recently recognized by Mashable as one of the “8 dating apps that are bucking against Tinder’s model.” To learn more, visit www.vinyllyapp.com.

Name: FREELENCING AGENCY
Description:
Freelancing refers to the act of working independently and offering services to clients on a project-by-project basis, rather than being employed by a company or organization. Freelancers typically work remotely and have the flexibility to choose their own projects, clients, and hours of work.

Freelancing can be done in a variety of fields, such as writing, graphic design, programming, web development, photography, social media management, and more. It allows individuals to use their skills and expertise to earn a living while also enjoying the freedom and autonomy of working for themselves.

One of the benefits of freelancing is the ability to work from anywhere in the world, as long as there is an internet connection. Freelancers can also often set their own rates, negotiate their own contracts, and choose the projects they work on.

However, freelancing also comes with challenges, such as the need to find clients and manage multiple projects at once. Freelancers must also handle their own finances, including invoicing and taxes.

Overall, freelancing can be a rewarding and flexible career option for those with the right skills and mindset. It requires discipline, self-motivation, and the ability to manage time effectively in order to be successful.

Name: Fabric
Description:
Stitching society together, one thread at a time.

In a world that has never been more connected, we are starving for authentic human connection. So far, big tech has abused our reward systems, manipulating society to crave and believe in these superficial connections. This abuse has led to social isolation, boredom, depression, and a decreased attention span.

At Fabric, our mission is to revitalize authentic human connection by constructing digital bridges that lead to real-world experiences. We're not just building an app; we're crafting a new way of interacting with our communities and each other. Through our platform, we aim to inspire people to venture beyond their screens and turn online interactions into face-to-face adventures.

At Fabric, we envision a world where technology is a tool for fostering authentic human connection, not replacing it. A world where your digital network translates into a rich, vibrant, real-life community. A world where "social media" isn't a passive scroll, but an active invitation to explore, experience, and engage with the world around you.

Our community blends structured business support with authentic connection. Through weekly gatherings, focused Nooks, educational workshops, and social meetups, members get a space to talk through their challenges, share wins, exchange warm introductions, and learn from one another. Every event is included in membership, and members can attend as often or as little as they choose.

At its core, Nooks and Socials exists to remove the isolation that many business owners feel. We create an environment where people feel supported, understood, and equipped with the resources they need to grow professionally and personally. It’s a comfortable place to build meaningful relationships, elevate your business, and surround yourself with people who genuinely want to see you succeed.

The club represents the Department of Food and Nutrition and Food Technology and serves as a platform where scientific knowledge meets everyday practices. Our mission is to bridge the gap between what we know and what we do, particularly in the context of dietary habits and nutritional intake among college-going female students.

Through competitions, discussions, expert sessions, workshops, and community outreach, we strive to make learning about nutrition engaging, evidence-based, and impactful.

NutriVigyaan also actively aligns with Government of India’s initiatives such as Poshan Maah and Poshan Pakhwada by conducting awareness drives, campaigns, and the dissemination of right information.

 Together, we aim to inspire healthier choices, empower young minds, and contribute to building a nutrition-conscious society.
